		-- Logic helpers
		local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
		local function getEmitters()
			local seen, list = {}, {}
			for _, obj in pairs(selection:Get()) do
				if obj == game.Workspace or obj == game then continue end
				if obj:IsA("ParticleEmitter") and not seen[obj] and not ctx.isInsideEmitter(obj) then seen[obj]=true; table.insert(list, obj) end
				-- full walk: a deeply-nested emitter must still fire when you Emit
				for _, d in ipairs(obj:GetDescendants()) do
					if d:IsA("ParticleEmitter") and not seen[d] and not ctx.isInsideEmitter(d) then seen[d]=true; table.insert(list, d) end
				end
			end
			return list
		end
		-- SineVFX 3D emitters selected (tagged parts). They take the same Emit Count/Delay/
		-- Duration attributes as real emitters; the Emit button bursts them via the runtime.
		local EmitterRuntime = require(script.Parent.Parent.Modules.EmitterRuntime)
		local TrailRuntime   = require(script.Parent.Parent.Modules.EmitterRuntime).Trail
		local BeamRuntime    = require(script.Parent.Parent.Modules.EmitterRuntime).Beam
		local function get3D() return (ctx.getEmitters and ctx.getEmitters()) or {} end
		-- Transformed trails. A SEPARATE list from get3D() rather than folded into it: the e3d paths
		-- read Enabled off the Appearance Configuration, but a transformed trail keeps its Enabled in
		-- Emission, and EmitterRuntime.burst only takes BaseParts. Same shape, different plumbing.
		local function getTrailEms()
			local out = {}
			-- Includes ribbons nested in a RenderPart. Their Count/Delay/Duration are read PER
			-- PARTICLE by EmitterRuntime (each particle's own copy of the ribbon stacks/waits/lasts),
			-- so the rows mean something even though the ribbon never emits loose copies itself.
			for _, e in ipairs((ctx.getTrails3D and ctx.getTrails3D()) or {}) do out[#out+1] = e end
			for _, e in ipairs((ctx.getBeams3D and ctx.getBeams3D())  or {}) do out[#out+1] = e end
			return out
		end
		-- Is any transformed trail emitting? Its continuous switch is Emission > Emitting, so every
		-- place that asks "is the loop on" has to check it too, or the toggle flips itself off while
		-- a trail is still emitting.
		local function anyTrailEmitting(list)
			for _, e in pairs(list or getTrailEms()) do
				local pf = e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local em = pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Emission")
				if em and em:GetAttribute("Emitting") == true then return true end
			end
			return false
		end
		-- Root-based lookup for the Repeat cycle, which snapshots `cachedRoots` at start
		-- instead of re-reading live selection (so it keeps working if selection changes).
		local function find3D(root)
			local CS = game:GetService("CollectionService")
			local list = {}
			if root:IsA("BasePart") and CS:HasTag(root, "SineVFX3D") then table.insert(list, root) end
			for _, d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
				if d:IsA("BasePart") and CS:HasTag(d, "SineVFX3D") then table.insert(list, d) end
			end
			return list
		end
		-- One repeat-cycle for a 3D emitter: delay, burst, then wait for the burst duration
		-- plus its own particle Lifetime so the next cycle doesn't start mid-flight.
		local function run3D(part, runningCheck)
			if not part or not part.Parent then return end
			local delay = part:GetAttribute("EmitDelay") or 0
			local elDelay=0
			while true do
				if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then return end
				if elDelay>=math.max(0,delay) then break end
				elDelay+=task.wait(0.05)
			end
			if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then return end
			if not part.Parent then return end
			local count = part:GetAttribute("EmitCount") or 0
			local dur   = part:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0
			local pf = part:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app = pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Appearance")
			-- Mirror runEmit: Enabled brackets the Duration window, the manual burst is instant.
			if dur > 0 and app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", true) end
			if count > 0 then EmitterRuntime.burst(part, count) end
			if ctx.pcRecordEmit then pcall(ctx.pcRecordEmit, part, count) end
			local emis = pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Emission")
			local life = (emis and emis:GetAttribute("Lifetime")) or 1
			if typeof(life)=="NumberRange" then life = life.Max end     -- 3D emitter Lifetime is a range now
			if typeof(life)~="number" then life = 1 end
			local waitFor = math.max(0,dur) + math.max(0,life)
			local elDur=0
			while true do
				if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then
					if dur > 0 and part.Parent and app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", false) end
					return
				end
				if elDur>=waitFor then break end
				elDur+=task.wait(0.05)
			end
			if dur > 0 and part.Parent and app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", false) end
		end
		local function getToggleables()
			-- Returns Beams, Trails, Lights that support .Enabled
			local seen, list = {}, {}
			local classes = {"Beam","Trail","Light"}
			for _, obj in pairs(selection:Get()) do
				if obj==game or obj==workspace then continue end
				local function chk(inst)
					if seen[inst] then return end; seen[inst]=true
					if ctx.isInsideEmitter(inst) then return end
					-- A TRANSFORMED trail is not a toggleable. Its .Enabled is deliberately false:
					-- it is a template that TrailRuntime clones, and toggling it here would make the
					-- source ribbon render on top of the emitted ones. Its own Enabled attribute
					-- (Properties > Appearance) is the real switch.
					local _cs = game:GetService("CollectionService")
					if _cs:HasTag(inst, "SineVFXTransformedTrail") or _cs:HasTag(inst, "SineVFXTransformedBeam") then return end
					for _,cls in ipairs(classes) do
						if inst:IsA(cls) then table.insert(list,inst); break end
					end
				end
				chk(obj)
				for _,d in ipairs(obj:GetDescendants()) do chk(d) end
			end
			return list
		end
		local function getSounds()
			local seen, list = {}, {}
			for _, obj in pairs(selection:Get()) do
				if obj == game.Workspace or obj == game then continue end
				if obj:IsA("Sound") and not seen[obj] and not ctx.isInsideEmitter(obj) then seen[obj]=true; table.insert(list, obj) end
				for _, d in ipairs(obj:GetDescendants()) do
					if d:IsA("Sound") and not seen[d] and not ctx.isInsideEmitter(d) then seen[d]=true; table.insert(list, d) end
				end
			end
			return list
		end
		local function groupValue(targets, attr)
			local val, mixed, init = nil, false, false
			for _, t in pairs(targets) do
				local v = t:GetAttribute(attr) or 0
				if not init then val=v; init=true
				elseif val~=v then mixed=true; break end
			end
			return val, mixed
		end
		local function applyAttr(attr, value)
			local targets = {}
			for _, em in pairs(getEmitters())    do table.insert(targets, em) end
			for _, e  in pairs(get3D())          do table.insert(targets, e) end
			-- Transformed Trails/Beams too. This list was missing them, so typing a Count/Delay/
			-- Duration for one wrote the attribute to NOTHING while the box happily showed the
			-- value back (groupValue does include them) -- EmitCount stayed nil, count came out 0,
			-- and the Emit button never called burst. That is the whole "transformed ribbons don't
			-- emit" bug: the runtime was fine, the value never reached the instance.
			for _, e  in pairs(getTrailEms())    do table.insert(targets, e) end
			if attr ~= "EmitCount" then
				for _, s in pairs(getSounds())      do table.insert(targets, s) end
				for _, t in pairs(getToggleables()) do table.insert(targets, t) end
			end
			for _, t in pairs(targets) do
				if value == 0 then t:SetAttribute(attr, nil) else t:SetAttribute(attr, value) end
			end
		end
		local function beginHistory(label)
			if historyInProgress then return end
			historyLabel = label or "SineVFX Change"
			CHS:SetWaypoint(historyLabel .. " Before"); historyInProgress = true
		end
		local function endHistory()
			if not historyInProgress then return end
			CHS:SetWaypoint(historyLabel .. " After"); historyInProgress = false
		end
		local applySquelch = false  -- true while SelectionChanged force-releases a box
		local function resetTypingState()
			isTyping.Emit=false; isTyping.Delay=false; isTyping.Duration=false
			delayToken+=1; slidingActive=false; endHistory()
		end
		local function round2(n) return math.floor(n*100+0.5)/100 end
		local function formatClean(n) return tostring(math.floor(n*100+0.5)/100) end

		local function setSliderT(t)
			t = math.clamp(t, 0, 1)
			local mn  = getSliderMin()
			local mx  = getSliderMax()
			local raw = mn + t*(mx-mn)
			local val = (activeAttr=="EmitCount") and math.round(raw) or round2(raw)
			tw(floatSl.fill, { Size = UDim2.new(t,0,1,0) }, DRAG_TI)
			tw(floatSl.knob, { Position = UDim2.new(t,0,0.5,0) }, DRAG_TI)
			if activeBox  then activeBox.Text = (activeAttr=="EmitCount") and tostring(val) or formatClean(val) end
			if activeAttr then applyAttr(activeAttr, val) end
		end
		local function openSlider(cfg)
			sliderMin=cfg.min; sliderMax=cfg.max; activeBox=cfg.box; activeAttr=cfg.attr
			-- Read the colour from Theme.C at OPEN time. Storing a Color3 in fieldConfig froze a copy
			-- at mount: recolorGui repaints the fill on a theme change, but reopening the slider
			-- painted the old accent straight back over it.
			local col = C[cfg.colorKey or "accent"] or C.accent
			floatSl.fill.BackgroundColor3=col;
			floatSl.knob.BackgroundColor3=col
			-- Set min/max boxes only if they weren't manually changed (a saved
			-- custom range must survive reopening the slider)
			if plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_EmitSlMin") == nil then floatMinBox.Text = tostring(cfg.min) end
			if plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_EmitSlMax") == nil then floatMaxBox.Text = tostring(cfg.max) end
			local mn = getSliderMin(); local mx = getSliderMax()
			local v = tonumber(cfg.box.Text) or mn
			local t = math.clamp((v-mn)/math.max(mx-mn,1),0,1)
			floatSl.fill.Size=UDim2.new(t,0,1,0); floatSl.knob.Position=UDim2.new(t,0,0.5,0)
			if openRow==cfg.row then return end
			openRow=cfg.row
			positionFloatPanel(cfg.row)
			floatPanel.Size = UDim2.new(0, FLOAT_W, 0, FLOAT_H)
			floatPanel.Visible = true
		end
		local function closeSlider(force)
			if not openRow then return end
			if editingRange and not force then return end
			if activeBox then pcall(function() activeBox:ReleaseFocus() end) end
			floatPanel.Visible = false
			openRow=nil; activeBox=nil; activeAttr=nil
		end
		local function setContentMode(mode)
			if contentMode==mode then return end
			if mode~="full" and openRow==emitRow then closeSlider(true) end
			if mode=="none" then closeSlider(true) end
			contentMode=mode
			emitRow.Visible=(mode=="full"); delayRow.Visible=(mode~="none")
			durationRow.Visible=(mode~="none")
			if mode=="full"       then BASE_H=WIN_H
			elseif mode=="sounds" then BASE_H=WIN_H-ROW_H-5
			else BASE_H=TOPBAR_H+BTN_H+10 end
			currentTargetHeight=BASE_H
			tw(main, { Size=UDim2.new(0,main.Size.X.Offset,0,currentTargetHeight) })
			cSize.h=currentTargetHeight
		end

		-- Sound loop helpers
		local function stopLoopCloneForSound(snd)
			local clone=loopedSoundClones[snd]
			if clone then pcall(function() clone:Stop(); clone:Destroy() end); loopedSoundClones[snd]=nil end
			local conn=soundCloneConns[snd]
			if conn  then pcall(function() conn:Disconnect() end); soundCloneConns[snd]=nil end
		end
		local function isLoopCloneActiveForSound(snd)
			local clone=loopedSoundClones[snd]
			if not clone then return false end
			if not clone.Parent then loopedSoundClones[snd]=nil; return false end
			local playing=false; pcall(function() playing=clone.IsPlaying end)
			return clone.Looped and playing
		end
		local function anySelectedSoundCloneLooping()
			for _, snd in pairs(getSounds()) do if isLoopCloneActiveForSound(snd) then return true end end
			return false
		end
		local function stopAllLooping()
			for _, em in pairs(getEmitters()) do em.Enabled=false end
			for _, t in pairs(getToggleables()) do t.Enabled=false end
			for _, s  in pairs(getSounds())   do stopLoopCloneForSound(s) end
			for _, e in pairs(getTrailEms()) do
				local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local em=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Emission")
				if em then em:SetAttribute("Emitting", false) end
			end
			setLoopVisual(false)
		end
		local function ensureLoopCloneWatch(snd)
			if soundCloneConns[snd] then return end
			soundCloneConns[snd]=snd.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
				if snd.Parent then return end
				stopLoopCloneForSound(snd)
				if not runningRepeat then setLoopVisual(anySelectedSoundCloneLooping()) end
			end)
		end

		-- Emit/sound run logic
		local function runEmit(em, runningCheck, count, delay, duration)
			if not em or not em.Parent or not em:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then return end
			local dur=duration or em:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0
			-- Nothing to emit: no burst (Count 0) and no on-window (Duration 0). Bail rather than
			-- running the delay/duration loops to call Emit(0) -- same rule runToggleable already
			-- applies, so every emittable kind now behaves the same way.
			do
				local _c = count or em:GetAttribute("EmitCount") or 0
				if _c <= 0 and dur <= 0 then return end
			end
			suppressLoopCount += 1
			local elDelay=0; local d=delay or em:GetAttribute("EmitDelay") or 0
			while true do
				if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
				if elDelay>=math.max(0,d) then break end
				elDelay+=task.wait(0.05)
			end
			if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
			if not em.Parent then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
			if dur>0 then em.Enabled=true end
			local c=count or em:GetAttribute("EmitCount") or 0
			em:Emit(math.max(0,c))
			if ctx.pcRecordEmit then ctx.pcRecordEmit(em, math.max(0,c)) end
			local elDur=0
			while true do
				if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
				if elDur>=math.max(0,dur) then break end
				elDur+=task.wait(0.05)
			end
			if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
			if not em.Parent then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
			if dur>0 then em.Enabled=false end
			local elLife=0; local life=em.Lifetime; local maxL=(typeof(life)=="NumberRange") and life.Max or 0
			while true do
				if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
				if elLife>=(maxL+0.05) then break end
				elLife+=task.wait(0.05)
			end
			suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1)
		end
		local function runToggleable(tog, runningCheck)
			if not tog or not tog.Parent then return end
			local delay    = tog:GetAttribute("EmitDelay")    or 0
			local duration = tog:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0
			-- Trails/Beams/Lights with no duration have no meaningful burst: skip
			-- entirely (single Emit and Repeat) rather than flashing a fallback.
			if duration <= 0 then return end
			-- wait delay
			local el = 0
			while el < math.max(0, delay) do
				if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then return end
				el += task.wait(0.05)
			end
			if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then return end
			if not tog.Parent then return end
			tog.Enabled = true
			local ed = 0
			while ed < duration do
				if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then tog.Enabled = false; return end
				ed += task.wait(0.05)
			end
			if not tog.Parent then return end
			tog.Enabled = false
		end
		local function runSound(snd, runningCheck, delay, duration)
			if not snd or not snd.Parent or not snd:IsA("Sound") then return end
			local dur=duration or snd:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0
			suppressLoopCount += 1
			local elDelay=0; local d=delay or snd:GetAttribute("EmitDelay") or 0
			while true do
				if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
				if elDelay>=math.max(0,d) then break end
				elDelay+=task.wait(0.05)
			end
			if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
			if not snd.Parent then suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
			local clone=snd:Clone(); clone.Parent=ctx.soundRef.widget; clone:Play()
			if dur>0 then setLoopVisual(false); clone.Looped=true end
			local playTime=(dur>0) and dur or (clone.TimeLength>0 and (clone.TimeLength/math.max(0.001,clone.PlaybackSpeed)) or 1)
			local elDur=0
			while true do
				if runningCheck and not runningCheck() then clone:Stop(); clone:Destroy(); suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
				if not snd.Parent then clone:Stop(); clone:Destroy(); suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1); return end
				if elDur>=playTime then break end
				elDur+=task.wait(0.05)
			end
			clone:Stop(); clone:Destroy(); suppressLoopCount = math.max(0, suppressLoopCount - 1)
		end

		-- Typing in Min/Max must not close the panel (see editingRange). Focus arms the guard;
		-- losing focus disarms it and then closes only if the mouse has already left the panel,
		-- because the hover-driven close that WOULD have fired was suppressed while typing.
		local function armRange()   editingRange = true end
		local function disarmRange()
			editingRange = false
			task.defer(function()
				if not editingRange and not slidingActive and not mouseOnPanel then closeSlider() end
			end)
		end
		floatMinBox.Focused:Connect(armRange)
		floatMaxBox.Focused:Connect(armRange)

		-- Min/max box changes update the slider position
		floatMinBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			disarmRange()
			local v = tonumber(floatMinBox.Text)
			if not v then floatMinBox.Text = tostring(sliderMin); return end
			sliderMin = v
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_EmitSlMin", v)
		end)
		floatMaxBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			disarmRange()
			local v = tonumber(floatMaxBox.Text)
			if not v then floatMaxBox.Text = tostring(sliderMax); return end
			sliderMax = v
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_EmitSlMax", v)
		end)

		-- Field configs (shared floatSl)
		local fieldConfig = {
			{ box=emitBox,     row=emitRow,     attr="EmitCount",    key="Emit",     min=0, max=150, colorKey="accent" },
			{ box=delayBox,    row=delayRow,    attr="EmitDelay",    key="Delay",    min=0, max=5,   colorKey="accent" },
			{ box=durationBox, row=durationRow, attr="EmitDuration", key="Duration", min=0, max=5,   colorKey="accent" },
		}
		local sliderUsedRow = nil

		-- Track whether mouse is over the float panel
		local sliderWasUsed = false
		floatPanel.MouseEnter:Connect(function() mouseOnPanel = true end)
		floatPanel.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
			mouseOnPanel = false
			if not slidingActive and sliderWasUsed then
				sliderWasUsed = false
				closeSlider()
			end
		end)

		-- Floating slider interactions
		floatSl.hitbox.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
			if not activeAttr then return end
			local cfg
			for _, c in pairs(fieldConfig) do if c.row==openRow then cfg=c; break end end
			if cfg then beginHistory("SineVFX "..cfg.attr) end
			slidingActive=true; plugin:Activate(false)
			sliderUsedRow=openRow
			sliderWasUsed=true
			local leaveWhileSliding = false
			local leaveConn = floatPanel.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
				leaveWhileSliding = true
			end)
			local function getT()
				local mp=userInputService:GetMouseLocation(); local absW=floatSl.track.AbsoluteSize.X
				return (absW<=0) and 0 or math.clamp((mp.X-floatSl.track.AbsolutePosition.X)/absW,0,1)
			end
			setSliderT(getT())
			-- Re-capture focus so the textbox stays focused while dragging
			if activeBox then task.defer(function() pcall(function() activeBox:CaptureFocus() end) end) end
			local mc=userInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement and slidingActive then setSliderT(getT()) end
			end)
			local ec; ec=userInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
				slidingActive=false; mc:Disconnect(); ec:Disconnect(); leaveConn:Disconnect(); plugin:Deactivate(); endHistory()
				if leaveWhileSliding or not mouseOnPanel then
					closeSlider()
				else
					-- Mouse still on panel after release — close when it leaves
					local leaveAfterConn
					leaveAfterConn = floatPanel.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
						leaveAfterConn:Disconnect()
						closeSlider()
					end)
				end
			end)
		end)

		for _, cfg in pairs(fieldConfig) do
			cfg.box.Focused:Connect(function()
				delayToken+=1; isTyping[cfg.key]=true
				sliderUsedRow=nil
				sliderWasUsed=false
				cfg.box:SetAttribute("LastFocusTime",tick()); openSlider(cfg)
			end)
			cfg.box.FocusLost:Connect(function()
				local tok=delayToken
				task.delay(0.15, function() if not slidingActive and delayToken==tok then isTyping[cfg.key]=false; closeSlider() end end)
				if cfg.box.Text~="..." and not applySquelch then
					local v=tonumber(cfg.box.Text)
					if v then
						if not slidingActive then beginHistory("SineVFX "..cfg.attr) end
						v=math.max(0,v); v=(cfg.attr~="EmitCount") and round2(v) or math.round(v)
						cfg.box.Text=(cfg.attr~="EmitCount") and formatClean(v) or tostring(v)
						applyAttr(cfg.attr,v)
						if not slidingActive then endHistory() end
					end
				end
			end)
			cfg.row.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
				if sliderUsedRow==cfg.row and not slidingActive and openRow==cfg.row then
					sliderUsedRow=nil; isTyping[cfg.key]=false; closeSlider()
				end
			end)
		end

		-- Emit button
		emitButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			local emitters=getEmitters(); local sounds=getSounds(); local toggleables=getToggleables()
			if #emitters==0 and #sounds==0 and #toggleables==0 and #get3D()==0 and #getTrailEms()==0 then return end
			for _, em  in pairs(emitters)    do task.spawn(function() runEmit(em,  function() return true end) end) end
			for _, snd in pairs(sounds)      do task.spawn(function() runSound(snd, function() return true end) end) end
			for _, t   in pairs(toggleables) do
				task.spawn(function()
					local dur   = t:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0
					if dur <= 0 then return end  -- Trails/Beams/Lights: no duration => nothing to emit
					local delay = t:GetAttribute("EmitDelay")    or 0
					if delay > 0 then task.wait(delay) end
					t.Enabled = true
					task.wait(dur); t.Enabled = false
				end)
			end
			for _, e in pairs(get3D()) do
				task.spawn(function()
					local delay = e:GetAttribute("EmitDelay") or 0
					if delay > 0 then task.wait(delay) end
					if not e.Parent then return end
					local dur   = e:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0
					local count = e:GetAttribute("EmitCount") or 0
					local pf = e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app = pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Appearance")
					-- Mirror runEmit: Enabled brackets the Duration window (drives continuous
					-- Rate-based emission), the manual burst is instant and independent of it.
					if dur > 0 and app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", true) end
					if count > 0 then EmitterRuntime.burst(e, count) end
					if dur > 0 then
						task.wait(dur)
						if e.Parent and app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", false) end
					end
				end)
			end
			for _, e in pairs(getTrailEms()) do
				task.spawn(function()
					local delay = e:GetAttribute("EmitDelay") or 0
					if delay > 0 then task.wait(delay) end
					if not e.Parent then return end
					local dur   = e:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0
					local count = e:GetAttribute("EmitCount") or 0
					-- Same bracket-the-duration shape as the 3D path above, but a transformed trail
					-- keeps Enabled in its Emission group, not Appearance.
					local pf = e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local em = pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Emission")
					if dur > 0 and em then em:SetAttribute("Emitting", true) end
					if count > 0 then (e:IsA("Beam") and BeamRuntime or TrailRuntime).burst(e, count) end
					if dur > 0 then
						task.wait(dur)
						if e.Parent and em then em:SetAttribute("Emitting", false) end
					end
				end)
			end
		end)

		-- Loop button
		loopBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			local emitters=getEmitters(); local sounds=getSounds(); local toggleables=getToggleables()
			local temit=getTrailEms()
			if #emitters==0 and #sounds==0 and #toggleables==0 and #get3D()==0 and #temit==0 then setLoopVisual(false); return end
			local anyOn=false
			for _, em in pairs(emitters) do if em.Enabled then anyOn=true; break end end
			if not anyOn then for _, t in pairs(toggleables) do if t.Enabled then anyOn=true; break end end end
			if not anyOn then for _, snd in pairs(sounds) do if isLoopCloneActiveForSound(snd) then anyOn=true; break end end end
			if not anyOn then
				for _, e in pairs(get3D()) do
					local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Appearance")
					if app and app:GetAttribute("Enabled")==true then anyOn=true; break end
				end
			end
			-- a transformed trail's continuous emission is Emission > Emitting (its Appearance >
			-- Enabled is the trail's own draw toggle, which this button must not touch)
			if not anyOn then
				for _, e in pairs(temit) do
					local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local em=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Emission")
					if em and em:GetAttribute("Emitting")==true then anyOn=true; break end
				end
			end
			local turnOn=not anyOn
			if #emitters>0 then
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle Particle Loop Before")
				for _, em in pairs(emitters) do em.Enabled=turnOn end
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle Particle Loop After")
			end
			if #toggleables>0 then
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle Enabled Before")
				for _, t in pairs(toggleables) do t.Enabled=turnOn end
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle Enabled After")
			end
			local e3dLoop = get3D()
			if #e3dLoop>0 then
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle 3D Loop Before")
				for _, e in pairs(e3dLoop) do
					local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Appearance")
					if app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", turnOn) end
				end
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle 3D Loop After")
			end
			if #temit>0 then
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle Trail Emitting Before")
				for _, e in pairs(temit) do
					local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local em=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Emission")
					if em then em:SetAttribute("Emitting", turnOn) end
				end
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle Trail Emitting After")
			end
			if #sounds>0 then
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle Sound Looped Before")
				for _, snd in pairs(sounds) do
					if turnOn then
						if not isLoopCloneActiveForSound(snd) then
							stopLoopCloneForSound(snd)
							local clone=snd:Clone(); clone.Looped=true; clone.Parent=ctx.soundRef.widget; clone:Play()
							loopedSoundClones[snd]=clone; ensureLoopCloneWatch(snd)
						end
					else stopLoopCloneForSound(snd) end
				end
				CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Toggle Sound Looped After")
			end
			setLoopVisual(turnOn)
		end)

		local repeatDebounce = false
		repeatButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if repeatDebounce then return end
			repeatDebounce = true
			task.delay(0.1, function() repeatDebounce = false end)

			if runningRepeat then
				if stopAfterCycle then
					stopAfterCycle = false
					runningRepeatFake = true
					updateRepeatIcon()
				else

					stopAfterCycle = true
					runningRepeatFake = false
					updateRepeatIcon()
				end
				return
			end

			runningRepeat = true
			runningRepeatFake = true
			stopAfterCycle = false

			local curSel = selection:Get()
			cachedRoots = {}
			for _, obj in ipairs(curSel) do
				if obj == game or obj == workspace then continue end
				table.insert(cachedRoots, obj)
			end

			if #cachedRoots == 0 then
				runningRepeat = false
				runningRepeatFake = false
				return
			end

			updateRepeatIcon()

			task.spawn(function()
				while runningRepeat do
					local cycleStart = os.clock()
					local curEm, curSnd, curTog, curE3D, validRoots = {}, {}, {}, {}, {}
					local seen_tog = {}

					for _, root in ipairs(cachedRoots) do
						local ok, alive = pcall(function() return root:IsDescendantOf(game) end)
						if not ok or not alive then continue end

						table.insert(validRoots, root)
						for _, em in ipairs(Helpers.findEmitters(root)) do table.insert(curEm, em) end
						for _, snd in ipairs(Helpers.findSounds(root))  do table.insert(curSnd, snd) end
						for _, e3d in ipairs(find3D(root)) do table.insert(curE3D, e3d) end
					end
					for _, tog in ipairs(getToggleables()) do
						if not seen_tog[tog] then seen_tog[tog]=true; table.insert(curTog, tog) end
					end

					cachedRoots = validRoots
					local total = #curEm + #curSnd + #curTog + #curE3D

					if total == 0 then 
						break 
					end

					local done = 0
					for _, em in pairs(curEm) do 
						task.spawn(function() 
							if em and em.Parent then 
								runEmit(em, function() return runningRepeat end) 
							end
							done += 1 
						end) 
					end
					for _, snd in pairs(curSnd) do 
						task.spawn(function() 
							if snd and snd.Parent then 
								runSound(snd, function() return runningRepeat end) 
							end
							done += 1 
						end) 
					end
					for _, tog in pairs(curTog) do
						task.spawn(function()
							if tog and tog.Parent then
								runToggleable(tog, function() return runningRepeat end)
							end
							done += 1
						end)
					end
					for _, e3d in pairs(curE3D) do
						task.spawn(function()
							if e3d and e3d.Parent then
								run3D(e3d, function() return runningRepeat end)
							end
							done += 1
						end)
					end

					-- Repeat Timer (Settings > Emission): 0 = wait for every VFX to finish
					-- then repeat (0.1s min cycle); >0 = repeat on that fixed interval.
					local rt = tonumber(plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_repeatTimer")) or 0
					if rt > 0 then
						local waited = 0
						while waited < rt and runningRepeat do waited += task.wait(0.05) end
					else
						while done < total do
							task.wait(0.05)
						end
						local elapsed = os.clock() - cycleStart
						if elapsed < 0.1 then task.wait(0.1 - elapsed) end
					end

					if stopAfterCycle then 
						break 
					end
				end

				runningRepeat = false
				runningRepeatFake = false
				stopAfterCycle = false
				cachedRoots = {}
				updateRepeatIcon()
			end)
		end)

		-- Refresh on selection change
		local function refresh()
			local emitters=getEmitters(); local sounds=getSounds(); local toggleables=getToggleables(); local e3d=get3D(); local temit=getTrailEms(); emitButton.Text="Emit"
			-- Independent Transform swap: when the only thing the selection offers is something
			-- TRANSFORMABLE, hide this whole window so the standalone Transform button (its own
			-- ScreenGui) stands in for it.
			-- "Nothing to emit" isn't the test any more. A childless BasePart is never emittable, so
			-- for that kind the two conditions coincide -- but a transformable Trail IS emittable (a
			-- toggleable), so a Trails-only selection has something to emit AND something to
			-- transform. Ignoring toggleables that are themselves transformable keeps the swap
			-- exclusive: trails-only hides Emit and shows Transform, while a trail selected next to
			-- anything else isn't transformable at all (see Main's getTransformables) and Emit stays.
			local _tf = ctx.getTransformables()
			local _tfSet = {}; for _, x in ipairs(_tf) do _tfSet[x] = true end
			local _otherTog = 0
			for _, x in ipairs(toggleables) do if not _tfSet[x] then _otherTog += 1 end end
			main.Visible = not ((#emitters==0 and #sounds==0 and _otherTog==0 and #e3d==0) and #_tf>0)
			if #emitters==0 and #sounds==0 and #toggleables==0 and #e3d==0 and #temit==0 then
				if activeBox then pcall(function() activeBox:ReleaseFocus() end) end
				resetTypingState(); closeSlider(true); setContentMode("none")
				if not runningRepeat then setLoopVisual(false) end
				clearLoopConns(); return
			end
			-- Update loop visual based on toggleables too
			if not runningRepeat then
				local anyTogOn = false
				for _,t in pairs(toggleables) do if t.Enabled then anyTogOn=true; break end end
				local anyEmOn = false
				for _,e in pairs(emitters) do if e.Enabled then anyEmOn=true; break end end
				local any3DOn = false
				for _,e in pairs(e3d) do
					local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Appearance")
					if app and app:GetAttribute("Enabled")==true then any3DOn=true; break end
				end
				-- transformed trails keep Enabled in Emission, not Appearance
				if not any3DOn then
					for _,e in pairs(temit) do
						local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local em=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Emission")
						if em and em:GetAttribute("Emitting")==true then any3DOn=true; break end
					end
				end
				setLoopVisual(anyTogOn or anyEmOn or any3DOn or anySelectedSoundCloneLooping())
			end
			setContentMode((#emitters>0 or #e3d>0 or #temit>0) and "full" or (#toggleables>0 and "sounds" or "sounds"))
			local allTargets={}
			for _, e in pairs(emitters)    do table.insert(allTargets,e) end
			for _, s in pairs(sounds)      do table.insert(allTargets,s) end
			for _, t in pairs(toggleables) do table.insert(allTargets,t) end
			for _, e in pairs(e3d)         do table.insert(allTargets,e) end
			for _, e in pairs(temit)       do table.insert(allTargets,e) end
			if #emitters>0 or #e3d>0 or #temit>0 then
				local ctgt={}
				for _, e in pairs(emitters) do table.insert(ctgt,e) end
				for _, e in pairs(e3d)      do table.insert(ctgt,e) end
				for _, e in pairs(temit)    do table.insert(ctgt,e) end
				local ev,emix=groupValue(ctgt,"EmitCount")
				if not isTyping.Emit then emitBox.Text=emix and "..." or tostring(ev or 0) end
			end
			local d,dmix=groupValue(allTargets,"EmitDelay")
			local du,dumix=groupValue(allTargets,"EmitDuration")
			if not isTyping.Delay    then delayBox.Text    = dmix  and "..." or formatClean(d  or 0) end
			if not isTyping.Duration then durationBox.Text = dumix and "..." or formatClean(du or 0) end
			clearLoopConns()
			for _, em in pairs(emitters) do
				table.insert(loopConns, em:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Enabled"):Connect(function()
					local anyEmOn=false; for _,e in pairs(emitters) do if e.Enabled then anyEmOn=true; break end end
					local anyTogOn=false; for _,t in pairs(toggleables) do if t.Enabled then anyTogOn=true; break end end
					local any3DOn=false; for _,e in pairs(e3d) do local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Appearance"); if app and app:GetAttribute("Enabled")==true then any3DOn=true; break end end
					local on=anyEmOn or anyTogOn or any3DOn or anyTrailEmitting(temit) or anySelectedSoundCloneLooping()
					if suppressLoopCount == 0 or not on then setLoopVisual(on) end
				end))
			end

			for _, t in pairs(toggleables) do
				table.insert(loopConns, t:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Enabled"):Connect(function()
					local anyOn=false; for _,e in pairs(emitters) do if e.Enabled then anyOn=true; break end end
					if not anyOn then for _,tt in pairs(toggleables) do if tt.Enabled then anyOn=true; break end end end
					if not anyOn then for _,e in pairs(e3d) do local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Appearance"); if app and app:GetAttribute("Enabled")==true then anyOn=true; break end end end
					if not anyOn then anyOn=anyTrailEmitting(temit) end
					if not anyOn then anyOn=anySelectedSoundCloneLooping() end
					if suppressLoopCount == 0 or not anyOn then setLoopVisual(anyOn) end
				end))
			end
			for _, e in pairs(temit) do
				local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local em=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Emission")
				if em then
					table.insert(loopConns, em:GetAttributeChangedSignal("Emitting"):Connect(function()
						local anyEmOn=false; for _,x in pairs(emitters) do if x.Enabled then anyEmOn=true; break end end
						local anyTogOn=false; for _,x in pairs(toggleables) do if x.Enabled then anyTogOn=true; break end end
						local any3DOn=false
						for _,x in pairs(e3d) do
							local pf2=x:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app2=pf2 and pf2:FindFirstChild("Appearance")
							if app2 and app2:GetAttribute("Enabled")==true then any3DOn=true; break end
						end
						local on=anyEmOn or anyTogOn or any3DOn or anyTrailEmitting(temit) or anySelectedSoundCloneLooping()
						if suppressLoopCount == 0 or not on then setLoopVisual(on) end
					end))
				end
			end
			for _, e in pairs(e3d) do
				local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Appearance")
				if app then
					table.insert(loopConns, app:GetAttributeChangedSignal("Enabled"):Connect(function()
						local anyEmOn=false; for _,em in pairs(emitters) do if em.Enabled then anyEmOn=true; break end end
						local anyTogOn=false; for _,tt in pairs(toggleables) do if tt.Enabled then anyTogOn=true; break end end
						local any3DOn=false; for _,ee in pairs(e3d) do local pf2=ee:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app2=pf2 and pf2:FindFirstChild("Appearance"); if app2 and app2:GetAttribute("Enabled")==true then any3DOn=true; break end end
						local on=anyEmOn or anyTogOn or any3DOn or anyTrailEmitting(temit) or anySelectedSoundCloneLooping()
						if suppressLoopCount == 0 or not on then setLoopVisual(on) end
					end))
				end
			end
			for _, snd in pairs(sounds) do
				table.insert(loopConns, snd:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Looped"):Connect(function()
					local on=anySelectedSoundCloneLooping()
					if suppressLoopCount == 0 or not on then setLoopVisual(on) end
				end))
				table.insert(loopConns, snd.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
					local on=anySelectedSoundCloneLooping()
					if suppressLoopCount == 0 or not on then setLoopVisual(on) end
				end))
			end
			local anyEmOn=false; for _,e in pairs(emitters) do if e.Enabled then anyEmOn=true; break end end
			local anyTogOn=false; for _,t in pairs(toggleables) do if t.Enabled then anyTogOn=true; break end end
			local any3DOn=false; for _,e in pairs(e3d) do local pf=e:FindFirstChild("Properties"); local app=pf and pf:FindFirstChild("Appearance"); if app and app:GetAttribute("Enabled")==true then any3DOn=true; break end end
			local on=anyEmOn or anyTogOn or any3DOn or anyTrailEmitting(temit) or anySelectedSoundCloneLooping()
			if suppressLoopCount == 0 or not on then setLoopVisual(on) end
		end

		selectionConn=selection.SelectionChanged:Connect(function()
			if activeBox then
				applySquelch = true
				pcall(function() activeBox:ReleaseFocus() end)
				task.defer(function() applySquelch = false end)
				resetTypingState(); closeSlider(true)
			end
			refresh()
		end)
		refresh()
	end

	return {
		mount   = mount,
		unmount = cleanup,
		isOpen  = isOpen,
	}
end

-- CodeWindow: VFX Code preview window
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory, Helpers)
	local C       = Theme.C
	local TI      = Theme.TI
	local tw      = UIKit.tw
	local twNow   = UIKit.twNow

	local coreGui         = ctx.coreGui
	local selection       = ctx.selection
	local userInputService = ctx.userInputService
	local tweenService    = ctx.tweenService
	local runService      = ctx.runService
	local textService     = ctx.textService
	local plugin          = ctx.plugin

	local COLOR_SHARED = "ffab9e"
	local COLOR_VFX    = "9ed5ff"
	local COLOR_MODE   = "fff99e"
	local COLOR_NIL    = "FF6B8A"
	local COLOR_STRING = "88e066"

	local DROPDOWN_OPTION_HEIGHT = 24
	local DROPDOWN_WIDTH = 95
	local DROPDOWN_GAP   = 4
	local CODE_TEXT_SIZE = 16

	local codeGui_inst       = nil
	local nameCheckConn      = nil
	local codePinned         = false
	local codeSelectionConn  = nil
	local codeUisConn        = nil
	local ddCloseConn        = nil

	-- RichText-safe: raw names may contain & < > which corrupt the markup
	local function richEscape(txt)
		return (txt:gsub("&", "&"):gsub("<", "<"):gsub(">", ">"))
	end
	-- names that are not valid Lua identifiers must be ["quoted"] (same rule
	-- as Helpers.getFullPath, so the coloured line matches the copyable one)
	local function luaEscape(txt)
		return (txt:gsub("\\", "\\\\"):gsub('"', '\\"'))
	end

	local function buildColoredPath(instance)
		if not instance then
			return string.format('<font color="#%s">nil</font>', COLOR_NIL)
		end
		local segs = Helpers.getSegments(instance)
		if not segs or #segs == 0 then
			local name = instance.Name
			if Helpers.isIdent(name) then
				return string.format('<font color="#%s">%s</font>', COLOR_SHARED, richEscape(name))
			end
			return string.format('<font color="#%s">["%s"]</font>', COLOR_STRING, richEscape(luaEscape(name)))
		end
		local first = segs[1]
		local result
		if first == "workspace" then
			result = string.format('<font color="#%s">workspace</font>', COLOR_SHARED)
		elseif Helpers.isIdent(first) then
			result = string.format('<font color="#%s">game</font>.', COLOR_SHARED)
				.. string.format('<font color="#%s">%s</font>', COLOR_SHARED, richEscape(first))
		else
			result = string.format('<font color="#%s">game</font>', COLOR_SHARED)
				.. string.format('<font color="#%s">["%s"]</font>', COLOR_STRING, richEscape(luaEscape(first)))
		end
		for i = 2, #segs do
			local name = segs[i]
			if Helpers.isIdent(name) then
				result = result .. string.format('.<font color="#%s">%s</font>', COLOR_VFX, richEscape(name))
			else
				result = result .. string.format('<font color="#%s">["%s"]</font>', COLOR_STRING, richEscape(luaEscape(name)))
			end
		end
		return result
	end

	local function cleanup()
		if codeGui_inst      then codeGui_inst:Destroy()           end
		if codeSelectionConn then codeSelectionConn:Disconnect()   end
		if nameCheckConn     then nameCheckConn:Disconnect()        end
		if codeUisConn       then codeUisConn:Disconnect()         end
		if ddCloseConn       then ddCloseConn:Disconnect()         end
		codeGui_inst=nil; codeSelectionConn=nil; codeUisConn=nil; ddCloseConn=nil
	end

	local function isOpen() return codeGui_inst and codeGui_inst.Parent ~= nil end

	local function mount(App, CODE_WINDOW_ID)
		cleanup()
		codePinned = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_Code") == true

		codeGui_inst = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
		codeGui_inst.Name = "SineVFX_CodeWindow_v4"
		codeGui_inst.ResetOnSpawn = false
		codeGui_inst.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
		codeGui_inst.DisplayOrder = 10001
		codeGui_inst.Parent = coreGui

			stateKey="VFXCode",
