			minW = 20, maxW = 1000,
			minH = 20, maxH = 400,
			topbarH = 24,
			getPinned = function() return codePinned end,
		})
		local main       = win.main
		local bgFrame    = win.bgFrame
		local topbar     = win.topbar
		local dragHandle = win.dragHandle
		local dragStroke = win.dragStroke

		local titleLbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		titleLbl.Size = UDim2.new(0, 80, 1, 0); titleLbl.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 0)
		titleLbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1; titleLbl.Text = "VFX Code"
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(titleLbl, "Generate Luau code for the VFX.") end
		titleLbl.TextColor3 = C.text; titleLbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
		titleLbl.TextSize = 13; titleLbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
		titleLbl.ZIndex = 3; titleLbl.Parent = topbar

		local pinBtn, pinIcon = UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar, "120413064155653", -48, 15)
		local closeBtn, _     = UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar, "101421401454601", -26, 10)
		pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			codePinned = not codePinned
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_Code", codePinned)
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive", codePinned)
			tw(pinIcon, { ImageColor3 = codePinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim })
		end)

		if codePinned then
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive", true)
			pinIcon.ImageColor3 = C.Pinned
		end		closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() App:toggle(CODE_WINDOW_ID) end)

		-- Dim title + topbar icons when unfocused
		win.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
			local col       = focused and C.text    or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0), 0.15)
			local iconCol   = focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0), 0.15)
			local pinnedCol = focused and C.Pinned  or C.Pinned
			task.defer(function()
				for _, ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
					if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end
					if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch, {TextColor3 = col}) end
					if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then
						if ch.Parent and ch.Parent:GetAttribute("PinnedActive") then
							tw(ch, {ImageColor3 = pinnedCol})
						else
							tw(ch, {ImageColor3 = iconCol})
						end
					end
				end
			end)
		end)	-- Dropdown button
		local ddBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
		ddBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0,50,0,14); ddBtn.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
		ddBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0,75,0.5,-7); ddBtn.BackgroundColor3 = C.accent
		ddBtn.Text = "Emit"; ddBtn.TextColor3 = C.base; ddBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
		ddBtn.TextSize = 12; ddBtn.AutoButtonColor = false; ddBtn.ZIndex = 105; ddBtn.Parent = topbar
		UIKit.corner(ddBtn, 6); ddBtn:SetAttribute("BaseColor", C.accent)
		local ddPad = Instance.new("UIPadding"); ddPad.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0,8); ddPad.Parent = ddBtn
		local arrow = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		arrow.Size = UDim2.new(0,10,0,10); arrow.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1,0.5)
		arrow.Position = UDim2.new(1,-6,0.5,0); arrow.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		UIKit.setIconImage(arrow, "116140507142780"); arrow.ImageColor3 = C.base
		arrow:SetAttribute("NoFocusTint", true)
		arrow.ZIndex = 11; arrow.Parent = ddBtn
		ddBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() UIKit.fadeButton(ddBtn, 0.2) end)
		ddBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() UIKit.fadeButton(ddBtn, 0) end)

		local function updateButtonSize(text)
			local ts = textService:GetTextSize(text, ddBtn.TextSize, UIKit.safeFont(ddBtn), Vector2.new(1000,1000))
			tw(ddBtn, { Size = UDim2.new(0, ts.X+28, 0, ddBtn.Size.Y.Offset) }, Theme.DD_TI)
		end
		updateButtonSize(ddBtn.Text)

		-- Content / code box
		local content = Instance.new("Frame")
		content.Size = UDim2.new(1,0,1,-24); content.Position = UDim2.new(0,0,0,24)
		content.BackgroundTransparency = 1; content.Parent = bgFrame
		local codeContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
		codeContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1,-12,1,-12); codeContainer.Position = UDim2.new(0,6,0,6)
		codeContainer.BackgroundColor3 = C.base; codeContainer.ClipsDescendants = true
		codeContainer.Parent = content
		UIKit.corner(codeContainer, 6)
		local boxPad = Instance.new("UIPadding")
		boxPad.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,6); boxPad.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,6)
		boxPad.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,6); boxPad.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,6); boxPad.Parent=codeContainer
		local codeBox = Instance.new("TextBox")
		codeBox.Size = UDim2.new(1,0,1,0); codeBox.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		codeBox.RichText = true; codeBox.TextWrapped = false; codeBox.MultiLine = false
		codeBox.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; codeBox.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top
		codeBox.ClearTextOnFocus = false; codeBox.TextEditable = false
		codeBox.TextSize = CODE_TEXT_SIZE
		codeBox.FontFace = Font.new("rbxasset://fonts/families/RobotoMono.json", Enum.FontWeight.Bold, Enum.FontStyle.Normal)
		-- Preserve this box's bold weight (+ monospace family for the "Default" font) across theme
		-- font switches: its font is set via FontFace, so Main's string-parse of .Font.Name can't see
		-- the weight. These attrs tell Main's applier the intended weight + restore family.
		codeBox:SetAttribute("SVFXfontWeight", Enum.FontWeight.Bold.Value)
		codeBox:SetAttribute("SVFXbaseFamily", "rbxasset://fonts/families/RobotoMono.json")
		codeBox.Parent = codeContainer

		local currentRawText  = ""
		local currentRichText = ""
		local activeMode      = "emit"

		local function updateCodePreview()
			local selected = selection:Get()
			if #selected == 0 then
				currentRawText  = string.format("shared.sv.%s()", activeMode)
				currentRichText = string.format('<font color="#%s">shared</font>.<font color="#%s">sv</font>.<font color="#%s">%s</font>()', COLOR_SHARED, COLOR_VFX, COLOR_MODE, activeMode)
			else
				local rawPaths, coloredPaths = {}, {}
				for _, obj in ipairs(selected) do
					table.insert(rawPaths,     Helpers.getFullPath(obj))
					table.insert(coloredPaths, buildColoredPath(obj))
				end
				currentRawText  = string.format("shared.sv.%s(%s)", activeMode, table.concat(rawPaths, ", "))
				currentRichText = string.format('<font color="#%s">shared</font>.<font color="#%s">sv</font>.<font color="#%s">%s</font>(%s)',
					COLOR_SHARED, COLOR_VFX, COLOR_MODE, activeMode, table.concat(coloredPaths, ", "))
			end
			if codeBox:IsFocused() then
				codeBox.RichText=false; codeBox.TextColor3=C.accent; codeBox.Text=currentRawText
			else
				codeBox.RichText=true;  codeBox.TextColor3=C.white;  codeBox.Text=currentRichText
			end
		end

		codeBox.Focused:Connect(function()
			codeBox.RichText=false; codeBox.TextColor3=C.accent; codeBox.Text=currentRawText
			task.defer(function()
				if codeBox:IsFocused() then codeBox.CursorPosition=string.len(currentRawText)+1; codeBox.SelectionStart=1 end
			end)
		end)
		codeBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			codeBox.RichText=true; codeBox.TextColor3=C.white; codeBox.Text=currentRichText
		end)

		updateCodePreview()
		-- Poll for name changes on selected instances
		local lastPathKey = ""
		local function getPathKey()
			local parts = {}
			for _, obj in ipairs(selection:Get()) do
				table.insert(parts, obj:GetFullName())
			end
			return table.concat(parts, "|")
		end
		codeSelectionConn = selection.SelectionChanged:Connect(function()
			lastPathKey = getPathKey()
			updateCodePreview()
		end)
		local _nameAcc = 0
		nameCheckConn = runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
			if not codeGui_inst or not codeGui_inst.Parent then return end
			-- Throttle ~5fps: getPathKey() calls GetFullName() (an ancestor-chain walk) on EVERY selected
			-- instance + concats, so at 60fps it scaled badly with big selections. It only needs to catch
			-- an instance NAME change (rare), so 0.2s latency is fine.
			_nameAcc += dt
			if _nameAcc < 0.2 then return end
			_nameAcc = 0
			local key = getPathKey()
			if key ~= lastPathKey then
				lastPathKey = key
				updateCodePreview()
			end
		end)

		-- Dropdown menu
		local ddMenu = Instance.new("Frame")
		ddMenu.Size = UDim2.new(0,DROPDOWN_WIDTH,0,0); ddMenu.BackgroundColor3 = C.surface
		ddMenu.ZIndex = 101; ddMenu.ClipsDescendants = true; ddMenu.Visible = false; ddMenu.Parent = main
		UIKit.corner(ddMenu, 4); UIKit.makeBorder(ddMenu, C.border:Lerp(C.accent,0.5)):SetAttribute("SVFXddoutline",true)
		local ddLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout"); ddLayout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; ddLayout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center; ddLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0,3); ddLayout.Parent = ddMenu
		do local _ddp=Instance.new("UIPadding"); _ddp.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,3); _ddp.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,3); _ddp.Parent=ddMenu end
		local modes = {"Emit", "Enable", "Disable"}
		local isOpen_dd = false
		local openingDown = true
		local ddHeight = nil
		local optBtns={}; local hoveredOpt=nil
		local function styleOpt(opt,instant)
			local function ap(pp) if instant then for k,v in pairs(pp) do opt[k]=v end else twNow(opt,pp) end end
			if string.lower(opt.Text)==activeMode then
				opt.TextSize=13; opt.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
				ap({BackgroundColor3=(opt==hoveredOpt) and C.accent:Lerp(C.white,0.2) or C.accent, BackgroundTransparency=0, TextColor3=C.base})
			elseif opt==hoveredOpt then
				opt.TextSize=11; opt.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium
				ap({BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.white,0.14), BackgroundTransparency=0, TextColor3=C.white})
			else
				opt.TextSize=11; opt.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium
				ap({BackgroundColor3=C.base, BackgroundTransparency=0, TextColor3=C.textDim})
			end
		end
		local function restyleAll(instant) for _,o in ipairs(optBtns) do styleOpt(o,instant) end end
		local function setHover(opt,on)
			if on then
				if hoveredOpt and hoveredOpt~=opt then local _ph=hoveredOpt; hoveredOpt=nil; styleOpt(_ph) end
				hoveredOpt=opt
			else if hoveredOpt==opt then hoveredOpt=nil end end
			styleOpt(opt)
		end
		for _, modeName in ipairs(modes) do
			local opt = Instance.new("TextButton")
			opt.Size = UDim2.new(1,-8,0,DROPDOWN_OPTION_HEIGHT); opt.BackgroundColor3=C.base; opt.BackgroundTransparency = 1; opt.AutoButtonColor = false
			opt.Text = modeName; opt.TextColor3 = C.textDim; opt.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
			opt.TextSize = 12; opt.ZIndex = 102; opt.Parent = ddMenu
			UIKit.corner(opt,5)
			table.insert(optBtns,opt)
			opt.MouseEnter:Connect(function() setHover(opt,true) end)
			opt.MouseLeave:Connect(function() setHover(opt,false) end)
			opt.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
				activeMode=string.lower(modeName); ddBtn.Text=modeName
				hoveredOpt=nil; restyleAll()
				updateButtonSize(modeName); updateCodePreview()
				isOpen_dd=false; tw(arrow, { Rotation=0 }, Theme.DD_TI)
				ddMenu.Visible=false
			end)
		end
		ddMenu.Size = UDim2.new(0,DROPDOWN_WIDTH,0,#modes*DROPDOWN_OPTION_HEIGHT+(#modes-1)*3+6)

		local function positionDropdown()
			local _sc=(WinFactory.getUiScale and WinFactory.getUiScale()) or 1; local bAP=ddBtn.AbsolutePosition; local bAS=ddBtn.AbsoluteSize
			local mAP=main.AbsolutePosition; local sS=codeGui_inst.AbsoluteSize
			local relX=(bAP.X-mAP.X)/_sc; local relY=(bAP.Y-mAP.Y)/_sc
			ddHeight=#modes*DROPDOWN_OPTION_HEIGHT+(#modes-1)*3+6
			local spBelow=(sS.Y-(bAP.Y+bAS.Y))/_sc
			local finalY=(spBelow>=ddHeight+DROPDOWN_GAP) and (relY+bAS.Y/_sc+DROPDOWN_GAP) or (relY-DROPDOWN_GAP)
			ddMenu.Position=UDim2.new(0,relX-3,0,finalY); ddMenu.Size=UDim2.new(0,bAS.X/_sc+6,0,ddHeight)
			openingDown=spBelow>=ddHeight+DROPDOWN_GAP
		end
		local function toggleDropdown()
			isOpen_dd=not isOpen_dd; positionDropdown()
			tw(arrow, { Rotation=isOpen_dd and 180 or 0 }, Theme.DD_TI)
			if isOpen_dd then
				ddMenu.AnchorPoint=openingDown and Vector2.new(0,0) or Vector2.new(0,1)
				ddMenu.Size=UDim2.new(0,ddBtn.AbsoluteSize.X+6,0,ddHeight)
				restyleAll(true)
				ddMenu.Visible=true
			else
				ddMenu.Visible=false
			end
		end
		ddBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(toggleDropdown)

		ddCloseConn = userInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
			if not isOpen_dd then return end
			if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
			local mp = userInputService:GetMouseLocation()
			local function inside(pos, size)
				return mp.X>=pos.X and mp.X<=pos.X+size.X and mp.Y>=pos.Y and mp.Y<=pos.Y+size.Y
			end
			if inside(ddMenu.AbsolutePosition,ddMenu.AbsoluteSize) or inside(ddBtn.AbsolutePosition,ddBtn.AbsoluteSize) then return end
			isOpen_dd=false; tw(arrow,{Rotation=0},Theme.DD_TI)
			ddMenu.Visible=false
		end)
	end

	return {
		mount   = mount,
		unmount = cleanup,
		isOpen  = isOpen,
	}
end

-- ColorWindow: HSV Color Control UI (v2 - polished)
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory)
	local C    = Theme.C
	local tw   = UIKit.tw

	local coreGui          = ctx.coreGui
	local selection        = ctx.selection
	local userInputService = ctx.userInputService
	local runService       = ctx.runService
	local plugin           = ctx.plugin
	local CHS              = ctx.CHS
	local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
	local okTr, Trail3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Trail3D end)
	if not okTr or type(Trail3D)~="table" then Trail3D = { isTrail=function() return false end, get=function() end, set=function() end } end
	local okBm, Beam3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Beam3D end)
	if not okBm or type(Beam3D)~="table" then Beam3D = { isBeam=function() return false end, get=function() end, set=function() end } end
	-- A transformed trail's Trail.Color is runtime-driven (from Gradient) and any write to it is
	-- overwritten next frame, so ColorWindow targets the Color ATTRIBUTE instead -- the
	-- over-lifetime tint applied to emitted copies.
	local TRAIL_TAG = "SineVFXTransformedTrail"
	local BEAM_TAG  = "SineVFXTransformedBeam"

	local colorGui_inst    = nil
	local colorPinned      = false
	local colorSelConn     = nil
	local colorUisConn     = nil
	local globalRevertColorPreview = nil
	ctx.GlobalRevertColorPreview = function() if globalRevertColorPreview then globalRevertColorPreview() end end

	local function cleanup()
		if ctx.GlobalRevertColorPreview then ctx.GlobalRevertColorPreview() end
		if colorGui_inst then colorGui_inst:Destroy() end
		if colorSelConn  then colorSelConn:Disconnect() end
		if colorUisConn  then colorUisConn:Disconnect() end
		colorGui_inst=nil; colorSelConn=nil; colorUisConn=nil
	end

	local function isOpen() return colorGui_inst and colorGui_inst.Parent ~= nil end

	local function mount(App, COLOR_WINDOW_ID)
		cleanup()
		colorPinned = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_Color") == true

		colorGui_inst = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
		colorGui_inst.Name = "SineVFX_ColorControl_v2"
		colorGui_inst.ResetOnSpawn = false
		colorGui_inst.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
		colorGui_inst.DisplayOrder = 10002
		colorGui_inst.Parent = coreGui

		local win = WinFactory.new({
			stateKey="ColorControl",
			gui = colorGui_inst, name = "ColorWindowWrapper",
			w = 70, h = 380,
			pos = UDim2.new(0.35, 0, 0.5, 0),
			minW = 20, maxW = 70,
			minH = 20, maxH = 800,
			topbarH = 24,
			getPinned = function() return colorPinned end,
		})
		local main       = win.main
		local bgFrame    = win.bgFrame
		local topbar     = win.topbar
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(topbar, "Pick and apply colors to the selected VFX.") end
		local dragHandle = win.dragHandle

		dragHandle.Size = UDim2.new(1,-40,1.1,0); dragHandle.Position = UDim2.new(0,20,0,0)

		local pinBtn, pinIcon = UIKit.makeTopBtnPos(topbar, "120413064155653", UDim2.new(0,4,0.5,-12), 15)
		local closeBtn, _     = UIKit.makeTopBtnPos(topbar, "101421401454601", UDim2.new(1,-28,0.5,-12), 10)
		pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			colorPinned = not colorPinned
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_Color", colorPinned)
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive", colorPinned)
			tw(pinIcon, { ImageColor3 = colorPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim })
		end)

		if colorPinned then
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive", true)
			pinIcon.ImageColor3 = C.Pinned
		end		closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() App:toggle(COLOR_WINDOW_ID) end)

		-- Dim title + topbar icons when unfocused
		win.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
			local col       = focused and C.text    or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0), 0.15)
			local iconCol   = focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0), 0.15)
			local pinnedCol = focused and C.Pinned  or C.Pinned
			task.defer(function()
				for _, ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
					if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end
					if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch, {TextColor3 = col}) end
					if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then
						if ch.Parent and ch.Parent:GetAttribute("PinnedActive") then
							tw(ch, {ImageColor3 = pinnedCol})
						else
							tw(ch, {ImageColor3 = iconCol})
						end
					end
				end
			end)
		end)	local content = Instance.new("Frame")
		content.Size = UDim2.new(1,0,1,-24); content.Position = UDim2.new(0,0,0,24)
		content.BackgroundTransparency = 1; content.Parent = bgFrame
		local layout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
		layout.Padding = UDim.new(0,8); layout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
		layout.VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
		layout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; layout.Parent = content
		local pad = Instance.new("UIPadding")
		pad.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,5); pad.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,5)
		pad.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,5); pad.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,5); pad.Parent=content

		-- State Management
		local activeMode   = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_colorMode") or "Replace"
		local isPreviewing = false
		local savedColors, originalColors = {}, {}

		-- Raw Slider Positions (0 to 1)
		local sliderH, sliderS, sliderV = 0, 1, 1

		-- Final Computed Values for the Swatch
		local currentH, currentS, currentV = 0, 1, 1
		local currentColor = Color3.fromHSV(0, 1, 1)

		-- The reference baseline color of the selected particle
		local baseHSV = {h = 0, s = 1, v = 1}

		-- Each target carries read/write closures instead of a bare property name, so an
		-- attribute-backed kind (transformed trail -> Gradient attribute) plugs in beside the
		-- direct-property kinds without special-casing every apply/revert path.
		local function propTarget(inst, seq)
			return { inst=inst, seq=seq,
				read  = function() return inst.Color end,
				write = function(v) inst.Color = v end }
		end
		local function getColorTargets()
			local seen, out = {}, {}
			for _, obj in pairs(selection:Get()) do
				if obj==game or obj==workspace then continue end
				local function chk(inst)
					if seen[inst] then return end; seen[inst]=true
					-- A transformed trail is a Trail, so this MUST come before the IsA("Trail") branch.
					-- It targets the Color attribute (the over-lifetime tint on emitted copies), NOT
					-- Trail.Color -- that is runtime-driven from Gradient and any write is overwritten.
					if inst:IsA("Trail") and CollectionService:HasTag(inst, TRAIL_TAG) then
						table.insert(out, { inst=inst, seq=true,
							read  = function() return Trail3D.get(inst, "Color") end,
							write = function(v) Trail3D.set(inst, "Color", v) end })
					elseif inst:IsA("Beam") and CollectionService:HasTag(inst, BEAM_TAG) then
						table.insert(out, { inst=inst, seq=true,
							read  = function() return Beam3D.get(inst, "Color") end,
							write = function(v) Beam3D.set(inst, "Color", v) end })
					elseif inst:IsA("ParticleEmitter") or inst:IsA("Beam") or inst:IsA("Trail") or inst:IsA("UIGradient") then
						table.insert(out, propTarget(inst, true))
					elseif inst:IsA("BasePart") then
						table.insert(out, propTarget(inst, false))
					elseif inst:IsA("Light") then
						table.insert(out, propTarget(inst, false))
					end
				end
				chk(obj)
				for _, d in pairs(ctx.descendantsTo(obj)) do chk(d) end
			end
			return out
		end

		local function getMiddleColor(val)
			if typeof(val) == "Color3" then return val end
			if typeof(val) == "ColorSequence" then
				local kps = val.Keypoints
				if #kps == 1 then return kps[1].Value end
				local left, right
				for i = 1, #kps do
					if kps[i].Time == 0.5 then return kps[i].Value end
					if kps[i].Time < 0.5 then left = kps[i] end
					if kps[i].Time > 0.5 and not right then right = kps[i] end
				end
				if left and right then
					local range = right.Time - left.Time
					local alpha = (0.5 - left.Time) / range
					return left.Value:Lerp(right.Value, alpha)
				end
				return kps[1].Value
			end
			return Color3.new(1,1,1)
		end

		local function cacheOriginals()
			originalColors={}; savedColors={}
			for _, t in ipairs(getColorTargets()) do
				pcall(function()
					local val=t.read()
					originalColors[t.inst]={ val=val, seq=t.seq, read=t.read, write=t.write }
					savedColors[t.inst]={ val=val, seq=t.seq, read=t.read, write=t.write }
				end)
			end
		end

		local function updateBaseHSV()
			local targets = getColorTargets()
			if #targets > 0 and originalColors[targets[1].inst] then
				local midCol = getMiddleColor(originalColors[targets[1].inst].val)
				local h, s, v = midCol:ToHSV()
				baseHSV.h, baseHSV.s, baseHSV.v = h, s, v
			else
				baseHSV.h, baseHSV.s, baseHSV.v = 0, 1, 1
			end
		end

		local function applyColorToData(data)
			if activeMode == "Replace" then
				if data.seq then
					local newKps={}
					for _, kp in ipairs(data.val.Keypoints) do
						table.insert(newKps, ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(kp.Time, currentColor))
					end
					return ColorSequence.new(newKps)
				else
					return currentColor
				end
			else
				-- Shift Mode (Multiply)
				local dH = (sliderH - 0.5)
				local dS = (sliderS - 0.5) * 2
				local dV = (sliderV - 0.5) * 2

				local function shiftColor(c)
					local h, s, v = c:ToHSV()
					local nH = (h + dH) % 1
					local nS = math.clamp(s + dS, 0, 1)
					local nV = math.clamp(v + dV, 0, 1)
					return Color3.fromHSV(nH, nS, nV)
				end

				if data.seq then
					local newKps={}
					for _, kp in ipairs(data.val.Keypoints) do
						table.insert(newKps, ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(kp.Time, shiftColor(kp.Value)))
					end
					return ColorSequence.new(newKps)
				else
					return shiftColor(data.val)
				end
			end
		end

		local updateVisuals -- forward declare

		local function resetSlidersToTarget()
			updateBaseHSV()
			if activeMode == "Replace" then
				sliderH, sliderS, sliderV = baseHSV.h, baseHSV.s, baseHSV.v
			else
				sliderH, sliderS, sliderV = 0.5, 0.5, 0.5
			end
			updateVisuals(false)
		end

		local function revertPreview()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			for _, data in pairs(savedColors) do pcall(function() data.write(data.val) end) end
			isPreviewing=false
		end
		globalRevertColorPreview = revertPreview
		ctx.GlobalRevertColorPreview = revertPreview

		local function applyPreview()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			for _, data in pairs(savedColors) do pcall(function() data.write(applyColorToData(data)) end) end
		end

		local function commitPreview()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Color Change Before")
			for _, data in pairs(savedColors) do pcall(function() data.write(applyColorToData(data)) end) end
			isPreviewing=false; cacheOriginals()
			CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Color Change After")
			resetSlidersToTarget()
		end

		-- Mode buttons
		local modeRow = Instance.new("Frame")
		modeRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,26); modeRow.BackgroundTransparency=1
		modeRow.LayoutOrder=1; modeRow.Parent=content
		local modeLayout=Instance.new("UIListLayout")
		modeLayout.HorizontalAlignment=Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
		modeLayout.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal; modeLayout.Padding=UDim.new(0,6)
		modeLayout.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; modeLayout.Parent=modeRow

		local replaceBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		replaceBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0.5,0,1,0); replaceBtn.BackgroundColor3=(activeMode=='Replace' and C.accent or C.base)
		replaceBtn.Text=""; replaceBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; replaceBtn.LayoutOrder=1; replaceBtn.Parent=modeRow
		local Aspect1 = Instance.new("UIAspectRatioConstraint")
		Aspect1.Parent = replaceBtn
		UIKit.corner(replaceBtn,6)

		local replaceIcon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		replaceIcon.Size=UDim2.new(0,16,0,16); replaceIcon.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
		replaceIcon.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); replaceIcon.BackgroundTransparency=1
		replaceIcon.ImageColor3=(activeMode=='Replace' and C.base or C.text); replaceIcon.Parent=replaceBtn
		UIKit.setIconImage(replaceIcon, "92441021070637")
		
		local MouseOutRep = (activeMode=='Replace' and C.base or C.text)
		
		replaceBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
			if activeMode=="Replace" then
				tw(replaceBtn, {BackgroundColor3 = C.accent:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), 0.15)})
			else
				tw(replaceIcon, {ImageColor3 = replaceIcon.ImageColor3:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)})
			end
		end)
		replaceBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
			tw(replaceIcon, {ImageColor3 = MouseOutRep})
			tw(replaceBtn, {BackgroundColor3 = activeMode=="Replace" and C.accent or C.base})
		end)
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(replaceBtn, "Replace: set the selected VFX's color to the color you pick.") end

		local multiplyBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		multiplyBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0.5,0,1,0); multiplyBtn.BackgroundColor3=(activeMode=='Replace' and C.base or C.accent)
		multiplyBtn.Text=""; multiplyBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; multiplyBtn.LayoutOrder=2; multiplyBtn.Parent=modeRow
		local Aspect2 = Instance.new("UIAspectRatioConstraint")
		Aspect2.Parent = multiplyBtn
		UIKit.corner(multiplyBtn,6)

		local multiplyIcon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		multiplyIcon.Size=UDim2.new(0,15,0,15); multiplyIcon.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
		multiplyIcon.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); multiplyIcon.BackgroundTransparency=1
		multiplyIcon.ImageColor3=(activeMode=='Replace' and C.text or C.base); multiplyIcon.Parent=multiplyBtn
		UIKit.setIconImage(multiplyIcon, "77849852923386")
		
		local MouseOutMul = (activeMode=='Replace' and C.text or C.base)
		
		multiplyBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
			if activeMode~="Replace" then
				tw(multiplyBtn, {BackgroundColor3 = C.accent:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), 0.15)})
			else
				tw(multiplyIcon, {ImageColor3 = multiplyIcon.ImageColor3:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)})
			end
		end)
		multiplyBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
			tw(multiplyIcon, {ImageColor3 = MouseOutMul})
			tw(multiplyBtn, {BackgroundColor3 = activeMode~="Replace" and C.accent or C.base})
		end)
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(multiplyBtn, "Multiply: shift the selected VFX's existing colors by hue/saturation/value (keeps gradients).") end

		local function setMode(mode)
			activeMode=mode; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_colorMode", mode)
			if mode=="Replace" then
				tw(replaceBtn, {BackgroundColor3=C.accent})
				tw(replaceIcon, {ImageColor3=C.base})
				tw(multiplyBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.base})
				tw(multiplyIcon, {ImageColor3=C.text})
				MouseOutMul = C.text
				MouseOutRep = C.base
			else
				tw(replaceBtn, {BackgroundColor3=C.base})
				tw(replaceIcon, {ImageColor3=C.text})
				tw(multiplyBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent})
				tw(multiplyIcon, {ImageColor3=C.base})
				MouseOutMul = C.base
				MouseOutRep = C.text
			end
			resetSlidersToTarget()
			if isPreviewing then applyPreview() end
		end
		replaceBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			setMode("Replace")
			-- Re-apply hover since mouse is still over button
			tw(replaceBtn, {BackgroundColor3 = C.accent:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), 0.15)})
			tw(multiplyBtn, {BackgroundColor3 = C.base})
		end)
		multiplyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			setMode("Multiply")
			-- Re-apply hover since mouse is still over button
			tw(multiplyBtn, {BackgroundColor3 = C.accent:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), 0.15)})
			tw(replaceBtn, {BackgroundColor3 = C.base})
		end)
		-- Live theme switch: recolorGui repaints by matching an element's CURRENT colour against the
		-- OLD theme's values, which is unreliable for these two-state (accent/base) mode buttons (a
		-- hover-lerped or mode-swapped colour won't match, so they keep the old theme's colour). Re-
		-- assert the exact colours from the active mode on every live theme apply. Self-prunes on close.
		if ctx.themeRefreshers then
			table.insert(ctx.themeRefreshers, function()
				if not replaceBtn or not replaceBtn.Parent then return false end
				local rep = (activeMode=="Replace")
				replaceBtn.BackgroundColor3  = rep and C.accent or C.base
				replaceIcon.ImageColor3      = rep and C.base or C.text
				multiplyBtn.BackgroundColor3 = rep and C.base or C.accent
				multiplyIcon.ImageColor3     = rep and C.text or C.base
				MouseOutRep = rep and C.base or C.text
				MouseOutMul = rep and C.text or C.base
				return true
			end)
		end


		-- Sliders
		local sliderContainer=Instance.new("Frame")
		sliderContainer.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,-101); sliderContainer.BackgroundTransparency=1
		sliderContainer.LayoutOrder=2; sliderContainer.Parent=content
		local slLayout=Instance.new("UIListLayout")
		slLayout.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal; slLayout.HorizontalAlignment=Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
		slLayout.VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
		slLayout.Padding=UDim.new(0,11); slLayout.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; slLayout.Parent=sliderContainer

		local hTrack, hGrad, hKnob, hHit = UIKit.makeVSlider(sliderContainer, 1)
		local sTrack, sGrad, sKnob, sHit = UIKit.makeVSlider(sliderContainer, 2)
		local vTrack, vGrad, vKnob, vHit = UIKit.makeVSlider(sliderContainer, 3)

		-- Swatch & reset row
		local swatchRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		swatchRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,25); swatchRow.BackgroundTransparency=1
		swatchRow.LayoutOrder=3; swatchRow.Parent=content
		local swatch=Instance.new("Frame")
		swatch.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5)
		swatch.Position=UDim2.new(0,1,.5,0)
		swatch.Size=UDim2.new(0,25,0,25); swatch.BackgroundColor3=currentColor
		swatch.BorderSizePixel=0; swatch.Parent=swatchRow
		UIKit.corner(swatch,6); UIKit.makeBorder(swatch, Color3.new(0,0,0))
		-- click the preview swatch -> open the Color Wheel picker; feed the pick back
		-- into the H/S/V sliders (exact in Replace mode).
		do
			local swBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
			swBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0); swBtn.BackgroundTransparency=1; swBtn.Text=""
			swBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; swBtn.ZIndex=10; swBtn.Parent=swatch
			swBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
				if not ctx.openColorEditor then
					local okR,cwf=pcall(function() return require(script.Parent:FindFirstChild("ColorWheel")) end)
					if okR and type(cwf)=="function" then pcall(function() cwf(ctx,Theme,UIKit,WinFactory) end) end
				end
				if not ctx.openColorEditor then return end
				local prevH,prevS,prevV = sliderH, sliderS, sliderV
				ctx.openColorEditor(currentColor, function(c)
					local h,sa,v=c:ToHSV()
					sliderH=h; sliderS=sa; sliderV=v; updateVisuals(true)
				end, App, "ColorWheel", function()
					sliderH=prevH; sliderS=prevS; sliderV=prevV; updateVisuals(true)
				end, nil, function() return currentColor end)
			end)
		end

		local resetBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		resetBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,28,0,28); resetBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,-28,.5,0)
		resetBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5)
		resetBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.base; resetBtn.Text=""; resetBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; resetBtn.Parent=swatchRow
		UIKit.corner(resetBtn,6)

		local resetIcon=Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		resetIcon.Size=UDim2.new(0,20,0,20); resetIcon.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
		resetIcon.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); resetIcon.BackgroundTransparency=1
		resetIcon.ImageColor3=C.textDim; resetIcon.Parent=resetBtn
		UIKit.setIconImage(resetIcon, "438217405")

		UIKit.hoverLift(resetIcon)
		resetBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			revertPreview()
			for _, data in pairs(originalColors) do pcall(function() data.write(data.val) end) end
			cacheOriginals()
			resetSlidersToTarget()
		end)

		-- Apply button
		local setBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		setBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,25); setBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent
		setBtn.Text="Apply"; setBtn.TextColor3=C.base; setBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
		setBtn.TextSize=12; setBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; setBtn.LayoutOrder=4; setBtn.Parent=content
		UIKit.corner(setBtn,8)
		setBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()       tw(setBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),0.2)}) end)
		setBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()       tw(setBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent}) end)
		setBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() tw(setBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.1)}) end)
		setBtn.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()   tw(setBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),0.2)}) end)
		setBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(commitPreview)

		-- Visuals updater
		local DRAG_TI = Theme.DRAG_TI
		updateVisuals = function(applyPrev)
			if activeMode == "Replace" then
				currentH = sliderH
				currentS = sliderS
				currentV = sliderV
			else
				-- Math for the Centered Shift 
				currentH = (baseHSV.h + (sliderH - 0.5)) % 1
				currentS = math.clamp(baseHSV.s + (sliderS - 0.5) * 2, 0, 1)
				currentV = math.clamp(baseHSV.v + (sliderV - 0.5) * 2, 0, 1)
			end

			currentColor = Color3.fromHSV(currentH, currentS, currentV)
			swatch.BackgroundColor3 = currentColor

			-- Update the Background Gradients Visually
			if activeMode == "Replace" then
				hGrad.Color = ColorSequence.new({
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0,     Color3.fromRGB(255, 0,   0)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.166, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.333, Color3.fromRGB(0,   255, 0)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.5,   Color3.fromRGB(0,   255, 255)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.666, Color3.fromRGB(0,   0,   255)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.833, Color3.fromRGB(255, 0,   255)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1,     Color3.fromRGB(255, 0,   0))
				})
				sGrad.Color = ColorSequence.new({
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, Color3.fromHSV(currentH, 1, 1)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, Color3.fromHSV(currentH, 0, 1))
				})
				vGrad.Color = ColorSequence.new({
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, Color3.fromHSV(currentH, currentS, 1)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, Color3.fromHSV(currentH, currentS, 0))
				})
			else
				-- Shift Mode Gradients: Offset everything so Middle matches the base target exactly
				local hkps = {}
				for i = 0, 6 do
					local t = i / 6
					local h = (baseHSV.h + (t - 0.5)) % 1
					table.insert(hkps, ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(t, Color3.fromHSV(h, 1, 1)))
				end
				hGrad.Color = ColorSequence.new(hkps)

				local sTop = math.clamp(baseHSV.s + 1, 0, 1)
				local sMid = baseHSV.s
				local sBot = math.clamp(baseHSV.s - 1, 0, 1)
				sGrad.Color = ColorSequence.new({
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0,   Color3.fromHSV(currentH, sTop, 1)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.5, Color3.fromHSV(currentH, sMid, 1)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1,   Color3.fromHSV(currentH, sBot, 1))
				})

				local vTop = math.clamp(baseHSV.v + 1, 0, 1)
				local vMid = baseHSV.v
				local vBot = math.clamp(baseHSV.v - 1, 0, 1)
				vGrad.Color = ColorSequence.new({
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0,   Color3.fromHSV(currentH, currentS, vTop)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.5, Color3.fromHSV(currentH, currentS, vMid)),
					ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1,   Color3.fromHSV(currentH, currentS, vBot))
				})
			end

			-- Move the physical slider knobs visually
			tw(hKnob, {Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, sliderH, 0)}, DRAG_TI)
			tw(sKnob, {Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 1 - sliderS, 0)}, DRAG_TI)
			tw(vKnob, {Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 1 - sliderV, 0)}, DRAG_TI)

			if applyPrev then isPreviewing = true; applyPreview() end
		end

		local function hookSlider(hitbox, track, callback)
			local isDragging=false
			hitbox.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
				if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
				isDragging=true; plugin:Activate(false)
				local function upd()
					local mp=userInputService:GetMouseLocation()
					local pos=track.AbsolutePosition; local sz=track.AbsoluteSize
					callback(math.clamp((mp.Y-pos.Y)/sz.Y,0,1))
				end
				upd()
				local mc=userInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
					if i.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement and isDragging then upd() end
				end)
				local ec; ec=userInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
					if i.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
						isDragging=false; mc:Disconnect(); ec:Disconnect(); plugin:Deactivate()
					end
				end)
			end)
		end

		hookSlider(hHit, hTrack, function(t) sliderH = t;       updateVisuals(true) end)
		hookSlider(sHit, sTrack, function(t) sliderS = 1 - t;   updateVisuals(true) end)
		hookSlider(vHit, vTrack, function(t) sliderV = 1 - t;   updateVisuals(true) end)

		colorSelConn=selection.SelectionChanged:Connect(function() 
			revertPreview()
			cacheOriginals()
			resetSlidersToTarget()
		end)

		-- Initialize
		cacheOriginals()
		resetSlidersToTarget()

		-- Poll for external color changes and sync sliders
		local lastExternalColor = nil
		local _extAcc = 0
		local extPollConn = ctx.runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
			if isPreviewing then return end
			-- Throttle ~10fps: getColorTargets() walks the selection each call to catch an EXTERNAL color
			-- change (e.g. edited via the Properties panel); user-driven, so 0.1s latency is fine and
			-- avoids a per-frame selection walk with big selections.
			_extAcc += dt
			if _extAcc < 0.1 then return end
			_extAcc = 0
			local targets = getColorTargets()
			if #targets == 0 then lastExternalColor = nil; return end
			local ok, liveVal = pcall(targets[1].read)
			if not ok then return end
			local liveColor = getMiddleColor(liveVal)
			if lastExternalColor and (
				math.abs(liveColor.R - lastExternalColor.R) > 0.002 or
				math.abs(liveColor.G - lastExternalColor.G) > 0.002 or
				math.abs(liveColor.B - lastExternalColor.B) > 0.002
			) then
				cacheOriginals()
				resetSlidersToTarget()
			end
			lastExternalColor = liveColor
		end)
		if colorGui_inst then
			colorGui_inst.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
				pcall(function() extPollConn:Disconnect() end)
			end)
		end
	end

	return {
		mount   = mount,
		unmount = cleanup,
		isOpen  = isOpen,
	}
end

-- ShifterWindow v3: multi-select properties
local ok3d, Emitter3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Emitter3D end)
if not ok3d or type(Emitter3D)~="table" then Emitter3D = { isEmitter=function() return false end, get=function() end, set=function() end, bezierAttr=function(a) return "SineVFX_Bezier_"..a end } end
-- Transformed Trail/Beam kits. Kept in their own namespace: attribute names collide across kinds
-- on purpose, so every get/set keys by KIND first (see kitOf).
local _stub = { get=function() end, set=function() end, bezierAttr=function(a) return "SineVFX_Bezier_"..a end }
local okT, Trail3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Trail3D end)
if not okT or type(Trail3D)~="table" then Trail3D = { isTrail=function() return false end, get=_stub.get, set=_stub.set, bezierAttr=_stub.bezierAttr } end
local okB, Beam3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Beam3D end)
if not okB or type(Beam3D)~="table" then Beam3D = { isBeam=function() return false end, get=_stub.get, set=_stub.set, bezierAttr=_stub.bezierAttr } end
local function kitOf(inst)
	if Trail3D.isTrail and Trail3D.isTrail(inst) then return Trail3D end
	if Beam3D.isBeam  and Beam3D.isBeam(inst)  then return Beam3D  end
	return Emitter3D
end
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory)
	local C       = Theme.C
	local DRAG_TI = Theme.DRAG_TI
	local tw      = UIKit.tw

	local plugin           = ctx.plugin
	local selection        = ctx.selection
	local userInputService = ctx.userInputService
	local CHS              = ctx.CHS
	local coreGui          = ctx.coreGui

	local WIN_W    = 220
	local TOPBAR_H = 25
	local MIN_W    = 20
	local MAX_W    = 600
	local KSIZE    = 8
	local ROW_H    = 22
	local SL_ROW_H = 22
	local LIST_H   = 72
	local OPT_H    = 14
	local BTN_H    = 24
	local SB_W     = 6   -- matches SettingsWindow's list bar (sbW=6)
	local SB_GAP   = 3

	local shifterGui = nil
	local isPinned   = false
	local selConn    = nil

	local ALL_PROPS = {
		{ label="Rate",           prop="Rate",               cls="ParticleEmitter" },
		{ label="Speed",          prop="Speed",              cls="ParticleEmitter" },
		{ label="Lifetime",       prop="Lifetime",           cls="ParticleEmitter" },
		{ label="Size",           prop="Size",               cls="ParticleEmitter" },
		{ label="Squash",         prop="Squash",             cls="ParticleEmitter" },
		{ label="Rotation",       prop="Rotation",           cls="ParticleEmitter" },

	local function cleanup()
		if selConn    then selConn:Disconnect()  end
		if shifterGui then shifterGui:Destroy()  end
		shifterGui=nil; selConn=nil; isPinned=false
	end

	local function isOpen() return shifterGui and shifterGui.Parent~=nil end

	local function mount(App, SHIFTER_WINDOW_ID)
		cleanup()
		local MIN_H_COLLAPSED = 111
		local alreadyTweenedH = MIN_H_COLLAPSED

		local sw = WinFactory.standardWindow({
			stateKey="Shifter", guiName="SineVFX_Shifter_v3", displayOrder=10003,
			title="Shifter", tooltip="Add/subtract a value across VFX.",
			w=WIN_W, h=MIN_H_COLLAPSED, pos=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.4,0),
			minW=MIN_W, maxW=MAX_W, minH=MIN_H_COLLAPSED, maxH=600, noSaveH=true, topbarH=TOPBAR_H,
			onClose=function() App:toggle(SHIFTER_WINDOW_ID) end,
		})
		shifterGui = sw.gui
		local win     = sw.win
		local main    = sw.main
		local bgFrame  = sw.bgFrame
		local topbar  = sw.topbar

		-- Content
		local content=Instance.new("Frame")
		content.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,-TOPBAR_H); content.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,TOPBAR_H)
		content.BackgroundTransparency=1; content.Parent=bgFrame

		local FIXED_H = 5 + BTN_H + 4 + SL_ROW_H + 4 + ROW_H + 4

		local listContainer=Instance.new("Frame")
		listContainer.Position=UDim2.new(0,5,0,5)
		listContainer.Size=UDim2.new(1,-10,1,-(FIXED_H+7))
		listContainer.BackgroundTransparency=1
		listContainer.Parent=content

		local propListWrapper=Instance.new("CanvasGroup")
		propListWrapper.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(SB_W+SB_GAP+2),1,0)
		propListWrapper.BackgroundColor3=C.base; propListWrapper.BorderSizePixel=0
		propListWrapper.Parent=listContainer
		UIKit.corner(propListWrapper,7)
		-- CanvasGroup flattens + clips children to the rounded corners (no mask images needed)

		local propList=Instance.new("ScrollingFrame")
		propList.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0)
		propList.BackgroundTransparency=1; propList.BorderSizePixel=0
		propList.ScrollBarThickness=0; propList.ScrollBarImageTransparency=1
		pcall(function() propList.TopImage=""; propList.MidImage=""; propList.BottomImage="" end)
		propList.CanvasSize=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0); propList.ClipsDescendants=true
		propList.Parent=propListWrapper
		local listLayout=Instance.new("UIListLayout")
		listLayout.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
		listLayout.Parent=propList

		-- Custom scrollbar
		local sbTrack=Instance.new("Frame")
		sbTrack.Size=UDim2.new(0,SB_W,1,0)
		sbTrack.Position=UDim2.new(1,-(SB_W),0,0)
		sbTrack.BackgroundColor3=C.base; sbTrack.BorderSizePixel=0
		sbTrack.Parent=listContainer
		UIKit.corner(sbTrack,3)
		local sbThumb=Instance.new("Frame")
		sbThumb.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0.3,0); sbThumb.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0)
		sbThumb.BackgroundColor3=C.slider; sbThumb.BorderSizePixel=0
		sbThumb.BackgroundTransparency=0.4
		sbThumb.Parent=sbTrack
		UIKit.corner(sbThumb,3)

		-- Single source of truth for "does the list fit?" -- shared by scrollbar
		-- visibility AND the resize-height lock so they never disagree near the
		-- per-scale rounding boundary.
		local function contentFits()
			if propList.AbsoluteSize.Y<=0 then return true end
			local _S=UIKit.uiScaleOf(propList)
			return propList.CanvasSize.Y.Offset <= propList.AbsoluteSize.Y/_S + 3
		end
		local function updateScrollbar()
			propList.ScrollBarThickness=0; propList.ScrollBarImageTransparency=1
			local contentH=propList.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y
			local visH=propList.AbsoluteSize.Y
			if contentFits() then
				sbTrack.Visible=false
				propListWrapper.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0)
				return
			end
			sbTrack.Visible=true; sbThumb.Visible=true
			propListWrapper.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(SB_W+SB_GAP+2),1,0)
			local ratio=math.clamp(visH/contentH,0.1,1)
			local posR=propList.CanvasPosition.Y/math.max(1,contentH-visH)
			sbThumb.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,ratio,0)
			sbThumb.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,posR*(1-ratio),0)
		end
		propList:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(updateScrollbar)
		propList:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(updateScrollbar)
		listLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(function()
			propList.CanvasSize=UDim2.new(0,0,0,listLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y/UIKit.uiScaleOf(propList))
			updateScrollbar()
		end)

		-- Scrollbar drag
		local sbDragging=false
		sbThumb.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
			sbDragging=true; plugin:Activate(false)
			local startY=userInputService:GetMouseLocation().Y
			local startPos=propList.CanvasPosition.Y
			local mc=userInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement or not sbDragging then return end
				local dy=userInputService:GetMouseLocation().Y-startY
				local contentH=propList.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y
				local visH=propList.AbsoluteSize.Y
				local trackH=sbTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y
				local scrollRatio=contentH/math.max(1,trackH)
				propList.CanvasPosition=Vector2.new(0,math.clamp(startPos+dy*scrollRatio,0,contentH-visH))
			end)
			local ec; ec=userInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
				sbDragging=false; mc:Disconnect(); ec:Disconnect(); plugin:Deactivate()
			end)
		end)
		propList.InputChanged:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseWheel then
				local contentH=propList.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y
				local visH=propList.AbsoluteSize.Y
				propList.CanvasPosition=Vector2.new(0,math.clamp(propList.CanvasPosition.Y-inp.Position.Z*OPT_H*0.5,0,math.max(0,contentH-visH)))
			end
		end)

		-- valRow
		local valRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		valRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-10,0,ROW_H)
		valRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,5,1,-(5+BTN_H+4+SL_ROW_H+4+ROW_H))
		valRow.BackgroundTransparency=1
		valRow.Parent=content

		local BOX_SIDE=38; local BOX_GAP=4
		local function makeValBox(xPos,w,defText,dim)
			local box=Instance.new("TextBox")
			box.Size=UDim2.new(0,w,1,0); box.Position=xPos
			box.BackgroundColor3=C.base; box.TextColor3=dim and C.textDim or C.white
			box.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; box.TextSize=11
			box.ClearTextOnFocus=false; box.Text=defText
			box.BorderSizePixel=0; box.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
			box.Parent=valRow
			UIKit.corner(box,6)
			local bp=Instance.new("UIPadding"); bp.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,4); bp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,4); bp.Parent=box
			box.Focused:Connect(function() end)
			box.FocusLost:Connect(function() tw(box,{BackgroundColor3=C.base})    end)
			UIKit.numericOnly(box)
			return box
		end
		local minBox=makeValBox(UDim2.new(0,0,0,0),BOX_SIDE,tostring(plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_ShifterMin") or 0.5),true)
		local valBox=makeValBox(UDim2.new(0,BOX_SIDE+BOX_GAP,0,0),0,"1",false)
		local maxBox=makeValBox(UDim2.new(1,-BOX_SIDE,0,0),BOX_SIDE,tostring(plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_ShifterMax") or 2),true)
		valRow:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
			-- AbsoluteSize.X is post-scale; divide by uiScaleOf to get the LOGICAL width
			-- before feeding it back into an Offset (which UIScale re-multiplies). Without
			-- this the middle box double-scales at scale~=1 and overruns maxBox.
			local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(valRow)
			local avail=valRow.AbsoluteSize.X/_s-BOX_SIDE*2-BOX_GAP*2
			valBox.Size=UDim2.new(0,math.max(20,avail),1,0)
		end)

		-- sliderRow
		local sliderRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		sliderRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,SL_ROW_H)
		sliderRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,1,-(5+BTN_H+4+SL_ROW_H))
		sliderRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; sliderRow.ClipsDescendants=false
		sliderRow.Parent=content
		local sl=UIKit.makeHSlider(sliderRow,KSIZE,0)
		sl.fill.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; sl.knob.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; sl.kStroke:Destroy()
		sl.minLbl.Visible=false; sl.maxLbl.Visible=false
		local centreMark=Instance.new("Frame")
		centreMark.Size=UDim2.new(0,1,1,8); centreMark.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0)
		centreMark.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0,-4)
		centreMark.BackgroundColor3=C.textDim; centreMark.BackgroundTransparency=0.4
		centreMark.BorderSizePixel=0; centreMark.ZIndex=3; centreMark.Parent=sl.track

		-- btnRow
		local btnRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		btnRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-10,0,BTN_H)
		btnRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,5,1,-(5+BTN_H))
		btnRow.BackgroundTransparency=1
		btnRow.Parent=content

		local RESET_W,GAP=BTN_H,4
		local applyBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		applyBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(RESET_W+GAP),1,0)
		applyBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; applyBtn.Text="Shift"
		applyBtn.TextColor3=C.base; applyBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
		applyBtn.TextSize=12; applyBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; applyBtn.BorderSizePixel=0
		applyBtn.Parent=btnRow
		UIKit.corner(applyBtn,7)
		applyBtn:SetAttribute("BaseColor",C.accent)
		applyBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()       UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0.2)  end)
		applyBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()       UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0)    end)
		applyBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0.35) end)
		applyBtn.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()   UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0.2)  end)

		local resetBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		resetBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,RESET_W,1,0)
		resetBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); resetBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0)
		resetBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.base; resetBtn.Text=""
		resetBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; resetBtn.BorderSizePixel=0; resetBtn.Parent=btnRow
		UIKit.corner(resetBtn,7)
		local resetIcon=Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		resetIcon.Size=UDim2.new(0,18,0,18); resetIcon.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
		resetIcon.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); resetIcon.BackgroundTransparency=1
		resetIcon.ImageColor3=C.textDim; resetIcon.Parent=resetBtn
		UIKit.setIconImage(resetIcon,"438217405")
		UIKit.hoverLift(resetIcon, resetBtn)

		-- ── State ──────────────────────────────────────────
		local selectedDefs  = {}  -- key→def (multi-select)
		local sliderT       = 0.5
		local savedValues   = {}  -- def→{[inst]=origVal}
		local savedBez      = {}  -- def->{[inst]=bezier string} (so curves shift too)
		local isPreviewing  = false
		local slidingActive = false
		local optButtons    = {}
		local prevOrder     = 0
		local savedH        = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_ShifterH") or 300
		local blockSave     = false
		local propSizeConn=nil
		local listSizeConn  = nil

		local function isAnySelected() return next(selectedDefs)~=nil end

		-- Save height when list visible and user manually resizes
		-- Height is remembered in memory on every size change, but only WRITTEN once the user
		-- stops dragging. plugin:SetSetting is a ~29ms whole-blob reserialise, and this fires once
		-- per frame while resizing -- a write per frame is what made the drag stutter. (Same reason
		-- PropertiesWindow only persists its height on a real drag.)
		local _hSavePending=false
		local function _persistH()
			if _hSavePending then return end
			_hSavePending=true
			task.delay(0.4,function() _hSavePending=false; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_ShifterH",savedH) end)
		end
		main:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
			if blockSave then return end
			alreadyTweenedH=main.AbsoluteSize.Y
			local h=main.AbsoluteSize.Y
			if listContainer.Visible and h>MIN_H_COLLAPSED+20 then
				savedH=h; _persistH()
			end
		end)

		local function getMinMult() return tonumber(minBox.Text) or 0.5 end
		local function getMaxMult() return tonumber(maxBox.Text) or 2   end

		local function tToMult(t)
			local mn,mx=getMinMult(),getMaxMult()
			if t<=0.5 then return mn+(t*2)*(1-mn)
			else return 1+((t-0.5)*2)*(mx-1) end
		end
		local function multToT(mult)
			local mn,mx=getMinMult(),getMaxMult()
			if mult<=1 then
				local d=1-mn; if d==0 then return 0.5 end
				return math.clamp((mult-mn)/d*0.5,0,0.5)
			else
				local d=mx-1; if d==0 then return 0.5 end
				return math.clamp(0.5+(mult-1)/d*0.5,0.5,1)
			end
		end

		local function round2(n) return math.floor(n*100+0.5)/100 end
		local function showMult() valBox.Text=tostring(round2(tToMult(sliderT))) end

		local function updateSliderVisual(t)
			tw(sl.fill,{Size=UDim2.new(t,0,1,0)},DRAG_TI)
			tw(sl.knob,{Position=UDim2.new(t,0,0.5,0)},DRAG_TI)
			showMult()
		end
		local function resetSliderToOne() sliderT=0.5; updateSliderVisual(0.5) end

		local function getTargets(def)
			if not def then return {} end
			local seen,list={},{}
			for _,obj in pairs(selection:Get()) do
				if obj==game or obj==workspace or obj==game:GetService("Players") then continue end
				if not obj:IsDescendantOf(game) then continue end
				local function chk(inst)
					if seen[inst] then return end; seen[inst]=true
					if def.cls=="SineVFX3D" then
						if Emitter3D.isEmitter(inst) then table.insert(list,inst) end
						return
					end
					if def.cls=="SineVFXTrail" then
						if Trail3D.isTrail(inst) then table.insert(list,inst) end
						return
					end
					if def.cls=="SineVFXBeam" then
						if Beam3D.isBeam(inst) then table.insert(list,inst) end
						return
					end
					-- a transformed ribbon is driven from its attributes, so the native Trail/Beam rows
					-- would be silently reverted -- it has its own rows above
					if Trail3D.isTrail(inst) or Beam3D.isBeam(inst) then return end
					-- non-3D defs: never match anything that IS or is INSIDE a 3D emitter (its RenderPart
					-- & nested effects belong to the 3D particle, not the plain-part/emitter tools)
					if Emitter3D.isInsideEmitter(inst) then return end
					if inst:IsA(def.cls) then
						local ok=pcall(function() return inst[def.prop] end)
						if ok then table.insert(list,inst) end
					end
				end
				chk(obj)
				for _,d in pairs(ctx.descendantsTo(obj)) do chk(d) end
			end
			return list
		end

		local function getAvailableProps()
			local av={}
			for _,def in ipairs(ALL_PROPS) do
				if #getTargets(def)>0 then av[def]=true end
			end
			return av
		end

		local function scaleVal(orig,mult)
			if type(orig)=="number" then
				return orig*mult
			elseif typeof(orig)=="NumberRange" then
				return NumberRange.new(orig.Min*mult,orig.Max*mult)
			elseif typeof(orig)=="NumberSequence" then
				local kps={}
				for _,kp in ipairs(orig.Keypoints) do
					table.insert(kps,NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(kp.Time,kp.Value*mult,kp.Envelope*mult))
				end
				return NumberSequence.new(kps)
			elseif typeof(orig)=="Vector3" then
				return orig*mult
			elseif typeof(orig)=="Vector2" then
				return orig*mult
			end
			return orig
		end

		local function cacheOriginals()
			savedValues={}
			for _,def in pairs(selectedDefs) do
				savedValues[def]={}; savedBez[def]={}
				for _,inst in pairs(getTargets(def)) do
					if def.cls=="SineVFX3D" then
						local vals,bez={},{}
						for _,a in ipairs(def.attrs) do
							vals[a]=kitOf(inst).get(inst,a)
							if typeof(vals[a])=="NumberSequence" then bez[a]=inst:GetAttribute(kitOf(inst).bezierAttr(a)) end
						end
						savedValues[def][inst]=vals; savedBez[def][inst]=bez
					else
						pcall(function() savedValues[def][inst]=inst[def.prop]; if typeof(inst[def.prop])=="NumberSequence" then savedBez[def][inst]=inst:GetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..def.prop) end end)
					end
				end
			end
		end

		local function applyMultTo(mult)
			for def,instMap in pairs(savedValues) do
				for inst,orig in pairs(instMap) do
					if def.cls=="SineVFX3D" then
						for a,ov in pairs(orig) do
							pcall(function()
								kitOf(inst).set(inst,a,scaleVal(ov,mult))
								local b=savedBez[def][inst] and savedBez[def][inst][a]
								if b then inst:SetAttribute(kitOf(inst).bezierAttr(a), UIKit.bezierTransform(b,mult,1)) end
							end)
						end
					else
						pcall(function() inst[def.prop]=scaleVal(orig,mult); if savedBez[def] and savedBez[def][inst] then inst:SetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..def.prop, UIKit.bezierTransform(savedBez[def][inst], mult, 1)) end end)
					end
				end
			end
		end
		local function applyPreview()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			applyMultTo(tToMult(sliderT))
		end

		local function revertPreview()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			for def,instMap in pairs(savedValues) do
				for inst,orig in pairs(instMap) do
					if def.cls=="SineVFX3D" then
						for a,ov in pairs(orig) do
							pcall(function() local K=kitOf(inst); K.set(inst,a,ov); local b=savedBez[def][inst] and savedBez[def][inst][a]; if b~=nil then inst:SetAttribute(K.bezierAttr(a), b) end end)
						end
					else
						pcall(function() inst[def.prop]=orig; if savedBez[def] and savedBez[def][inst]~=nil then inst:SetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..def.prop, savedBez[def][inst]) end end)
					end
				end
			end
			isPreviewing=false
		end

		local function commitApply()
			if not isAnySelected() or not isPreviewing then return end
			revertPreview()
			CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Shift Before")
			applyMultTo(tToMult(sliderT))
			isPreviewing=false
			CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Shift After")
			cacheOriginals(); resetSliderToOne()
		end

		local function resetAll() revertPreview(); resetSliderToOne() end

		-- ── Property list ──────────────────────────────────────
		local CLASS_ICONS={
			ParticleEmitter="131377150575337",
			Sound="124463162348884",
			Beam="140122122335338",
			Trail="123552365554169",
			BasePart="126042378893608",
			SineVFX3D="126042378893608",
			SineVFXTrail="123552365554169",
			SineVFXBeam="140122122335338",
			Light="130938062190902",
		}

		local function updateButtonVisuals()
			for key,btn in pairs(optButtons) do
				local active=selectedDefs[key]~=nil
				if active then
					tw(btn,{TextColor3=C.white,BackgroundTransparency=0})
					btn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
					local ic=btn:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ImageLabel")
					if ic then tw(ic,{ImageColor3=C.white,ImageTransparency=0}) end
				else
					tw(btn,{TextColor3=C.textDim,BackgroundTransparency=1})
					btn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium
					local ic=btn:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ImageLabel")
					if ic then tw(ic,{ImageColor3=C.text,ImageTransparency=0.25}) end
				end
				btn.BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5)
			end
		end

		local function toggleDef(def)
			revertPreview()
			local key=def.label..def.cls
			if selectedDefs[key] then selectedDefs[key]=nil
			else selectedDefs[key]=def end
			updateButtonVisuals()
			cacheOriginals(); resetSliderToOne()
		end

		local function rebuildList()
			for _,ch in pairs(propList:GetChildren()) do
				if ch:IsA("TextButton") then ch:Destroy() end
			end
			optButtons={}; local av=getAvailableProps(); local order=0
			for _,def in ipairs(ALL_PROPS) do
				if not av[def] then continue end
				order+=1
				local opt=Instance.new("TextButton")
				opt.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,OPT_H); opt.BackgroundTransparency=1
				opt.BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5); opt.AutoButtonColor=false; opt.Selectable=false
				opt.Text=def.label; opt.TextColor3=C.textDim; opt.TextTruncate=Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd
				opt.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; opt.TextSize=13
				opt.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
				opt.LayoutOrder=order; opt.ZIndex=3; opt.Parent=propList
				local op=Instance.new("UIPadding"); op.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,26); op.Parent=opt
				local iconId=CLASS_ICONS[def.cls]
				if iconId then
					local img=Instance.new("ImageLabel")
					img.Size=UDim2.new(0,16,0,16)
					img.Position=UDim2.new(0,-20,0.5,-8)
					img.BackgroundTransparency=1
					img.ImageColor3=C.text; img.ImageTransparency=0.25
					img.ZIndex=4; img.Parent=opt
					img.ScaleType=Enum.ScaleType.Fit
					UIKit.setIconImage(img,iconId)
				end
				local key=def.label..def.cls
				optButtons[key]=opt
				opt.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
					if selectedDefs[key] then tw(opt,{BackgroundTransparency=0,BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5):Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),0.15)})
					else tw(opt,{TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH),BackgroundTransparency=0.88}) end
				end)
				opt.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
					if selectedDefs[key] then tw(opt,{BackgroundTransparency=0,BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5)})
					else tw(opt,{TextColor3=C.textDim,BackgroundTransparency=1}) end
				end)
				opt.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
					toggleDef(def)
					-- Re-apply hover state since mouse is still over button
					if selectedDefs[key] then tw(opt,{BackgroundTransparency=0,BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5):Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),0.15)})
					else tw(opt,{TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH),BackgroundTransparency=0.88}) end
				end)
			end

			-- Remove selected defs no longer available
			local newSel={}
			for k,def in pairs(selectedDefs) do
				if av[def] then newSel[k]=def end
			end
			selectedDefs=newSel

			if order==0 then
				if prevOrder>0 and listContainer.Visible then
					blockSave=true
					local absX=main.AbsolutePosition.X; local absY=main.AbsolutePosition.Y
					main.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0)
					main.Position=UDim2.new(0,absX,0,absY)
					tw(main,{Size=UDim2.new(0,main.Size.X.Offset,0,MIN_H_COLLAPSED)})
					win.currentSize.h=MIN_H_COLLAPSED
					-- collapse re-anchors to (0,0) for the shrink animation; restore the
					-- RESPONSIVE anchor after it settles so closing while collapsed saves the
					-- correct anchor (was saving (0,0) -> window forgot its corner on reopen).
					task.delay(0.16,function() blockSave=false; win.applyResponsivePosition() end)
				end
				win.setMaxH(600)
			else
				local maxH=TOPBAR_H+5+(order*OPT_H)+FIXED_H+2
				win.setMaxH(maxH)
				local cur=main.Size.Y.Offset  -- LOGICAL: maxH/savedH are logical, AbsoluteSize.Y is scaled
				local targetH
				if cur>maxH then
					targetH=maxH
				elseif savedH and math.min(savedH,maxH)>cur+2 then
					targetH=math.min(savedH,maxH)
				end
				if targetH then
					blockSave=true; alreadyTweenedH=targetH
					tw(main,{Size=UDim2.new(0,main.Size.X.Offset,0,targetH)})
					win.currentSize.h=targetH
					task.delay(0.15,function() blockSave=false end)
				end
			end
			prevOrder=order

			local MIN_LIST_VIS=5
			local isVis=(listContainer.AbsoluteSize.Y>=MIN_LIST_VIS)
			listContainer.Visible=isVis

			if listSizeConn then listSizeConn:Disconnect(); listSizeConn=nil end
			listSizeConn=listContainer:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
				listContainer.Visible=listContainer.AbsoluteSize.Y>=MIN_LIST_VIS
				updateScrollbar()
			end)

			-- Lock maxH when scrollbar disappears (skip during resize to avoid mid-drag clamping)
			if propSizeConn then propSizeConn:Disconnect(); propSizeConn=nil end
			propSizeConn=propList:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
				if win.isResizing() then return end
				local pOrd=prevOrder or 0
				if pOrd==0 then return end
				if contentFits() then
					win.setMaxH(math.ceil(main.Size.Y.Offset))
				else
					win.setMaxH(TOPBAR_H+5+(pOrd*OPT_H)+FIXED_H+2)
				end
			end)

			-- No auto-select; restore previously selected defs
			updateButtonVisuals()
			if isAnySelected() then
				cacheOriginals(); resetSliderToOne()
			else
				valBox.Text="1"; resetSliderToOne()
			end
		end

		-- ── Slider ──────────────────────────────────────────
		resetSliderToOne()

		sl.hitbox.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
			slidingActive=true; plugin:Activate(false)
			if not isPreviewing and isAnySelected() then cacheOriginals(); isPreviewing=true end
			local function getT()
				local mp=userInputService:GetMouseLocation()
				local w=sl.track.AbsoluteSize.X
				return w<=0 and 0 or math.clamp((mp.X-sl.track.AbsolutePosition.X)/w,0,1)
			end
			sliderT=getT(); updateSliderVisual(sliderT); applyPreview()
			local mc=userInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement and slidingActive then
					sliderT=getT(); updateSliderVisual(sliderT); applyPreview()
				end
			end)
			local ec; ec=userInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
				slidingActive=false; mc:Disconnect(); ec:Disconnect(); plugin:Deactivate()
				-- Re-cache so next drag uses current (possibly manually edited) values
				end)
		end)
		sl.hitbox.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton3 then return end
			if isPreviewing then revertPreview(); cacheOriginals() end
			resetSliderToOne()
		end)

		-- Range boxes
		local function onRangeChanged()
			if isPreviewing then revertPreview(); cacheOriginals() end
			resetSliderToOne()
		end
		minBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local v=tonumber(minBox.Text); if not v then minBox.Text="0.5"; v=0.5 end
			minBox.Text=tostring(v); plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_ShifterMin", v); onRangeChanged()
		end)
		maxBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local v=tonumber(maxBox.Text); if not v then maxBox.Text="2"; v=2 end
			maxBox.Text=tostring(v); plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_ShifterMax", v); onRangeChanged()
		end)
		valBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			if not isAnySelected() then showMult(); return end
			local v=tonumber(valBox.Text); if not v then showMult(); return end
			if not isPreviewing then cacheOriginals(); isPreviewing=true end
			-- applyMultTo handles BOTH property defs and SineVFX3D attr defs, and
			-- always scales from the cached originals (no compounding re-cache)
			applyMultTo(v)
			sliderT=multToT(v)
			tw(sl.fill,{Size=UDim2.new(sliderT,0,1,0)},DRAG_TI)
			tw(sl.knob,{Position=UDim2.new(sliderT,0,0.5,0)},DRAG_TI)
			valBox.Text=tostring(math.floor(v*100+0.5)/100)
		end)

		applyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(commitApply)
		resetBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(resetAll)

		selConn=selection.SelectionChanged:Connect(function()
			revertPreview(); rebuildList()
		end)

		rebuildList()
		if WinFactory.onScaleChanged then WinFactory.onScaleChanged(function() if main.Parent then rebuildList() end end) end
	end

	return { mount=mount, unmount=cleanup, isOpen=isOpen }
end

-- ResizeWindow: proportionally scale visual properties per class
local ok3d, Emitter3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Emitter3D end)
if not ok3d or type(Emitter3D)~="table" then Emitter3D = { isEmitter=function() return false end, get=function() end, set=function() end, bezierAttr=function(a) return "SineVFX_Bezier_"..a end } end
local okTr, Trail3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Trail3D end)
if not okTr or type(Trail3D)~="table" then Trail3D = { isTrail=function() return false end, get=function() end, set=function() end, bezierAttr=function(a) return "SineVFX_Bezier_"..a end } end
local okBm, Beam3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Beam3D end)
if not okBm or type(Beam3D)~="table" then Beam3D = { isBeam=function() return false end, get=function() end, set=function() end, bezierAttr=function(a) return "SineVFX_Bezier_"..a end } end
-- Pseudo-class name for a transformed trail in CLASS_PROPS (it is a Trail, so it cannot be keyed
-- by ClassName without colliding with the native Trail rows).
local TRAIL_CLS_KEY = "SineVFXTrail"
local BEAM_CLS_KEY  = "SineVFXBeam"
-- Attribute-backed classes route through their OWN module: the two specs deliberately share
-- attribute names, so using Emitter3D for a trail would resolve the wrong Configuration (or none).
local function api3d(cls) if cls == TRAIL_CLS_KEY then return Trail3D end if cls == BEAM_CLS_KEY then return Beam3D end return Emitter3D end
local function isKind(cls, inst)
	if cls == "SineVFX3D" then return Emitter3D.isEmitter(inst) end
	if cls == TRAIL_CLS_KEY then return Trail3D.isTrail(inst) end
	if cls == BEAM_CLS_KEY then return Beam3D.isBeam(inst) end
	-- a transformed trail/beam must NOT also match its native class or it gets scaled twice
	return not Emitter3D.isInsideEmitter(inst) and not Trail3D.isTrail(inst) and not Beam3D.isBeam(inst) and inst:IsA(cls)
end
local okSpec, EmitterSpec = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).EmitterSpec end)
local RENDER_NAME = (okSpec and EmitterSpec.RENDER_NAME) or "RenderPart"
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory)
	local C       = Theme.C
	local DRAG_TI = Theme.DRAG_TI
	local tw      = UIKit.tw

	local plugin           = ctx.plugin
	local selection        = ctx.selection
	local userInputService = ctx.userInputService
	local CHS              = ctx.CHS
	local coreGui          = ctx.coreGui

	local WIN_W    = 220
	local WIN_H    = 111
	local TOPBAR_H = 25
	local MIN_W    = 20
	local MAX_W    = 600
	local KSIZE    = 8
	local ROW_H    = 22
	local SL_ROW_H = 22
	local BTN_H    = 24

	-- Properties to scale per class. Each entry: { prop, allowNeg }
	-- allowNeg = true means the value can be negative (don't clamp to 0)
	local CLASS_PROPS = {
		ParticleEmitter = {
			{ prop="Size",         ns=true            },
			{ prop="Speed",        nr=true            },
			{ prop="ZOffset",      allowNeg=true      },
			{ prop="Acceleration", isV3=true          },
		},
		Beam = {
			{ prop="Width0",       },
			{ prop="Width1",       },
			{ prop="CurveSize0",   allowNeg=true },
			{ prop="CurveSize1",   allowNeg=true },
			{ prop="TextureLength", skipIfStretch=true },
		},
		Trail = {
			{ prop="MinLength",    },
			{ prop="MaxLength",    },
			{ prop="Lifetime",     },
			{ prop="WidthScale", ns=true },
			{ prop="TextureLength", skipIfStretch=true },
		},
		Light = {
			{ prop="Brightness",   },
			{ prop="Range",        },
		},
		-- Transformed trail (attribute-backed). Its real WIDTH is the attachment separation, handled
		-- below exactly like a native Trail, so Size is deliberately NOT scaled here: Size multiplies
		-- WidthScale, and scaling both would change the width twice.
		[TRAIL_CLS_KEY] = {
			{ attr="MinLength", ns=true },
			{ attr="MaxLength", ns=true },
			{ attr="Lifetime" },
			{ attr="WidthScale", ns=true },
			{ attr="TextureLength", ns=true, skipIfStretch=true },
		},
		-- Transformed beam (attribute-backed, blueprint = Utilities.BeamSpec). Width0/1 + CurveSize0/1
		-- + TextureLength are the resizable NumberSequences; its LENGTH is the attachment separation,
		-- handled by the beam-attachment path below just like a native beam.
		[BEAM_CLS_KEY] = {
			{ attr="Width0", ns=true },
			{ attr="Width1", ns=true },
			{ attr="CurveSize0", ns=true },
			{ attr="CurveSize1", ns=true },
			{ attr="TextureLength", ns=true, skipIfStretch=true },
		},
		SineVFX3D = {  -- 3D particle emitter (attribute-backed): scale Size, Speed, ZOffset (like ParticleEmitter)
			{ attr="SizeX",   ns=true },
			{ attr="SizeY",   ns=true },
			{ attr="SizeZ",   ns=true },
			{ attr="ShapeSizeX", ns=true },  -- spawn-region half-extent per axis (studs, curve); scales with the emitter
			{ attr="ShapeSizeY", ns=true },
			{ attr="ShapeSizeZ", ns=true },
			{ attr="Radius",  ns=true },  -- Bezier spline bend radius (studs, curve); scales + carries its own bezier
			{ attr="Speed",   ns=true },
			{ attr="ZOffset", allowNeg=true },
			{ attr="Offset", nr=true },
			{ attr="Spacing" },
			{ attr="PositionX", ns=true },
			{ attr="PositionY", ns=true },
			{ attr="PositionZ", ns=true },
			{ attr="AccelX",  ns=true },
			{ attr="AccelY",  ns=true },
			{ attr="AccelZ",  ns=true },
		},
	}

	local resizeGui = nil
	local isPinned  = false
	local selConn   = nil

	local attachWatchers = {}
	local function cleanup()
		if selConn   then selConn:Disconnect() end
		for _,conn in pairs(attachWatchers) do pcall(function() conn:Disconnect() end) end
		attachWatchers={}
		if resizeGui then resizeGui:Destroy()  end
		resizeGui=nil; selConn=nil; isPinned=false
	end

	local function isOpen() return resizeGui and resizeGui.Parent~=nil end

	local function mount(App, RESIZE_WINDOW_ID)
		cleanup()
		local sw = WinFactory.standardWindow({
			stateKey="Resizer", guiName="SineVFX_Resize_v1", displayOrder=10004,
			title="Resizer", tooltip="Scale sizes by a multiplier.",
			w=WIN_W, h=WIN_H, pos=UDim2.new(0.5,60,0.4,0),
			minW=MIN_W, maxW=MAX_W, noYResize=true, topbarH=TOPBAR_H,
			onClose=function() App:toggle(RESIZE_WINDOW_ID) end,
		})
		resizeGui = sw.gui
		local win     = sw.win
		local main    = sw.main
		local bgFrame  = sw.bgFrame
		local topbar  = sw.topbar

		local content=Instance.new("Frame")
		content.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,-TOPBAR_H); content.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,TOPBAR_H)
		content.BackgroundTransparency=1; content.Parent=bgFrame

		local valRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		valRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-10,0,ROW_H)
		valRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,5,0,5)
		valRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; valRow.Parent=content

		local BOX_SIDE=38; local BOX_GAP=4
		local function makeValBox(xPos, w, defText, dim)
			local box=Instance.new("TextBox")
			box.Size=UDim2.new(0,w,1,0); box.Position=xPos
			box.BackgroundColor3=C.base; box.TextColor3=dim and C.textDim or C.white
			box.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; box.TextSize=11
			box.ClearTextOnFocus=false; box.Text=defText
			box.BorderSizePixel=0; box.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
			box.Parent=valRow
			UIKit.corner(box,6)
			local bp=Instance.new("UIPadding"); bp.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,4); bp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,4); bp.Parent=box
			box.Focused:Connect(function() end)
			box.FocusLost:Connect(function() tw(box,{BackgroundColor3=C.base})    end)
			UIKit.numericOnly(box)
			return box
		end

		local minBox = makeValBox(UDim2.new(0,0,0,0),                BOX_SIDE, tostring(plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_ResizerMin") or 0.5), true)
		local valBox = makeValBox(UDim2.new(0,BOX_SIDE+BOX_GAP,0,0), 0,       "1",   false)
		local maxBox = makeValBox(UDim2.new(1,-BOX_SIDE,0,0),         BOX_SIDE, tostring(plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_ResizerMax") or 2),   true)

		valRow:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
			-- AbsoluteSize.X is post-scale; divide by uiScaleOf to get the LOGICAL width
			-- before feeding it back into an Offset (which UIScale re-multiplies). Without
			-- this the middle box double-scales at scale~=1 and overruns maxBox.
			local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(valRow)
			local avail=valRow.AbsoluteSize.X/_s - BOX_SIDE*2 - BOX_GAP*2
			valBox.Size=UDim2.new(0,math.max(20,avail),1,0)
		end)

		local sliderRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		sliderRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,SL_ROW_H)
		sliderRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,5+ROW_H+4)
		sliderRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; sliderRow.ClipsDescendants=false
		sliderRow.Parent=content
		local sl=UIKit.makeHSlider(sliderRow, KSIZE, 0)
		sl.fill.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; sl.knob.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; sl.kStroke:Destroy()
		sl.minLbl.Visible=false; sl.maxLbl.Visible=false
		local centreMark=Instance.new("Frame")
		centreMark.Size=UDim2.new(0,1,1,8); centreMark.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0)
		centreMark.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0,-4)
		centreMark.BackgroundColor3=C.textDim; centreMark.BackgroundTransparency=0.4
		centreMark.BorderSizePixel=0; centreMark.ZIndex=3; centreMark.Parent=sl.track

		local btnRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		btnRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-10,0,BTN_H)
		btnRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,5,0,5+ROW_H+4+SL_ROW_H+4)
		btnRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; btnRow.Parent=content

		local RESET_W,GAP=BTN_H,4
		local applyBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		applyBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(RESET_W+GAP),1,0)
		applyBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; applyBtn.Text="Resize"
		applyBtn.TextColor3=C.base; applyBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
		applyBtn.TextSize=12; applyBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; applyBtn.BorderSizePixel=0
		applyBtn.Parent=btnRow
		UIKit.corner(applyBtn,7)
		applyBtn:SetAttribute("BaseColor",C.accent)
		applyBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()       UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0.2)  end)
		applyBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()       UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0)    end)
		applyBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0.35) end)
		applyBtn.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()   UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0.2)  end)

		local resetBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		resetBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,RESET_W,1,0)
		resetBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); resetBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0)
		resetBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.base; resetBtn.Text=""
		resetBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; resetBtn.BorderSizePixel=0; resetBtn.Parent=btnRow
		UIKit.corner(resetBtn,7)
		local resetIcon=Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		resetIcon.Size=UDim2.new(0,18,0,18); resetIcon.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
		resetIcon.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); resetIcon.BackgroundTransparency=1
		resetIcon.ImageColor3=C.textDim; resetIcon.Parent=resetBtn
		UIKit.setIconImage(resetIcon,"438217405")
		UIKit.hoverLift(resetIcon, resetBtn)

		-- State
		local sliderT          = 0.5
		local savedData        = {}  -- prop scaling entries
		local beamAttachData   = {}  -- beam attachment entries: { beam, mid, off0, off1, att0, att1 }
	local att3dData        = {}  -- 3D nested attachment offsets, ONLY when the emitter's ScaleAttachments is off: { a=Attachment, base=Position }
		local isPreviewing     = false
		local slidingActive    = false

		local function getMinMult() return tonumber(minBox.Text) or 0.5 end
		local function getMaxMult() return tonumber(maxBox.Text) or 2   end

		local function tToMult(t)
			local mn,mx=getMinMult(),getMaxMult()
			if t<=0.5 then return mn+(t*2)*(1-mn)
			else           return 1+((t-0.5)*2)*(mx-1) end
		end
		local function multToT(mult)
			local mn,mx=getMinMult(),getMaxMult()
			if mult<=1 then
				local d=1-mn; if d==0 then return 0.5 end
				return math.clamp((mult-mn)/d*0.5,0,0.5)
			else
				local d=mx-1; if d==0 then return 0.5 end
				return math.clamp(0.5+(mult-1)/d*0.5,0.5,1)
			end
		end

		local function round2(n) return math.floor(n*100+0.5)/100 end
		local function showMult() valBox.Text=tostring(round2(tToMult(sliderT))) end

		local function updateSliderVisual(t)
			tw(sl.fill,{Size=UDim2.new(t,0,1,0)},DRAG_TI)
			tw(sl.knob,{Position=UDim2.new(t,0,0.5,0)},DRAG_TI)
			showMult()
		end
		local function resetSliderToOne() sliderT=0.5; updateSliderVisual(0.5) end

		-- Scale a single value by mult
		local function scaleVal(orig, mult, def)
			if def.nr then
				if typeof(orig)~="NumberRange" then return orig end
				return NumberRange.new(orig.Min*mult, orig.Max*mult)
			elseif def.ns then
				if typeof(orig)~="NumberSequence" then return orig end
				local kps={}
				for _,kp in ipairs(orig.Keypoints) do
					table.insert(kps,NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(kp.Time, kp.Value*mult, kp.Envelope*mult))
				end
				return NumberSequence.new(kps)
			elseif def.isV3 then
				if typeof(orig)~="Vector3" then return orig end
				return orig * mult
			else
				if type(orig)~="number" then return orig end
				return orig*mult
			end
		end

		local function getTargets()
			local seen,list={},{}
			local emitterSeen={}
			local function addTarget(inst,cls)
				if cls=="SineVFX3D" then if emitterSeen[inst] then return end emitterSeen[inst]=true end
				table.insert(list,{inst=inst,cls=cls})
			end
			for _,obj in pairs(selection:Get()) do
				if obj==game or obj==workspace then continue end
				if not obj:IsDescendantOf(game) then continue end
				-- The emitter ROOT is invisible, so clicking in the viewport usually selects its
				-- RenderPart or nested content instead. Resolve the enclosing SineVFX3D emitter so the
				-- resizer works no matter which of those the user actually clicked.
				local anc=obj
				while anc and anc~=game do
					if Emitter3D.isEmitter(anc) then addTarget(anc,"SineVFX3D"); break end
					anc=anc.Parent
				end
