				if seen[obj] then continue end; seen[obj]=true
				local function chk(inst)
					if seen[inst] and inst~=obj then return end
					for cls,_ in pairs(CLASS_PROPS) do
						if isKind(cls, inst) then
							addTarget(inst,cls)
							break
						end
					end
					for _,d in pairs(ctx.descendantsTo(inst)) do
						if seen[d] then continue end; seen[d]=true
						for cls,_ in pairs(CLASS_PROPS) do
							if isKind(cls, d) then
								addTarget(d,cls)
								break
							end
						end
					end
				end
				chk(obj)
			end
			return list
		end

		local function cacheOriginals()
			savedData={}; beamAttachData={}; att3dData={}
			for _,t in pairs(getTargets()) do
				local defs = CLASS_PROPS[t.cls]
				local API = api3d(t.cls)
				-- Scale the target's OWN props (the 3D particle's Size/Speed/etc). Its nested RenderPart
				-- content (beams/trails/emitters/lights) ALSO scales in the SineVFX3D block below.
				for _,def in ipairs(defs) do
					pcall(function()
						if def.attr then
							table.insert(savedData, {inst=t.inst, def=def, api=API, orig=API.get(t.inst,def.attr), origBez=def.ns and t.inst:GetAttribute(API.bezierAttr(def.attr)) or nil})
						else
							table.insert(savedData, {inst=t.inst, def=def, orig=t.inst[def.prop], origBez=def.ns and t.inst:GetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..def.prop) or nil})
						end
					end)
				end
				if t.cls == "SineVFX3D" then
					-- Nested trails/beams inside the RenderPart. Two independent parts:
					--   * CLASS size-props (a beam's Width0/1/CurveSize/TextureLength, a trail's Min/Max
					--     Length + Lifetime) ALWAYS scale, so nested resizing works exactly like resizing a
					--     standalone ribbon. isKind() excludes inside-emitter instances from the native
					--     Trail/Beam targets, so this SineVFX3D branch is where nested ones get scaled.
					--   * ATTACHMENTS (a trail's width / a beam's length) are scaled here ONLY when
					--     ScaleAttachments is OFF. With it ON the runtime already grows every RenderPart
					--     attachment from the emitter's animated Size, so touching them here would double it.
					pcall(function()
						local render = t.inst:FindFirstChild(RENDER_NAME)
						if not render then return end
						-- Attachments scale here ONLY when ScaleAttachments is OFF. With it ON the runtime
						-- already grows every RenderPart attachment from the (now-scaled) emitter Size, so
						-- touching them here too would double it.
						local scaleAtt = (Emitter3D.get(t.inst, "ScaleAttachments") == false)
						local ribbonAtt = {}
						for _,ch in ipairs(render:GetDescendants()) do
							-- scale ANY nested resizable instance's own class props: ParticleEmitter, Beam,
							-- Trail, Light (base class of Point/Spot/Surface). isKind() keeps inside-emitter
							-- instances out of the native targets, so this branch is where they get scaled.
							local defs = (ch:IsA("ParticleEmitter") and CLASS_PROPS.ParticleEmitter)
								or (ch:IsA("Beam") and CLASS_PROPS.Beam)
								or (ch:IsA("Trail") and CLASS_PROPS.Trail)
								or (ch:IsA("Light") and CLASS_PROPS.Light) or nil
							if defs then
								for _,def in ipairs(defs) do
									if def.prop then
										pcall(function()
											table.insert(savedData, {inst=ch, def=def, orig=ch[def.prop], origBez=def.ns and ch:GetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..def.prop) or nil})
										end)
									end
								end
							end
							-- Beam/Trail also scale their OWN attachment pair from its midpoint (trail width /
							-- beam length), in place instead of drifting -- when scaleAtt.
							if (ch:IsA("Beam") or ch:IsA("Trail")) and scaleAtt then
								local a0, a1 = ch.Attachment0, ch.Attachment1
								if a0 and a1 then
									ribbonAtt[a0] = true; ribbonAtt[a1] = true
									local useLocal = (a0.Parent ~= nil and a0.Parent == a1.Parent)
									local p0 = useLocal and a0.Position or a0.WorldPosition
									local p1 = useLocal and a1.Position or a1.WorldPosition
									local mid = (p0 + p1) / 2
									table.insert(beamAttachData, {beam=ch, att0=a0, off0=p0-mid, att1=a1, off1=p1-mid, mid=mid, isLocal=useLocal})
								end
							end
						end
						-- any LOOSE RenderPart attachment (not owned by a scaled ribbon) scales from the
						-- RenderPart origin.
						if scaleAtt then
							for _,ch in ipairs(render:GetDescendants()) do
								if ch:IsA("Attachment") and not ribbonAtt[ch] then
									table.insert(att3dData, {a=ch, base=ch.Position})
								end
							end
						end
					end)

				end
				local trailLike = (t.cls == "Trail" or t.cls == TRAIL_CLS_KEY)
				if t.cls == "Beam" or t.cls == BEAM_CLS_KEY or trailLike then  -- trails use Attachment0/1 separation for width, just like beams
					pcall(function()
						local beam = t.inst
						local att0, att1 = beam.Attachment0, beam.Attachment1
						if not att0 or not att1 then return end
						local useLocal = (trailLike and att0.Parent and att0.Parent == att1.Parent)
						local p0 = useLocal and att0.Position or att0.WorldPosition
						local p1 = useLocal and att1.Position or att1.WorldPosition
						local mid = (p0 + p1) / 2
						table.insert(beamAttachData, {
							beam=beam, att0=att0, off0=p0-mid,
							att1=att1, off1=p1-mid, mid=mid, isLocal=useLocal,
						})
					end)
				end
			end
		end

		-- Re-cache when beam attachments are assigned after selection
		attachWatchers = {}  -- (declared at module scope so cleanup() can disconnect)
		local function watchBeamAttachments()
			for _,conn in pairs(attachWatchers) do conn:Disconnect() end
			attachWatchers = {}
			for _,t in pairs(getTargets()) do
				if t.cls ~= "Beam" and t.cls ~= "Trail" and t.cls ~= TRAIL_CLS_KEY then continue end
				local beam = t.inst
				local function tryRecache()
					if beam.Attachment0 and beam.Attachment1 then
						cacheOriginals()
					end
				end
				table.insert(attachWatchers, beam:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Attachment0"):Connect(tryRecache))
				table.insert(attachWatchers, beam:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Attachment1"):Connect(tryRecache))
			end
		end

		local previewMult = 1  -- the EXACT multiplier being previewed (typed values can exceed the slider range)
		local function applyScale(mult)
			previewMult = mult
			for _,e in pairs(savedData) do
				pcall(function()
					-- Check TextureMode at apply time so toggling Stretch after select works
					if e.def.skipIfStretch and (e.inst:IsA("Beam") or e.inst:IsA("Trail")) then
						if e.inst.TextureMode == Enum.TextureMode.Stretch then return end
					end
					if e.def.attr then
						local API = e.api or Emitter3D
						API.set(e.inst, e.def.attr, scaleVal(e.orig,mult,e.def))
						if e.def.ns and e.origBez then e.inst:SetAttribute(API.bezierAttr(e.def.attr), UIKit.bezierTransform(e.origBez, mult, 1)) end
					else
						e.inst[e.def.prop]=scaleVal(e.orig,mult,e.def)
						if e.def.ns and e.origBez then e.inst:SetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..e.def.prop, UIKit.bezierTransform(e.origBez, mult, 1)) end
					end
				end)
			end
			-- Scale beam attachment distances from their midpoint

			for _,b in pairs(beamAttachData) do
				pcall(function()
					if b.isLocal then b.att0.Position=b.mid+b.off0*mult; b.att1.Position=b.mid+b.off1*mult else b.att0.WorldPosition=b.mid+b.off0*mult; b.att1.WorldPosition=b.mid+b.off1*mult end
				end)
			end
			-- Scale nested 3D RenderPart attachment offsets (only collected when ScaleAttachments is off)
			for _,e in pairs(att3dData) do
				pcall(function() if e.a and e.a.Parent then e.a.Position = e.base*mult end end)
			end
		end

		local function revertPreview()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			for _,e in pairs(savedData) do
				pcall(function()
					if e.def.attr then
						local API = e.api or Emitter3D
						API.set(e.inst, e.def.attr, e.orig); if e.def.ns and e.origBez~=nil then e.inst:SetAttribute(API.bezierAttr(e.def.attr), e.origBez) end
					else
						e.inst[e.def.prop]=e.orig; if e.def.ns and e.origBez~=nil then e.inst:SetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..e.def.prop, e.origBez) end
					end
				end)
			end
			for _,b in pairs(beamAttachData) do
				pcall(function()
					if b.isLocal then b.att0.Position=b.mid+b.off0; b.att1.Position=b.mid+b.off1 else b.att0.WorldPosition=b.mid+b.off0; b.att1.WorldPosition=b.mid+b.off1 end
				end)
			end
			for _,e in pairs(att3dData) do
				pcall(function() if e.a and e.a.Parent then e.a.Position = e.base end end)
			end
			isPreviewing=false
		end

		local function applyPreview()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			applyScale(tToMult(sliderT))
		end

		local function commitApply()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			revertPreview()
			CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Resize Before")
			applyScale(previewMult)
			isPreviewing=false
			CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Resize After")
			cacheOriginals(); resetSliderToOne()
		end

		local function resetAll()
			revertPreview(); resetSliderToOne()
		end

		resetSliderToOne()

		sl.hitbox.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
			slidingActive=true; plugin:Activate(false)
			-- Always re-cache at drag start so manual edits since last interaction are captured
			if isPreviewing then revertPreview() end
			cacheOriginals(); isPreviewing=true
			local function getT()
				local mp=userInputService:GetMouseLocation()
				local w=sl.track.AbsoluteSize.X
				return w<=0 and 0 or math.clamp((mp.X-sl.track.AbsolutePosition.X)/w,0,1)
			end
			sliderT=getT(); updateSliderVisual(sliderT); applyPreview()
			local mc=userInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement and slidingActive then
					sliderT=getT(); updateSliderVisual(sliderT); applyPreview()
				end
			end)
			local ec; ec=userInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
				slidingActive=false; mc:Disconnect(); ec:Disconnect(); plugin:Deactivate()
				-- Re-cache so next drag uses current (possibly manually edited) values
				end)
		end)
		sl.hitbox.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton3 then return end
			if isPreviewing then revertPreview() end
			resetSliderToOne()
		end)

		local function onRangeChanged()
			if isPreviewing then revertPreview() end
			resetSliderToOne()
		end
		minBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local v=tonumber(minBox.Text); if not v then minBox.Text="0.5"; v=0.5 end
			minBox.Text=tostring(v); plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_ResizerMin",v); onRangeChanged()
		end)
		maxBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local v=tonumber(maxBox.Text); if not v then maxBox.Text="2"; v=2 end
			maxBox.Text=tostring(v); plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_ResizerMax",v); onRangeChanged()
		end)
		valBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local v=tonumber(valBox.Text); if not v then showMult(); return end
			if not isPreviewing then isPreviewing=true end
			applyScale(v)
			-- Move slider visually but don't overwrite typed text with showMult
			sliderT=multToT(v)
			tw(sl.fill,{Size=UDim2.new(sliderT,0,1,0)},DRAG_TI)
			tw(sl.knob,{Position=UDim2.new(sliderT,0,0.5,0)},DRAG_TI)
			valBox.Text=tostring(math.floor(v*100+0.5)/100)
		end)

		applyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(commitApply)
		resetBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(resetAll)

		selConn=selection.SelectionChanged:Connect(function()
			for _,conn in pairs(attachWatchers) do conn:Disconnect() end
			attachWatchers={}
			revertPreview(); cacheOriginals(); resetSliderToOne()
			watchBeamAttachments()
		end)

		cacheOriginals(); watchBeamAttachments()
	end

	return { mount=mount, unmount=cleanup, isOpen=isOpen }
end

-- RetimerWindow: scale timing-related properties per class
local ok3d, Emitter3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Emitter3D end)
if not ok3d or type(Emitter3D)~="table" then Emitter3D = { isEmitter=function() return false end, get=function() end, set=function() end, bezierAttr=function(a) return "SineVFX_Bezier_"..a end } end
local okTr, Trail3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Trail3D end)
if not okTr or type(Trail3D)~="table" then Trail3D = { isTrail=function() return false end, get=function() end, set=function() end, bezierAttr=function(a) return "SineVFX_Bezier_"..a end } end
-- Pseudo-class key for a transformed trail (it IS a Trail, so it cannot be keyed by ClassName
-- without colliding with the native Trail rules).
local TRAIL_CLS_KEY = "SineVFXTrail"
-- The two specs deliberately share attribute names, so each attribute-backed kind must read and
-- write through its OWN module or it resolves the wrong Configuration (or none at all).
local function api3d(cls) if cls == TRAIL_CLS_KEY then return Trail3D end return Emitter3D end
local function isKind(cls, inst)
	if cls == "SineVFX3D" then return Emitter3D.isEmitter(inst) end
	if cls == TRAIL_CLS_KEY then return Trail3D.isTrail(inst) end
	-- a transformed trail must NOT also match the native Trail class or it gets retimed twice
	return not Emitter3D.isInsideEmitter(inst) and not Trail3D.isTrail(inst) and inst:IsA(cls)
end
local okSpec, EmitterSpec = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).EmitterSpec end)
local RENDER_NAME = (okSpec and EmitterSpec.RENDER_NAME) or "RenderPart"
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory)
	local C       = Theme.C
	local DRAG_TI = Theme.DRAG_TI
	local tw      = UIKit.tw

	local plugin           = ctx.plugin
	local selection        = ctx.selection
	local userInputService = ctx.userInputService
	local CHS              = ctx.CHS
	local coreGui          = ctx.coreGui

	local WIN_W    = 220
	local WIN_H    = 111
	local TOPBAR_H = 25
	local MIN_W    = 20
	local MAX_W    = 600
	local KSIZE    = 8
	local ROW_H    = 22
	local SL_ROW_H = 22
	local BTN_H    = 24

	local CLASS_PROPS = {
		ParticleEmitter = {
			{ prop="Lifetime",     nr=true,   inverse=true },
			{ prop="Rate",                               },
			{ prop="Speed",        nr=true              },
			{ prop="RotSpeed",     nr=true              },
			{ prop="Acceleration", isV3=true            },
			{ prop="Drag",                               },
		},
		Sound = {
			{ prop="PlaybackSpeed",                      },
			{ prop="TimePosition",                        },
		},
		Beam = {
			{ prop="TextureSpeed", allowNeg=true         },
		},
		Trail = {
			{ prop="Lifetime",     inverse=true         },
		},
		-- Transformed trail (attribute-backed): retime like a ParticleEmitter. Lifetime is how long
		-- each emitted copy lives (inverse: a 2x retime makes it last half as long) and Rate is how
		-- often copies appear. MinLength/MaxLength are studs, not seconds, so Resizer owns those.
		[TRAIL_CLS_KEY] = {
			-- Both retime, and both are plain numbers. Lifetime is the ribbon's linger (same rule as
			-- the native Trail above); Duration is how long until an emitted trail is deleted.
			{ attr="Lifetime", inverse=true },
			{ attr="Duration", inverse=true },
			{ attr="Rate" },
		},
		SineVFX3D = {  -- 3D particle emitter (attribute-backed): retime like ParticleEmitter
			{ attr="Lifetime",  nr=true, inverse=true },
			{ attr="Rate"       },
			{ attr="Speed",     ns=true },
			{ attr="RotSpeedX", ns=true },
			{ attr="RotSpeedY", ns=true },
			{ attr="RotSpeedZ", ns=true },
			{ attr="AnchorRotSpeedX", ns=true },  -- orbit/swirl spin (deg/s): must speed up with retime so splines/orbits look the same, just faster
			{ attr="AnchorRotSpeedY", ns=true },
			{ attr="AnchorRotSpeedZ", ns=true },
			{ attr="BezierSpeed", ns=true },  -- weave rate (points/sec): scale with retime so the spline weaves the same, just faster
			{ attr="AccelX",    ns=true, sq=true },
			{ attr="AccelY",    ns=true, sq=true },
			{ attr="AccelZ",    ns=true, sq=true },
		},
	}

	local retimerGui = nil
	local isPinned   = false
	local selConn    = nil

	local function cleanup()
		if selConn    then selConn:Disconnect()  end
		if retimerGui then retimerGui:Destroy()  end
		retimerGui=nil; selConn=nil; isPinned=false
	end

	local function isOpen() return retimerGui and retimerGui.Parent~=nil end

	local function mount(App, RETIMER_WINDOW_ID)
		cleanup()
		local sw = WinFactory.standardWindow({
			stateKey="Retimer", guiName="SineVFX_Retimer_v1", displayOrder=10005,
			title="Retimer", tooltip="Speed up or slow down VFX.",
			w=WIN_W, h=WIN_H, pos=UDim2.new(0.5,120,0.4,0),
			minW=MIN_W, maxW=MAX_W, noYResize=true, topbarH=TOPBAR_H,
			onClose=function() App:toggle(RETIMER_WINDOW_ID) end,
		})
		retimerGui = sw.gui
		local win     = sw.win
		local main    = sw.main
		local bgFrame  = sw.bgFrame
		local topbar  = sw.topbar

		local content=Instance.new("Frame")
		content.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,-TOPBAR_H); content.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,TOPBAR_H)
		content.BackgroundTransparency=1; content.Parent=bgFrame

		local valRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		valRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-10,0,ROW_H)
		valRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,5,0,5)
		valRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; valRow.Parent=content

		local BOX_SIDE=38; local BOX_GAP=4
		local function makeValBox(xPos, w, defText, dim)
			local box=Instance.new("TextBox")
			box.Size=UDim2.new(0,w,1,0); box.Position=xPos
			box.BackgroundColor3=C.base; box.TextColor3=dim and C.textDim or C.white
			box.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; box.TextSize=11
			box.ClearTextOnFocus=false; box.Text=defText
			box.BorderSizePixel=0; box.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
			box.Parent=valRow
			UIKit.corner(box,6)
			local bp=Instance.new("UIPadding"); bp.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,4); bp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,4); bp.Parent=box
			box.Focused:Connect(function() end)
			box.FocusLost:Connect(function() tw(box,{BackgroundColor3=C.base})    end)
			UIKit.numericOnly(box)
			return box
		end

		local minBox = makeValBox(UDim2.new(0,0,0,0),                BOX_SIDE, tostring(plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_RetimerMin") or 0.5), true)
		local valBox = makeValBox(UDim2.new(0,BOX_SIDE+BOX_GAP,0,0), 0,       "1",   false)
		local maxBox = makeValBox(UDim2.new(1,-BOX_SIDE,0,0),         BOX_SIDE, tostring(plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_RetimerMax") or 2),   true)

		valRow:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
			-- AbsoluteSize.X is post-scale; divide by uiScaleOf to get the LOGICAL width
			-- before feeding it back into an Offset (which UIScale re-multiplies). Without
			-- this the middle box double-scales at scale~=1 and overruns maxBox.
			local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(valRow)
			local avail=valRow.AbsoluteSize.X/_s - BOX_SIDE*2 - BOX_GAP*2
			valBox.Size=UDim2.new(0,math.max(20,avail),1,0)
		end)

		local sliderRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		sliderRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,SL_ROW_H)
		sliderRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,5+ROW_H+4)
		sliderRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; sliderRow.ClipsDescendants=false
		sliderRow.Parent=content
		local sl=UIKit.makeHSlider(sliderRow, KSIZE, 0)
		sl.fill.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; sl.knob.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; sl.kStroke:Destroy()
		sl.minLbl.Visible=false; sl.maxLbl.Visible=false
		local centreMark=Instance.new("Frame")
		centreMark.Size=UDim2.new(0,1,1,8); centreMark.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0)
		centreMark.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0,-4)
		centreMark.BackgroundColor3=C.textDim; centreMark.BackgroundTransparency=0.4
		centreMark.BorderSizePixel=0; centreMark.ZIndex=3; centreMark.Parent=sl.track

		local btnRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		btnRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-10,0,BTN_H)
		btnRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,5,0,5+ROW_H+4+SL_ROW_H+4)
		btnRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; btnRow.Parent=content

		local RESET_W,GAP=BTN_H,4
		local applyBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		applyBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(RESET_W+GAP),1,0)
		applyBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; applyBtn.Text="Retime"
		applyBtn.TextColor3=C.base; applyBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
		applyBtn.TextSize=12; applyBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; applyBtn.BorderSizePixel=0
		applyBtn.Parent=btnRow
		UIKit.corner(applyBtn,7)
		applyBtn:SetAttribute("BaseColor",C.accent)
		applyBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()       UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0.2)  end)
		applyBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()       UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0)    end)
		applyBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0.35) end)
		applyBtn.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()   UIKit.fadeButton(applyBtn,0.2)  end)

		local resetBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		resetBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,RESET_W,1,0)
		resetBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); resetBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0)
		resetBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.base; resetBtn.Text=""
		resetBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; resetBtn.BorderSizePixel=0; resetBtn.Parent=btnRow
		UIKit.corner(resetBtn,7)
		local resetIcon=Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		resetIcon.Size=UDim2.new(0,18,0,18); resetIcon.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
		resetIcon.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); resetIcon.BackgroundTransparency=1
		resetIcon.ImageColor3=C.textDim; resetIcon.Parent=resetBtn
		UIKit.setIconImage(resetIcon,"438217405")
		UIKit.hoverLift(resetIcon, resetBtn)

		-- State
		local sliderT      = 0.5
		local savedData    = {}
		local isPreviewing = false
		local slidingActive= false

		local function getMinMult() return tonumber(minBox.Text) or 0.5 end
		local function getMaxMult() return tonumber(maxBox.Text) or 2   end

		local function tToMult(t)
			local mn,mx=getMinMult(),getMaxMult()
			if t<=0.5 then return mn+(t*2)*(1-mn)
			else           return 1+((t-0.5)*2)*(mx-1) end
		end
		local function multToT(mult)
			local mn,mx=getMinMult(),getMaxMult()
			if mult<=1 then
				local d=1-mn; if d==0 then return 0.5 end
				return math.clamp((mult-mn)/d*0.5,0,0.5)
			else
				local d=mx-1; if d==0 then return 0.5 end
				return math.clamp(0.5+(mult-1)/d*0.5,0.5,1)
			end
		end

		local function round2(n) return math.floor(n*100+0.5)/100 end
		local function showMult() valBox.Text=tostring(round2(tToMult(sliderT))) end

		local function updateSliderVisual(t)
			tw(sl.fill,{Size=UDim2.new(t,0,1,0)},DRAG_TI)
			tw(sl.knob,{Position=UDim2.new(t,0,0.5,0)},DRAG_TI)
			showMult()
		end
		local function resetSliderToOne() sliderT=0.5; updateSliderVisual(0.5) end

		local function scaleVal(orig, mult, def)
			if mult == 0 then return orig end
			local m = def.inverse and 1/mult or mult
			if def.nr then
				if typeof(orig)~="NumberRange" then return orig end
				return NumberRange.new(orig.Min*m, orig.Max*m)
			elseif def.isV3 then
				if typeof(orig)~="Vector3" then return orig end
				return orig * m
			elseif def.ns then
				if typeof(orig)~="NumberSequence" then return orig end
				local sm = def.sq and m*m or m   -- acceleration (studs/s^2) retimes by mult^2, not mult
				local kps={}
				for _,kp in ipairs(orig.Keypoints) do kps[#kps+1]=NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(kp.Time, kp.Value*sm, kp.Envelope*sm) end
				return NumberSequence.new(kps)
			else
				if type(orig)~="number" then return orig end
				return def.allowNeg and orig*m or math.max(0, orig*m)
			end
		end

		local function getTargets()
			local seen,list={},{}
			-- Nested effects inside a 3D emitter's RenderPart are normally off-limits (isInsideEmitter).
			-- When the emitter itself is a target, retime whatever's inside it too (its nested
			-- ParticleEmitters/Beams/Trails/Sounds) using their own per-class timing rules.
			local function addNested(emitterPart)
				local render=emitterPart:FindFirstChild(RENDER_NAME)
				if not render then return end
				for _,d in ipairs(render:GetDescendants()) do
					if seen[d] then continue end
					for cls,_ in pairs(CLASS_PROPS) do
						if cls~="SineVFX3D" and d:IsA(cls) then
							seen[d]=true
							table.insert(list,{inst=d,cls=cls})
							break
						end
					end
				end
			end
			for _,obj in pairs(selection:Get()) do
				if obj==game or obj==workspace then continue end
				if not obj:IsDescendantOf(game) then continue end
				if seen[obj] then continue end; seen[obj]=true
				local function chk(inst)
					if seen[inst] and inst~=obj then return end
					for cls,_ in pairs(CLASS_PROPS) do
						if isKind(cls, inst) then
							table.insert(list,{inst=inst,cls=cls})
							if cls=="SineVFX3D" then addNested(inst) end
							break
						end
					end
					for _,d in pairs(ctx.descendantsTo(inst)) do
						if seen[d] then continue end; seen[d]=true
						for cls,_ in pairs(CLASS_PROPS) do
							if isKind(cls, d) then
								table.insert(list,{inst=d,cls=cls})
								if cls=="SineVFX3D" then addNested(d) end
								break
							end
						end
					end
				end
				chk(obj)
			end
			return list
		end

		local function cacheOriginals()
			savedData={}
			for _,t in pairs(getTargets()) do
				local defs=CLASS_PROPS[t.cls]
				local API = api3d(t.cls)
				for _,def in ipairs(defs) do
					pcall(function()
						if def.attr then
							table.insert(savedData,{inst=t.inst,def=def,api=API,orig=API.get(t.inst,def.attr),origBez=def.ns and t.inst:GetAttribute(API.bezierAttr(def.attr)) or nil})
						else
							table.insert(savedData,{inst=t.inst,def=def,orig=t.inst[def.prop],origBez=def.ns and t.inst:GetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..def.prop) or nil})
						end
					end)
				end
			end
		end

		local previewMult = 1  -- the EXACT multiplier being previewed (typed values can exceed the slider range)
		-- value-axis multiplier for a NumberSequence's bezier, matching scaleVal's `sm`
		local function bezValMult(def,mult)
			if mult==0 then return 1 end
			local m = def.inverse and 1/mult or mult
			return def.sq and m*m or m
		end
		local function applyScale(mult)
			previewMult = mult
			for _,e in pairs(savedData) do
				pcall(function()
					if e.def.attr then
						local API = e.api or Emitter3D
						API.set(e.inst,e.def.attr,scaleVal(e.orig,mult,e.def))
						if e.def.ns and e.origBez then e.inst:SetAttribute(API.bezierAttr(e.def.attr), UIKit.bezierTransform(e.origBez, bezValMult(e.def,mult), 1)) end
					else
						e.inst[e.def.prop]=scaleVal(e.orig,mult,e.def)
						if e.def.ns and e.origBez then e.inst:SetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..e.def.prop, UIKit.bezierTransform(e.origBez, bezValMult(e.def,mult), 1)) end
					end
				end)
			end
		end

		local function revertPreview()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			for _,e in pairs(savedData) do
				pcall(function()
					if e.def.attr then
						local API = e.api or Emitter3D
						API.set(e.inst,e.def.attr,e.orig); if e.def.ns and e.origBez~=nil then e.inst:SetAttribute(API.bezierAttr(e.def.attr), e.origBez) end
					else
						e.inst[e.def.prop]=e.orig; if e.def.ns and e.origBez~=nil then e.inst:SetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..e.def.prop, e.origBez) end
					end
				end)
			end
			isPreviewing=false
		end

		local function applyPreview()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			applyScale(tToMult(sliderT))
		end

		local function commitApply()
			if not isPreviewing then return end
			revertPreview()
			CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Retimer Before")
			applyScale(previewMult)
			isPreviewing=false
			CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Retimer After")
			cacheOriginals(); resetSliderToOne()
		end

		local function resetAll()
			revertPreview(); resetSliderToOne()
		end

		resetSliderToOne()

		sl.hitbox.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
			slidingActive=true; plugin:Activate(false)
			-- Always re-cache at drag start so manual edits since last interaction are captured
			if isPreviewing then revertPreview() end
			cacheOriginals(); isPreviewing=true
			local function getT()
				local mp=userInputService:GetMouseLocation()
				local w=sl.track.AbsoluteSize.X
				return w<=0 and 0 or math.clamp((mp.X-sl.track.AbsolutePosition.X)/w,0,1)
			end
			sliderT=getT(); updateSliderVisual(sliderT); applyPreview()
			local mc=userInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement and slidingActive then
					sliderT=getT(); updateSliderVisual(sliderT); applyPreview()
				end
			end)
			local ec; ec=userInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
				slidingActive=false; mc:Disconnect(); ec:Disconnect(); plugin:Deactivate()
				-- Re-cache so next drag uses current (possibly manually edited) values
				end)
		end)
		sl.hitbox.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton3 then return end
			if isPreviewing then revertPreview() end
			resetSliderToOne()
		end)

		local function onRangeChanged()
			if isPreviewing then revertPreview() end
			resetSliderToOne()
		end
		minBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local v=tonumber(minBox.Text); if not v then minBox.Text="0.5"; v=0.5 end
			minBox.Text=tostring(v); plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_RetimerMin",v); onRangeChanged()
		end)
		maxBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local v=tonumber(maxBox.Text); if not v then maxBox.Text="2"; v=2 end
			maxBox.Text=tostring(v); plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_RetimerMax",v); onRangeChanged()
		end)
		valBox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local v=tonumber(valBox.Text); if not v then showMult(); return end
			if not isPreviewing then isPreviewing=true end
			applyScale(v)
			sliderT=multToT(v)
			tw(sl.fill,{Size=UDim2.new(sliderT,0,1,0)},DRAG_TI)
			tw(sl.knob,{Position=UDim2.new(sliderT,0,0.5,0)},DRAG_TI)
			valBox.Text=tostring(math.floor(v*100+0.5)/100)
		end)

		applyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(commitApply)
		resetBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(resetAll)

		selConn=selection.SelectionChanged:Connect(function()
			revertPreview(); cacheOriginals(); resetSliderToOne()
		end)

		cacheOriginals()
	end

	return { mount=mount, unmount=cleanup, isOpen=isOpen }
end

-- HubWindow: FAB + detached menu bar
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, App, WIN_IDS, WinFactory)
	local C       = Theme.C
	local TXT     = Theme.TXT
	local ICONS   = Theme.ICONS
	local HOVER_S = Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH
	local tw      = UIKit.tw
	local plugin  = ctx.plugin

	local coreGui          = ctx.coreGui
	local userInputService = ctx.userInputService

	-- ── Layout constants ──────────────────────────────────────
	local FAB_SIZE    = 30
	local STRIP_H     = 30
	local BTN_W       = 80
	local BTN_GAP     = 4
	local STRIP_PAD   = 4
	local MARGIN      = 10
	local FAB_GAP     = 6
	local CORNER      = 9
	local BTN_CORNER  = 6

	local N_MENU     = 4
	local EXPANDED_W = STRIP_PAD + N_MENU * BTN_W + (N_MENU - 1) * BTN_GAP + STRIP_PAD

	-- ── Tools window constants ──────────────────────────────
	local TOPBAR_H    = 24
	local ITEM_H      = 25
	local ITEM_GAP    = 4
	local TPAD        = 3
	local N_TOOLS     = 6
	local TOOLS_MAX_H = TOPBAR_H + TPAD + N_TOOLS * ITEM_H + (N_TOOLS - 1) * ITEM_GAP + TPAD * 2 -1 
	local TOOLS_MIN_H = TOPBAR_H + TPAD + ITEM_H + TPAD
	local TOOLS_FIXED = TOPBAR_H + TPAD * 2

	local TOOL_ITEMS = {
		{ label = "Shifter", id = WIN_IDS.shifter },
		{ label = "Resizer", id = WIN_IDS.resizer },
		{ label = "Retimer", id = WIN_IDS.retimer },
		{ label = "Copier",  id = WIN_IDS.copier  },
		{ label = "Code",    id = WIN_IDS.code    },
		{ label = "Color",   id = WIN_IDS.color   },
	}

	-- ── Module-level state (persists across remounts) ────────────
	local hubFabGui  = nil   -- FAB + strip (low Z, always behind)
	local hubGui     = nil   -- tools window (normal Z)
	local toolsWin   = nil
	local isPinned   = false
	local isExpanded = false

	local function closeToolsWindow()
		if toolsWin then toolsWin.destroy(); toolsWin = nil end
	end

	local function cleanup()
		-- Only save state when live UI exists; don't overwrite on the cleanup() call inside mount()
		if hubFabGui then
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_toolsOpen",   toolsWin ~= nil)
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_hubExpanded", isExpanded)
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_toolsPinned", isPinned)
		end
		isPinned   = false
		isExpanded = false
		closeToolsWindow()
		if hubFabGui then hubFabGui:Destroy(); hubFabGui = nil end
		if hubGui    then hubGui:Destroy();    hubGui    = nil end
	end
	local function isOpen() return hubFabGui ~= nil end

	local function mount()
		cleanup()

		-- hubFabGui: FAB + strip — low DisplayOrder, always behind other windows
		hubFabGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
		hubFabGui.Name           = "SineVFX_HubFAB"
		hubFabGui.ResetOnSpawn   = false
		hubFabGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Global
		hubFabGui.DisplayOrder   = 20000
		hubFabGui.Parent         = coreGui
		WinFactory.keepGuiOnTop(hubFabGui)

		-- hubGui: tools window — normal Z, WinFactory manages bringToFront
		hubGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
		hubGui.Name           = "SineVFX_Hub"
		hubGui.ResetOnSpawn   = false
		hubGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Global
		-- Authored against the 10000 default base (sits just above base, BELOW the windows
		-- which start at 10005+). registerManagedGui applies the live base offset and keeps
		-- it tracking the Display Order setting so it never strands above the windows.
		hubGui.DisplayOrder   = 10001
		hubGui.Parent         = coreGui
		WinFactory.registerManagedGui(hubGui)

		-- ── FAB: base bg, border outline, accent icon ───────────
		local fab = Instance.new("TextButton")
		fab.AnchorPoint      = Vector2.new(1, 1)
		fab.Position         = UDim2.new(1, -MARGIN, 1, -MARGIN)
		fab.Size             = UDim2.new(0, FAB_SIZE, 0, FAB_SIZE)
		fab.BackgroundColor3 = C.hub; fab:SetAttribute("SVFXhub", true)
		fab.Text             = ""; fab.AutoButtonColor = false; fab.BorderSizePixel = 0
		fab.ZIndex           = 5
		fab.Parent           = hubFabGui
		UIKit.corner(fab, CORNER)
		
		WinFactory.registerScaled(fab)
		local fabIcon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		fabIcon.Size                   = UDim2.new(0, 18, 0, 18)
		fabIcon.AnchorPoint            = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		fabIcon.Position               = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
		fabIcon.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		fabIcon.ImageColor3            = C.textDim
		fabIcon.ScaleType              = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
		fabIcon.ZIndex                 = 6; fabIcon.Parent = fab
		UIKit.setIconImage(fabIcon, ICONS.hub)
		UIKit.hoverLift(fabIcon, fab)

		-- ── Button strip: surface bg, base buttons, starts hidden ──
		local btnStrip = Instance.new("Frame")
		btnStrip.AnchorPoint      = Vector2.new(1, 1)
		btnStrip.Position         = UDim2.new(1, -(MARGIN + FAB_SIZE + FAB_GAP), 1, -MARGIN)
		btnStrip.Size             = UDim2.new(0, EXPANDED_W, 0, STRIP_H)
		btnStrip.BackgroundColor3 = C.hub; btnStrip:SetAttribute("SVFXhub", true)
		btnStrip.BorderSizePixel  = 0
		btnStrip.ClipsDescendants = true
		btnStrip.Visible          = false
		btnStrip.ZIndex           = 4
		btnStrip.Parent           = hubFabGui
		UIKit.corner(btnStrip, CORNER)
		
		WinFactory.registerScaled(btnStrip)
		-- Register FAB and strip in focus system with accent stroke
		local fabStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		fabStroke.Color = C.accent; fabStroke.Thickness = 0; fabStroke.Transparency = 1
		fabStroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border; fabStroke.Parent = fab
		local stripStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		stripStroke.Color = C.accent; stripStroke.Thickness = 0; stripStroke.Transparency = 1
		stripStroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border; stripStroke.Parent = btnStrip
		WinFactory.registerFocusFrame(fab, function(focused)
			tw(fabStroke, {Transparency = focused and 0.3 or 1, Thickness = focused and 1.5 or 0})
		end)
		WinFactory.registerFocusFrame(btnStrip, function(focused)
			if not btnStrip.Visible then return end
			tw(stripStroke, {Transparency = focused and 0.3 or 1, Thickness = focused and 1.5 or 0})
		end)
		local stripLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
		stripLayout.FillDirection       = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
		stripLayout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Right
		stripLayout.VerticalAlignment   = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
		stripLayout.SortOrder           = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
		stripLayout.Padding             = UDim.new(0, BTN_GAP)
		stripLayout.Parent              = btnStrip
		local stripPad = Instance.new("UIPadding")
		stripPad.PaddingLeft   = UDim.new(0, STRIP_PAD); stripPad.PaddingRight  = UDim.new(0, STRIP_PAD)
		stripPad.PaddingTop    = UDim.new(0, STRIP_PAD); stripPad.PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, STRIP_PAD)
		stripPad.Parent        = btnStrip
		-- FAB / strip corner placement (Settings > Button Layout). Default bottom-right.
		local fabCorner = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_fabCorner") or "BR"
		local function applyCorner(corner)
			fabCorner = corner
			local right  = (corner=="BR" or corner=="TR")
			local bottom = (corner=="BR" or corner=="BL")
			local ax = right and 1 or 0
			local ay = bottom and 1 or 0
			local mx = right and -MARGIN or MARGIN
			local my = bottom and -MARGIN or MARGIN
			fab.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(ax, ay)
			fab.Position    = UDim2.new(ax, mx, ay, my)
			local off = (FAB_SIZE + FAB_GAP) * ((WinFactory.getUiScale and WinFactory.getUiScale()) or 1)
			btnStrip.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(ax, ay)
			btnStrip.Position    = UDim2.new(ax, right and -(MARGIN+off) or (MARGIN+off), ay, my)
			stripLayout.HorizontalAlignment = right and Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Right or Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Left
		end
		applyCorner(fabCorner)

		-- Menu buttons: base bg, GothamBold, text-only hover, no icon
		-- LayoutOrder 1=emit (rightmost/closest to FAB), 2=tools, 3=settings
		local function makeMenuBtn(label, layoutOrder)
			local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
			btn.Size             = UDim2.new(0, BTN_W, 1, 0)
			btn.BackgroundColor3 = C.base
			btn.AutoButtonColor  = false
			btn.Text             = label
			btn.TextColor3       = C.textDim
			btn.Font             = TXT.btn.font
			btn.TextSize         = TXT.btn.size
			btn.TextXAlignment   = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
			btn.BorderSizePixel  = 0
			btn.LayoutOrder      = layoutOrder
			btn.ZIndex           = 5
			btn.Parent           = btnStrip
			UIKit.corner(btn, BTN_CORNER)

			local ICON_W = 13
			local GAP    = 5

			-- Container centered inside button
			local row = Instance.new("Frame")
			row.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
			row.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
			row.Size = UDim2.new(1, -8, 1, 0)
			row.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			row.ZIndex = 6
			row.Parent = btn

			local rowLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
			rowLayout.FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
			rowLayout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
			rowLayout.VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
			rowLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, GAP)
			rowLayout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
			rowLayout.Parent = row

			local btnIcon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
			btnIcon.Size = UDim2.new(0, ICON_W, 0, ICON_W)
			btnIcon.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			btnIcon.ImageColor3 = C.textDim
			btnIcon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
			btnIcon.ZIndex = 7
			btnIcon.LayoutOrder = 1
			btnIcon.Parent = row
			local iconIds = { emit=ICONS.emit, tools=ICONS.tools, settings=ICONS.settings, module=ICONS.module }
			UIKit.setIconImage(btnIcon, iconIds[string.lower(label)] or "438217405")

			local btnLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
			btnLabel.AutomaticSize = Enum.AutomaticSize.X
			btnLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
			btnLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			btnLabel.Text = label
			btnLabel.TextColor3 = C.textDim
			btnLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
			btnLabel.TextSize = 12
			btnLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
			btnLabel.ZIndex = 7
			btnLabel.LayoutOrder = 2
			btnLabel.Parent = row
			btn.Text = ""

			local function setActive(on)
				btn:SetAttribute("Active", on)
				local col = on and C.surface or C.textDim
				tw(btn,      {BackgroundColor3 = on and C.accent or C.base})
				tw(btnIcon,  {ImageColor3 = col})
				tw(btnLabel, {TextColor3  = col})
			end
			local isHovered = false
			local function applyHover()
				if btn:GetAttribute("Active") then
					tw(btn, {BackgroundColor3 = C.accent:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), 0.15)})
				else
					local col = C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), HOVER_S)
					tw(btnIcon,  {ImageColor3 = col})
					tw(btnLabel, {TextColor3  = col})
				end
			end
			btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() isHovered = true;  applyHover() end)
			btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
				isHovered = false
				if btn:GetAttribute("Active") then
					tw(btn,      {BackgroundColor3 = C.accent})
					tw(btnIcon,  {ImageColor3 = C.surface})
					tw(btnLabel, {TextColor3  = C.surface})
				else
					tw(btnIcon,  {ImageColor3 = C.textDim})
					tw(btnLabel, {TextColor3  = C.textDim})
				end
			end)
			local origSetActive = setActive
			setActive = function(on)
				origSetActive(on)
				if isHovered then applyHover() end
			end
			return btn, setActive
		end

		local emitBtn,     setEmitActive     = makeMenuBtn("Emit",     1)
		local toolsBtn,    setToolsActive    = makeMenuBtn("Tools",    2)
		local settingsBtn, setSettingsActive = makeMenuBtn("Settings", 4)
		local moduleBtn,   setModuleActive   = makeMenuBtn("Module",   3)
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then
			UIKit.attachTooltip(emitBtn, "Emit particles (hold to repeat).")
			UIKit.attachTooltip(toolsBtn, "Open the tools menu.")
			UIKit.attachTooltip(settingsBtn, "Plugin settings.")
			UIKit.attachTooltip(moduleBtn, "Plant the runtime module for in-game VFX.")
		end

		-- ── Tools window ────────────────────────────────────
		local function openToolsWindow()
			if toolsWin then return end
			local winW = 150
			toolsWin = WinFactory.new({
				gui      = hubGui,
				name     = "ToolsWindow",
				stateKey = "HubToolsWindow",
				w = winW, h = TOOLS_MAX_H,
				pos = UDim2.new(1, -(MARGIN + winW/2), 1, -(MARGIN + FAB_SIZE + FAB_GAP + TOOLS_MAX_H/2)),
				minW = 100, maxW = 260,
				minH = TOOLS_MIN_H, maxH = TOOLS_MAX_H,
				noYResize = false, noSaveH = false,
				topbarH   = TOPBAR_H,
				getPinned = function() return isPinned end,
			})
			local main    = toolsWin.main
			local bgFrame = toolsWin.bgFrame
			local topbar  = toolsWin.topbar

			-- Title: lowercase, matches other windows
			local titleLbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
			titleLbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, -60, 1, 0); titleLbl.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 0)
			titleLbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1; titleLbl.Text = "Tools"
			titleLbl.TextColor3 = C.text; titleLbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
			titleLbl.TextSize = 13; titleLbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
			titleLbl.ZIndex = 6; titleLbl.Parent = topbar

			-- Pin + Close
			local pinBtn, pinIcon = UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar, ICONS.pin,   -48, 15)
			local closeBtn, _     = UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar, ICONS.close, -26, 10)
			-- Restore pin visual if still active
			isPinned = isPinned  -- already module-level, just restore the icon
			if isPinned then
				pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive", true)
				pinIcon.ImageColor3 = C.Pinned
			end
			pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
				isPinned = not isPinned
				pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive", isPinned)
				tw(pinIcon, {ImageColor3 = isPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim})
			end)
			-- Wire focus dimming for tools window title/icons
			toolsWin.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
				local col = focused and C.text or C.textDim
				task.defer(function()
					for _, ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
						if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch, {TextColor3 = col}) end
						if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then tw(ch, {ImageColor3 = col}) end
					end
				end)
			end)

			closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
				plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_toolsOpen",   false)
				plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_toolsPinned", false)
				isPinned = false
				closeToolsWindow()
			end)

			-- Content
			local content = Instance.new("Frame")
			content.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, TOPBAR_H); content.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, -TOPBAR_H)
			content.BackgroundTransparency = 1; content.ZIndex = 3; content.Parent = bgFrame

			local listContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
			listContainer.Position = UDim2.new(0, 2, 0, TPAD)
			listContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, -4, 1, -(TPAD * 2))
			listContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1; listContainer.Parent = content

			local sc = UIKit.makeScrollableList(listContainer, {
				plugin = plugin, uis = userInputService, sbW = 7, sbGap = 3, OGap = 2,
			})
			sc.layout.Padding = UDim.new(0, ITEM_GAP)

			-- Inset buttons so accent stroke isn't clipped by the scrollframe edge
			local scPad = Instance.new("UIPadding")
			scPad.PaddingLeft   = UDim.new(0, 2)
			scPad.PaddingRight  = UDim.new(0, 2)
			scPad.PaddingTop    = UDim.new(0, 1)
			scPad.PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, 4)
			scPad.Parent        = sc.list

			-- Buttons: base bg, accent left bar when active
			for i, item in ipairs(TOOL_ITEMS) do
				local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
				btn.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, ITEM_H)
				btn.BackgroundColor3 = C.base
				btn.BackgroundTransparency = 0
				btn.Text = ""
				btn.AutoButtonColor = false; btn.BorderSizePixel = 0
				btn.LayoutOrder = i; btn.ZIndex = 4; btn.Parent = sc.list
				UIKit.corner(btn, 6)

				-- Thin accent bar on left edge (hidden when inactive)
				local bar = Instance.new("Frame")
				bar.Size = UDim2.new(0, 2, 0.6, 0)
				bar.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
				bar.Position = UDim2.new(0, 3, 0.5, 0)
				bar.BackgroundColor3 = C.accent
				bar.BackgroundTransparency = 1
				bar.BorderSizePixel = 0
				bar.ZIndex = 6
				bar.Parent = btn
				UIKit.corner(bar, 99)

				-- Label centered
				local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel")
				lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
				lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
				lbl.Text = item.label
				lbl.TextColor3 = C.textDim
				lbl.Font = TXT.btn.font
				lbl.TextSize = TXT.btn.size
				lbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
				lbl.ZIndex = 5
				lbl.Parent = btn


				-- Poll open state; only tween on change. Throttled ~10fps (open-state is user-driven).
				local lastOn = App.windows[item.id] and App.windows[item.id].isOpen() or false
				bar.BackgroundTransparency = lastOn and 0 or 1
				local _barAcc = 0
				local barPollConn = ctx.runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
					_barAcc += dt
					if _barAcc < 0.1 then return end
					_barAcc = 0
					local on = App.windows[item.id] and App.windows[item.id].isOpen() or false
					if on ~= lastOn then
						lastOn = on
						tw(bar, {BackgroundTransparency = on and 0 or 1})
					end
				end)
				sc.list.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
					pcall(function() barPollConn:Disconnect() end)
				end)
				btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
					tw(lbl, {TextColor3 = C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), HOVER_S)})
				end)
				btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
					tw(lbl, {TextColor3 = C.textDim})
				end)
				btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() App:toggle(item.id) end)
			end

			-- Dynamically lock maxH so window can't grow past content
			sc.list:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
				if not toolsWin or toolsWin.isResizing() then return end
				local contentH = sc.list.CanvasSize.Y.Offset
				if contentH <= 0 then return end
				local visH = sc.list.AbsoluteSize.Y
				if visH >= contentH then
					toolsWin.setMaxH(math.ceil(main.AbsoluteSize.Y))
				else
					toolsWin.setMaxH(TOOLS_FIXED + contentH)
				end
			end)
			task.defer(function()
				if not toolsWin then return end
				local contentH = sc.list.CanvasSize.Y.Offset
				if contentH > 0 then
					toolsWin.setMaxH(TOOLS_FIXED + math.max(contentH, ITEM_H))
				end
			end)
		end

		-- ── Expand / collapse ─────────────────────────────────
		local function collapse()
			isExpanded = false
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_hubExpanded", false)
			btnStrip.Visible = false
		end

		local function expand()
			isExpanded = true
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_hubExpanded", true)
			btnStrip.Visible = true
		end

		fab.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if isExpanded then collapse() else expand() end
		end)

		emitBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			App:toggle(WIN_IDS.emit)
			local on = App.windows[WIN_IDS.emit] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.emit].isOpen()
			emitBtn:SetAttribute("Active", on); setEmitActive(on)
		end)
		toolsBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			App:toggle(WIN_IDS.tools)
		end)
		moduleBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			App:toggle(WIN_IDS.module)
		end)
		settingsBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			App:toggle(WIN_IDS.settings)
		end)
		-- Poll button active states every frame while hub is alive
		local lastEmitOn = App.windows[WIN_IDS.emit] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.emit].isOpen() or false
		local lastToolsOn = toolsWin ~= nil
		local lastModuleOn = App.windows[WIN_IDS.module] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.module].isOpen() or false
		local lastSettingsOn = App.windows[WIN_IDS.settings] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.settings].isOpen() or false
		local _lastScale = (WinFactory.getUiScale and WinFactory.getUiScale()) or 1
		local _pollAcc = 0
		local pollConn = ctx.runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
			-- Throttle to ~10fps: everything polled here (the fab-corner SETTING, ui scale, and the four
			-- window open-states) only changes on user action, so a plugin:GetSetting + 4 isOpen() calls
			-- EVERY frame was pure waste. 100ms latency on these is imperceptible.
			_pollAcc += dt
			if _pollAcc < 0.1 then return end
			_pollAcc = 0
			local _cc = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_fabCorner") or "BR"
			if _cc ~= fabCorner then applyCorner(_cc) end
			local _sc = (WinFactory.getUiScale and WinFactory.getUiScale()) or 1
			if _sc ~= _lastScale then _lastScale = _sc; applyCorner(fabCorner) end
			local emitOn  = App.windows[WIN_IDS.emit]  and App.windows[WIN_IDS.emit].isOpen()  or false
			local toolsOn = App.windows[WIN_IDS.tools] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.tools].isOpen() or false
			local moduleOn = App.windows[WIN_IDS.module] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.module].isOpen() or false
			local settingsOn = App.windows[WIN_IDS.settings] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.settings].isOpen() or false
			if emitOn ~= lastEmitOn then
				lastEmitOn = emitOn
				emitBtn:SetAttribute("Active", emitOn)
				if emitOn then
					setEmitActive(true)
				else
					task.delay(0.05, function() setEmitActive(false) end)
				end
			end
			if toolsOn ~= lastToolsOn then
				lastToolsOn = toolsOn
				toolsBtn:SetAttribute("Active", toolsOn)
				if toolsOn then
					setToolsActive(true)
				else
					task.delay(0.05, function() setToolsActive(false) end)
				end
			end
			if moduleOn ~= lastModuleOn then
				lastModuleOn = moduleOn
				moduleBtn:SetAttribute("Active", moduleOn)
				if moduleOn then
					setModuleActive(true)
				else
					task.delay(0.05, function() setModuleActive(false) end)
				end
			end
			if settingsOn ~= lastSettingsOn then
				lastSettingsOn = settingsOn
				settingsBtn:SetAttribute("Active", settingsOn)
				if settingsOn then
					setSettingsActive(true)
				else
					task.delay(0.05, function() setSettingsActive(false) end)
				end
			end
		end)
		hubFabGui.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
			pcall(function() pollConn:Disconnect() end)
		end)

		-- Restore saved state from previous session
		isPinned = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_toolsPinned") == true
		if plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_hubExpanded") then expand() end
		
		local emitOn = App.windows[WIN_IDS.emit] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.emit].isOpen()
		if emitOn then emitBtn:SetAttribute("Active", true); setEmitActive(true) end
		local moduleOn0 = App.windows[WIN_IDS.module] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.module].isOpen()
		if moduleOn0 then moduleBtn:SetAttribute("Active", true); setModuleActive(true) end
		local settingsOn0 = App.windows[WIN_IDS.settings] and App.windows[WIN_IDS.settings].isOpen()
		if settingsOn0 then settingsBtn:SetAttribute("Active", true); setSettingsActive(true) end
	end

	return { mount = mount, unmount = cleanup, isOpen = isOpen }
end

-- CopierWindow: like Shifter but with Copy/Paste instead of slider
local ok3d, Emitter3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Emitter3D end)
if not ok3d or type(Emitter3D)~="table" then Emitter3D = { isEmitter=function() return false end, get=function() end, set=function() end, bezierAttr=function(a) return "SineVFX_Bezier_"..a end } end
-- Transformed Trail/Beam kits. Same shape as Emitter3D (isX/get/set/bezierAttr) but a SEPARATE
-- namespace: attribute names collide across kinds on purpose, so every lookup keys by KIND first.
local _stub = { get=function() end, set=function() end, bezierAttr=function(a) return "SineVFX_Bezier_"..a end }
local okT, Trail3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Trail3D end)
if not okT or type(Trail3D)~="table" then Trail3D = { isTrail=function() return false end, get=_stub.get, set=_stub.set, bezierAttr=_stub.bezierAttr } end
local okB, Beam3D = pcall(function() return require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).Beam3D end)
if not okB or type(Beam3D)~="table" then Beam3D = { isBeam=function() return false end, get=_stub.get, set=_stub.set, bezierAttr=_stub.bezierAttr } end
-- Which kit owns `inst`. Everything attribute-backed goes through this instead of assuming Emitter3D.
local function kitOf(inst)
	if Trail3D.isTrail and Trail3D.isTrail(inst) then return Trail3D end
	if Beam3D.isBeam  and Beam3D.isBeam(inst)  then return Beam3D  end
	return Emitter3D
end
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory)
	local C       = Theme.C
	local DRAG_TI = Theme.DRAG_TI
	local tw      = UIKit.tw

	local plugin           = ctx.plugin
	local selection        = ctx.selection
	local userInputService = ctx.userInputService
	local CHS              = ctx.CHS
	local coreGui          = ctx.coreGui

	local WIN_W    = 220
	local TOPBAR_H = 25
	local MIN_W    = 20
	local MAX_W    = 600
	local OPT_H    = 14
	local BTN_H    = 24
	local SB_W     = 6   -- matches SettingsWindow's list bar (sbW=6)
	local SB_GAP   = 3

	local copierGui = nil
	local isPinned  = false
	local selConn   = nil

	local ALL_PROPS = {
	-- Universal: applies to all matching classes, shown once
	{ label="Color",         prop="Color",             classes={"ParticleEmitter","Beam","Trail","Light","SineVFX3D"}, attr3d="Color", universal=true },
	{ label="Transparency",  prop="Transparency",      classes={"ParticleEmitter","Beam","Trail","SineVFX3D"}, attr3d="Transparency", universal=true },
	{ label="Material",      prop="Material",          classes={"SineVFX3D"}, attr3d="Material", universal=true },
	{ label="LightEmission", prop="LightEmission",     classes={"ParticleEmitter","Beam","Trail"},                   universal=true },
	{ label="LightInfluence",prop="LightInfluence",    classes={"ParticleEmitter","Beam","Trail"},                   universal=true },
	-- Per-class specific
	{ label="Texture",       prop="Texture",           cls="ParticleEmitter" },
	{ label="Size",          prop="Size",              cls="ParticleEmitter" },
	{ label="Texture",       prop="Texture",           cls="Beam"            },
	{ label="Texture",       prop="Texture",           cls="Trail"           },
	{ label="Brightness",    prop="Brightness",        cls="Light"           },
	{ label="Range",         prop="Range",             cls="Light"           },
	{ label="ShadowSoftness",prop="ShadowSoftness",    cls="Light"           },
	{ label="Angle",         prop="Angle",             cls="Light"           },
	{ label="SoundId",       prop="SoundId",           cls="Sound"           },
	{ label="Volume",        prop="Volume",            cls="Sound"           },
	{ label="PlaybackSpeed", prop="PlaybackSpeed",     cls="Sound"           },
	{ label="RollOffMax",    prop="RollOffMaxDistance",cls="Sound"           },
	{ label="TimePosition",  prop="TimePosition",      cls="Sound"           },
	-- SineVFX 3D particle emitters (attribute-backed; tag SineVFX3D). `attrs` = config attributes to copy.
	{ label="Size",          cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"SizeX","SizeY","SizeZ"}    },
	{ label="Speed",         cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"Speed"}                    },
	{ label="Offset",        cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"Offset"}                   },
	{ label="Spacing",       cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"Spacing"}                   },
	{ label="Position",      cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"PositionX","PositionY","PositionZ"}                  },
	{ label="Acceleration",  cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"AccelX","AccelY","AccelZ"}    },
	{ label="Locked To Part",cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"LockedToPart"}              },
	{ label="Collisions",     cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"Collisions"}                },
	{ label="Bounce",         cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"Bounce"}                    },
	{ label="Friction",       cls="SineVFX3D", attrs={"Friction"}                  },
	-- Transformed Trails (tag SineVFXTransformedTrail). Their look lives in attributes, so copying
	-- the native Trail property would just be overwritten by the runtime on the next frame.
	{ label="Color",         cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"Color"}            },
	{ label="Gradient",      cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"Gradient"}         },
	{ label="Transparency",  cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"Transparency","TransparencyGradient"} },
	{ label="Size",          cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"Size"}             },
	{ label="Texture",       cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"Texture","TextureMode","TextureLength"} },
	{ label="Light",         cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"LightEmission","LightInfluence","Brightness"} },
	{ label="Lifetime",      cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"Lifetime"}         },
	{ label="Length",        cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"MinLength","MaxLength"} },
	{ label="WidthScale",    cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"WidthScale"}       },
	{ label="Emission",      cls="SineVFXTrail", attrs={"Rate","Duration"}  },
	-- Transformed Beams (tag SineVFXTransformedBeam)
	{ label="Color",         cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"Color"}             },
	{ label="Gradient",      cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"Gradient"}          },
	{ label="Transparency",  cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"Transparency","TransparencyGradient"} },
	{ label="Texture",       cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"Texture","TextureMode","TextureLength","TextureSpeed"} },
	{ label="Light",         cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"LightEmission","LightInfluence","Brightness"} },
	{ label="Width",         cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"Width0","Width1"}   },
	{ label="Curve",         cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"CurveSize0","CurveSize1"} },
	{ label="Segments",      cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"Segments"}          },
	{ label="Lifetime",      cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"Lifetime"}          },
	{ label="Emission",      cls="SineVFXBeam", attrs={"Rate"}              },
}

	local function cleanup()
		if selConn   then selConn:Disconnect() end
		if copierGui then copierGui:Destroy()  end
		copierGui=nil; selConn=nil; isPinned=false
	end

	local function isOpen() return copierGui and copierGui.Parent~=nil end

	local function mount(App, COPIER_WINDOW_ID)
		cleanup()
		local MIN_H_COLLAPSED = 59
		local alreadyTweenedH = MIN_H_COLLAPSED

		local sw = WinFactory.standardWindow({
			stateKey="Copier", guiName="SineVFX_Copier", displayOrder=10006,
			title="Copier", tooltip="Copy properties between VFX.",
			w=WIN_W, h=MIN_H_COLLAPSED, pos=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.4,0),
			minW=MIN_W, maxW=MAX_W, minH=MIN_H_COLLAPSED, maxH=600, noSaveH=true, topbarH=TOPBAR_H,
			onClose=function() App:toggle(COPIER_WINDOW_ID) end,
		})
		copierGui = sw.gui
		local win     = sw.win
		local main    = sw.main
		local bgFrame  = sw.bgFrame
		local topbar  = sw.topbar

		-- Content
		local content=Instance.new("Frame")
		content.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,-TOPBAR_H); content.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,TOPBAR_H)
		content.BackgroundTransparency=1; content.Parent=bgFrame

		local FIXED_H = 5 + BTN_H + 4

		local listContainer=Instance.new("Frame")
		listContainer.Position=UDim2.new(0,5,0,5)
		listContainer.Size=UDim2.new(1,-10,1,-(FIXED_H+7))
		listContainer.BackgroundTransparency=1
		listContainer.Parent=content

		local propListWrapper=Instance.new("CanvasGroup")
		propListWrapper.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(SB_W+SB_GAP+2),1,0)
		propListWrapper.BackgroundColor3=C.base; propListWrapper.BorderSizePixel=0
		propListWrapper.Parent=listContainer
		UIKit.corner(propListWrapper,7)
		-- CanvasGroup flattens + clips children to the rounded corners (no mask images needed)

		local propList=Instance.new("ScrollingFrame")
		propList.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0)
		propList.BackgroundTransparency=1; propList.BorderSizePixel=0
		propList.ScrollBarThickness=0; propList.ScrollBarImageTransparency=1
		pcall(function() propList.TopImage=""; propList.MidImage=""; propList.BottomImage="" end)
		propList.CanvasSize=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0); propList.ClipsDescendants=true
		propList.Parent=propListWrapper
		local listLayout=Instance.new("UIListLayout")
		listLayout.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
		listLayout.Parent=propList

		local sbTrack=Instance.new("Frame")
		sbTrack.Size=UDim2.new(0,SB_W,1,0); sbTrack.Position=UDim2.new(1,-(SB_W),0,0)
		sbTrack.BackgroundColor3=C.base; sbTrack.BorderSizePixel=0
		sbTrack.Parent=listContainer
		UIKit.corner(sbTrack,3)
		local sbThumb=Instance.new("Frame")
		sbThumb.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0.3,0); sbThumb.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0)
		sbThumb.BackgroundColor3=C.slider; sbThumb.BorderSizePixel=0
		sbThumb.BackgroundTransparency=0.4; sbThumb.Parent=sbTrack
		UIKit.corner(sbThumb,3)

		-- Single source of truth for "does the list fit?" -- shared by scrollbar
		-- visibility AND the resize-height lock so they never disagree near the
		-- per-scale rounding boundary (which let the window resize past the list).
		local function contentFits()
			if propList.AbsoluteSize.Y<=0 then return true end
			local _S=UIKit.uiScaleOf(propList)
			return propList.CanvasSize.Y.Offset <= propList.AbsoluteSize.Y/_S + 3
		end
		local function updateScrollbar()
			propList.ScrollBarThickness=0; propList.ScrollBarImageTransparency=1
			local contentH=propList.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y
			local visH=propList.AbsoluteSize.Y
			if contentFits() then
				sbTrack.Visible=false; propListWrapper.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0); return
			end
			sbTrack.Visible=true; sbThumb.Visible=true
			propListWrapper.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(SB_W+SB_GAP+2),1,0)
			local ratio=math.clamp(visH/contentH,0.1,1)
			local posR=propList.CanvasPosition.Y/math.max(1,contentH-visH)
			sbThumb.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,ratio,0)
			sbThumb.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,posR*(1-ratio),0)
		end
		propList:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(updateScrollbar)
		propList:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(updateScrollbar)
		local lastMaxH = nil  -- declared BEFORE the closure below so it captures this local, not a nil global
		propList:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
			if win.isResizing() then return end
			if not lastMaxH then return end
			if contentFits() then
				win.setMaxH(math.ceil(main.Size.Y.Offset))
			else
				win.setMaxH(lastMaxH)
			end
		end)
		listLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(function()
			propList.CanvasSize=UDim2.new(0,0,0,listLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y/UIKit.uiScaleOf(propList))
			updateScrollbar()
		end)

		local sbDragging=false
		sbThumb.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
			sbDragging=true; plugin:Activate(false)
			local startY=userInputService:GetMouseLocation().Y
			local startPos=propList.CanvasPosition.Y
			local mc=userInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement or not sbDragging then return end
				local dy=userInputService:GetMouseLocation().Y-startY
				local contentH=propList.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y; local visH=propList.AbsoluteSize.Y
				local trackH=sbTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y
				local scrollRatio=contentH/math.max(1,trackH)
				propList.CanvasPosition=Vector2.new(0,math.clamp(startPos+dy*scrollRatio,0,contentH-visH))
			end)
			local ec; ec=userInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
				if i.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
				sbDragging=false; mc:Disconnect(); ec:Disconnect(); plugin:Deactivate()
			end)
		end)
		propList.InputChanged:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseWheel then
				local contentH=propList.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y; local visH=propList.AbsoluteSize.Y
				propList.CanvasPosition=Vector2.new(0,math.clamp(propList.CanvasPosition.Y-inp.Position.Z*OPT_H*0.5,0,math.max(0,contentH-visH)))
			end
		end)

		-- btnRow: Copy + Paste
		local btnRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		btnRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-10,0,BTN_H); btnRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,5,1,-(5+BTN_H))
		btnRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; btnRow.Parent=content

		local GAP=4
		local copyBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		copyBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0.5,-(GAP/2),1,0)
		copyBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; copyBtn.Text="Copy"
		copyBtn.TextColor3=C.base; copyBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
		copyBtn.TextSize=12; copyBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; copyBtn.BorderSizePixel=0
		copyBtn.Parent=btnRow
		UIKit.corner(copyBtn,7)
		copyBtn:SetAttribute("BaseColor",C.accent)
		copyBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() UIKit.fadeButton(copyBtn,0.2) end)
		copyBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() UIKit.fadeButton(copyBtn,0)   end)

		local pasteBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		pasteBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0.5,-(GAP/2),1,0)
		pasteBtn.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,GAP/2,0,0)
		pasteBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; pasteBtn.Text="Paste"
		pasteBtn.TextColor3=C.base; pasteBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
		pasteBtn.TextSize=12; pasteBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; pasteBtn.BorderSizePixel=0
		pasteBtn.Parent=btnRow
		UIKit.corner(pasteBtn,7)
		pasteBtn:SetAttribute("BaseColor",C.accent)
		pasteBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() UIKit.fadeButton(pasteBtn,0.2) end)
		pasteBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() UIKit.fadeButton(pasteBtn,0)   end)

		-- State
		local selectedDefs = {}
		local clipboard    = {}  -- def -> { inst -> value }
		local clipboardBez = {}  -- def -> { inst -> bezier string }
		local clipboardFirst = {}  -- def -> {val,bez} from the FIRST matched instance (deterministic paste source)
		local optButtons   = {}
		local prevOrder    = 0
		local savedH       = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_CopierH") or 300
		local blockSave    = false
		local listSizeConn = nil

		local function isAnySelected() return next(selectedDefs)~=nil end

		-- Height is remembered in memory on every size change, but only WRITTEN once the user
		-- stops dragging. plugin:SetSetting is a ~29ms whole-blob reserialise, and this fires once
		-- per frame while resizing -- a write per frame is what made the drag stutter. (Same reason
		-- PropertiesWindow only persists its height on a real drag.)
		local _hSavePending=false
		local function _persistH()
			if _hSavePending then return end
			_hSavePending=true
			task.delay(0.4,function() _hSavePending=false; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_CopierH",savedH) end)
		end
		main:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
			if blockSave then return end
			alreadyTweenedH=main.AbsoluteSize.Y
			local h=main.AbsoluteSize.Y
			if listContainer.Visible and h>MIN_H_COLLAPSED+20 then
				savedH=h; _persistH()
			end
		end)

		-- Resolve type mismatch between src value and target property
	local function resolveValue(srcVal, inst, prop)
		local ok, cur = pcall(function() return inst[prop] end)
		if not ok then return srcVal end
		local srcType = typeof(srcVal)
		local dstType = typeof(cur)
		if srcType == dstType then return srcVal end
		-- ColorSequence -> Color3: extract midpoint
		if srcType == "ColorSequence" and dstType == "Color3" then
			local kps = srcVal.Keypoints
			if #kps == 1 then return kps[1].Value end
			local mid, best = kps[1].Value, math.huge
			for _, kp in ipairs(kps) do
				local d = math.abs(kp.Time - 0.5)
				if d < best then best=d; mid=kp.Value end
			end
			return mid
		end
		-- Color3 -> ColorSequence: wrap in flat gradient
		if srcType == "Color3" and dstType == "ColorSequence" then
			return ColorSequence.new(srcVal)
		end
		-- NumberSequence -> number: extract midpoint
		if srcType == "NumberSequence" and dstType == "number" then
			local kps = srcVal.Keypoints
			if #kps == 1 then return kps[1].Value end
			local mid, best = kps[1].Value, math.huge
			for _, kp in ipairs(kps) do
				local d = math.abs(kp.Time - 0.5)
				if d < best then best=d; mid=kp.Value end
			end
			return mid
		end
		-- number -> NumberSequence: wrap in flat sequence
		if srcType == "number" and dstType == "NumberSequence" then
			return NumberSequence.new(srcVal)
		end
		return srcVal
	end

	local function getClasses(def)
		return def.classes or {def.cls}
	end
	local function clsMatch(inst, cls)
		if cls=="SineVFX3D"    then return Emitter3D.isEmitter(inst) end
		if cls=="SineVFXTrail" then return Trail3D.isTrail(inst) == true end
		if cls=="SineVFXBeam"  then return Beam3D.isBeam(inst) == true end
		if Emitter3D.isInsideEmitter(inst) then return false end  -- RenderPart & nested effects belong to the 3D particle
		-- A transformed ribbon is driven from its attributes every frame, so pasting onto the raw
		-- Trail/Beam property would be silently undone. It has its own rows above.
		if (inst:IsA("Trail") and Trail3D.isTrail(inst)) or (inst:IsA("Beam") and Beam3D.isBeam(inst)) then return false end
		return inst:IsA(cls)
	end
	local function getTargetsForDef(def)
			if not def then return {} end
			local seen,list={},{}
			for _,obj in pairs(selection:Get()) do
				if obj==game or obj==workspace or obj==game:GetService("Players") then continue end
				if not obj:IsDescendantOf(game) then continue end
				local function chk(inst)
					if seen[inst] then return end; seen[inst]=true
					for _,cls in ipairs(getClasses(def)) do
						if clsMatch(inst,cls) then
							if def.attrs then table.insert(list,inst)
							else local ok=pcall(function() return inst[def.prop] end); if ok then table.insert(list,inst) end end
							break
						end
					end
				end
				chk(obj)
				for _,d in pairs(ctx.descendantsTo(obj)) do chk(d) end
			end
			return list
		end

		local function getAvailableProps()
			local av={}
			for _,def in ipairs(ALL_PROPS) do
				if #getTargetsForDef(def)>0 then av[def]=true end
			end
			return av
		end

		local function updateButtonVisuals()
			for key,btn in pairs(optButtons) do
				local active=selectedDefs[key]~=nil
				if active then
					tw(btn,{TextColor3=C.white,BackgroundTransparency=0})
					btn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
					local ic=btn:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ImageLabel")
					if ic then tw(ic,{ImageColor3=C.white,ImageTransparency=0}) end
				else
					tw(btn,{TextColor3=C.textDim,BackgroundTransparency=1})
					btn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium
					local ic=btn:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("ImageLabel")
					if ic then tw(ic,{ImageColor3=C.text,ImageTransparency=0.25}) end
				end
				btn.BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5)
			end
		end

		local function toggleDef(def)
			local key=def.label..(def.universal and "_universal" or (def.cls or ""))
			if selectedDefs[key] then selectedDefs[key]=nil
			else selectedDefs[key]=def end
			prevOrder = order
			updateButtonVisuals()
		end

		-- Selection watcher: expand/collapse like Shifter (no list rebuild)
		local function updateHeight()
			local sel = selection:Get()
			local av = getAvailableProps()
			local hasSelection = #sel > 0 and next(av) ~= nil
			-- Count visible props for maxH
			local visCount = 0
			for _,def in ipairs(ALL_PROPS) do if av[def] then visCount+=1 end end
			local maxH = TOPBAR_H+5+(visCount*OPT_H)+FIXED_H+2
			local cur = main.Size.Y.Offset  -- LOGICAL: maxH/savedH are logical, AbsoluteSize.Y is scaled
			if hasSelection then
				win.setMaxH(maxH); lastMaxH=maxH
				local targetH
				if cur > maxH then targetH = maxH
				elseif math.min(savedH,maxH) > cur+2 then targetH = math.min(savedH,maxH) end
				if targetH then
					blockSave=true; alreadyTweenedH=targetH
					tw(main,{Size=UDim2.new(0,main.Size.X.Offset,0,targetH)})
					win.currentSize.h=targetH
					task.delay(0.15,function() blockSave=false end)
				end
			else
				if cur > MIN_H_COLLAPSED+4 then
					blockSave=true
					tw(main,{Size=UDim2.new(0,main.Size.X.Offset,0,MIN_H_COLLAPSED)})
					win.currentSize.h=MIN_H_COLLAPSED
					task.delay(0.15,function() blockSave=false end)
				end
				win.setMaxH(MIN_H_COLLAPSED)
			end
		end
		local UNIVERSAL_ICON = "107099348668000"
		local CLASS_ICONS={
			ParticleEmitter="131377150575337",
			Sound="124463162348884",
			Beam="140122122335338",
			Trail="123552365554169",
			BasePart="126042378893608",
			SineVFX3D="126042378893608",
			SineVFXTrail="123552365554169",
			SineVFXBeam="140122122335338",
			Light="130938062190902",

		}

		

		local function rebuildList()
			for _,ch in pairs(propList:GetChildren()) do
				if ch:IsA("TextButton") then ch:Destroy() end
			end
			optButtons={}; local order=0
			for _,def in ipairs(ALL_PROPS) do
				order+=1
				local opt=Instance.new("TextButton")
				opt.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,OPT_H); opt.BackgroundTransparency=1
				opt.BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5); opt.AutoButtonColor=false; opt.Selectable=false
				opt.Text=def.label; opt.TextColor3=C.textDim; opt.TextTruncate=Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd
				opt.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; opt.TextSize=13
				opt.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
				opt.LayoutOrder=order; opt.ZIndex=3; opt.Parent=propList
				local op=Instance.new("UIPadding"); op.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,26); op.Parent=opt
				local iconId = def.universal and UNIVERSAL_ICON or CLASS_ICONS[def.cls or (def.classes and def.classes[1])]
				if iconId then
					local img=Instance.new("ImageLabel")
					img.Size=UDim2.new(0,16,0,16); img.Position=UDim2.new(0,-20,0.5,-8)
					img.BackgroundTransparency=1; img.ImageColor3=C.text; img.ImageTransparency=0.25
					img.ZIndex=4; img.Parent=opt; img.ScaleType=Enum.ScaleType.Fit
					UIKit.setIconImage(img,iconId)
				end
				local key=def.label..(def.universal and "_universal" or def.cls)
				optButtons[key]=opt
				opt.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
					if selectedDefs[key] then tw(opt,{BackgroundTransparency=0,BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5):Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),0.15)})
					else tw(opt,{TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH),BackgroundTransparency=0.88}) end
				end)
				opt.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
					if selectedDefs[key] then tw(opt,{BackgroundTransparency=0,BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5)})
					else tw(opt,{TextColor3=C.textDim,BackgroundTransparency=1}) end
				end)
				opt.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
					toggleDef(def)
					-- Re-apply hover state since mouse is still over button
					if selectedDefs[key] then tw(opt,{BackgroundTransparency=0,BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.accent,0.5):Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),0.15)})
					else tw(opt,{TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH),BackgroundTransparency=0.88}) end
				end)
			end

			local newSel={}
			for k,def in pairs(selectedDefs) do
				if av[def] then newSel[k]=def end
			end
			selectedDefs=newSel


			prevOrder=order

			local MIN_LIST_VIS=5
			local isVis=(listContainer.AbsoluteSize.Y>=MIN_LIST_VIS)
			listContainer.Visible=isVis

			if listSizeConn then listSizeConn:Disconnect(); listSizeConn=nil end
			listSizeConn=listContainer:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
				listContainer.Visible=listContainer.AbsoluteSize.Y>=MIN_LIST_VIS
				updateScrollbar()
			end)

			-- (max-height lock is handled by the single propList handler near the top, which uses
			-- lastMaxH = the VISIBLE-count cap; a second pOrd-based handler here over-counted because
			-- Copier creates every button and only hides them, letting the window resize past the list)
			updateButtonVisuals()
		end


		local function updateVisibility()
			local av = getAvailableProps()
			local anyVisible = false
			for key, btn in pairs(optButtons) do
				-- find def for this key
				local def = nil
				for _, d in ipairs(ALL_PROPS) do
					if d.label..(d.universal and "_universal" or (d.cls or "")) == key then def = d; break end
				end
				local visible = def ~= nil and av[def] == true
				btn.Visible = visible
				if visible then anyVisible = true end
			end
			listContainer.Visible = anyVisible
			updateHeight()
		end
		selConn = selection.SelectionChanged:Connect(updateVisibility)
		if WinFactory.onScaleChanged then WinFactory.onScaleChanged(function() if main.Parent then updateHeight() end end) end
		rebuildList()
		-- Start collapsed, then expand after render if selection has matching props
		win.setMaxH(MIN_H_COLLAPSED)
		main.Size = UDim2.new(0,main.Size.X.Offset,0,MIN_H_COLLAPSED)
		win.currentSize.h = MIN_H_COLLAPSED
		for _,btn in pairs(optButtons) do btn.Visible = false end
		listContainer.Visible = false
		task.defer(updateVisibility)		-- Copy: reads values from first selected matching instance per def
		copyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if not isAnySelected() then return end
			clipboard={}
			clipboardFirst={}
			local sel=selection:Get()
			for _,def in pairs(selectedDefs) do
				clipboard[def]={}; clipboardBez[def]={}
				local seen={}
				for _,obj in pairs(sel) do
					if obj==game or not obj:IsDescendantOf(game) then continue end
					local function chk(inst)
						if seen[inst] then return end; seen[inst]=true
						for _,cls in ipairs(getClasses(def)) do
							if clsMatch(inst,cls) then
								if def.attrs then
									local vals,bez={},{}
									local K=kitOf(inst); for _,a in ipairs(def.attrs) do vals[a]=K.get(inst,a); bez[a]=inst:GetAttribute(K.bezierAttr(a)) end
									clipboard[def][inst]=vals; clipboardBez[def][inst]=bez
									if clipboardFirst[def]==nil then clipboardFirst[def]={val=vals,bez=bez} end
								elseif def.attr3d and cls=="SineVFX3D" then
									local v = Emitter3D.get(inst, def.attr3d)
									clipboard[def][inst]=v; clipboardBez[def][inst]=inst:GetAttribute(Emitter3D.bezierAttr(def.attr3d))
									if clipboardFirst[def]==nil then clipboardFirst[def]={val=v,bez=clipboardBez[def][inst]} end
								else
									pcall(function()
										clipboard[def][inst]=inst[def.prop]; clipboardBez[def][inst]=inst:GetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..def.prop)
										if clipboardFirst[def]==nil then clipboardFirst[def]={val=clipboard[def][inst],bez=clipboardBez[def][inst]} end
									end)
								end
								break
							end
						end
					end
					chk(obj)
					for _,d in pairs(ctx.descendantsTo(obj)) do chk(d) end
				end
			end
		end)

		-- Paste: applies clipboard values to matching instances in selection
		pasteBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if next(clipboard)==nil then return end
			local sel=selection:Get()
			if #sel==0 then return end
			CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX Copier Before")
			for def,instMap in pairs(clipboard) do
				-- collect src values (take first available)
				local srcVal=nil; local srcBez=nil
				if clipboardFirst[def] then
					srcVal=clipboardFirst[def].val; srcBez=clipboardFirst[def].bez
				else
					for si,v in pairs(instMap) do srcVal=v; srcBez=(clipboardBez[def] or {})[si]; break end
				end
				if srcVal==nil then continue end
				for _,obj in pairs(sel) do
					if obj==game or not obj:IsDescendantOf(game) then continue end
					local function chk(inst)
						for _,cls in ipairs(getClasses(def)) do
							if clsMatch(inst,cls) then
								if def.attrs then
									for _,a in ipairs(def.attrs) do
										local v = type(srcVal)=="table" and srcVal[a] or nil
										if v~=nil then pcall(function() local K=kitOf(inst); K.set(inst,a,v); local b=type(srcBez)=="table" and srcBez[a] or nil; if b~=nil then inst:SetAttribute(K.bezierAttr(a), b) end end) end
									end
								elseif def.attr3d and cls=="SineVFX3D" then
									pcall(function()
										local cur = Emitter3D.get(inst, def.attr3d)
										local v = srcVal
										if typeof(cur)=="ColorSequence" and typeof(v)=="Color3" then v=ColorSequence.new(v)
										elseif typeof(cur)=="NumberSequence" and typeof(v)=="number" then v=NumberSequence.new(v) end
										Emitter3D.set(inst, def.attr3d, v)
										if srcBez~=nil then inst:SetAttribute(Emitter3D.bezierAttr(def.attr3d), srcBez) end
									end)
								else
									pcall(function() inst[def.prop]=resolveValue(srcVal,inst,def.prop); inst:SetAttribute("SineVFX_Bezier_"..def.prop, srcBez) end)
								end
								break
							end
						end
