				local mt,mv=fromCanvas(mpx,mpy,cbgWH())
				local dt = mt - anchor.t
				local dv = mv - anchor.v
				if which=="in" then dt=-dt; dv=-dv end
				-- 180 flip: dragging the handle past the anchor (dt<0 in the handle's
				-- own frame) would make the tangent point backward and the curve loop
				-- on itself. Mirror the whole vector instead so the handle cleanly
				-- reappears on the opposite side and the curve stays well-formed.
				-- ONLY when synced -- with independent (sync-off) handles the user wants
				-- the handle to stay put past 180 (it slides to the vertical line via the
				-- dt>=0 clamp below) instead of snapping across to the opposite side.
				if synced and dt < 0 then dt = -dt; dv = -dv end
				-- Monotonicity clamp: a NumberSequence is value-over-TIME, so time must
				-- strictly increase -- a handle whose time crosses a neighbour node would
				-- fold the curve backward in time. Bound dt to the NEARER neighbour: the OUT
				-- handle (anchor.t+dt) can't pass the next node; the mirrored IN handle
				-- (anchor.t-dt) can't pass the previous node. An endpoint has one neighbour,
				-- so its single handle still gets room right up to it.
				-- Handles may cross neighbour NODES (user request). Bound dt only to keep the
				-- handle on canvas in time: OUT (anchor.t+dt) stays <=1, IN (anchor.t-dt) stays
				-- >=0; synced uses the tighter bound so both mirrored handles stay grabbable.
				-- The render clamps curveT per segment, so the curve can't fold past a node.
				local maxDt
				if which=="out" then maxDt = 1 - anchor.t else maxDt = anchor.t end
				if synced and selIdx~=1 and selIdx~=#kps then maxDt = math.min(1 - anchor.t, anchor.t) end  -- endpoints use one handle; don't clamp to 0
				if maxDt < 0 then maxDt = 0 end
				if dt > maxDt then dt = maxDt end
				if dt < 0 then dt = 0 end
				local a = (which=="out") and anchor.ot or anchor.it
				a.dt = dt; a.dv = dv
				if synced then
					local other = (which=="out") and anchor.it or anchor.ot
					other.dt = dt; other.dv = dv
				end
				redraw()
				liveApply()
				setStatus("Handle  \xCE\x94T: "..fmtNum(dt,2).."  \xCE\x94V: "..fmtNum(dv,2))
			end)
		end

		local function startEnvDrag(kpIdx,dir,clickPy)
			if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect() end
			local k=kps[kpIdx]; if not k then return end
			-- startEnv: drag symmetrically — always use distance from anchor
			local startEnvVal=k.env or 0
			local W0,H0=cbgWH()
			local _,ancY=toCanvas(k.t,k.v,W0,H0)
			dragConn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
				if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
					if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect(); dragConn=nil end; redraw(); return  -- final full-quality frame at release (throttle may skip last)
				end
				local m2=uis:GetMouseLocation(); local a2=cbg.AbsolutePosition; local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(cbg)
				local mpy=(m2.Y-a2.Y)/_s
				local _,mv=fromCanvas(0,mpy,cbgWH())
				-- envelope value moves FREELY past the value cap (the tick isn't
				-- stopped at valMin/valMax). The rendered band edge clamps to the
				-- range separately (bandAt), so visually it squishes flat against
				-- the cap like the curve does, while the stored env keeps growing.
				-- Bound only to the visible view so the tick stays on canvas.
				local maxEnv=math.max(1e-6, viewMax-viewMin)
				local raw = (dir<0) and (k.v-mv) or (mv-k.v)
				k.env=math.clamp(raw,0,maxEnv)
				redraw(); liveApply()
				setStatus("Envelope  "..fmtNum(k.env,2))
			end)
		end
		clickBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
			local m=uis:GetMouseLocation(); local a=cbg.AbsolutePosition; local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(cbg)
			local px=(m.X-a.X)/_s; local py=(m.Y-a.Y)/_s
			-- envelope handles win first
			local ei,edir=findEnvHandle(px,py)
			if ei then clearHover(); startEnvDrag(ei,edir,py); return end
			-- handles win over anchor when overlapping
			local hh=findHandle(px,py)
			if hh then
				clearHover()
				startHandleDrag(hh, px, py)
				return
			end
			-- An open editor: a plot click dismisses it. Clicked empty space -> consume the
			-- click (no new keyframe); clicked a point -> close and fall through so it can
			-- be selected/dragged/re-opened.
			if peIsOpen and peIsOpen() then
				pointEditorClose()
				if not findNear(px,py) then return end
			end
			local found=findNear(px,py)
			if found then
				local nowC=os.clock()
				if peLastIdx==found and (nowC-peLastT)<0.35 then
					peLastIdx=nil; peLastT=0
					selIdx=found; redraw(); clearHover()
					if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect(); dragConn=nil end
					if openPointEditor then openPointEditor(found) end
					return
				end
				peLastT=nowC; peLastIdx=found
				selIdx=found; redraw()
				clearHover()
				startAnchorDrag(px, py)
			else
				peLastIdx=nil
				if #kps>=20 then setStatus("Max 20 keyframes"); return end  -- NumberSequence caps at 20; don't add silently
				local t2,v2=fromCanvas(px,py,cbgWH())
				local vlo=math.max(viewMin,valMin); local vhi=math.min(viewMax,valMax)
				if vlo>vhi then vlo,vhi=vhi,vlo end -- view fully outside value range: don't crash
				local nt=math.clamp(t2,0.005,0.995)
				-- inherit the envelope WIDTH the band is actually drawing at this
				-- spot, using the same lockstep value-progress the renderer/bake use,
				-- so dropping a point lands exactly on the visible band edge (no kink).
				local inhEnv=0
				do
					-- find the segment [A,B] containing nt
					local A,B
					for i=1,#kps-1 do
						if nt>=kps[i].t and nt<=kps[i+1].t then A=kps[i]; B=kps[i+1]; break end
					end
					if not A then
						if nt<=kps[1].t then inhEnv=kps[1].env or 0
						else inhEnv=kps[#kps].env or 0 end
					else
						local aE=A.env or 0; local bE=B.env or 0
						if segIsLinear(A,B) then
							local span=B.t-A.t
							local f=(span>1e-9) and ((nt-A.t)/span) or 0
							inhEnv=aE+(bE-aE)*math.clamp(f,0,1)
						else
							-- solve bezier-u for this t, then take value-progress pV
							local aot=A.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}; local bot=B.it or B.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}
							local c1t=A.t+aot.dt; local c2t=B.t-bot.dt
							local c1v=A.v+aot.dv; local c2v=B.v-bot.dv
							local lo,hi=0,1
							for _=1,18 do
								local m=(lo+hi)*0.5
								if bez(m,A.t,c1t,c2t,B.t)<nt then lo=m else hi=m end
							end
							local u=(lo+hi)*0.5
							local pvRaw=bez(u,A.v,c1v,c2v,B.v)
							local dV=B.v-A.v
							local pV=(math.abs(dV)>1e-6) and ((pvRaw-A.v)/dV) or u
							inhEnv=aE+(bE-aE)*math.clamp(pV,0,1)
						end
					end
				end
				table.insert(kps,{t=nt,v=math.clamp(v2,vlo,vhi),ot={dt=0,dv=0},it={dt=0,dv=0},sync=true,env=inhEnv})
				table.sort(kps,function(a2,b) return a2.t<b.t end)
				for i,k in ipairs(kps) do if math.abs(k.t-t2)<0.004 then selIdx=i; break end end
				clearHover()
				redraw(); liveApply()
				setStatus("Added keyframe")
				-- New point starts exactly under the cursor, so no offset.
				startAnchorDrag(px, py)
			end
		end)

		-- Right-click: handle -> reset to linear (ot={0,0}); anchor -> delete (not endpoints).
		-- Handles win over anchor when overlapping, matching left-click priority.
		-- Uses InputBegan for reliable mouse2 capture.
		clickBtn.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2 then return end
			local m=uis:GetMouseLocation(); local a=cbg.AbsolutePosition; local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(cbg)
			local px=(m.X-a.X)/_s; local py=(m.Y-a.Y)/_s
			-- right-click an envelope tick -> reset that point's envelope to 0
			local ei = findEnvHandle(px,py)
			if ei then
				local k=kps[ei]
				if k and (k.env or 0)>0 then
					k.env=0
					clearHover()
					liveApply()
					redraw()
					setStatus("Reset envelope")
				end
				return
			end
			local hh=findHandle(px,py)
			if hh then
				local anchor = selIdx and kps[selIdx] or nil
				if anchor then
					anchor.ot = anchor.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}
					anchor.it = anchor.it or {dt=anchor.ot.dt,dv=anchor.ot.dv}
					local act = (hh=="out") and anchor.ot or anchor.it
					if not isZeroOt(act) then
						act.dt = 0; act.dv = 0
						if anchor.sync ~= false then
							local other = (hh=="out") and anchor.it or anchor.ot
							other.dt = 0; other.dv = 0
						end
						clearHover(); liveApply(); redraw(); setStatus("Reset handle")
					end
				end
				return
			end
			local found=findNear(px,py)
			if found and found~=1 and found~=#kps then
				table.remove(kps,found)
				if selIdx==found then selIdx=nil
				elseif selIdx and selIdx>found then selIdx=selIdx-1 end
				liveApply()
				redraw()
				setStatus("Deleted keyframe")
			end
		end)

		-- Extra button row (above main buttons)
		local btnRow2=Instance.new("Frame")
		-- inset from the window edges so the row sits inside the window
		btnRow2.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,BTN_ROW2_H); btnRow2.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
		btnRow2.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-(E+BTN_ROW_H+E))
		btnRow2.BackgroundTransparency=1; btnRow2.ZIndex=2; btnRow2.Parent=bgFrame
		local btnLayout2=Instance.new("UIListLayout")
		btnLayout2.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
		btnLayout2.HorizontalAlignment=Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Left
		btnLayout2.VerticalAlignment=Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
		btnLayout2.Padding=UDim.new(0,E); btnLayout2.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
		btnLayout2.Parent=btnRow2
		local function makeBtn2(label,idx,bgCol,txtCol)
			local btn=Instance.new("TextButton")
			btn.Size=UDim2.new(0,70,1,0)
			btn.LayoutOrder=idx; btn.BackgroundColor3=bgCol; btn.AutoButtonColor=false
			btn.Text=label; btn.TextColor3=txtCol
			btn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; btn.TextSize=12
			btn.ZIndex=3; btn.Parent=btnRow2; UIKit.corner(btn,6)
			if bgCol==C.base then  end
			return btn
		end
		-- Responsive labels: as btnRow2 narrows, drop label text one character at
		-- a time to whatever width is available (no "..."), and let boxes reclaim
		-- the freed space. Populated as controls are built; driven by the
		-- AbsoluteSize watcher below.
		local respItems={}
		local _ts=game:GetService("TextService")
		local function measureText(t,size,font)
			if t=="" then return 0 end
			if font==Enum.Font.Unknown then font=Enum.Font.Gotham end
			return _ts:GetTextSize(t,size,font,Vector2.new(9999,100)).X
		end
		-- longest leading substring of `full` that fits in `avail` px (per-char)
		local function fitText(full,avail,size,font)
			if avail<=0 then return "" end
			if measureText(full,size,font)<=avail then return full end
			for n=#full-1,0,-1 do
				if measureText(full:sub(1,n),size,font)<=avail then return full:sub(1,n) end
			end
			return ""
		end
		local function makeRangeBox(label,idx)
			local wrap=Instance.new("Frame")
			wrap.Size=UDim2.new(0,90,1,0); wrap.LayoutOrder=idx
			wrap.BackgroundTransparency=1; wrap.BorderSizePixel=0; wrap.ZIndex=3; wrap.Parent=btnRow2
			-- Flex-fill: the Min/Max/Env boxes grow to share extra width when the
			-- window is wide and shrink (down to ~46px) when it's narrow. Fixed
			-- controls (the toggles) keep their size. The 90px base acts as the
			-- proportional weight so all three flex boxes grow/shrink together.
			local flex=Instance.new("UIFlexItem")
			flex.FlexMode=Enum.UIFlexMode.Shrink; flex.Parent=wrap
			local wmin=Instance.new("UISizeConstraint")
			wmin.MinSize=Vector2.new(30,0); wmin.Parent=wrap
			local lbl=Instance.new("TextLabel")
			lbl.Size=UDim2.new(0,30,1,0); lbl.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0)
			lbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; lbl.Text=label
			lbl.TextColor3=C.textDim; lbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; lbl.TextSize=12
			lbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; lbl.ZIndex=3; lbl.Parent=wrap
			local box=Instance.new("TextBox")
			box.Size=UDim2.new(1,-32,1,-4); box.Position=UDim2.new(0,32,0,2)
			box.BackgroundColor3=C.base; box.BorderSizePixel=0
			box.TextColor3=C.white; box.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; box.TextSize=12
			box.PlaceholderText=""; box.PlaceholderColor3=C.textDim
			box.ClearTextOnFocus=false; box.Text=""
			box.ZIndex=3; box.Parent=wrap; UIKit.corner(box,6)
			-- two states: labelled (label shown, box inset 32) and bare (label
			-- hidden, box fills wrapper) — chosen by wrapper width in the watcher.
			respItems[#respItems+1]={
				kind="box", wrap=wrap, lbl=lbl, box=box, full=label,
				-- Trim the label one trailing char at a time to whatever gutter the
				-- wrapper width allows; when it empties, drop the gutter so the box
				-- takes the full wrapper.
				fit=function()
					local ww=wrap.AbsoluteSize.X/UIKit.uiScaleOf(wrap)
					-- reserve a usable box width (~26px) + gutter for the label
					local gutter=math.clamp(ww-30, 0, 32)
					local shown=fitText(label, gutter, lbl.TextSize, lbl.Font)
					if #shown>0 then
						lbl.Text=shown; lbl.Visible=true
						local gx=measureText(shown,lbl.TextSize,lbl.Font)+4
						box.Position=UDim2.new(0,gx,0,2); box.Size=UDim2.new(1,-gx-2,1,-4)
					else
						lbl.Visible=false
						box.Position=UDim2.new(0,2,0,2); box.Size=UDim2.new(1,-4,1,-4)
					end
				end,
			}
			selectAllOnFocus(box)
			return box
		end
		local deleteBtn = makeBtn2("Delete",1,C.danger,C.danger:Lerp(C.white,0.4)); deleteBtn.BackgroundTransparency=0.5; deleteBtn:SetAttribute("SVFXdanger",true)
		-- Delete grows/shrinks with the row too; truncates to "..." when too narrow.
		do
			local dflex=Instance.new("UIFlexItem")
			dflex.FlexMode=Enum.UIFlexMode.Shrink; dflex.Parent=deleteBtn
			local dmin=Instance.new("UISizeConstraint")
			dmin.MinSize=Vector2.new(40,0); dmin.Parent=deleteBtn
		end
		local deleteStroke=UIKit.makeBorder(deleteBtn, C.danger)
		-- Edit button (opens the per-point editor for the selected keyframe, like the
		-- gradient window's Edit). Sits beside Delete; shrinks with the row.
		local editBtn = makeBtn2("Edit",1.5,C.base,C.textDim)
		do
			local eflex=Instance.new("UIFlexItem")
			eflex.FlexMode=Enum.UIFlexMode.Shrink; eflex.Parent=editBtn
			local emin=Instance.new("UISizeConstraint")
			emin.MinSize=Vector2.new(34,0); emin.Parent=editBtn
		end

			if selIdx and kps[selIdx] and openPointEditor then openPointEditor(selIdx) end
		end)
		editBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() if editBtn.Active then tw(editBtn,{TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(C.white,Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)}) end end)
		editBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
			tw(editBtn,{TextColor3=editBtn.Active and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.6)})
		end)
		-- forward decl: lets the drop-up toggles also hide the matching per-point
		-- toggle buttons on the row (assigned once those toggles are built below).
		local applyToggleVis
		-- Options drop-up (bottom-left): GLOBAL show/hide of curve handles + envelope
		-- band. No animation; stays open until the button is clicked again (clicking

		-- Per-point Curve toggle: curve / linearize the selected point's segment.
		local function makeTogItem(labelText, order)
			-- One per-point toggle. It's a flex Shrink item, so it shrinks PROPORTIONALLY
			-- with the Min/Max/Env boxes (same mechanism + rate) instead of via a separate
			-- window-width formula. Base width = natural content (measured label + switch);
			-- fit() reads the flex-driven actual width and trims the label per-char + scales
			-- the switch toward the right edge as it narrows.
			local switchW=42
			local natural=math.ceil(measureText(labelText,12,Enum.Font.GothamBold))+6+switchW
			local cont=Instance.new("Frame")
			cont.Size=UDim2.new(0,natural,1,0); cont.LayoutOrder=order
			cont.BackgroundTransparency=1; cont.BorderSizePixel=0; cont.ZIndex=3; cont.Parent=btnRow2
			local fx=Instance.new("UIFlexItem"); fx.FlexMode=Enum.UIFlexMode.Shrink; fx.Parent=cont
			local szc=Instance.new("UISizeConstraint"); szc.MinSize=Vector2.new(30,0); szc.Parent=cont
			local lbl=Instance.new("TextLabel")
			lbl.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0); lbl.Size=UDim2.new(0,natural-switchW-4,1,0)
			lbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; lbl.Text=labelText
			lbl.TextColor3=C.textDim; lbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; lbl.TextSize=12
			lbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; lbl.ZIndex=3; lbl.Parent=cont
			local tg=UIKit.makeToggle(cont,42,22,16,3)
			tg.track.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); tg.track.Position=UDim2.new(1,0,0.5,0); tg.track.Parent=cont
			local sc=Instance.new("UIScale"); sc.Scale=1; sc.Parent=tg.track
			respItems[#respItems+1]={kind="tog", lbl=lbl, scale=sc, cont=cont, full=labelText, base=natural,
				fit=function(self)
					local cwid=self.cont.AbsoluteSize.X/UIKit.uiScaleOf(self.cont)
					local minw=30
					local sScale=math.clamp(0.62+0.38*((cwid-minw)/math.max(1,self.base-minw)),0.62,1)
					self.scale.Scale=sScale
					local sw=42*sScale
					local avail=math.max(0,cwid-sw-4)
					local shown=fitText(self.full,avail,self.lbl.TextSize,self.lbl.Font)
					self.lbl.Text=shown; self.lbl.Visible=(#shown>0)
					self.lbl.Size=UDim2.new(0,math.ceil(avail),1,0)
				end}
			return tg, cont
		end

		-- Drop-up Curve/Envelope toggles also hide the matching per-point toggles.

		envAllBox.Parent.Size=UDim2.new(0,74,1,0)
		envAllBox.PlaceholderText="..."
		local function applyEnvAll()
			local e=tonumber((envAllBox.Text:gsub(",", ""))); if e then e=e/dispV end
			if e then
				e=math.max(0,e)
				-- Store env freely up to the view span (same bound as dragging a tick),
				-- so points sitting AT the value cap still take an envelope. The bake
				-- (capEnv) and preview clamp value+/-env to range visually; we don't cap
				-- to per-point headroom here, which would otherwise force those to 0.
				local maxEnv=math.max(1e-6, viewMax-viewMin)
				for _,kp in ipairs(kps) do
					kp.env=math.clamp(e,0,maxEnv)
				end
				liveApply(); redraw()
				setStatus("Envelope set on all points")

			end
			-- don't blank here; the redraw refreshes the box to the new shared value
		end
		envAllBox.FocusLost:Connect(applyEnvAll)
		-- Responsive label tiers for btnRow2. As the row narrows, drop label text
		-- (full -> mid -> bare) and let boxes reclaim the space, rather than
		-- truncating with "...". Thresholds are in px of btnRow2 width.
		local function applyRespTier()
			-- Every responsive item (toggles AND Min/Max/Env boxes) is a flex Shrink item
			-- now, so they shrink at the same proportional rate. Each fit() reads its own
			-- flex-driven width and adapts its label / switch.
			for _,it in ipairs(respItems) do
				if it.fit then it.fit(it) end
			end
		end
		-- Labels depend on each control's own AbsoluteSize (set by flex), which

			applyRespTier(); task.defer(applyRespTier)
		end)
		task.defer(applyRespTier)
		local function updateRangeBoxes()
			-- don't wipe a value the user is typing right now
			if not minBox:IsFocused() then minBox.Text=fmtNum(viewMin*dispV,2) end
			if not maxBox:IsFocused() then maxBox.Text=fmtNum(viewMax*dispV,2) end
			-- Env-all box: show the shared envelope if every point has the same one;
			-- otherwise blank the value and use "..." to signal mixed envelopes.
			if not envAllBox:IsFocused() then
				if #kps==0 then
					envAllBox.Text=""; envAllBox.PlaceholderText="..."
				else
					local e0=kps[1].env or 0; local same=true
					for _,kp in ipairs(kps) do if math.abs((kp.env or 0)-e0)>1e-4 then same=false; break end end
					if same then
						envAllBox.Text=fmtNum(e0*dispV,2); envAllBox.PlaceholderText="..."
					else
						envAllBox.Text=""; envAllBox.PlaceholderText="..."
					end
				end
			end
		end
		local function updateToggleBtn()
			local canDel = selIdx~=nil and selIdx~=1 and selIdx~=#kps
			deleteBtn.Active = canDel
			deleteBtn.TextColor3 = canDel and C.danger:Lerp(C.white,0.4) or C.danger:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.45)
			deleteBtn.BackgroundColor3 = canDel and C.danger or C.danger:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.5); deleteBtn.BackgroundTransparency = canDel and 0.5 or 0.62; if deleteStroke then deleteStroke.Color = canDel and C.danger or C.danger:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.45) end

			editBtn.BackgroundColor3 = canEdit and C.base or C.base:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.2)
			if not selIdx then curveTog.setOn(false,C.loop); syncTog.setOn(false,C.loop); envTog.setOn(false,C.loop); return end
			local k=kps[selIdx]
			if not k then curveTog.setOn(false,C.loop); syncTog.setOn(false,C.loop); envTog.setOn(false,C.loop); return end
			curveTog.setOn(not isZeroOt(k.ot), C.loop)

		syncTog.button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()

			k.ot=k.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}
			k.it=k.it or {dt=k.ot.dt,dv=k.ot.dv}
			if k.sync==false then
				-- re-syncing: snap the in-handle back onto the out-handle's mirror
				k.sync=true; k.it={dt=k.ot.dt,dv=k.ot.dv}

		end)
		envTog.button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()

				k.env=0
			else
				-- default envelope = 10% of the visible range. Bound to the view span
				-- (same as tick-dragging and the "Env:" all-points box), NOT per-point
				-- headroom -- endpoints that sit AT the value cap (first/last points at
				-- valMin/valMax) have zero headroom, which used to clamp their env to 0
				-- so the toggle did nothing for them. bake (capEnv) + preview clamp
				-- value+/-env to range visually, so this is safe.

		openPointEditor=function(idx)

		-- ===== end point editor ======================================
		-- ===== Presets bar (top of the grid) ==========================
		local HttpService=game:GetService("HttpService")
		local function encodeKps(arr)
			local parts={}
			for _,k in ipairs(arr) do
				local ot=k.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}; local it=k.it or {dt=ot.dt,dv=ot.dv}
				local sy=(k.sync==false) and 0 or 1
				table.insert(parts,string.format("%.6f,%.6f,%.6f,%.6f,%.6f,%.6f,%.6f,%d",k.t,k.v,ot.dt,ot.dv,k.env or 0,it.dt,it.dv,sy))
			end
			return table.concat(parts,";")
		end
		local function copyKps(arr)
			local o={}
			for _,k in ipairs(arr) do
				local ot=k.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}; local it=k.it or {dt=ot.dt,dv=ot.dv}
				o[#o+1]={t=k.t,v=k.v,ot={dt=ot.dt,dv=ot.dv},it={dt=it.dt,dv=it.dv},env=k.env or 0,sync=(k.sync~=false)}
			end
			return o
		end
		-- built-in easing shapes (v in 0..1; last point's ot is unused so sync mirrors it)
		local function P(t,v,odt,odv) return {t=t,v=v,ot={dt=odt or 0,dv=odv or 0},it={dt=odt or 0,dv=odv or 0},sync=true,env=0} end
		local builtinPresets={
			{name="Linear Up",    kps={P(0,0),P(1,1)}},
			{name="Constant",     kps={P(0,1),P(1,1)}},
			{name="Bounce Down",  kps={P(0,1),P(0.3,0),P(0.45,0.3),P(0.6,0),P(0.75,0.12),P(0.88,0),P(0.95,0.04),P(1,0)}},
			{name="Sine In",      kps={P(0,0,0.12,0),P(1,1,0.61,1)}},
			{name="Sine Out",     kps={P(0,0,0.61,1),P(1,1,0.12,0)}},
			{name="Quad In-Out",  kps={P(0,0,0.45,0),P(1,1,0.45,0)}},
			{name="Cubic In-Out", kps={P(0,0,0.65,0),P(1,1,0.65,0)}},
			{name="Quart In-Out", kps={P(0,0,0.76,0),P(1,1,0.76,0)}},
			{name="Quint In-Out", kps={P(0,0,0.83,0),P(1,1,0.83,0)}},
			{name="Expo In-Out",  kps={P(0,0,0.87,0),P(1,1,0.87,0)}},
		}
		local function loadUserPresets()
			local raw=plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_CurvePresets"); local list={}
			if type(raw)=="string" and #raw>0 then
				local ok,arr=pcall(function() return HttpService:JSONDecode(raw) end)
				if ok and type(arr)=="table" then
					for _,rec in ipairs(arr) do
						if type(rec)=="table" and rec.name and rec.bz then
							local kpsArr=decodeBezier(rec.bz)
							if kpsArr and #kpsArr>=2 then list[#list+1]={name=tostring(rec.name),kps=kpsArr,vmin=tonumber(rec.vmin),vmax=tonumber(rec.vmax),user=true} end
						end
					end
				end
			end
			return list
		end
		local function saveUserPresets(userList)
			local arr={}
			for _,p in ipairs(userList) do arr[#arr+1]={name=p.name,bz=encodeKps(p.kps),vmin=p.vmin,vmax=p.vmax} end
			pcall(function() plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_CurvePresets",HttpService:JSONEncode(arr)) end)
		end
		local userPresets=loadUserPresets()
		-- Seed/refresh defaults (v2). The previous default set was replaced, so remove any
		-- still-present OLD defaults (matched by their old names) and make sure the NEW
		-- defaults LEAD the list. Custom presets (any other name) are kept after them.
		if plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_CurvePresetsSeeded_v2")~=true then
			local oldNames={Linear=true,["Ease In"]=true,["Ease Out"]=true,["Ease In-Out"]=true,
				["Expo In"]=true,["Expo Out"]=true,["Back In"]=true,["Back Out"]=true,
				Bounce=true,Elastic=true,["Sine In"]=true,["Sine Out"]=true}
			for i=#userPresets,1,-1 do if oldNames[userPresets[i].name] then table.remove(userPresets,i) end end
			local have={}; for _,p in ipairs(userPresets) do have[p.name]=true end
			local merged={}
			for _,p in ipairs(builtinPresets) do if not have[p.name] then merged[#merged+1]={name=p.name,kps=copyKps(p.kps),user=true} end end
			for _,p in ipairs(userPresets) do merged[#merged+1]=p end
			for i=#userPresets,1,-1 do userPresets[i]=nil end
			for _,p in ipairs(merged) do userPresets[#userPresets+1]=p end
			saveUserPresets(userPresets)
			pcall(function() plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_CurvePresetsSeeded_v2",true) end)
		end
		-- v3: drop the retired "Linear Down" default from users who were already seeded
		if plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_CurvePresetsRemoveLinearDown_v3")~=true then
			local removed=false
			for i=#userPresets,1,-1 do if userPresets[i].name=="Linear Down" then table.remove(userPresets,i); removed=true end end
			if removed then saveUserPresets(userPresets) end
			pcall(function() plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_CurvePresetsRemoveLinearDown_v3",true) end)
		end
		-- mini curve preview drawn into a fixed-size square (no AbsoluteSize needed)
		local function miniLine(parent,x0,y0,x1,y1,col)
			-- Draw the segment as axis-aligned 1px COLUMNS, not a rotated Frame: rotated
			-- GuiObjects ignore ClipsDescendants in Roblox, so a rotated mini-curve line
			-- bleeds straight through the cell + scroll frame. Columns clip correctly.
			if x1<x0 then x0,y0,x1,y1=x1,y1,x0,y0 end
			local dx=x1-x0
			if dx<1 then
				local top=math.min(y0,y1); local bot=math.max(y0,y1)
				local f=Instance.new("Frame")
				f.BackgroundColor3=col; f.BorderSizePixel=0; f.ZIndex=6; f.Parent=parent
				f.Position=UDim2.new(0,math.floor(x0-0.5),0,math.floor(top))
				f.Size=UDim2.new(0,2,0,math.max(2,math.ceil(bot-top)))
				return
			end
			for x=math.floor(x0),math.ceil(x1)-1 do
				local f0=math.clamp((x-x0)/dx,0,1); local f1=math.clamp((x+1-x0)/dx,0,1)
				local ya=y0+(y1-y0)*f0; local yb=y0+(y1-y0)*f1
				local top=math.min(ya,yb); local bot=math.max(ya,yb)
				local fr=Instance.new("Frame")
				fr.BackgroundColor3=col; fr.BorderSizePixel=0; fr.ZIndex=6; fr.Parent=parent
				fr.Position=UDim2.new(0,x,0,math.floor(top))
				fr.Size=UDim2.new(0,1,0,math.max(2,math.ceil(bot-top)+1))
			end
		end
		local function renderMini(sq,pkps,W,H)
			local pad=8; local vmn,vmx=math.huge,-math.huge
			for _,k in ipairs(pkps) do vmn=math.min(vmn,k.v); vmx=math.max(vmx,k.v); local e=k.env or 0; if e>0 then vmn=math.min(vmn,k.v-e); vmx=math.max(vmx,k.v+e) end end
			if (vmx-vmn)<1e-6 then vmn=vmn-0.5; vmx=vmx+0.5 end
			local function mx(t) return pad+math.clamp(t,0,1)*(W-2*pad) end
			local function my(v) return pad+(1-(v-vmn)/(vmx-vmn))*(H-2*pad) end
			local col=C.accent:Lerp(C.white,0.35)
			-- envelope band under the curve (translucent vertical columns)
			for i=1,#pkps-1 do
				local A=pkps[i]; local B=pkps[i+1]
				local aE=A.env or 0; local bE=B.env or 0
				if aE>0 or bE>0 then
					local aot=A.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}; local bit2=B.it or B.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}
					local lin=isZeroOt(aot) and isZeroOt(bit2)
					local c1t,c1v,c2t,c2v
					if not lin then c1t=A.t+aot.dt; c1v=A.v+aot.dv; c2t=B.t-bit2.dt; c2v=B.v-bit2.dv end
					for sB=0,10 do
						local u=sB/10
						local tt=lin and (A.t+(B.t-A.t)*u) or bez(u,A.t,c1t,c2t,B.t)
						local vv=lin and (A.v+(B.v-A.v)*u) or bez(u,A.v,c1v,c2v,B.v)
						local ee=aE+(bE-aE)*u
						local X=mx(tt); local yU=my(vv+ee); local yD=my(vv-ee)
						local top=math.min(yU,yD); local hgt=math.abs(yD-yU)
						if hgt>=1 then
							local fr=Instance.new("Frame")
							fr.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; fr.BackgroundTransparency=0.82; fr.BorderSizePixel=0
							fr.ZIndex=4; fr.Parent=sq
							fr.Position=UDim2.new(0,math.floor(X),0,math.floor(top))
							fr.Size=UDim2.new(0,2,0,math.ceil(hgt))
						end
					end
				end
			end
			for i=1,#pkps-1 do
				local A=pkps[i]; local B=pkps[i+1]
				local aot=A.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}; local bit=B.it or B.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}
				if isZeroOt(aot) and isZeroOt(bit) then
					miniLine(sq,mx(A.t),my(A.v),mx(B.t),my(B.v),col)
				else
					local c1t=A.t+aot.dt; local c1v=A.v+aot.dv; local c2t=B.t-bit.dt; local c2v=B.v-bit.dv
					local px,py
					for s=0,10 do
						local u=s/10
						local X=mx(bez(u,A.t,c1t,c2t,B.t)); local Y=my(bez(u,A.v,c1v,c2v,B.v))
						if px then miniLine(sq,px,py,X,Y,col) end
						px,py=X,Y
					end
				end
			end
		end
		local rebuildPresets
		local function applyPreset(preset)
			local copy=copyKps(preset.kps)
			if preset.vmin and preset.vmax and preset.vmin<preset.vmax then
				-- User-saved preset: it captured the ACTUAL property values AND the view
				-- range it was authored in. Reproduce it verbatim — restore that view and
				-- drop the values straight in (only clamped to the property caps). Do NOT
				-- refit to the current view; that refit is what made saved presets land at
				-- the wrong height/scale.
				viewMin=preset.vmin; viewMax=preset.vmax
				for _,k in ipairs(copy) do k.v=math.clamp(k.v,valMin,valMax) end
			else
				-- Built-in normalized preset (0..1 shape): fit it into the CURRENT view
				-- range [viewMin,viewMax], clamped to the property caps, so it fills exactly
				-- what you're viewing. dv + env scale by the same factor so the shape holds.
				local tLo=(valMin~=-math.huge) and math.max(viewMin,valMin) or viewMin
				local tHi=(valMax~= math.huge) and math.min(viewMax,valMax) or viewMax
				if tHi<=tLo then tHi=tLo+1 end
				local pmn,pmx=math.huge,-math.huge
				for _,k in ipairs(copy) do pmn=math.min(pmn,k.v); pmx=math.max(pmx,k.v) end
				if pmn~=math.huge then
					local pspan=pmx-pmn
					local scale=(pspan>1e-9) and ((tHi-tLo)/pspan) or 0
					for _,k in ipairs(copy) do
						k.v=(pspan>1e-9) and (tLo+(k.v-pmn)*scale) or tHi
						if k.ot then k.ot.dv=k.ot.dv*scale end
						if k.it then k.it.dv=k.it.dv*scale end
						k.env=(k.env or 0)*scale
						k.v=math.clamp(k.v,valMin,valMax)
					end
				end
			end
			for n=#kps,1,-1 do kps[n]=nil end
			for _,k in ipairs(copy) do kps[#kps+1]=k end
			selIdx=nil
			liveApply(); redraw(); updateRangeBoxes(); updateToggleBtn()
			setStatus("Applied "..preset.name)
		end
		local function addCurrentPreset()
			local name="Preset "..(#userPresets+1)
			userPresets[#userPresets+1]={name=name,kps=copyKps(kps),vmin=viewMin,vmax=viewMax,user=true}
			saveUserPresets(userPresets); rebuildPresets(); setStatus("Saved "..name)
		end
		local function deletePreset(preset)
			for n,p in ipairs(userPresets) do
				if p==preset then table.remove(userPresets,n); break end
			end
			saveUserPresets(userPresets); rebuildPresets(); setStatus("Deleted "..preset.name)
		end

		local function updateSB()
			local cwid=scrollContent.AbsoluteCanvasSize.X; local vwid=scrollContent.AbsoluteSize.X
			local want = presetsOpen and cwid>vwid+1 and vwid>0
			sbTrack.Visible=want
			if want then

			end)

		rebuildPresets=function()

		local PRESET_TI=TweenInfo.new(0.18,Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
		local bottomH=BTN_ROW_H+BTN_ROW2_H+E*3

		relayout=function(animated)
			local boxH = presetsOpen and (HEADER_H+PANEL_H+PB_PAD_B) or HEADER_H
			local boxBottom = TOPBAR_H+E+boxH
			sbTrack.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,0,boxBottom+SB_GAP)
			local extra = (presetsOpen and sbShown) and (SB_H+SB_GAP) or 0

			if boxTween then boxTween:Cancel() end
			if gridTween then gridTween:Cancel() end
			if animated then
				boxTween=ctx.tweenService:Create(presetBox,PRESET_TI,{Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,boxH)}); boxTween:Play()
				gridTween=ctx.tweenService:Create(cbg,PRESET_TI,{Position=cpos,Size=csize}); gridTween:Play()
			else
				presetBox.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,boxH); cbg.Position=cpos; cbg.Size=csize
			end
		end
		local function setPresets(open)
			presetsOpen=open
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_CurvePresetsOpen",open)
			tw(pbArrow,{Rotation=open and 90 or 0})
			if open then rebuildPresets() end
			updateSB(); relayout(true)
		end
		header.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() setPresets(not presetsOpen) end)
		header.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(pbLbl,{TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(C.white,Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)}); tw(pbArrow,{ImageColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(C.white,Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)}) end)
		header.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(pbLbl,{TextColor3=C.textDim}); tw(pbArrow,{ImageColor3=C.textDim}) end)
		pbArrow.Rotation = presetsOpen and 90 or 0
		if presetsOpen then rebuildPresets() end
		updateSB(); relayout(false)
		-- ===== end Presets bar ========================================

		-- Bottom button row
		local btnRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		-- inset from the window edges so the row sits inside the window
		btnRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,BTN_ROW_H); btnRow.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
		btnRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-E)
		btnRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; btnRow.ZIndex=2; btnRow.Parent=bgFrame
		local btnLayout=Instance.new("UIListLayout")
		btnLayout.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
		btnLayout.HorizontalAlignment=Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Left
		btnLayout.VerticalAlignment=Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
		btnLayout.Padding=UDim.new(0,E); btnLayout.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
		btnLayout.Parent=btnRow
		local function makeBtn(label,idx,bgCol,txtCol)
			local btn=Instance.new("TextButton")
			btn.Size=UDim2.new(0,0,1,0)
			btn.LayoutOrder=idx; btn.BackgroundColor3=bgCol; btn.AutoButtonColor=false
			btn.Text=label; btn.TextColor3=txtCol
			btn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; btn.TextSize=TXT.body.size
			btn.ZIndex=3; btn.Parent=btnRow; UIKit.corner(btn,6)
			local fx=Instance.new("UIFlexItem"); fx.FlexMode=Enum.UIFlexMode.Fill; fx.Parent=btn
			if bgCol==C.base then  end
			return btn
		end
		-- Undo / redo (go back & forth) at the far left of the row. Asset 3098670612
		-- faces up: rotate -90 -> points left (back), +90 -> points right (forward).
		local function makeHistBtn(order, rot)
			local b=Instance.new("TextButton")
			b.Size=UDim2.new(0,25,1,0); b.LayoutOrder=order
			b.BackgroundColor3=C.base; b.AutoButtonColor=false
			b.Text=""; b.ZIndex=3; b.Parent=btnRow
			UIKit.corner(b,6)
			local ic=Instance.new("ImageLabel")
			ic.Size=UDim2.new(0,14,0,14); ic.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
			ic.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); ic.BackgroundTransparency=1
			ic.Rotation=rot; ic.ImageColor3=C.textDim; ic.ZIndex=4; ic.Parent=b
			UIKit.setIconImage(ic,"3098670612")
			return b,ic
		end
		undoBtn,undoIcon=makeHistBtn(0,-90)
		redoBtn,redoIcon=makeHistBtn(0.5,90)
		undoBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() if histCanU then tw(undoIcon,{ImageColor3=undoIcon.ImageColor3:Lerp(C.white,Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)}) end end)
		undoBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() if refreshHistButtons then refreshHistButtons() end end)
		redoBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() if histCanR then tw(redoIcon,{ImageColor3=redoIcon.ImageColor3:Lerp(C.white,Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)}) end end)
		redoBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() if refreshHistButtons then refreshHistButtons() end end)
		undoBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() if undo then undo() end end)
		redoBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() if redo then redo() end end)
		-- Inverse: mirror every keyframe value around the curve's own min/max
		-- centre (rising<->falling), flipping handle dv so the shape inverts too.
		-- Reversible (apply twice = original); never leaves the existing value range.
		local inverseBtn=makeBtn("Invert",0.75,C.base,C.textDim)
		-- narrower than the flex-fill buttons: drop the Fill flex item + fix the width
		do local ifx=inverseBtn:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("UIFlexItem"); if ifx then ifx:Destroy() end end
		inverseBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,62,1,0)
		inverseBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if #kps==0 then return end
			local mn,mx=math.huge,-math.huge
			for _,k in ipairs(kps) do if k.v<mn then mn=k.v end; if k.v>mx then mx=k.v end end
			local sum=mn+mx
			for _,k in ipairs(kps) do
				k.v=sum-k.v
				if k.ot then k.ot.dv=-(k.ot.dv or 0) end
				if k.it then k.it.dv=-(k.it.dv or 0) end
			end
			liveApply(); redraw(); updateRangeBoxes(); if commit then commit() end
			setStatus("Inverted curve")
		end)
		UIKit.hoverLift(inverseBtn)
		local reloadBtn=makeBtn("Reload",1,C.base,C.textDim)
		local cancelBtn=makeBtn("Cancel",2,C.base,C.textDim)
		local applyBtn =makeBtn("Apply", 3,C.accent,  C.base)
		applyBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; applyBtn.TextSize=13
		reloadBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			local mn,mx=math.huge,-math.huge
			local function acc(v) if v<mn then mn=v end; if v>mx then mx=v end end
			for _,k in ipairs(kps) do
				-- anchor value
				acc(k.v)
				-- envelope spread (band reaches k.v ± k.env), but the rendered band
				-- clamps to the value range, so respect that here too
				local env=k.env or 0
				if env>0 then
					local up=(valMax~=math.huge) and math.min(k.v+env, valMax) or (k.v+env)
					local dn=(valMin~=-math.huge) and math.max(k.v-env, valMin) or (k.v-env)
					acc(up); acc(dn)
				end
			end
			-- bezier overshoot: a curved segment can bulge past both anchors, so
			-- sample each curved segment and fold the extremes in. Straight
			-- segments stay within their anchors and need no sampling.
			for si=1,#kps-1 do
				local A=kps[si]; local B=kps[si+1]
				local ot=A.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}; local bt=B.it or B.ot or {dt=0,dv=0}
				if not (ot.dt==0 and ot.dv==0 and bt.dt==0 and bt.dv==0) then
					local c1v=A.v+ot.dv; local c2v=B.v-bt.dv
					for sN=1,15 do
						local u=sN/16
						local mu=1-u
						local bv=mu*mu*mu*A.v + 3*mu*mu*u*c1v + 3*mu*u*u*c2v + u*u*u*B.v
						if valMin~=-math.huge then bv=math.max(bv,valMin) end
						if valMax~= math.huge then bv=math.min(bv,valMax) end
						acc(bv)
					end
				end
			end
			if mn==math.huge then mn=0; mx=1 end
			local pad=(mx-mn)*0.2; if pad<0.1 then pad=0.1 end
			viewMin=math.min(0,mn-pad); viewMax=math.max(1,mx+pad); redraw()
			setStatus("Range  "..fmtNum(viewMin*dispV,2).." – "..fmtNum(viewMax*dispV,2))
		end)
		cancelBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if onRevert then onRevert()
			elseif callback and origSeq then callback(origSeq) end
			App:toggle(CURVE_WINDOW_ID)
		end)
		applyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			liveApply()
			if onCommit then onCommit() end
			App:toggle(CURVE_WINDOW_ID)
		end)
		UIKit.hoverLift(reloadBtn)
		UIKit.hoverLift(cancelBtn)
		applyBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(applyBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(C.white,Theme.FADE_STRENGTH)}) end)
		applyBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(applyBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent}) end)

		-- ===== Undo / redo history ====================================
		-- Snapshot model: every committed change captures kps + user presets + the
		-- global Curve/Envelope display toggles + selection. The VIEW range
		-- (viewMin/viewMax) is deliberately NOT tracked. commit() is idempotent (it
		-- diffs a serialized form) so it can be called liberally; a global mouse /
		-- right-click release drives most edits, with explicit calls on the
		-- keyboard-committed textboxes.
		local history={}; local histIdx=0; local lastSerial=nil; local restoring=false
		local function copyPresets(arr)
			local o={}
			for _,p in ipairs(arr) do o[#o+1]={name=p.name,kps=copyKps(p.kps),vmin=p.vmin,vmax=p.vmax,user=p.user} end
			return o
		end
		local function makeSnapshot()
			return {kps=copyKps(kps),presets=copyPresets(userPresets),
				showHandles=showHandlesG,showEnv=showEnvG,selIdx=selIdx}
		end
		local function serialize()
			local pp={}
			for _,p in ipairs(userPresets) do pp[#pp+1]=p.name.."="..encodeKps(p.kps) end
			return "K:"..encodeKps(kps).."~P:"..table.concat(pp,"|")
				.."~G:"..(showHandlesG and "1" or "0")..(showEnvG and "1" or "0")
		end
		refreshHistButtons=function()
			if not undoIcon then return end
			histCanU=histIdx>1; histCanR=histIdx<#history
			undoIcon.ImageColor3 = histCanU and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.55)
			redoIcon.ImageColor3 = histCanR and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.55)
			undoBtn.BackgroundColor3 = histCanU and C.base:Lerp(C.white,0.04) or C.base
			redoBtn.BackgroundColor3 = histCanR and C.base:Lerp(C.white,0.04) or C.base
		end
		commit=function()
			if restoring then return end
			local sr=serialize()
			if sr==lastSerial then return end
			for n=#history,histIdx+1,-1 do history[n]=nil end
			history[#history+1]=makeSnapshot()
			if #history>120 then table.remove(history,1) end
			histIdx=#history; lastSerial=sr
			refreshHistButtons()
		end
		local function restore(snap)
			restoring=true
			for n=#kps,1,-1 do kps[n]=nil end
			for _,k in ipairs(copyKps(snap.kps)) do kps[#kps+1]=k end
			for n=#userPresets,1,-1 do userPresets[n]=nil end
			for _,p in ipairs(copyPresets(snap.presets)) do p.user=true; userPresets[#userPresets+1]=p end
			saveUserPresets(userPresets); rebuildPresets()
			showHandlesG=snap.showHandles; showEnvG=snap.showEnv
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_CurveShowHandles",showHandlesG)
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_CurveShowEnv",showEnvG)
			if applyToggleVis then applyToggleVis() end
			selIdx=snap.selIdx; if selIdx and not kps[selIdx] then selIdx=nil end
			liveApply(); redraw(); updateRangeBoxes(); updateToggleBtn()
			restoring=false
		end
		undo=function()
			if histIdx<=1 then return end
			histIdx=histIdx-1; restore(history[histIdx])
			lastSerial=serialize(); refreshHistButtons(); setStatus("Undo")
		end
		redo=function()
			if histIdx>=#history then return end
			histIdx=histIdx+1; restore(history[histIdx])
			lastSerial=serialize(); refreshHistButtons(); setStatus("Redo")
		end
		-- Most edits finish with a mouse-button release (left: drag / add / toggle /
		-- preset; right: reset / delete). Defer so the gesture's final liveApply lands
		-- before we snapshot. Idempotent, so harmless on plain clicks.
		histConn=uis.InputEnded:Connect(function(inp)
			local ut=inp.UserInputType
			if ut==Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or ut==Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2 then
				task.defer(function() if commit then commit() end end)
			end
		end)
		commit()              -- seed history[1] with the opening state
		refreshHistButtons()
		-- ===== end undo / redo ========================================

		-- Assign the real rebuild now that the UI helpers exist (heartbeat set at
		-- mount top calls this through the forward-declared fullRedraw).
		fullRedraw=function()
			redrawNow()
			if updateToggleBtn then updateToggleBtn() end
			if updateRangeBoxes then updateRangeBoxes() end
		end
		fullRedraw()  -- initial paint immediately (no first-frame blank)
	end

	local function unmount() cleanup() end

	ctx.openCurveEditor=function(seq,cb,App_,id,range,onRevert_,bezierIO_,name_,supportsEnv,onCommit_)
		envAllowed = (supportsEnv ~= false)
		local pk={}
		local vMin,vMax=0,1
		if seq and typeof(seq)=="NumberSequence" then
			for _,k in ipairs(seq.Keypoints) do table.insert(pk,{t=k.Time,v=k.Value,ot={dt=0,dv=0},it={dt=0,dv=0},sync=true,env=k.Envelope}) end
			local mn,mx=math.huge,-math.huge
			for _,k in ipairs(pk) do mn=math.min(mn,k.v); mx=math.max(mx,k.v) end
			local pad=(mx-mn)*0.2; if pad<0.1 then pad=0.1 end
			vMin=math.min(0,mn-pad); vMax=math.max(1,mx+pad)
		else pk={{t=0,v=0,ot={dt=0,dv=0}},{t=1,v=0,ot={dt=0,dv=0}}} end
		pending={
			cb=cb, range=range,
			origSeq=(seq and typeof(seq)=="NumberSequence") and seq or NumberSequence.new(0),
			kps=pk, viewMin=vMin, viewMax=vMax, onRevert=onRevert_, bezierIO=bezierIO_, name=name_,
			onCommit=onCommit_,
		}
		if not App_ then return end
		if isOpen() then
			UIKit.setInstant(true)
			mount(App_, id)
			task.defer(function() UIKit.setInstant(false) end)
		else
			App_:toggle(id)
		end
	end

	return {mount=mount,unmount=unmount,isOpen=isOpen}
end

-- ColSeqWindow: ColorSequence (gradient) editor
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory)
	local C   = Theme.C
	local tw  = UIKit.tw
	local TXT = Theme.TXT or {title={font=Enum.Font.GothamBold,size=13},body={font=Enum.Font.GothamBold,size=12},small={font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium,size=11}}
	local coreGui    = ctx.coreGui
	local plugin     = ctx.plugin
	local uis        = ctx.userInputService
	local runService = ctx.runService

	local gui=nil; local isPinned=false; local kps={}; local origKps={}
	local selIdx=nil; local callback=nil; local origSeq=nil; local onRevert=nil
	local gradFrame=nil; local markerLayer=nil; local guideLayer=nil
	local dragConn=nil; local histConn=nil
	local E=6; local TOPBAR_H=24; local BAR_H=40; local MK_H=16; local KR=6
	local MK_PAD=6
	local WIN_W=300; local WIN_H=160
	local pending=nil
	local commit, undo, redo, refreshHistButtons, histCanU, histCanR, updateEditBtn, updateTimeFld, updateDelBtn
	local undoBtn, redoBtn, undoIcon, redoIcon
	local redraw

	local function cleanup()
		if gui then gui:Destroy() end; gui=nil; selIdx=nil; callback=nil; origSeq=nil; onRevert=nil
		gradFrame=nil; markerLayer=nil; guideLayer=nil
		if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect(); dragConn=nil end
		if histConn then histConn:Disconnect(); histConn=nil end
	end
	local function isOpen() return gui~=nil and gui.Parent~=nil end

	local function copyKps(arr) local o={} for _,k in ipairs(arr) do o[#o+1]={t=k.t,c=k.c} end return o end

	local function buildSequence()
		table.sort(kps,function(a,b) return a.t<b.t end)
		if #kps==0 then return ColorSequence.new(Color3.new(1,1,1)) end
		if #kps==1 then return ColorSequence.new(kps[1].c) end
		-- ColorSequence requires keypoints at exactly 0 and 1; if the user dragged the
		-- end stops inward, cap the edges with the nearest stop's colour (flat run).
		local pts={}
		for _,k in ipairs(kps) do pts[#pts+1]={t=math.clamp(k.t,0,1),c=k.c} end
		if pts[1].t>0 then table.insert(pts,1,{t=0,c=pts[1].c}) end
		if pts[#pts].t<1 then pts[#pts+1]={t=1,c=pts[#pts].c} end
		local out={}; local lastT=-1
		for _,e in ipairs(pts) do
			if #out>=20 then break end
			local t=e.t
			if t<=lastT then t=math.min(1,lastT+0.0001) end
			lastT=t
			out[#out+1]=ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(t,e.c)
		end
		out[1]=ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0,out[1].Value)
		out[#out]=ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1,out[#out].Value)
		return ColorSequence.new(out)
	end
	local function liveApply() if callback then callback(buildSequence()) end end

	local function updateGradient()
		if not gradFrame then return end
		for _,c in ipairs(gradFrame:GetChildren()) do if c:IsA("UIGradient") then c:Destroy() end end
		local ok,seq=pcall(buildSequence)
		if ok then local g=Instance.new("UIGradient"); g.Color=seq; g.Parent=gradFrame end
	end

	local function mkX(t,W) W=W/UIKit.uiScaleOf(gradFrame); return MK_PAD + math.clamp(t,0,1)*(W-2*MK_PAD) end
	local function xToT(x,W) W=W/UIKit.uiScaleOf(gradFrame); return math.clamp((x-MK_PAD)/math.max(1,W-2*MK_PAD),0,1) end

	local function redrawMarkers()
		if not markerLayer or not gradFrame then return end
		for _,c in ipairs(markerLayer:GetChildren()) do if c:IsA("Frame") then c:Destroy() end end
		table.sort(kps,function(a,b) return a.t<b.t end)
		local W=gradFrame.AbsoluteSize.X
		for i,k in ipairs(kps) do
			local sel=(selIdx==i)
			local mk=Instance.new("Frame")
			mk.Size=UDim2.new(0,KR*2,1,0); mk.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0)
			mk.Position=UDim2.new(0,mkX(k.t,W),0,0)
			mk.BackgroundColor3=k.c; mk.BorderSizePixel=0; mk.ZIndex=sel and 6 or 4; mk.Parent=markerLayer
			UIKit.corner(mk,3)
			local st=UIKit.makeBorder(mk, sel and C.white or C.border, sel and 2.5 or 1)
			if sel then st.Transparency=0 end
		end
		if guideLayer then
			for _,c in ipairs(guideLayer:GetChildren()) do c:Destroy() end
			-- guide lines scale with width (more subdivisions when the window is wider);
			-- kept even so a line always lands on the 0.5 centre.
			local divs=math.clamp(math.floor(W/110+0.5),1,8)*2
			-- i=0 and i=divs add the start/end edge lines, emphasised like the centre.
			for i=0,divs do
				local gt=i/divs
				local emph=math.abs(gt-0.5)<1e-3 or i==0 or i==divs
				local ln=Instance.new("Frame")
				ln.Size=UDim2.new(0,emph and 2 or 1,1,0); ln.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0)
				ln.Position=UDim2.new(0,mkX(gt,W),0,0)
				ln.BackgroundColor3=C.white; ln.BorderSizePixel=0
				ln.BackgroundTransparency=emph and 0.55 or 0.85
				ln.ZIndex=2; ln.Parent=guideLayer
			end
		end
	end

	redraw=function() updateGradient(); redrawMarkers(); if refreshHistButtons then refreshHistButtons() end; if updateEditBtn then updateEditBtn() end; if updateTimeFld then updateTimeFld() end; if updateDelBtn then updateDelBtn() end end

	local function mount(App, COLSEQ_WINDOW_ID)
		cleanup()
		if pending then
			callback=pending.cb; origSeq=pending.origSeq; onRevert=pending.onRevert
			kps={}; origKps={}
			for _,k in ipairs(pending.kps) do table.insert(kps,{t=k.t,c=k.c}); table.insert(origKps,{t=k.t,c=k.c}) end
			selIdx=nil; pending=nil
		end
		isPinned=plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ColSeq")==true
		gui=Instance.new("ScreenGui"); gui.Name="SineVFX_ColSeqEditor"
		gui.ResetOnSpawn=false; gui.ZIndexBehavior=Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
		gui.DisplayOrder=10006; gui.Parent=coreGui

		local win=WinFactory.new({
			stateKey="ColSeqEditor", gui=gui, name="ColSeqWrapper",
			w=WIN_W, h=WIN_H, pos=UDim2.new(0.32,0,0.32,0),
			minW=20, maxW=600, minH=20, maxH=600,
			topbarH=TOPBAR_H, getPinned=function() return isPinned end,
		})
		local main=win.main; local topbar=win.topbar; local bgFrame=win.bgFrame
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(topbar, "Edit a color gradient with stops.") end

		local ttl=Instance.new("TextLabel")
		ttl.Size=UDim2.new(1,-60,1,0); ttl.Position=UDim2.new(0,12,0,0)
		ttl.BackgroundTransparency=1; ttl.Text="Gradient"
		ttl.TextColor3=C.text; ttl.Font=TXT.title.font; ttl.TextSize=TXT.title.size
		ttl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; ttl.ZIndex=6; ttl.Parent=topbar

		local pinBtn,pinIcon=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"120413064155653",-48,15)
		local closeBtn,_   =UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"101421401454601",-26,10)
		pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			isPinned=not isPinned; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ColSeq",isPinned)
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",isPinned)
			tw(pinIcon,{ImageColor3=isPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim})
		end)
		if isPinned then pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",true); pinIcon.ImageColor3=C.Pinned end
		closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() liveApply(); App:toggle(COLSEQ_WINDOW_ID) end)

		win.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
			local col=focused and C.text or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			local ic=focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			task.defer(function()
				for _,ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
					if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end
					if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch,{TextColor3=col}) end
					if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then
						if ch.Parent and ch.Parent:GetAttribute("PinnedActive") then tw(ch,{ImageColor3=focused and C.Pinned or C.Pinned})
						else tw(ch,{ImageColor3=ic}) end
					end
				end
			end)
		end)

		gradFrame=Instance.new("Frame")
		local BR=25*2+E*3  -- two button rows + three 6px gaps reserved at the bottom
		gradFrame.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,1,-(TOPBAR_H+E + BR+MK_H+E)); gradFrame.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,0,TOPBAR_H+E)
		gradFrame.BackgroundColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1); gradFrame.BorderSizePixel=0
		gradFrame.ZIndex=2; gradFrame.Parent=bgFrame
		UIKit.corner(gradFrame,6)
		guideLayer=Instance.new("Frame"); guideLayer.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,MK_H)
		guideLayer.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1); guideLayer.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-BR)
		guideLayer.BackgroundTransparency=1; guideLayer.ZIndex=2; guideLayer.Parent=bgFrame

		markerLayer=Instance.new("Frame")
		markerLayer.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,MK_H); markerLayer.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1); markerLayer.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-BR)
		markerLayer.BackgroundTransparency=1; markerLayer.ZIndex=3; markerLayer.Parent=bgFrame
		gradFrame:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(redrawMarkers)

		local function findNear(px)
			local W=gradFrame.AbsoluteSize.X
			for i,k in ipairs(kps) do if math.abs(mkX(k.t,W)-px)<KR+4 then return i end end
		end
		local editingKp=nil
		local function wheelOpen() return ctx.coreGui~=nil and ctx.coreGui:FindFirstChild("SineVFX_ColorWheel")~=nil end
		local function editColor(idx)
			local k=kps[idx]; if not k then return end
			editingKp=k
			if not ctx.openColorEditor then
				local okR,cwf=pcall(function() return require(script.Parent:FindFirstChild("ColorWheel")) end)
				if okR and type(cwf)=="function" then pcall(function() cwf(ctx,Theme,UIKit,WinFactory) end) end
			end
			if not ctx.openColorEditor then return end
			local orig=k.c
			ctx.openColorEditor(k.c, function(c)
				k.c=c; redraw(); liveApply()
			end, App, "ColorWheel", function()
				k.c=orig; redraw(); liveApply()
			end, {
				get=function() return k.t end,
				set=function(t) k.t=math.clamp(t,0,1); selIdx=table.find(kps,k); redraw(); liveApply() end,
			}, function() return k.c end)
		end
		local function startDrag(idx, clickPx)
			if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect() end
			local k=kps[idx]; if not k then return end
			-- endpoints (first/last) are pinned: dragging one instead drops a NEW point that
			-- copies its colour, which you then drag. The endpoint itself stays at 0/1.
			local isEnd=(k.t<=0.0001 or k.t>=0.9999)
			local dragK=k; local spawned=(not isEnd)
			local off=(clickPx and (clickPx - mkX(k.t, gradFrame.AbsoluteSize.X))) or 0
			dragConn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
				if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
					if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect(); dragConn=nil end; return
				end
				local m=uis:GetMouseLocation(); local a=gradFrame.AbsolutePosition; local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(gradFrame)
				local newT=xToT((m.X-a.X)/_s - off, gradFrame.AbsoluteSize.X)
				if not spawned then
					-- a plain click still selects/edits; only an actual drag spawns the copy
					if clickPx and math.abs((m.X-a.X)/_s - clickPx) < 3 then return end
					dragK={t=newT, c=k.c}; table.insert(kps, dragK); spawned=true
				end
				dragK.t=math.clamp(newT,0.001,0.999)
				selIdx=table.find(kps,dragK)
				redraw(); liveApply()
			end)
		end

		local clickBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		clickBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,1,-(TOPBAR_H+E + BR)); clickBtn.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,0,TOPBAR_H+E)
		clickBtn.BackgroundTransparency=1; clickBtn.Text=""; clickBtn.ZIndex=5; clickBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; clickBtn.Parent=bgFrame

		local lastClickT, lastClickIdx = 0, nil
		clickBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
			local m=uis:GetMouseLocation(); local a=gradFrame.AbsolutePosition; local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(gradFrame)
			local px=(m.X-a.X)/_s
			local found=findNear(px)
			if found then
				local now=os.clock()
				if lastClickIdx==found and (now-lastClickT)<0.35 then
					lastClickIdx=nil; lastClickT=0
					selIdx=found; redraw()
					if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect(); dragConn=nil end
					editColor(found); return
				end
				lastClickT=now; lastClickIdx=found
				selIdx=found; redraw(); startDrag(found, px)
				-- if the colour wheel is already open, point it at the newly-selected stop
				if wheelOpen() and kps[found]~=editingKp then editColor(found) end
			else
				lastClickIdx=nil
				if #kps>=20 then return end  -- ColorSequence caps at 20 stops; don't add beyond (bake would drop it)
				local W=gradFrame.AbsoluteSize.X
				local tt=math.clamp(xToT(px,W),0.001,0.999)
				local newC
				if #kps>=1 then
					table.sort(kps,function(a2,b) return a2.t<b.t end)
					if tt<=kps[1].t then newC=kps[1].c
					elseif tt>=kps[#kps].t then newC=kps[#kps].c
					else
						for i=1,#kps-1 do
							if tt>=kps[i].t and tt<=kps[i+1].t then
								local d=kps[i+1].t-kps[i].t
								local al=(d>0) and (tt-kps[i].t)/d or 0
								newC=kps[i].c:Lerp(kps[i+1].c,al); break
							end
						end
					end
				end
				newC=newC or Color3.new(1,1,1)
				table.insert(kps,{t=tt,c=newC})
				table.sort(kps,function(a2,b) return a2.t<b.t end)
				for i,k in ipairs(kps) do if math.abs(k.t-tt)<0.003 then selIdx=i; break end end
				redraw(); liveApply(); startDrag(selIdx, px)
			end
		end)
		clickBtn.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2 then return end
			local m=uis:GetMouseLocation(); local a=gradFrame.AbsolutePosition; local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(gradFrame)
			local found=findNear((m.X-a.X)/_s)
			if found and found>1 and found<#kps and #kps>2 then
				table.remove(kps,found)
				if selIdx==found then selIdx=nil elseif selIdx and selIdx>found then selIdx=selIdx-1 end
				redraw(); liveApply()
			end
		end)

		-- hover selects the stop under the cursor (no tooltip)
		clickBtn.MouseMoved:Connect(function()
			if dragConn then return end
			local m=uis:GetMouseLocation(); local a=gradFrame.AbsolutePosition; local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(gradFrame)
			local found=findNear((m.X-a.X)/_s)
			if found and found~=selIdx then selIdx=found; redraw(); if wheelOpen() and kps[found]~=editingKp then editColor(found) end end
		end)
		local BTN_H=25
		-- main row: Cancel | Apply
		local btnRow=Instance.new("Frame")
		btnRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,BTN_H); btnRow.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
		btnRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-E)
		btnRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; btnRow.ZIndex=3; btnRow.Parent=bgFrame
		local btnLayout=Instance.new("UIListLayout")
		btnLayout.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
		btnLayout.HorizontalAlignment=Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Left
		btnLayout.VerticalAlignment=Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
		btnLayout.Padding=UDim.new(0,E); btnLayout.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; btnLayout.Parent=btnRow
		local function makeBtn(label,order,bgCol,txtCol)
			local btn=Instance.new("TextButton"); btn.Size=UDim2.new(0,0,1,0); btn.LayoutOrder=order
			btn.BackgroundColor3=bgCol; btn.AutoButtonColor=false; btn.Text=label; btn.TextColor3=txtCol
			btn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; btn.TextSize=TXT.body.size; btn.ZIndex=3; btn.Parent=btnRow; UIKit.corner(btn,6)
			local fx=Instance.new("UIFlexItem"); fx.FlexMode=Enum.UIFlexMode.Fill; fx.Parent=btn
			if bgCol==C.base then  end
			return btn
		end
		local cancelBtn=makeBtn("Cancel",1,C.base,C.textDim)
		local applyBtn =makeBtn("Apply", 2,C.accent,  C.base); applyBtn.TextSize=13

		-- second row: undo / redo (left) ... Delete (right)
		local btnRow2=Instance.new("Frame")
		btnRow2.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,BTN_H); btnRow2.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
		btnRow2.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-(E+BTN_H+E))
		btnRow2.BackgroundTransparency=1; btnRow2.ZIndex=3; btnRow2.Parent=bgFrame
		-- btnRow2 laid out manually (no UIListLayout): time field pinned left; Delete + Edit
		-- are fixed-width anchored on the RIGHT and only shrink if the row gets narrow enough
		-- that they'd touch the time field's background.
		local DEF_BTN_W=62
		local relayoutBtnRow2
		local function selAllCS(box)
			box.Focused:Connect(function()
				local conn; conn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
					if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
						conn:Disconnect(); conn=nil
						if box:IsFocused() then box.SelectionStart=1; box.CursorPosition=#box.Text+1 end
					end
				end)
			end)
		end
		local tfWrap=Instance.new("Frame"); tfWrap.Size=UDim2.new(0,72,1,0)
		tfWrap.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0); tfWrap.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0)
		tfWrap.BackgroundTransparency=1; tfWrap.ZIndex=3; tfWrap.Parent=btnRow2
		local tfLbl=Instance.new("TextLabel"); tfLbl.Size=UDim2.new(0,14,1,0)
		tfLbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; tfLbl.Text="T:"; tfLbl.TextColor3=C.textDim; tfLbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; tfLbl.TextSize=11
		tfLbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; tfLbl.ZIndex=3; tfLbl.Parent=tfWrap
		local timeFld=Instance.new("TextBox"); timeFld.Size=UDim2.new(1,-16,1,0); timeFld.Position=UDim2.new(0,16,0,0)
		timeFld.BackgroundColor3=C.base; timeFld.BorderSizePixel=0; timeFld.TextColor3=C.white
		timeFld.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; timeFld.TextSize=12; timeFld.ClearTextOnFocus=false; timeFld.Text=""; timeFld.PlaceholderText="0.000"; timeFld.PlaceholderColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.4); timeFld:SetAttribute("SVFXphdim",true)
		timeFld.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; timeFld.ZIndex=3; timeFld.Parent=tfWrap
		UIKit.corner(timeFld,5)
		do local pd=Instance.new("UIPadding"); pd.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,6); pd.Parent=timeFld end
		selAllCS(timeFld)
		updateTimeFld=function()
			if not timeFld or timeFld:IsFocused() then return end
			if selIdx and kps[selIdx] then timeFld.Text=string.format("%.3f",kps[selIdx].t); timeFld.TextEditable=true; timeFld.TextColor3=C.white
			else timeFld.Text=""; timeFld.TextEditable=false end
		end
		timeFld.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local k=selIdx and kps[selIdx]
			if k then local n=tonumber(timeFld.Text); if n then k.t=math.clamp(n,0,1); redraw(); liveApply(); selIdx=table.find(kps,k) end end
			updateTimeFld()
		end)
		local function makeHistBtn(order, rot)
			local b=Instance.new("TextButton"); b.Size=UDim2.new(0,BTN_H,1,0); b.LayoutOrder=order
			b.BackgroundColor3=C.base; b.AutoButtonColor=false; b.Text=""; b.ZIndex=3; b.Parent=btnRow
			UIKit.corner(b,6)
			local ic=Instance.new("ImageLabel"); ic.Size=UDim2.new(0,14,0,14); ic.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
			ic.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); ic.BackgroundTransparency=1; ic.Rotation=rot
			ic.ImageColor3=C.textDim; ic.ZIndex=4; ic.Parent=b; UIKit.setIconImage(ic,"3098670612")
			return b,ic
		end
		undoBtn,undoIcon=makeHistBtn(-2,-90)
		redoBtn,redoIcon=makeHistBtn(-1,90)
		undoBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() if histCanU then tw(undoIcon,{ImageColor3=undoIcon.ImageColor3:Lerp(C.white,Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)}) end end)
		undoBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() if refreshHistButtons then refreshHistButtons() end end)
		redoBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() if histCanR then tw(redoIcon,{ImageColor3=redoIcon.ImageColor3:Lerp(C.white,Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)}) end end)
		redoBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() if refreshHistButtons then refreshHistButtons() end end)
		undoBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() if undo then undo() end end)
		redoBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() if redo then redo() end end)
		local editBtn=Instance.new("TextButton"); editBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,DEF_BTN_W,1,0)
		editBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0); editBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0)
		editBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.base; editBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; editBtn.Text="Edit"; editBtn.TextColor3=C.textDim
		editBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; editBtn.TextSize=TXT.body.size; editBtn.ZIndex=3; editBtn.Parent=btnRow2
		UIKit.corner(editBtn,6)
		updateEditBtn=function()
			local on=(selIdx~=nil and kps[selIdx]~=nil)
			editBtn.Active=on
			editBtn.TextColor3 = on and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.55)
			editBtn.BackgroundColor3 = on and C.base or C.base:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.2)
		end
		editBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() if editBtn.Active then tw(editBtn,{TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(C.white,Theme.HOVER_STRENGTH)}) end end)
		editBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() if updateEditBtn then updateEditBtn() end end)
		editBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() if selIdx and kps[selIdx] then editColor(selIdx) end end)
		local delBtn=Instance.new("TextButton"); delBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,DEF_BTN_W,1,0)
		delBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0); delBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,-(DEF_BTN_W+E),0,0)
		delBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.danger; delBtn.BackgroundTransparency=0.5; delBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; delBtn:SetAttribute("SVFXdanger",true)
		delBtn.Text="Delete"; delBtn.TextColor3=C.danger:Lerp(C.white,0.4)
		delBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; delBtn.TextSize=TXT.body.size; delBtn.ZIndex=3; delBtn.Parent=btnRow2
		UIKit.corner(delBtn,6); local delStroke=UIKit.makeBorder(delBtn, C.danger)
		-- fixed-width, right-anchored; shrink only when about to overlap the time field bg
		relayoutBtnRow2=function()
			local rowW=btnRow2.AbsoluteSize.X; if rowW<=0 then return end
			local avail=rowW - tfWrap.Size.X.Offset - E - E
			local w=math.clamp(math.floor(avail/2), 24, DEF_BTN_W)
			editBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,w,1,0); editBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0)
			delBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,w,1,0); delBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,-(w+E),0,0)
		end
		btnRow2:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(relayoutBtnRow2)
		task.defer(relayoutBtnRow2)
		updateDelBtn=function()
			local on=(selIdx~=nil and kps[selIdx]~=nil and #kps>2 and selIdx>1 and selIdx<#kps)
			delBtn.Active=on
			delBtn.TextColor3 = on and C.danger:Lerp(C.white,0.4) or C.danger:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.45)
			delBtn.BackgroundColor3 = on and C.danger or C.danger:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.5); delBtn.BackgroundTransparency = on and 0.5 or 0.62; if delStroke then delStroke.Color = on and C.danger or C.danger:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.45) end
		end
		delBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() if delBtn.Active then tw(delBtn,{TextColor3=C.danger:Lerp(C.white,0.4),BackgroundTransparency=0.32}) end end)
		delBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
			if delBtn.Active then tw(delBtn,{TextColor3=C.danger:Lerp(C.white,0.4),BackgroundTransparency=0.5}) else updateDelBtn() end
		end)
		delBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if selIdx and selIdx>1 and selIdx<#kps and #kps>2 then
				table.remove(kps,selIdx); selIdx=nil; redraw(); liveApply()
			end
		end)

		cancelBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() if onRevert then onRevert() elseif callback and origSeq then callback(origSeq) end; App:toggle(COLSEQ_WINDOW_ID) end)
		UIKit.hoverLift(cancelBtn)
		applyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() liveApply(); App:toggle(COLSEQ_WINDOW_ID) end)
		applyBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(applyBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(C.white,Theme.FADE_STRENGTH)}) end)
		applyBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(applyBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent}) end)

				-- ===== Undo / redo history =====
		local history={}; local histIdx=0; local lastSerial=nil; local restoring=false
		local function serialize()
			local parts={}
			for _,k in ipairs(kps) do parts[#parts+1]=string.format("%.4f,%d,%d,%d",k.t,math.floor(k.c.R*255+0.5),math.floor(k.c.G*255+0.5),math.floor(k.c.B*255+0.5)) end
			return table.concat(parts,";")
		end
		refreshHistButtons=function()
			if not undoIcon then return end
			histCanU=histIdx>1; histCanR=histIdx<#history
			undoIcon.ImageColor3 = histCanU and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.55)
			redoIcon.ImageColor3 = histCanR and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.55)
			undoBtn.BackgroundColor3 = histCanU and C.base:Lerp(C.white,0.04) or C.base
			redoBtn.BackgroundColor3 = histCanR and C.base:Lerp(C.white,0.04) or C.base
		end
		commit=function()
			if restoring then return end
			local sr=serialize(); if sr==lastSerial then return end
			for n=#history,histIdx+1,-1 do history[n]=nil end
			history[#history+1]=copyKps(kps)
			if #history>120 then table.remove(history,1) end
			histIdx=#history; lastSerial=sr; refreshHistButtons()
		end
		local function restore(snap)
			restoring=true
			kps={}; for _,k in ipairs(snap) do kps[#kps+1]={t=k.t,c=k.c} end
			if selIdx and not kps[selIdx] then selIdx=nil end
			liveApply(); redraw(); restoring=false
		end
		undo=function() if histIdx<=1 then return end; histIdx=histIdx-1; restore(history[histIdx]); lastSerial=serialize(); refreshHistButtons() end
		redo=function() if histIdx>=#history then return end; histIdx=histIdx+1; restore(history[histIdx]); lastSerial=serialize(); refreshHistButtons() end
		histConn=uis.InputEnded:Connect(function(inp)
			local ut=inp.UserInputType
			if ut==Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or ut==Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2 then
				task.defer(function() if commit then commit() end end)
			end
		end)
		commit(); refreshHistButtons()

		task.defer(redraw)
	end

	local function unmount() cleanup() end

	ctx.openColSeqEditor=function(seq,cb,App_,id,onRevert_)
		local pk={}
		if seq and typeof(seq)=="ColorSequence" then
			-- load every keypoint as-is so same-colour stops are preserved (no dedup/strip);
			-- endpoints stay pinned at 0/1 and aren't draggable, so no spurious edge stops.
			for _,k in ipairs(seq.Keypoints) do table.insert(pk,{t=k.Time,c=k.Value}) end
			if #pk==1 then pk={{t=0,c=pk[1].c},{t=1,c=pk[1].c}} end
		else
			pk={{t=0,c=Color3.new(1,1,1)},{t=1,c=Color3.new(1,1,1)}}
		end
		pending={
			cb=cb,
			origSeq=(seq and typeof(seq)=="ColorSequence") and seq or ColorSequence.new(Color3.new(1,1,1)),
			kps=pk, onRevert=onRevert_,
		}
		if not App_ then return end
		if isOpen() then
			UIKit.setInstant(true); mount(App_, id); task.defer(function() UIKit.setInstant(false) end)
		else
			App_:toggle(id)
		end
	end

	return {mount=mount,unmount=unmount,isOpen=isOpen}
end

-- ColorWheel: single Color3 picker (SV square + hue strip + RGB/Hex)
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory)
	local C   = Theme.C
	local tw  = UIKit.tw
	local TXT = Theme.TXT or {title={font=Enum.Font.GothamBold,size=13},body={font=Enum.Font.GothamBold,size=12},small={font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium,size=11}}
	local coreGui    = ctx.coreGui
	local plugin     = ctx.plugin
	local uis        = ctx.userInputService
	local runService = ctx.runService

	local gui=nil; local isPinned=false
	local callback=nil; local origColor=nil; local onRevert=nil; local timeOpts=nil; local colorReader=nil
	local hue,sat,val = 0,1,1
	local E=6; local TOPBAR_H=24
	local WIN_W=240; local WIN_H=312
	local pending=nil
	local svArea,svCursor,hueBar,hueInd,swatch,winMain
	local rFld,gFld,bFld,hexFld
	local dragConn=nil; local posConns={}

	local function cleanup()
		if gui then gui:Destroy() end; gui=nil
		callback=nil; origColor=nil; onRevert=nil; timeOpts=nil; colorReader=nil
		svArea=nil; svCursor=nil; hueBar=nil; hueInd=nil; swatch=nil; winMain=nil
		rFld=nil; gFld=nil; bFld=nil; hexFld=nil
		if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect(); dragConn=nil end
		for _,c in ipairs(posConns) do c:Disconnect() end; table.clear(posConns)
	end
	local function isOpen() return gui~=nil and gui.Parent~=nil end

	local function curColor() return Color3.fromHSV(hue,sat,val) end
	local function liveApply() if callback then callback(curColor()) end end
	local function toHex(c)
		return string.format("%02X%02X%02X", math.floor(c.R*255+0.5), math.floor(c.G*255+0.5), math.floor(c.B*255+0.5))
	end

	local function positionBall()
		if not (svCursor and svArea and winMain) then return end
		local sp=svArea.AbsolutePosition; local ss=svArea.AbsoluteSize; local mp=winMain.AbsolutePosition
		local r=2  -- small inset so the dot isn't fully off the edge
		local lx=math.clamp(sat*ss.X, r, math.max(r, ss.X-r))
		local ly=math.clamp((1-val)*ss.Y, r, math.max(r, ss.Y-r))
		local _s=UIKit.uiScaleOf(svCursor)
		svCursor.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(((sp.X-mp.X)+lx)/_s, ((sp.Y-mp.Y)+ly)/_s)
	end
	local function refreshUI(skip)
		if not svArea then return end
		local c = curColor()
		svArea.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromHSV(hue,1,1)
		positionBall()
		if svCursor then svCursor.BackgroundColor3 = c end
		if hueInd then hueInd.Position = UDim2.new(hue,0,0.5,0) end
		if swatch then swatch.BackgroundColor3 = c end
		if rFld and rFld~=skip then rFld.Text=tostring(math.floor(c.R*255+0.5)) end
		if gFld and gFld~=skip then gFld.Text=tostring(math.floor(c.G*255+0.5)) end
		if bFld and bFld~=skip then bFld.Text=tostring(math.floor(c.B*255+0.5)) end
		if hexFld and hexFld~=skip then hexFld.Text="#"..toHex(c) end
	end

	-- Adopt an arbitrary Color3 into h/s/v. Greys (s==0) keep the previous hue so
	-- the hue strip doesn't snap to red when you type a grey value.
	local function setFromColor(c, skip)
		local h,s,v = c:ToHSV()
		if s>0.0001 then hue=h end
		sat=s; val=v
		refreshUI(skip); liveApply()
	end

	local function startDrag(updateFn)
		if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect() end
		dragConn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
			if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
				if dragConn then dragConn:Disconnect(); dragConn=nil end; return
			end
			updateFn(uis:GetMouseLocation())
		end)
	end

	local function mount(App, COLOR_WINDOW_ID)
		cleanup()
		if pending then
			callback=pending.cb; origColor=pending.origColor; onRevert=pending.onRevert; timeOpts=pending.timeOpts; colorReader=pending.getColor
			local h,s,v=(pending.color or Color3.new(1,1,1)):ToHSV()
			hue=h; sat=s; val=v
			pending=nil
		end
		isPinned=plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ColorWheel")==true
		gui=Instance.new("ScreenGui"); gui.Name="SineVFX_ColorWheel"
		gui.ResetOnSpawn=false; gui.ZIndexBehavior=Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
		gui.DisplayOrder=10008; gui.Parent=coreGui

		local win=WinFactory.new({
			stateKey="ColorWheel", gui=gui, name="ColorWheelWrapper",
			w=WIN_W, h=WIN_H,
			pos=UDim2.new(0.34,0,0.3,0),
			minW=20, maxW=440, minH=20, maxH=560,
			topbarH=TOPBAR_H, getPinned=function() return isPinned end,
		})
		local topbar=win.topbar; local bgFrame=win.bgFrame; winMain=win.main
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(topbar, "Pick a color.") end

		local ttl=Instance.new("TextLabel")
		ttl.Size=UDim2.new(1,-60,1,0); ttl.Position=UDim2.new(0,12,0,0)
		ttl.BackgroundTransparency=1; ttl.Text="Color Wheel"
		ttl.TextColor3=C.text; ttl.Font=TXT.title.font; ttl.TextSize=TXT.title.size
		ttl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; ttl.ZIndex=6; ttl.Parent=topbar

		local pinBtn,pinIcon=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"120413064155653",-48,15)
		local closeBtn,_   =UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"101421401454601",-26,10)
		pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			isPinned=not isPinned
			plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ColorWheel",isPinned)
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",isPinned)
			tw(pinIcon,{ImageColor3=isPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim})
		end)
		if isPinned then pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",true); pinIcon.ImageColor3=C.Pinned end
		closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() cleanup() end)
		win.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
			local col=focused and C.text or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			local ic=focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			task.defer(function()
				for _,ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
					if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end
					if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch,{TextColor3=col}) end
					if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then
						if ch.Parent and ch.Parent:GetAttribute("PinnedActive") then tw(ch,{ImageColor3=focused and C.Pinned or C.Pinned})
						else tw(ch,{ImageColor3=ic}) end
					end
				end
			end)
		end)

		local HUE_H=16; local ROW_H=24; local HEX_H=24; local BTN_H=26
		local GAP=6; local GAP_HEX=6
		local oBtn=E
		-- Time row now sits directly above the buttons (below RGB + Hex)
		local oTime= timeOpts and (oBtn+BTN_H+GAP_HEX) or nil
		local oHex = timeOpts and (oTime+ROW_H+GAP) or (oBtn+BTN_H+GAP_HEX)
		local oRgb=oHex+HEX_H+GAP
		local oHue=oRgb+ROW_H+GAP
		local svReserve=oHue+HUE_H+GAP
		local SV_TOP=TOPBAR_H+E

		-- SV square (fills the area above the controls; stretches on resize)
		svArea=Instance.new("TextButton"); svArea.Text=""; svArea.AutoButtonColor=false
		svArea.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,0,SV_TOP); svArea.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,1,-(SV_TOP+svReserve))
		svArea.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromHSV(hue,1,1); svArea.BorderSizePixel=0; svArea.ZIndex=2; svArea.Parent=bgFrame
		UIKit.corner(svArea,6)
		local whiteOv=Instance.new("Frame"); whiteOv.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0); whiteOv.BackgroundColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1)
		whiteOv.BorderSizePixel=0; whiteOv.ZIndex=3; whiteOv.Parent=svArea; UIKit.corner(whiteOv,6)
		local wg=Instance.new("UIGradient"); wg.Transparency=NumberSequence.new({NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0,0),NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1,1)}); wg.Parent=whiteOv
		local blackOv=Instance.new("Frame"); blackOv.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0); blackOv.BackgroundColor3=Color3.new(0,0,0)
		blackOv.BorderSizePixel=0; blackOv.ZIndex=4; blackOv.Parent=svArea; UIKit.corner(blackOv,6)
		local bgg=Instance.new("UIGradient"); bgg.Rotation=90; bgg.Transparency=NumberSequence.new({NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0,1),NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1,0)}); bgg.Parent=blackOv
		svCursor=Instance.new("Frame"); svCursor.Size=UDim2.new(0,9,0,9); svCursor.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
		svCursor.BackgroundColor3=curColor(); svCursor.BorderSizePixel=0; svCursor.ZIndex=1000; svCursor.Parent=winMain
		Instance.new("UICorner",svCursor).CornerRadius=UDim.new(1,0)
		local svStroke=Instance.new("UIStroke"); svStroke.Color=Color3.new(1,1,1); svStroke.Thickness=1.5; svStroke.Parent=svCursor
		local function svUpdate(mp)
			local ap=svArea.AbsolutePosition; local as=svArea.AbsoluteSize
			sat=math.clamp((mp.X-ap.X)/math.max(1,as.X),0,1)
			val=1-math.clamp((mp.Y-ap.Y)/math.max(1,as.Y),0,1)

		end
		svArea.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then svUpdate(uis:GetMouseLocation()); startDrag(svUpdate) end
		end)
		table.insert(posConns, svArea:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsolutePosition"):Connect(positionBall))
		table.insert(posConns, svArea:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(positionBall))
		table.insert(posConns, winMain:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsolutePosition"):Connect(positionBall))

		-- Hue strip
		hueBar=Instance.new("TextButton"); hueBar.Text=""; hueBar.AutoButtonColor=false; hueBar.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
		hueBar.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,HUE_H); hueBar.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-oHue)
		hueBar.BackgroundColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1); hueBar.BorderSizePixel=0; hueBar.ZIndex=2; hueBar.Parent=bgFrame
		UIKit.corner(hueBar,5)
		local hg=Instance.new("UIGradient")
		hg.Color=ColorSequence.new({
			ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0,Color3.fromHSV(0,1,1)),
			ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1/6,Color3.fromHSV(1/6,1,1)),
			ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(2/6,Color3.fromHSV(2/6,1,1)),
			ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(3/6,Color3.fromHSV(3/6,1,1)),
			ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(4/6,Color3.fromHSV(4/6,1,1)),
			ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(5/6,Color3.fromHSV(5/6,1,1)),
			ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1,Color3.fromHSV(1,1,1)),
		}); hg.Parent=hueBar
		hueInd=Instance.new("Frame"); hueInd.Size=UDim2.new(0,4,1,4); hueInd.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
		hueInd.Position=UDim2.new(hue,0,0.5,0); hueInd.BackgroundColor3=Color3.new(1,1,1); hueInd.BorderSizePixel=0
		hueInd.ZIndex=4; hueInd.Parent=hueBar; UIKit.corner(hueInd,2)
		local hiStroke=Instance.new("UIStroke"); hiStroke.Color=Color3.new(0,0,0); hiStroke.Thickness=1; hiStroke.Transparency=0.4; hiStroke.Parent=hueInd
		local function hueUpdate(mp)
			local ap=hueBar.AbsolutePosition; local as=hueBar.AbsoluteSize
			hue=math.clamp((mp.X-ap.X)/math.max(1,as.X),0,1)
			refreshUI(); liveApply()
		end
		hueBar.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
			if inp.UserInputType==Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then hueUpdate(uis:GetMouseLocation()); startDrag(hueUpdate) end
		end)

		local function selAll(box)
			box.Focused:Connect(function()
				local conn; conn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
					if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
						conn:Disconnect(); conn=nil
						if box:IsFocused() then box.SelectionStart=1; box.CursorPosition=#box.Text+1 end
					end
				end)
			end)
		end
		local function padBox(box) local pd=Instance.new("UIPadding"); pd.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,6); pd.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,4); pd.Parent=box end
		if timeOpts then
			local timeRow=Instance.new("Frame"); timeRow.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
			timeRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,ROW_H); timeRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-oTime)
			timeRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; timeRow.ZIndex=3; timeRow.Parent=bgFrame
			local tlbl=Instance.new("TextLabel"); tlbl.Size=UDim2.new(0,34,1,0)
			tlbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; tlbl.Text="Time:"; tlbl.TextColor3=C.textDim; tlbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; tlbl.TextSize=11
			tlbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; tlbl.ZIndex=3; tlbl.Parent=timeRow
			local tbox=Instance.new("TextBox"); tbox.Size=UDim2.new(1,-38,1,0); tbox.Position=UDim2.new(0,38,0,0)
			tbox.BackgroundColor3=C.base; tbox.BorderSizePixel=0; tbox.TextColor3=C.white
			tbox.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; tbox.TextSize=12; tbox.ClearTextOnFocus=false
			tbox.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; tbox.ZIndex=3; tbox.Parent=timeRow
			UIKit.corner(tbox,5); selAll(tbox); padBox(tbox)
