			tbox.Text=string.format("%.3f", (timeOpts.get and timeOpts.get()) or 0)
			tbox.FocusLost:Connect(function()
				local n=tonumber(tbox.Text)
				if n and timeOpts.set then timeOpts.set(n) end
				tbox.Text=string.format("%.3f", (timeOpts.get and timeOpts.get()) or 0)
			end)
		end

		-- RGB row (swatch + R/G/B), flex-fill so boxes share width on resize
		local rgbRow=Instance.new("Frame"); rgbRow.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
		rgbRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,ROW_H); rgbRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-oRgb)
		rgbRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; rgbRow.ZIndex=3; rgbRow.Parent=bgFrame
		local rgbList=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); rgbList.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
		rgbList.VerticalAlignment=Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center; rgbList.Padding=UDim.new(0,E)
		rgbList.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; rgbList.Parent=rgbRow
		swatch=Instance.new("Frame"); swatch.Size=UDim2.new(0,24,1,0); swatch.LayoutOrder=1
		swatch.BackgroundColor3=curColor(); swatch.BorderSizePixel=0; swatch.ZIndex=3; swatch.Parent=rgbRow
		UIKit.corner(swatch,5); UIKit.makeBorder(swatch, Color3.new(0,0,0))
		local function makeNum(label, order)
			local field=Instance.new("Frame"); field.Size=UDim2.new(0,0,1,0); field.LayoutOrder=order
			field.BackgroundTransparency=1; field.ZIndex=3; field.Parent=rgbRow
			local fx=Instance.new("UIFlexItem"); fx.FlexMode=Enum.UIFlexMode.Fill; fx.Parent=field
			local lbl=Instance.new("TextLabel"); lbl.Size=UDim2.new(0,14,1,0)
			lbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; lbl.Text=label; lbl.TextColor3=C.textDim; lbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; lbl.TextSize=11
			lbl.ZIndex=3; lbl.Parent=field
			local box=Instance.new("TextBox"); box.Size=UDim2.new(1,-16,1,0); box.Position=UDim2.new(0,16,0,0)
			box.BackgroundColor3=C.base; box.BorderSizePixel=0; box.TextColor3=C.white
			box.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; box.TextSize=12; box.ClearTextOnFocus=false; box.Text="0"
			box.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; box.ZIndex=3; box.Parent=field
			UIKit.corner(box,5)
			UIKit.numericOnly(box); selAll(box); padBox(box)
			return box
		end
		rFld=makeNum("R:",2); gFld=makeNum("G:",3); bFld=makeNum("B:",4)
		local function rgbCommit(box, chan)
			local n=tonumber(box.Text); if not n then refreshUI(); return end
			n=math.clamp(math.floor(n+0.5),0,255)
			local c=curColor()
			local r,g,b=math.floor(c.R*255+0.5),math.floor(c.G*255+0.5),math.floor(c.B*255+0.5)
			local cur=(chan=="r" and r) or (chan=="g" and g) or b
			if n==cur then refreshUI(); return end
			if chan=="r" then r=n elseif chan=="g" then g=n else b=n end
			setFromColor(Color3.fromRGB(r,g,b), box); box.Text=tostring(n)
		end
		rFld.FocusLost:Connect(function() rgbCommit(rFld,"r") end)
		gFld.FocusLost:Connect(function() rgbCommit(gFld,"g") end)
		bFld.FocusLost:Connect(function() rgbCommit(bFld,"b") end)

		-- Hex row
		local hexRow=Instance.new("Frame"); hexRow.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
		hexRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,HEX_H); hexRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-oHex)
		hexRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; hexRow.ZIndex=3; hexRow.Parent=bgFrame
		local hlbl=Instance.new("TextLabel"); hlbl.Size=UDim2.new(0,28,1,0)
		hlbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; hlbl.Text="Hex:"; hlbl.TextColor3=C.textDim; hlbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; hlbl.TextSize=11; hlbl.TextYAlignment=Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
		hlbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; hlbl.ZIndex=3; hlbl.Parent=hexRow
		hexFld=Instance.new("TextBox"); hexFld.Size=UDim2.new(1,-32,1,0); hexFld.Position=UDim2.new(0,32,0,0)
		hexFld.BackgroundColor3=C.base; hexFld.BorderSizePixel=0; hexFld.TextColor3=C.white
		hexFld.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; hexFld.TextSize=12; hexFld.ClearTextOnFocus=false; hexFld.Text="#FFFFFF"
		hexFld.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; hexFld.ZIndex=3; hexFld.Parent=hexRow
		UIKit.corner(hexFld,5); selAll(hexFld); padBox(hexFld)
		hexFld.FocusLost:Connect(function()
			local hx=hexFld.Text:gsub("#",""):gsub("%s","")
			if #hx==3 then hx=hx:sub(1,1):rep(2)..hx:sub(2,2):rep(2)..hx:sub(3,3):rep(2) end
			local r,g,b=hx:match("^(%x%x)(%x%x)(%x%x)$")
			if r and (r..g..b):upper()~=toHex(curColor()) then
				setFromColor(Color3.fromRGB(tonumber(r,16),tonumber(g,16),tonumber(b,16)), hexFld)
			else refreshUI() end
		end)

		-- Buttons: icon Reset (Shifter-style) + Cancel + Apply
		local btnRow=Instance.new("Frame"); btnRow.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
		btnRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,-E*2,0,BTN_H); btnRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,E,1,-oBtn)
		btnRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; btnRow.ZIndex=3; btnRow.Parent=bgFrame
		local bl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); bl.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
		bl.HorizontalAlignment=Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Left; bl.VerticalAlignment=Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
		bl.Padding=UDim.new(0,E); bl.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; bl.Parent=btnRow
		local resetBtn=Instance.new("TextButton"); resetBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,BTN_H,1,0); resetBtn.LayoutOrder=1
		resetBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.base; resetBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; resetBtn.Text=""; resetBtn.BorderSizePixel=0
		resetBtn.ZIndex=3; resetBtn.Parent=btnRow; UIKit.corner(resetBtn,7)
		local resetIcon=Instance.new("ImageLabel"); resetIcon.Size=UDim2.new(0,18,0,18); resetIcon.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
		resetIcon.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); resetIcon.BackgroundTransparency=1; resetIcon.ImageColor3=C.textDim
		resetIcon.ZIndex=4; resetIcon.Parent=resetBtn; UIKit.setIconImage(resetIcon,"438217405")
		UIKit.hoverLift(resetIcon, resetBtn)
		local function mkFill(label,order,bg,txt)
			local b=Instance.new("TextButton"); b.Size=UDim2.new(0,0,1,0); b.LayoutOrder=order
			b.BackgroundColor3=bg; b.AutoButtonColor=false; b.Text=label; b.TextColor3=txt
			b.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; b.TextSize=12; b.ZIndex=3; b.Parent=btnRow; UIKit.corner(b,6)
			local fx=Instance.new("UIFlexItem"); fx.FlexMode=Enum.UIFlexMode.Fill; fx.Parent=b
			if bg==C.base then  end
			return b
		end
		local cancelBtn=mkFill("Cancel",2,C.base,C.textDim)
		local applyBtn=mkFill("Apply",3,C.accent,C.base); applyBtn.TextSize=13
		resetBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if onRevert then
				onRevert()  -- restore the true original (keeps a gradient a gradient)
				local h,s,v=(origColor or Color3.new(1,1,1)):ToHSV()
				if s>0.0001 then hue=h end; sat=s; val=v
				refreshUI()  -- reflect it in the wheel WITHOUT re-applying (no flatten)
			elseif origColor then setFromColor(origColor) end
		end)
		cancelBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if onRevert then onRevert() elseif callback and origColor then callback(origColor) end
			cleanup()
		end)
		UIKit.hoverLift(cancelBtn)
		applyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() liveApply(); cleanup() end)
		applyBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(applyBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(C.white,Theme.FADE_STRENGTH)}) end)
		applyBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(applyBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent}) end)

		refreshUI()

		-- listen for the source colour changing outside the wheel and mirror it
		-- (skip while the user is dragging or editing a box; no liveApply so no loop)
		if colorReader then
			local _extAcc=0
			table.insert(posConns, runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
				if dragConn then return end
				_extAcc += dt
				if _extAcc < 0.066 then return end  -- ~15fps: only mirrors EXTERNAL color edits back into the wheel; imperceptible latency, big idle-CPU cut while a picker is open
				_extAcc = 0
				if (rFld and rFld:IsFocused()) or (gFld and gFld:IsFocused()) or (bFld and bFld:IsFocused()) or (hexFld and hexFld:IsFocused()) then return end
				local ext = colorReader()
				if typeof(ext)~="Color3" then return end
				local cur = curColor()
				if math.abs(ext.R-cur.R)>0.0039 or math.abs(ext.G-cur.G)>0.0039 or math.abs(ext.B-cur.B)>0.0039 then
					local h,s,v = ext:ToHSV()
					if s>0.0001 then hue=h end
					sat=s; val=v
					refreshUI()
				end
			end))
		end
	end

	local function unmount() cleanup() end

	ctx.openColorEditor=function(color,cb,App_,id,onRevert_,timeOpts_,getColor_)
		pending={
			cb=cb,
			color=(typeof(color)=="Color3") and color or Color3.new(1,1,1),
			origColor=(typeof(color)=="Color3") and color or Color3.new(1,1,1),
			onRevert=onRevert_, timeOpts=timeOpts_, getColor=getColor_,
		}
		if not App_ then return end
		if isOpen() then
			UIKit.setInstant(true)
			mount(App_, id)
			task.defer(function() UIKit.setInstant(false) end)
		else
			mount(App_, id)
		end
	end

	ctx.colorEditorIsOpen=isOpen
	return {mount=mount,unmount=unmount,isOpen=isOpen}
end

-- TrailPreviewWindow: orbit selected Trails around a shape to preview them live
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory)
	local C   = Theme.C
	local tw  = UIKit.tw
	local twNow = UIKit.twNow
	local plugin     = ctx.plugin
	local selection  = ctx.selection
	local uis        = ctx.userInputService
	local runService = ctx.runService
	local coreGui    = ctx.coreGui
	local DANGER     = C.danger or C.accent

	local WIN_W=212; local TOPBAR_H=25; local WIN_H=154
	local GAP=6

	-- live preview state (read each frame by the heartbeat loop)
	local speed=2.0      -- radians / sec
	local radius=6.0     -- studs
	local shape="Circle"
	local SHAPES={"Circle","Square","Figure 8","Line"}
	local previewConn=nil; local previewParts={}
	local CollectionService=game:GetService("CollectionService")
	local TP_TAG="SineVFX_TrailPreviewMoved"
	local TP_CF="SineVFX_TPOrigCF"; local TP_ANC="SineVFX_TPOrigAnchored"

	-- Crash/close recovery: if a previous session was still previewing when Studio
	-- crashed or closed (and the place was saved mid-preview), any moved part still
	-- carries its home CFrame/Anchored as attributes plus a tag -- put it all back.
	local function recoverOrphans()
		for _,inst in ipairs(CollectionService:GetTagged(TP_TAG)) do
			if inst:IsA("BasePart") then
				local cf=inst:GetAttribute(TP_CF)
				if typeof(cf)=="CFrame" then inst.CFrame=cf end
				local anc=inst:GetAttribute(TP_ANC)
				if type(anc)=="boolean" then inst.Anchored=anc end
			end
			pcall(function() inst:SetAttribute(TP_CF,nil); inst:SetAttribute(TP_ANC,nil) end)
			pcall(function() CollectionService:RemoveTag(inst,TP_TAG) end)
		end
	end
	recoverOrphans()

	local gui=nil; local isPinned=false; local selConn=nil; local ddOutConn=nil
	local CHS=ctx.CHS
	-- We deliberately do NOT disable ChangeHistoryService for the preview anymore.
	-- Disabling it is global, so it killed undo for every OTHER edit made while the
	-- preview was running -- and if it ever got stuck off, undo stayed broken even
	-- when nothing was previewing. The preview only translates an anchored part each
	-- frame and restores it exactly on stop, which never floods undo on its own.
	-- healHistory() re-enables recording defensively, in case an old build left it off.
	local function healHistory() if CHS then pcall(function() CHS:SetEnabled(true) end) end end

	local function getTrails()
		local seen,list={},{}
		for _,obj in ipairs(selection:Get()) do
			local function chk(i) if i and not seen[i] and (i:IsA("Trail") or i:IsA("ParticleEmitter")) then seen[i]=true; table.insert(list,i) end end
			chk(obj); for _,d in ipairs(ctx.descendantsTo(obj)) do chk(d) end
		end
		return list
	end

	local function stopPreview()
		if previewConn then previewConn:Disconnect(); previewConn=nil end
		-- restore each animated part to exactly where it started
		for _,pi in ipairs(previewParts) do
			if pi.part and pi.part.Parent then
				pi.part.CFrame = pi.origCF
				pi.part.Anchored = pi.origAnchored
				-- restored: safe to clear the breadcrumbs
				pcall(function()
					pi.part:SetAttribute(TP_CF,nil); pi.part:SetAttribute(TP_ANC,nil)
					CollectionService:RemoveTag(pi.part, TP_TAG)
				end)
			elseif pi.part then
				-- part was deleted mid-preview: LEAVE the breadcrumb attributes
				-- and tag, so if the user undoes the deletion, recoverOrphans()
				-- can still put it back where it belongs
				pcall(function()
					pi.part.CFrame = pi.origCF
					pi.part.Anchored = pi.origAnchored
				end)
			end
		end
		previewParts={}
	end
	local function isPreviewing() return previewConn~=nil end

	local function startPreview()
		stopPreview()
		local trails=getTrails()
		if #trails==0 then return false end

		-- Use the EXISTING parts the trails already live under; never clone the
		-- trails or spawn a rig. We only translate each part in place around its
		-- own current position, so the live trail draws as the part moves.
		local seen={}; local parts={}
		for _,tr in ipairs(trails) do
			local p=tr:FindFirstAncestorWhichIsA("BasePart")
			if p and not seen[p] then seen[p]=true; table.insert(parts,p) end
		end
		if #parts==0 then return false end

		-- Spin FLAT in each part's own right/look plane (its local X/Z): the part
		-- slides around its home position and never tilts up or faces the camera.

		for _,p in ipairs(parts) do
			local cf=p.CFrame
			table.insert(previewParts,{part=p, origCF=cf, origAnchored=p.Anchored, center=cf.Position, rot=cf-cf.Position, right=cf.RightVector, look=cf.LookVector})
			-- breadcrumb: lets a crash mid-preview be undone on the next plugin load
			pcall(function()
				p:SetAttribute(TP_CF, cf)
				p:SetAttribute(TP_ANC, p.Anchored)
				CollectionService:AddTag(p, TP_TAG)
			end)
			p.Anchored=true
		end

		local angle=0; local clk=os.clock()
		previewConn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
			local now=os.clock(); local dt=now-clk; clk=now
			angle=angle+speed*dt*(6/math.max(0.001,radius))
			local r=radius; local cx,cy=0,0
			if shape=="Circle" then cx,cy=math.cos(angle),math.sin(angle)
			elseif shape=="Square" then
				local t=(angle/(math.pi*2))%1; local seg=t*4
				if seg<1 then cx,cy=-1+2*seg,1
				elseif seg<2 then cx,cy=1,1-2*(seg-1)
				elseif seg<3 then cx,cy=1-2*(seg-2),-1
				else cx,cy=-1,-1+2*(seg-3) end
			elseif shape=="Figure 8" then cx,cy=math.sin(angle),math.sin(angle*2)*0.5
			elseif shape=="Line" then cx,cy=math.sin(angle),0
			end
			for _,pi in ipairs(previewParts) do
				if pi.part and pi.part.Parent then
					local offset=pi.right*(cx*r)+pi.look*(cy*r)
					pi.part.CFrame=pi.rot+(pi.center+offset)
				end
			end
		end)
		return true
	end

	local function cleanup()
		stopPreview()
		if selConn then selConn:Disconnect(); selConn=nil end
		if ddOutConn then ddOutConn:Disconnect(); ddOutConn=nil end
		if gui then gui:Destroy(); gui=nil end
		isPinned=false
	end
	local function isOpen() return gui~=nil and gui.Parent~=nil end

	local function mount(App, WIN_ID)
		cleanup()
		healHistory()
		for _,p in ipairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do if p.Name=="SineVFX_TrailPreviewRig" then p:Destroy() end end
		isPinned=plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_TrailPreview")==true

		gui=Instance.new("ScreenGui"); gui.Name="SineVFX_TrailPreview"
		gui.ResetOnSpawn=false; gui.ZIndexBehavior=Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
		gui.DisplayOrder=10009; gui.Parent=coreGui

		local win=WinFactory.new({
			stateKey="TrailPreview", gui=gui, name="TrailPreviewWrapper",
			w=WIN_W, h=WIN_H, pos=UDim2.new(0.5,-60,0.4,0),
			minW=20, maxW=600, minH=WIN_H, maxH=WIN_H, noSaveH=true,
			topbarH=TOPBAR_H, getPinned=function() return isPinned end,
		})
		local main=win.main; local bgFrame=win.bgFrame; local topbar=win.topbar

		local titleLbl=Instance.new("TextLabel")
		titleLbl.Size=UDim2.new(1,-60,1,0); titleLbl.Position=UDim2.new(0,12,0,0)
		titleLbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; titleLbl.Text="Trail Preview"
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(titleLbl, "Live preview of a Trail.") end
		titleLbl.TextColor3=C.text; titleLbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
		titleLbl.TextSize=13; titleLbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
		titleLbl.ZIndex=6; titleLbl.Parent=topbar

		local pinBtn,pinIcon=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"120413064155653",-48,15)
		local closeBtn,_=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"101421401454601",-26,10)
		pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			isPinned=not isPinned; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_TrailPreview",isPinned)
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",isPinned)
			tw(pinIcon,{ImageColor3=isPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim})
		end)
		if isPinned then pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",true); pinIcon.ImageColor3=C.Pinned end
		closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() App:toggle(WIN_ID) end)

		win.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
			local col=focused and C.text or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			local ic=focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			local pc=focused and C.Pinned or C.Pinned
			task.defer(function()
				for _,ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
					if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end
					if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch,{TextColor3=col}) end
					if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then tw(ch,{ImageColor3=ch.Parent and ch.Parent:GetAttribute("PinnedActive") and pc or ic}) end
				end
			end)
		end)

		local content=Instance.new("Frame")
		content.BackgroundTransparency=1
		content.Position=UDim2.new(0,GAP,0,TOPBAR_H+GAP)
		content.Size=UDim2.new(1,-GAP*2,1,-(TOPBAR_H+GAP*2))
		content.Parent=bgFrame

		local ROW_H=28

		-- ── shape dropdown ──
		local dropBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
		dropBtn.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0); dropBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,24)
		dropBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.base; dropBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; dropBtn.BorderSizePixel=0
		dropBtn.Text=""; dropBtn.ZIndex=3; dropBtn.Parent=content
		UIKit.corner(dropBtn,6)
		local ddLbl=Instance.new("TextLabel"); ddLbl.BackgroundTransparency=1
		ddLbl.Position=UDim2.new(0,10,0,0); ddLbl.Size=UDim2.new(1,-28,1,0)
		ddLbl.Text=shape; ddLbl.TextColor3=C.white; ddLbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; ddLbl.TextSize=12
		ddLbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; ddLbl.ZIndex=4; ddLbl.Parent=dropBtn
		local ddArrow=Instance.new("ImageLabel"); ddArrow.Size=UDim2.new(0,10,0,10)
		ddArrow.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); ddArrow.Position=UDim2.new(1,-8,0.5,0)
		ddArrow.BackgroundTransparency=1; UIKit.setIconImage(ddArrow,"116140507142780")
		ddArrow.ImageColor3=C.white; ddArrow.ScaleType=Enum.ScaleType.Fit; ddArrow.ZIndex=4; ddArrow.Parent=dropBtn

		local dropList=Instance.new("Frame"); dropList.Visible=false; dropList.BackgroundColor3=C.surface
		dropList.BorderSizePixel=0; dropList.ZIndex=50; dropList.Parent=main
		UIKit.corner(dropList,6); UIKit.makeBorder(dropList,C.border:Lerp(C.accent,0.5)):SetAttribute("SVFXddoutline",true)
		local ddl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); ddl.Padding=UDim.new(0,3); ddl.HorizontalAlignment=Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center; ddl.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; ddl.Parent=dropList
		local ddpd=Instance.new("UIPadding"); ddpd.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,3); ddpd.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,3); ddpd.Parent=dropList
		local OPTH=24

		local closeDrop, openDrop
		closeDrop=function()
			dropList.Visible=false; tw(ddArrow,{Rotation=0})
			if ddOutConn then ddOutConn:Disconnect(); ddOutConn=nil end
		end
		openDrop=function()
			local h=#SHAPES*OPTH + (#SHAPES-1)*3 + 6
			local _sc=(WinFactory.getUiScale and WinFactory.getUiScale()) or 1; local mp=main.AbsolutePosition; local bp=dropBtn.AbsolutePosition
			dropList.Size=UDim2.new(0, dropBtn.AbsoluteSize.X/_sc, 0, h)
			dropList.Position=UDim2.new(0, (bp.X-mp.X)/_sc, 0, (bp.Y-mp.Y)/_sc+dropBtn.AbsoluteSize.Y/_sc+2)
			dropList.Visible=true; tw(ddArrow,{Rotation=180})
			if ddOutConn then ddOutConn:Disconnect() end
			ddOutConn=uis.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
				if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.Touch then return end
				local m=uis:GetMouseLocation()
				local function inside(g) local a=g.AbsolutePosition; local s=g.AbsoluteSize; return m.X>=a.X and m.X<=a.X+s.X and m.Y>=a.Y and m.Y<=a.Y+s.Y end
				if not inside(dropList) and not inside(dropBtn) then closeDrop() end
			end)
		end
		local optBtns={}
		local function restyleOpts() 
			for _,o in ipairs(optBtns) do 
				local isActive = (o.Text==shape)
				o.TextColor3=isActive and C.base or C.textDim
				o.BackgroundColor3=isActive and C.accent or C.base
				o.Font = isActive and Enum.Font.GothamBold or Enum.Font.GothamMedium
				o.TextSize = isActive and 13 or 11
			end 
		end
		for i,sh in ipairs(SHAPES) do
			local o=Instance.new("TextButton"); o.Size=UDim2.new(1,-8,0,OPTH)
			o.BackgroundColor3=C.base; o.AutoButtonColor=false; o.Text=sh; o.TextColor3=C.textDim
			o.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; o.TextSize=11; o.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; o.BorderSizePixel=0; o.LayoutOrder=i; o.ZIndex=51; o.Parent=dropList
			UIKit.corner(o,5); local _op=Instance.new("UIPadding"); _op.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,8); _op.Parent=o
			o.MouseEnter:Connect(function() if o.Text~=shape then twNow(o,{BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.white,0.1),TextColor3=C.white}) end end)
			o.MouseLeave:Connect(function() if o.Text~=shape then twNow(o,{BackgroundColor3=C.base,TextColor3=C.textDim}) end end)
			o.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() shape=sh; ddLbl.Text=sh; restyleOpts(); closeDrop() end)
			optBtns[i]=o
		end
		restyleOpts()
		dropBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() if dropList.Visible then closeDrop() else openDrop() end end)

		-- ── sliders (vertically centred rows, editable value box) ──
		local VALW=42
		local function mkSlider(y, lblTxt, mn, mx, getV, setV, fmtV)
			local row=Instance.new("Frame"); row.BackgroundTransparency=1
			row.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,y); row.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,ROW_H); row.ZIndex=3; row.Parent=content
			local boxL=Instance.new("Frame"); boxL.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); boxL.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0.5,0); boxL.Size=UDim2.new(0,46,0,22)
			boxL.BackgroundColor3=C.base; boxL.BorderSizePixel=0; boxL.ZIndex=4; boxL.Parent=row
			UIKit.corner(boxL,6)
			local boxLtxt=Instance.new("TextLabel"); boxLtxt.BackgroundTransparency=1; boxLtxt.Position=UDim2.new(0,6,0,0); boxLtxt.Size=UDim2.new(1,-8,1,0)
			boxLtxt.Text=lblTxt; boxLtxt.TextColor3=C.textDim; boxLtxt.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; boxLtxt.TextSize=12
			boxLtxt.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; boxLtxt.ZIndex=5; boxLtxt.Parent=boxL
			local box=Instance.new("TextBox"); box.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); box.Position=UDim2.new(1,0,0.5,0); box.Size=UDim2.new(0,VALW,0,22)
			box.BackgroundColor3=C.base; box.TextColor3=C.white; box.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; box.TextSize=12
			box.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Center; box.ClearTextOnFocus=false; box.BorderSizePixel=0; box.ZIndex=4; box.Parent=row
			UIKit.corner(box,6); UIKit.numericOnly(box)
			local track=Instance.new("Frame"); track.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); track.Position=UDim2.new(0,50,0.5,0)
			track.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(50+VALW+GAP),0,6); track.BackgroundColor3=C.base; track:SetAttribute("SVFXnoFade",true); track.BorderSizePixel=0; track.ZIndex=3; track.Parent=row
			UIKit.corner(track,3)
			local fill=Instance.new("Frame"); fill.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; fill.BorderSizePixel=0; fill.ZIndex=4; fill.Parent=track; UIKit.corner(fill,3)
			local th=Instance.new("Frame"); th.Size=UDim2.new(0,8,0,13); th.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5); th.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0.5,0); th.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; th.BorderSizePixel=0; th.ZIndex=6; th.Parent=track
			UIKit.corner(th,4)
			local hb=Instance.new("TextButton"); hb.BackgroundTransparency=1; hb.Text=""; hb.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,14); hb.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); hb.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0.5,0); hb.ZIndex=7; hb.Parent=track
			local function refresh()
				local v=getV(); local f=math.clamp((v-mn)/(mx-mn),0,1)
				th.Position=UDim2.new(f,(0.5-f)*8,0.5,0); fill.Size=UDim2.new(f,0,1,0)
				if not box:IsFocused() then box.Text=fmtV(v) end
			end
			box.Focused:Connect(function() local conn; conn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function() if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then conn:Disconnect(); if box:IsFocused() then box.SelectionStart=1; box.CursorPosition=#box.Text+1 end end end) end)
			box.FocusLost:Connect(function() tw(box,{BackgroundColor3=C.base}); local n=tonumber(box.Text); if n then setV(n) end refresh() end)
			local dragging=nil
			hb.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
				local startMX=uis:GetMouseLocation().X; local startV=getV(); local startAW=math.max(1,track.AbsoluteSize.X)
				if dragging then dragging:Disconnect() end
				dragging=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
					if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then if dragging then dragging:Disconnect(); dragging=nil end return end
					local aw=track.AbsoluteSize.X
					local dv=(uis:GetMouseLocation().X-startMX)/startAW*(mx-mn)
					setV(math.floor((math.clamp(startV+dv,mn,mx))*10+0.5)/10); refresh()
				end)
			end)
			refresh()
			return refresh
		end

		mkSlider(24+GAP,        "Speed", 0, 30, function() return speed end, function(v) speed=v end, function(v) return string.format("%.1f",v) end)
		mkSlider((24+GAP)+28,   "Size",  1, 30, function() return radius end, function(v) radius=v end, function(v) return string.format("%.1f",v) end)

		-- ── Play / Stop button (full width) ──
		local BTN_H=25
		local btnRow=Instance.new("Frame"); btnRow.BackgroundTransparency=1
		btnRow.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,(24+GAP)+62); btnRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,BTN_H); btnRow.ZIndex=3; btnRow.Parent=content

		local playBtn=Instance.new("TextButton"); playBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); playBtn.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0.5,0)
		playBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0); playBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; playBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; playBtn.TextSize=13
		playBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; playBtn.TextColor3=C.base; playBtn.Text="Play"; playBtn.BorderSizePixel=0; playBtn.ZIndex=3; playBtn.Parent=btnRow
		playBtn:SetAttribute("BaseColor", C.accent); UIKit.corner(playBtn,8)
		local playStroke=UIKit.makeBorder(playBtn, DANGER); playStroke.Transparency=1; playStroke:SetAttribute("SVFXborder", nil)
		-- same outline the graph's Cancel button has; shown only in the no-trail state
		local neutralStroke=UIKit.makeBorder(playBtn, C.border); neutralStroke.Transparency=1; neutralStroke:SetAttribute("SVFXborder", nil)

		-- Stop state styled like the graph's Delete button (danger tint); all transitions FADE.
		local function hasTrail() return #getTrails()>0 end
		-- Disabled = nothing to preview: not already running AND no Trail in the selection.
		local function isDisabled() return (not isPreviewing()) and not hasTrail() end
		local function refreshPlay()
			local stopping=isPreviewing()
			local disabled=isDisabled()
			local base, txt
			if stopping then base=DANGER; txt=DANGER:Lerp(C.white,0.4)
			elseif disabled then base=C.base; txt=C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.45)
			else base=C.accent; txt=C.base end
			playBtn:SetAttribute("BaseColor", base)
			tw(playBtn, {BackgroundColor3=base, BackgroundTransparency=(stopping and 0.5 or 0), TextColor3=txt})
			tw(playStroke, {Transparency = stopping and 0 or 1})
			tw(neutralStroke, {Transparency = disabled and 0.3 or 1})
			playBtn.Text = stopping and "Stop" or "Play"
		end
		-- hover/press lighten the CURRENT base toward white (tweened, so it fades not snaps)
		-- hover: Play state lightens toward white; Stop state brightens to danger-red
		-- (mirrors the graph's Delete button) and falls back to its dim-red idle on leave.
		local function idleTxt()
			if isPreviewing() then return DANGER:Lerp(C.white,0.4) end
			if isDisabled() then return C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.45) end
			return C.base
		end
		playBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
			if isPreviewing() then tw(playBtn,{BackgroundColor3=DANGER,BackgroundTransparency=0.32,TextColor3=DANGER:Lerp(C.white,0.4)})
			elseif isDisabled() then tw(playBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.base,TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.45)})
			else tw(playBtn,{BackgroundColor3=playBtn:GetAttribute("BaseColor"):Lerp(C.white,0.12)}) end
		end)
		playBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
			tw(playBtn,{BackgroundColor3=playBtn:GetAttribute("BaseColor"),BackgroundTransparency=(isPreviewing() and 0.5 or 0),TextColor3=idleTxt()})
		end)
		playBtn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
			if isPreviewing() then tw(playBtn,{BackgroundColor3=DANGER,BackgroundTransparency=0.22,TextColor3=DANGER:Lerp(C.white,0.4)})
			elseif isDisabled() then return
			else tw(playBtn,{BackgroundColor3=playBtn:GetAttribute("BaseColor"):Lerp(C.white,0.22)}) end
		end)
		playBtn.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()
			if isPreviewing() then tw(playBtn,{BackgroundColor3=DANGER,BackgroundTransparency=0.32,TextColor3=DANGER:Lerp(C.white,0.4)})
			elseif isDisabled() then tw(playBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.base,TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(C.base,0.45)})
			else tw(playBtn,{BackgroundColor3=playBtn:GetAttribute("BaseColor"):Lerp(C.white,0.12)}) end
		end)
		playBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if isPreviewing() then stopPreview()
			elseif not isDisabled() then startPreview() end
			refreshPlay()
		end)
		refreshPlay()
		selConn=selection.SelectionChanged:Connect(function()
			if playBtn and playBtn.Parent then refreshPlay() end
		end)
	end

	local function unmount() cleanup() end
	return {mount=mount, unmount=unmount, isOpen=isOpen}
end

-- VfxModuleWindow: explains the SineVFX runtime module and plants it into ReplicatedStorage return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory) local C = Theme.C local tw = UIKit.tw local plugin = ctx.plugin local coreGui = ctx.coreGui local selection = ctx.selection local CHS = ctx.CHS local TS = game:GetService("TextService") local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage") local WIN_W=272; local TOPBAR_H=25; local WIN_H=103 local GAP=6 local MODULE_NAME="SineVFX" -- The only comment that survives into the planted module (head/tail/core are all stripped). local MODULE_DOC = [==[ -- SineVFX runtime module. Generated by the plugin; re-plant from the Hub to update. -- local VFX = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.SineVFX) -- VFX.emit(model) / VFX.enable(model) / VFX.disable(model) ]==] local MODULE_HEAD = [==[ local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService") local RunService = game:GetService("RunService") local VFX = {} local activeClones = {} -- ---- host bindings the SIM CORE expects (see the markers in EmitterRuntime) ---- local EmitterSpec = { TAG = "%s", PROPS_FOLDER = "%s", RENDER_NAME = "%s", DEST_FOLDER = "%s" } local TAG, PROPS, RENDER = EmitterSpec.TAG, EmitterSpec.PROPS_FOLDER, EmitterSpec.RENDER_NAME -- Distinct from the plugin's token so a running preview and this module never fight over it. local GEN_ATTR = "SineVFX_ModuleGen" local function genHolder() return workspace.Terrain end local CONTAINER = "SineVFXParticles" -- In edit mode the plugin preview already runs the Rate stream; don't double it up. local function previewActive() if RunService:IsRunning() then return false end local cg = game:FindService("CoreGui") return cg ~= nil and cg:FindFirstChild("SineVFX_RuntimeState") ~= nil end local function RATE_EMIT() return not previewActive() end local PREVIEW_THROTTLE = false ]==] local MODULE_TAIL = [==[ -- ---- runtime driver ------------------------------------------------------------------------- local function rtStart() if conn then return end myGeneration = (genHolder():GetAttribute(GEN_ATTR) or 0) + 1 genHolder():SetAttribute(GEN_ATTR, myGeneration) active = true conn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(step) end rtStart() local function rtBurst(part, count) if not part or not part:IsA("BasePart") then return end count = tonumber(count) or 0 if count <= 0 then return end local template = part:FindFirstChild(RENDER) if not template or not template:IsA("BasePart") then return end rtStart() _burstSeq += 1; _curBatch = _burstSeq for _ = 1, count do spawnOne(part, template) end _curBatch = 0 end local function findEmitters(inst, out) if inst:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then out[#out+1] = inst end for _, d in ipairs(inst:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then out[#out+1] = d end end end local function findToggleables(inst, out) local function chk(i) if i:IsA("Beam") or i:IsA("Trail") or i:IsA("Light") then out[#out+1] = i end end chk(inst) for _, d in ipairs(inst:GetDescendants()) do chk(d) end end local CLONE_MARK = "SineVFX_SoundClone" local function findSounds(inst, out) -- skip our own clones: cloning a clone doubles the sound count every emit if inst:IsA("Sound") and not inst:GetAttribute(CLONE_MARK) then out[#out+1] = inst end for _, d in ipairs(inst:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("Sound") and not d:GetAttribute(CLONE_MARK) then out[#out+1] = d end end end local function stopClone(snd) local clone = activeClones[snd] if clone then pcall(function() clone:Stop(); clone:Destroy() end) activeClones[snd] = nil end end local function playSound(snd, looped) local clone = snd:Clone() clone:SetAttribute(CLONE_MARK, true) -- so findSounds never re-clones it clone.Looped = looped or false -- same parent as the original keeps the clone positional clone.Parent = snd.Parent task.spawn(function() local t0 = os.clock() while not clone.IsLoaded do if os.clock() - t0 > 5 or clone.Parent == nil then clone:Destroy() return end task.wait(0.1) end if clone.Parent == nil then return end clone:Play() end) if looped then stopClone(snd) activeClones[snd] = clone else clone.Ended:Connect(function() clone:Destroy() end) end return clone end function VFX.emit(...) for _, instance in ipairs({...}) do if instance then if instance:IsA("BasePart") and CollectionService:HasTag(instance, TAG) then local count = instance:GetAttribute("EmitCount") or 0 local delay = instance:GetAttribute("EmitDelay") or 0 local dur = instance:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0 task.spawn(function() if delay > 0 then task.wait(delay) end if not instance.Parent then return end local app = cfgOf(instance,"Appearance") if dur > 0 and app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", true) end if count > 0 then rtBurst(instance, count) end if dur > 0 then task.wait(dur) if instance.Parent and app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", false) end end end) end local emitters, toggleables, sounds = {}, {}, {} findEmitters(instance, emitters) findToggleables(instance, toggleables) findSounds(instance, sounds) for _, em in ipairs(emitters) do task.spawn(function() local delay = em:GetAttribute("EmitDelay") or 0 local count = em:GetAttribute("EmitCount") or 1 local dur = em:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0 if delay > 0 then task.wait(delay) end if dur > 0 then em.Enabled = true end em:Emit(count) if dur > 0 then task.wait(dur); em.Enabled = false end end) end for _, t in ipairs(toggleables) do task.spawn(function() local dur = t:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0 if dur <= 0 then return end local delay = t:GetAttribute("EmitDelay") or 0 if delay > 0 then task.wait(delay) end t.Enabled = true task.wait(dur); t.Enabled = false end) end for _, snd in ipairs(sounds) do task.spawn(function() local delay = snd:GetAttribute("EmitDelay") or 0 local dur = snd:GetAttribute("EmitDuration") or 0 if delay > 0 then task.wait(delay) end local clone = playSound(snd, dur > 0) if dur > 0 and clone then task.wait(dur) if activeClones[snd] == clone then activeClones[snd] = nil end pcall(function() clone:Stop(); clone:Destroy() end) end end) end end end end function VFX.enable(...) for _, instance in ipairs({...}) do if instance then if instance:IsA("BasePart") and CollectionService:HasTag(instance, TAG) then local app = cfgOf(instance,"Appearance") if app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", true) end end local emitters, toggleables, sounds = {}, {}, {} findEmitters(instance, emitters) findToggleables(instance, toggleables) findSounds(instance, sounds) for _, em in ipairs(emitters) do em.Enabled = true end for _, t in ipairs(toggleables) do t.Enabled = true end for _, snd in ipairs(sounds) do stopClone(snd); playSound(snd, true) end end end end function VFX.disable(...) for _, instance in ipairs({...}) do if instance then if instance:IsA("BasePart") and CollectionService:HasTag(instance, TAG) then local app = cfgOf(instance,"Appearance") if app then app:SetAttribute("Enabled", false) end end local emitters, toggleables, sounds = {}, {}, {} findEmitters(instance, emitters) findToggleables(instance, toggleables) findSounds(instance, sounds) for _, em in ipairs(emitters) do em.Enabled = false end for _, t in ipairs(toggleables) do t.Enabled = false end for _, snd in ipairs(sounds) do stopClone(snd) end end end end return VFX ]==] -- The runtime module the Add button drops into ReplicatedStorage. -- The sim is SLICED from EmitterRuntime's SIM CORE markers at plant time rather than duplicated -- here: the old hand-copy drifted every time the runtime changed (it shipped without the entire -- bezier weave, all routing, and nested spawn). MODULE_HEAD supplies the host bindings the core -- expects; MODULE_TAIL drives it and exposes the VFX API. -- MUST stay below MODULE_HEAD/MODULE_TAIL: they are locals, so a function declared above them -- reads them as nil globals and string.format() throws. The Add button pcalls this, so that -- failure is SILENT -- the button simply does nothing. -- The planted module is generated and read-only, so the sliced core's explanatory comments -- would only be read where they cannot be acted on. They stay in EmitterRuntime (the file you -- actually edit); the shipped copy carries just MODULE_HEAD's usage/regeneration notes. -- String- and long-bracket-aware: a naive gsub would cut "--" out of string literals. local function stripComments(s) local out, i, n = {}, 1, #s while i <= n do local c = s:sub(i, i) if c == '"' or c == "'" then local j = i + 1 while j <= n do local d = s:sub(j, j) if d == "\\" then j += 2 elseif d == c or d == "\n" then j += 1 break else j += 1 end end out[#out+1] = s:sub(i, j - 1); i = j elseif s:match("^%[=*%[", i) then local close = "]" .. s:match("^%[(=*)%[", i) .. "]" local e = s:find(close, i, true) e = e and (e + #close) or (n + 1) out[#out+1] = s:sub(i, e - 1); i = e elseif s:sub(i, i + 1) == "--" then local eq = s:match("^%-%-%[(=*)%[", i) if eq then local close = "]" .. eq .. "]" local e = s:find(close, i, true) i = e and (e + #close) or (n + 1) else i = s:find("\n", i, true) or (n + 1) end else out[#out+1] = c; i += 1 end end local res = {} for line in (table.concat(out) .. "\n"):gmatch("([^\n]*)\n") do line = line:gsub("%s+$", "") -- a stripped comment block leaves a run of blanks; collapse it to one separator if line ~= "" or (res[#res] or "") ~= "" then res[#res+1] = line end end return table.concat(res, "\n") end local EmitterSpec_ = require(script.Parent.Parent.Utilities.Transformed).EmitterSpec local function buildModuleSrc() local rt = script.Parent.Parent.Modules.EmitterRuntime local s = rt.Source local a = s:find("-- ===== SIM CORE (BEGIN)", 1, true) local b = s:find("-- ===== SIM CORE (END)", 1, true) if not (a and b and b > a) then error("[SineVFX] EmitterRuntime SIM CORE markers missing or reordered; refusing to plant a module with no simulation in it") end -- Strip head and tail as well: their comments are plugin-build rationale, unreadable and -- unactionable from a shipped game. MODULE_DOC (the usage note) is the only survivor. local core = stripComments(s:sub(a, b - 1)) local head = string.format(MODULE_HEAD, EmitterSpec_.TAG, EmitterSpec_.PROPS_FOLDER, EmitterSpec_.RENDER_NAME, EmitterSpec_.DEST_FOLDER) local out = MODULE_DOC .. stripComments(head) .. "\n\n" .. stripComments(core) .. "\n\n" .. stripComments(MODULE_TAIL) .. "\n" -- never plant source that will not compile local okc, errc = loadstring(out, "SineVFX") if not okc then error("[SineVFX] generated runtime module does not compile: "..tostring(errc)) end return out end local gui=nil; local isPinned=false; local watchConns={} local function clearWatch() for _,c in ipairs(watchConns) do pcall(function() c:Disconnect() end) end watchConns={} end local function cleanup() clearWatch() if gui then gui:Destroy(); gui=nil end isPinned=false end local function isOpen() return gui~=nil and gui.Parent~=nil end local function existing() local m=ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(MODULE_NAME) if m and m:IsA("ModuleScript") then return m end return nil end local function addModule() local old=existing() local verb = old and "Updated" or "Added" -- REPLACE the instance rather than rewriting its Source. Roblox caches require() by -- ModuleScript INSTANCE, so editing Source in place leaves anyone who already did -- require(ReplicatedStorage.SineVFX) holding the OLD compiled copy for the rest of the -- session -- the update looks like it silently did nothing. A new instance is a new cache -- entry. The stale copy's own step() sees the generation token move and shuts itself down. local m=Instance.new("ModuleScript"); m.Name=MODULE_NAME m.Source=buildModuleSrc() if old then old.Parent=nil end m.Parent=ReplicatedStorage if old then old:Destroy() end pcall(function() selection:Set({m}) end) if CHS then pcall(function() CHS:SetWaypoint("SineVFX: "..verb.." runtime module") end) end return verb end local function mount(App, WIN_ID) cleanup() isPinned=plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_VfxModule")==true gui=Instance.new("ScreenGui"); gui.Name="SineVFX_VfxModule" gui.ResetOnSpawn=false; gui.ZIndexBehavior=Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling gui.DisplayOrder=10008; gui.Parent=coreGui local win=WinFactory.new({ stateKey="VfxModule", gui=gui, name="VfxModuleWrapper", w=WIN_W, h=WIN_H, pos=UDim2.new(0.5,-40,0.42,0), minW=20, maxW=460, minH=80, maxH=300, noYResize=true, noSaveH=true, topbarH=TOPBAR_H, getPinned=function() return isPinned end, }) local main=win.main; local bgFrame=win.bgFrame; local topbar=win.topbar local titleLbl=Instance.new("TextLabel") titleLbl.Size=UDim2.new(1,-60,1,0); titleLbl.Position=UDim2.new(0,12,0,0) titleLbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; titleLbl.Text="VFX Module" if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(titleLbl, "Plant the runtime module for in-game VFX.") end titleLbl.TextColor3=C.text; titleLbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold titleLbl.TextSize=13; titleLbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left titleLbl.ZIndex=6; titleLbl.Parent=topbar local pinBtn,pinIcon=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"120413064155653",-48,15) local closeBtn,_=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"101421401454601",-26,10) pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() isPinned=not isPinned; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_VfxModule",isPinned) pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",isPinned) tw(pinIcon,{ImageColor3=isPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim}) end) if isPinned then pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",true); pinIcon.ImageColor3=C.Pinned end closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() App:toggle(WIN_ID) end) win.setFocusCallback(function(focused) local col=focused and C.text or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15) local ic=focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15) local pc=focused and C.Pinned or C.Pinned task.defer(function() for _,ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch,{TextColor3=col}) end if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then tw(ch,{ImageColor3=ch.Parent and ch.Parent:GetAttribute("PinnedActive") and pc or ic}) end end end) end) local content=Instance.new("Frame") content.BackgroundTransparency=1 content.Position=UDim2.new(0,GAP,0,TOPBAR_H+GAP) content.Size=UDim2.new(1,-GAP*2,1,-(TOPBAR_H+GAP*2)) content.Parent=bgFrame local BTN_H=25 -- explanation (centered, wraps). Plain copy kept for measuring (RichText confuses GetTextSize) local INTRO_PLAIN="Adds a module to ReplicatedStorage so you can play VFX at runtime" local intro=Instance.new("TextLabel") intro.BackgroundTransparency=1; intro.TextWrapped=true; intro.RichText=true intro.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Center; intro.TextYAlignment=Enum.TextYAlignment.Top intro.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; intro.TextSize=14; intro.TextColor3=C.text intro.Text="Adds a module to ReplicatedStorage so you can play VFX at runtime" intro.ZIndex=3; intro.Parent=content -- divider above the button (text color, subtle) local div=Instance.new("Frame") div.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,1) div.BackgroundColor3=C.border; div.BackgroundTransparency=0.5; div.BorderSizePixel=0 div.ZIndex=3; div.Parent=content -- Add / Update button -- full width (follows window X), accent local addBtn=Instance.new("TextButton") addBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,BTN_H); addBtn.AutoButtonColor=false addBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; addBtn.TextSize=14 addBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; addBtn.TextColor3=C.base addBtn.BorderSizePixel=0; addBtn.ZIndex=3; addBtn.Parent=content UIKit.corner(addBtn,8) local function syncLabel() if addBtn and addBtn.Parent then addBtn.Text = existing() and "Update Module" or "Add Module" end end syncLabel() watchConns[#watchConns+1]=ReplicatedStorage.ChildAdded:Connect(function(c) if c.Name==MODULE_NAME then task.defer(syncLabel) end end) watchConns[#watchConns+1]=ReplicatedStorage.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(c) if c.Name==MODULE_NAME then task.defer(syncLabel) end end) addBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(addBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(C.white,0.12)}) end) addBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(addBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent}) end) addBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() local ok, err = pcall(addModule) if not ok then warn("[SineVFX] could not plant the runtime module: "..tostring(err)) end syncLabel() end) -- Responsive: blurb on top, divider + button below, window height auto-fits the -- wrapped blurb so nothing clips when narrow. (Y can't be dragged.) local function relayout() local _S=(WinFactory.getUiScale and WinFactory.getUiScale()) or 1 local W=main.AbsoluteSize.X/_S-GAP*2 if W<=0 then return end local eH=math.ceil(TS:GetTextSize(INTRO_PLAIN,14,Enum.Font.GothamMedium,Vector2.new(W,10000)).Y) local y=0 intro.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0); intro.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,eH); y=eH+GAP div.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,y); y=y+1+GAP addBtn.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,y) local newH=(y+BTN_H)+TOPBAR_H+GAP*2 if math.abs(main.AbsoluteSize.Y/_S-newH)>0.5 then main.Size=UDim2.new(0,main.AbsoluteSize.X/_S,0,newH) win.currentSize.h=newH; win.setMaxH(newH) end end main:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function() task.defer(relayout) end) task.defer(relayout) end local function unmount() cleanup() end return {mount=mount, unmount=unmount, isOpen=isOpen} end

-- SettingsWindow: SineVFX plugin settings (opened by the Hub "Settings" button)
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory, ThemeStore, ids, LayoutStore, applyLayoutFn)
    local C   = Theme.C
    local tw  = UIKit.tw
    local plugin   = ctx.plugin
    local coreGui  = ctx.coreGui
    local uis      = ctx.userInputService
    local runService = ctx.runService
    local DANGER   = C.danger or C.accent

    local WIN_W=284; local TOPBAR_H=25; local WIN_H=400
    local GAP=6; local NAMEW=92

    local K_REPEAT="SineVFX_repeatTimer"; local K_SCALE="SineVFX_uiScale"
    local K_DORDER="SineVFX_displayOrder"; local K_CORNER="SineVFX_fabCorner"; local K_RADIUS="SineVFX_cornerRadius"

    local STATE_KEYS = {"ColSeqEditor","ColorControl","ColorWheel","Copier","CurveEditor","EmitterController","PropsWindow","Resizer","Retimer","Shifter","ToolsWindow","HubToolsWindow","TrailPreview","VfxModule","Settings","VFXCode","ParticleCounter","ThemeEditor","ImportTheme","ExportTheme","Confirm"}
    local WIN_IDS    = {"EmitterController","VFXCode","ColorControl","Shifter","Resizer","Retimer","Copier","TrailPreview","CurveEditor","ColSeqEditor","ColorWheel","Tools","Props","VfxModule","Settings","ParticleCounter"}
    local PIN_KEYS   = {"Props","TrailPreview","VfxModule","Settings","ThemeEditor","ImportTheme","ExportTheme","Code","ColSeq","Color","ColorWheel","Confirm","Copier","Curve","Emit","Resizer","Retimer","Shifter","Tools"}
    local OTHER_KEYS = {"SineVFX_PropsH","SineVFX_hubExpanded","SineVFX_toolsOpen","SineVFX_toolsPinned","SineVFX_themes","SineVFX_activeTheme","SineVFX_layouts","SineVFX_layoutSeeded","SineVFX_activeLayout","SineVFX_edgeMargin","SineVFX_edgeMarginOn","SineVFX_settingsManualH","SineVFX_opacityResetV1","SineVFX_open","SineVFX_presetsVer","SineVFX_presetsSeededV1"}
    local function resetPositions() for _,k in ipairs(STATE_KEYS) do pcall(function() plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_win_"..k, nil) end) end end
    local function resetAll()
        resetPositions()
        for _,id in ipairs(WIN_IDS) do pcall(function() plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_winopen_"..id, nil) end) end
        for _,k in ipairs(PIN_KEYS) do pcall(function() plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_"..k, nil) end) end
        for _,k in ipairs(OTHER_KEYS) do pcall(function() plugin:SetSetting(k, nil) end) end
        for _,k in ipairs({K_REPEAT,K_SCALE,K_DORDER,K_CORNER,K_RADIUS,"SineVFX_pcCorner","SineVFX_transformCorner"}) do pcall(function() plugin:SetSetting(k, nil) end) end
    end

    local gui=nil; local isPinned=false; local savedScrollY=0
    local function cleanup() if gui then gui:Destroy(); gui=nil end isPinned=false end
    local function isOpen() return gui~=nil and gui.Parent~=nil end

    local function mount(App, WIN_ID)
        cleanup()
        isPinned=plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_Settings")==true
        gui=Instance.new("ScreenGui"); gui.Name="SineVFX_Settings"
        gui.ResetOnSpawn=false; gui.ZIndexBehavior=Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
        gui.DisplayOrder=10006; gui.Parent=coreGui

        local win=WinFactory.new({
            stateKey="Settings", gui=gui, name="SettingsWrapper",
            w=WIN_W, h=WIN_H, pos=UDim2.new(0.5,-30,0.42,0),
            minW=20, maxW=460, minH=100, maxH=640, noSaveH=false,
            topbarH=TOPBAR_H, getPinned=function() return isPinned end,
        })
        local main=win.main; local bgFrame=win.bgFrame; local topbar=win.topbar

        local titleLbl=Instance.new("TextLabel")
        titleLbl.Size=UDim2.new(1,-60,1,0); titleLbl.Position=UDim2.new(0,12,0,0)
        titleLbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; titleLbl.Text="Settings"
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(titleLbl, "Plugin settings.") end
        titleLbl.TextColor3=C.text; titleLbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
        titleLbl.TextSize=13; titleLbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        titleLbl.ZIndex=6; titleLbl.Parent=topbar
        local pinBtn,pinIcon=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"120413064155653",-48,15)
        local closeBtn,_=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"101421401454601",-26,10)
        pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            isPinned=not isPinned; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_Settings",isPinned)
            pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",isPinned); tw(pinIcon,{ImageColor3=isPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim})
        end)
        if isPinned then pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",true); pinIcon.ImageColor3=C.Pinned end
        closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() App:toggle(WIN_ID) end)
        win.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
            local col=focused and C.text or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
            local ic=focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
            local pc=focused and C.Pinned or C.Pinned
            task.defer(function()
                for _,ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
                    if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end
                    if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch,{TextColor3=col}) end
                    if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then tw(ch,{ImageColor3=ch.Parent and ch.Parent:GetAttribute("PinnedActive") and pc or ic}) end
                end
            end)
        end)

        local listContainer=Instance.new("Frame")
        listContainer.BackgroundTransparency=1
        listContainer.Position=UDim2.new(0,GAP,0,TOPBAR_H+GAP)
        listContainer.Size=UDim2.new(1,-GAP*2,1,-(TOPBAR_H+GAP*2))
        listContainer.ClipsDescendants=true
        listContainer.Parent=bgFrame
        local sc=UIKit.makeScrollableList(listContainer,{plugin=plugin,uis=uis,sbW=6,sbGap=3,OGap=1})
        local list=sc.list
        sc.layout.Padding=UDim.new(0,GAP)
        local lpad=Instance.new("UIPadding"); lpad.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,2); lpad.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,2); lpad.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,2); lpad.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,2); lpad.Parent=list
        do  -- preserve scroll position across remounts (e.g. switching themes)
            local restoring=true; local rc=0
            sc.list:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(function() if not restoring then savedScrollY=sc.list.CanvasPosition.Y end end)
            local rconn; rconn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                if not sc.list.Parent then if rconn then rconn:Disconnect() end return end
                rc+=1; sc.list.CanvasPosition=Vector2.new(0, savedScrollY)
                if rc>=10 then restoring=false; rconn:Disconnect() end
            end)
        end
        local order=0
        local function nextOrder() order=order+1; return order end

        local function mkResetBtn(parent, relayout)
            local b=Instance.new("ImageButton"); b.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); b.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0.5,0); b.Size=UDim2.new(0,22,0,22)
            b.BackgroundColor3=C.base; b.AutoButtonColor=false; b.BorderSizePixel=0; b.Image=""; b.ZIndex=6; b.Visible=false; b.Parent=parent
            UIKit.corner(b,8)
            local ic=Instance.new("ImageLabel"); ic.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5); ic.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0); ic.Size=UDim2.new(0,18,0,18)
            ic.BackgroundTransparency=1; ic.Image="rbxthumb://type=Asset&id=438217405&w=150&h=150"; ic.ImageColor3=C.textDim; ic.ScaleType=Enum.ScaleType.Fit; ic.ZIndex=7; ic.Parent=b
            local function setReset(on) b.Visible=on; b.Active=on; if relayout then relayout(on) end end
            UIKit.hoverLift(ic, b)
            setReset(false)
            return b, setReset
        end

        local SET_TIPS = {
			["Repeat Timer"]="Gap between repeat bursts.",
			["Scale"]="UI size.",
			["Display Order"]="Draw order vs other UI.",
			["Edge Margin"]="Gap from screen edges.",
			["Margin Size"]="Edge gap size (px).",
			["Auto-Hide"]="Hide tools when nothing editable is selected.",
			["Enabled"]="Turn tooltips on/off.",
			["Hover Delay"]="Wait before a tooltip shows.",
			["Hub Corner"]="Hub button corner.",
			["Transform Pos"]="Transform button corner.",
			["Counter Pos"]="Particle Counter corner.",
		}
		local function newCard(h)
            local row=Instance.new("Frame"); row.BackgroundTransparency=1; row.BorderSizePixel=0; row.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,h); row.LayoutOrder=nextOrder(); row.Parent=list
            local bg=Instance.new("Frame"); bg.Name="CardBG"; bg.BackgroundColor3=C.base; bg.BorderSizePixel=0; bg.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); bg.Position=UDim2.new(1,0,0.5,0); bg.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0); bg.Parent=row
            UIKit.corner(bg,8); return row, bg
        end

        local function mkHeader(text)
            local lbl=Instance.new("TextLabel"); lbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; lbl.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,20); lbl.LayoutOrder=nextOrder(); lbl.Parent=list
            lbl.Text=text; lbl.TextColor3=C.text; lbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; lbl.TextSize=15; lbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        end

        local function mkSlider(label, mn, mx, key, default, step, fmt, onChange)
            local cur=tonumber(plugin:GetSetting(key)); if cur==nil then cur=default end; cur=math.clamp(cur,mn,mx)
            local row,bg=newCard(32)

            if UIKit.attachTooltip and SET_TIPS[label] then UIKit.attachTooltip(row, SET_TIPS[label]) end            local reset,resetActive  -- assigned after the value frame exists
            local name=Instance.new("TextLabel"); name.BackgroundTransparency=1; name.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); name.Position=UDim2.new(0,6,0.5,0); name.Size=UDim2.new(0,NAMEW,1,0)
            name.Text=label; name.TextColor3=C.textDim; name.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; name.TextSize=13; name.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; name.TextTruncate=Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd; name.Parent=bg
            -- value part: a surface frame around the slider + box
            local vp=Instance.new("Frame"); vp.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); vp.Position=UDim2.new(1,-4,0.5,0); vp.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(NAMEW+18),0,24)
            vp.BackgroundColor3=C.surface; vp.BorderSizePixel=0; vp.Parent=bg; UIKit.corner(vp,7)
            local function relayout(hr) bg.Size = hr and UDim2.new(1,-26,1,0) or UDim2.new(1,0,1,0) end; reset,resetActive=mkResetBtn(row,relayout)
            local vl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); vl.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal; vl.VerticalAlignment=Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center; vl.Padding=UDim.new(0,7); vl.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; vl.Parent=vp
            local vpad=Instance.new("UIPadding"); vpad.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,8); vpad.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,4); vpad.Parent=vp
            local track=Instance.new("Frame"); track.Size=UDim2.new(0,0,0,6); track.BackgroundColor3=C.base; track.BorderSizePixel=0; track.LayoutOrder=1; track.Parent=vp; track:SetAttribute("SVFXnoFade",true)
            local fxx=Instance.new("UIFlexItem"); fxx.FlexMode=Enum.UIFlexMode.Fill; fxx.Parent=track
            UIKit.corner(track,3)
            local fill=Instance.new("Frame"); fill.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; fill.BorderSizePixel=0; fill.ZIndex=2; fill.Parent=track; UIKit.corner(fill,3)
            local th=Instance.new("Frame"); th.Size=UDim2.new(0,8,0,13); th.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0.5,0.5); th.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0.5,0); th.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; th.BorderSizePixel=0; th.ZIndex=4; th.Parent=track
            UIKit.corner(th,4)
            local hb=Instance.new("TextButton"); hb.BackgroundTransparency=1; hb.Text=""; hb.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,16); hb.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); hb.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0.5,0); hb.ZIndex=5; hb.Parent=track
            local box=Instance.new("TextBox"); box.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.X; box.Size=UDim2.new(0,0,0,20); box.LayoutOrder=2
            box.BackgroundColor3=C.base; box.TextColor3=C.white; box.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; box.TextSize=13; box.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Center; box.ClearTextOnFocus=false; box.BorderSizePixel=0; box.Parent=vp
            local bpd=Instance.new("UIPadding"); bpd.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,7); bpd.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,7); bpd.Parent=box
            UIKit.corner(box,5); UIKit.numericOnly(box)
            local function snap(v) v=math.clamp(v,mn,mx); if step then v=math.floor(v/step+0.5)*step end return v end
            local function refresh()
                local f=math.clamp((cur-mn)/(mx-mn),0,1)
                th.Position=UDim2.new(f,(0.5-f)*8,0.5,0); fill.Size=UDim2.new(f,0,1,0)
                if not box:IsFocused() then box.Text=fmt(cur) end
                resetActive(math.abs(cur-default) > (step and step*0.5 or 0.0001))
            end
            local function commit(v) cur=snap(v); plugin:SetSetting(key,cur); refresh(); if onChange then onChange(cur) end end
            local function commitRaw(v) cur=snap(v); plugin:SetSetting(key,cur); refresh(); if onChange then onChange(cur) end end
            reset.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() commit(default) end)
            box.Focused:Connect(function() local conn; conn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function() if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then conn:Disconnect(); if box:IsFocused() then box.SelectionStart=1; box.CursorPosition=#box.Text+1 end end end) end)
            box.FocusLost:Connect(function() tw(box,{BackgroundColor3=C.base}); local n=tonumber((box.Text:gsub("[^%d%.%-]",""))); if n then commitRaw(n) else refresh() end end)
            local dragging
            hb.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
                plugin:Activate(false); local startMX=uis:GetMouseLocation().X; local startV=cur; local startTW=math.max(1,track.AbsoluteSize.X)
                if dragging then dragging:Disconnect() end
                dragging=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                    if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then if dragging then dragging:Disconnect(); dragging=nil; pcall(function() plugin:Deactivate() end) end return end
                    commit(startV+(uis:GetMouseLocation().X-startMX)/startTW*(mx-mn))
                end)
            end)
            refresh()
            if WinFactory._sliderSetters==nil then WinFactory._sliderSetters={} end
            WinFactory._sliderSetters[key]=function(v) cur=snap(v); refresh() end
        end

        -- Boolean toggle card (label + switch). Registers WinFactory._toggleSetters[key]
        -- so external code (layout load) can flip the switch live, mirroring _sliderSetters.
        local function mkToggle(label, key, default, onChange)
            local cur=plugin:GetSetting(key); if cur==nil then cur=default end; cur=(cur and true or false)
            local row,bg=newCard(32)

            if UIKit.attachTooltip and SET_TIPS[label] then UIKit.attachTooltip(row, SET_TIPS[label]) end            local name=Instance.new("TextLabel"); name.BackgroundTransparency=1; name.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); name.Position=UDim2.new(0,6,0.5,0); name.Size=UDim2.new(0,NAMEW,1,0)
            name.Text=label; name.TextColor3=C.textDim; name.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; name.TextSize=13; name.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; name.TextTruncate=Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd; name.Parent=bg
            -- Reset button EXACTLY like the Scale/other slider cards: mkResetBtn(row, relayout) that
            -- shrinks the card 26px to reveal the reset on the far LEFT (instant, no animation).
            local reset,resetActive
            local function relayout(hr) bg.Size = hr and UDim2.new(1,-26,1,0) or UDim2.new(1,0,1,0) end; reset,resetActive=mkResetBtn(row,relayout)
            -- switch: same size + on-color (C.loop) as the Properties toggles, left of the value area
            local holder=Instance.new("Frame"); holder.BackgroundTransparency=1; holder.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); holder.Position=UDim2.new(0,NAMEW+12,0.5,0); holder.Size=UDim2.new(0,42,0,22); holder.Parent=bg
            local tgl=UIKit.makeToggle(holder,42,22,16)
            local function set(v)
                cur=(v and true or false); tgl.setOn(cur, C.loop); resetActive(cur~=default)
            end
            tgl.button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                plugin:SetSetting(key, not cur); set(not cur)
                if onChange then onChange(cur) end
            end)
            reset.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                plugin:SetSetting(key, default); set(default)
                if onChange then onChange(cur) end
            end)
            set(cur)
            if WinFactory._toggleSetters==nil then WinFactory._toggleSetters={} end
            -- external sync (layout load): flip the knob only when the value actually differs.
            WinFactory._toggleSetters[key]=function(v) v=(v and true or false); if v~=cur then set(v) end end
        end

        local ddOutConn=nil
        local function mkDropdown(label, opts, key, default, onChange)
            local cur=plugin:GetSetting(key) or default
            local function labelFor(id) for _,o in ipairs(opts) do if o.id==id then return o.t end end return id end
            local row,bg=newCard(32); row.ZIndex=3

            if UIKit.attachTooltip and SET_TIPS[label] then UIKit.attachTooltip(row, SET_TIPS[label]) end            local reset,resetActive  -- assigned after the value frame exists
            local name=Instance.new("TextLabel"); name.BackgroundTransparency=1; name.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); name.Position=UDim2.new(0,6,0.5,0); name.Size=UDim2.new(0,NAMEW,1,0)
            name.Text=label; name.TextColor3=C.textDim; name.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; name.TextSize=13; name.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; name.TextTruncate=Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd; name.Parent=bg
            local btn=Instance.new("TextButton"); btn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); btn.Position=UDim2.new(1,-4,0.5,0); btn.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(NAMEW+18),0,24)
            btn.BackgroundColor3=C.surface; btn.AutoButtonColor=false; btn.Text=""; btn.BorderSizePixel=0; btn.ZIndex=4; btn.Parent=bg
            UIKit.corner(btn,7)
            local function relayout(hr) bg.Size = hr and UDim2.new(1,-26,1,0) or UDim2.new(1,0,1,0) end; reset,resetActive=mkResetBtn(row,relayout)
            local cap=Instance.new("TextLabel"); cap.BackgroundTransparency=1; cap.Position=UDim2.new(0,8,0,0); cap.Size=UDim2.new(1,-26,1,0)
            cap.Text=labelFor(cur); cap.TextColor3=C.white; cap.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; cap.TextSize=12; cap.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; cap.ZIndex=5; cap.Parent=btn
            local arr=Instance.new("ImageLabel"); arr.Size=UDim2.new(0,10,0,10); arr.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); arr.Position=UDim2.new(1,-8,0.5,0)
			arr.BackgroundTransparency=1; UIKit.setIconImage(arr,"116140507142780"); arr.ImageColor3=C.white; arr.ScaleType=Enum.ScaleType.Fit; arr.ZIndex=5; arr.Parent=btn
            local restyle
            local function updReset() resetActive(cur~=default) end
            reset.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() cur=default; plugin:SetSetting(key,cur); cap.Text=labelFor(cur); updReset(); if onChange then onChange(cur) end
                if restyle then restyle() end end)
            do  -- re-sync caption if the setting is changed elsewhere (layout load, etc.)
                local _syncConn; local _syncAcc = 0
                _syncConn = runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt)
                    if not row.Parent then _syncConn:Disconnect(); return end
                    -- Throttle ~7fps: only re-syncs the caption when the setting is changed ELSEWHERE
                    -- (e.g. a layout load). Polling plugin:GetSetting every frame per dropdown was a
                    -- real FPS hit with Settings open (4 dropdowns x 60fps of GetSetting).
                    _syncAcc += dt
                    if _syncAcc < 0.3 then return end  -- ~3fps: only re-syncs the caption after an EXTERNAL change (rare layout load); halves the always-on GetSetting polling with Settings open
                    _syncAcc = 0
                    local s = plugin:GetSetting(key) or default
                    if s ~= cur then cur=s; cap.Text=labelFor(cur); updReset(); if restyle then restyle() end end
                end)
            end

            local DDR_H=24
            local ddOpen=false
            -- dropdown panel (faithful copy of the Properties enum dropdown)
            local panel=Instance.new("Frame"); panel.Visible=false
            panel.BackgroundColor3=C.surface; panel.BorderSizePixel=0
            panel.ClipsDescendants=true; panel.ZIndex=50; panel.Parent=listContainer
            UIKit.corner(panel,4); UIKit.makeBorder(panel,C.border:Lerp(C.accent,0.5)):SetAttribute("SVFXddoutline",true)
            local ddScroll=Instance.new("ScrollingFrame")
            ddScroll.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,1,0); ddScroll.BackgroundTransparency=1
            ddScroll.BorderSizePixel=0; ddScroll.ScrollBarThickness=0; ddScroll.ZIndex=50; ddScroll.Parent=panel
            ddScroll.CanvasSize=UDim2.new(0,0,0,#opts*DDR_H+math.max(0,#opts-1)*3+6)
            local _ddp=Instance.new("UIPadding")
            do local _ddl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); _ddl.HorizontalAlignment=Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center; _ddl.Padding=UDim.new(0,3); _ddl.Parent=ddScroll; _ddp.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,3); _ddp.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,3); _ddp.Parent=ddScroll end
            -- custom scrollbar (Shifter-style) parked just OUTSIDE the panel's right edge
            local SBW=6; local SBGAP=3
            local sbTrack=Instance.new("Frame"); sbTrack.BackgroundColor3=C.base; sbTrack.BorderSizePixel=0; sbTrack.ZIndex=51; sbTrack.Visible=false; sbTrack.Parent=listContainer
            UIKit.corner(sbTrack,3)
            local sbThumb=Instance.new("Frame"); sbThumb.BackgroundColor3=C.slider; sbThumb.BackgroundTransparency=0.4; sbThumb.BorderSizePixel=0; sbThumb.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0.3,0); sbThumb.ZIndex=52; sbThumb.Parent=sbTrack; UIKit.corner(sbThumb,3)
            local function updateDdSB()
                if not panel.Visible then _ddp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,0); sbTrack.Visible=false; return end
                local contentH=ddScroll.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y; local visH=ddScroll.AbsoluteSize.Y
                if contentH<=visH+0.5 or visH<=0 then _ddp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,0); sbTrack.Visible=false; return end
                _ddp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,SBW+SBGAP+2)
                local fx=panel.Position.X.Offset; local fy=panel.Position.Y.Offset
                local fw=panel.Size.X.Offset; local fh=panel.Size.Y.Offset
                sbTrack.Position=UDim2.new(0,fx+fw-SBW-5,0,fy+2); sbTrack.Size=UDim2.new(0,SBW,0,fh-4); sbTrack.Visible=true
                local ratio=math.clamp(visH/contentH,0.1,1)
                local posR=ddScroll.CanvasPosition.Y/math.max(1,contentH-visH)
                sbThumb.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,ratio,0); sbThumb.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,posR*(1-ratio),0)
            end
            ddScroll:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(updateDdSB)
            ddScroll:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(updateDdSB)
            sbThumb.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
                if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
                plugin:Activate(false)
                local startY=uis:GetMouseLocation().Y; local startPos=ddScroll.CanvasPosition.Y
                local mc; mc=uis.InputChanged:Connect(function(ii)
                    if ii.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then return end
                    local dy=uis:GetMouseLocation().Y-startY
                    local contentH=ddScroll.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y; local visH=ddScroll.AbsoluteSize.Y
                    local sr=contentH/math.max(1,sbTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y)
                    ddScroll.CanvasPosition=Vector2.new(0,math.clamp(startPos+dy*sr,0,math.max(0,contentH-visH)))
                end)
                local ec; ec=uis.InputEnded:Connect(function(ii)
                    if ii.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return end
                    mc:Disconnect(); ec:Disconnect(); plugin:Deactivate()
                end)
            end)
            local optBtns={}
            local hoveredOpt=nil
            local sinkBox=Instance.new("TextBox"); sinkBox.Size=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0); sinkBox.BackgroundTransparency=1; sinkBox.Text=""; sinkBox.TextTransparency=1; sinkBox.ZIndex=53; sinkBox.ClearTextOnFocus=false; sinkBox.Parent=panel
            local function styleOpt(ob,instant)
                local function ap(pp) if instant then for k,v in pairs(pp) do ob[k]=v end else UIKit.twNow(ob,pp) end end
                if ob:GetAttribute("OptId")==cur then
                    ob.TextSize=13; ob.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold
                    ap({BackgroundColor3=(ob==hoveredOpt) and C.accent:Lerp(C.white,0.2) or C.accent, BackgroundTransparency=0, TextColor3=C.base})
                elseif ob==hoveredOpt then
                    ob.TextSize=11; ob.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium
                    ap({BackgroundColor3=C.base:Lerp(C.white,0.14), BackgroundTransparency=0, TextColor3=C.white})
                else
                    ob.TextSize=11; ob.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium
                    ap({BackgroundColor3=C.base, BackgroundTransparency=0, TextColor3=C.textDim})
                end
            end
            local function setHover(ob,on)
                if on then
                    if hoveredOpt and hoveredOpt~=ob then local _ph=hoveredOpt; hoveredOpt=nil; styleOpt(_ph) end
                    hoveredOpt=ob
                else if hoveredOpt==ob then hoveredOpt=nil end end
                styleOpt(ob)
            end
            local function restyleAll(instant) for _,ob in ipairs(optBtns) do styleOpt(ob,instant) end updReset() end
            restyle = restyleAll
            local function closeDd()
                ddOpen=false; tw(arr,{Rotation=0})
                panel.Visible=false; sbTrack.Visible=false
                pcall(function() sinkBox:ReleaseFocus() end)
                if ddOutConn then ddOutConn:Disconnect(); ddOutConn=nil end
            end
            for oi,o in ipairs(opts) do
                local ob=Instance.new("TextButton")
                ob.Size=UDim2.new(1,-6,0,DDR_H); ob.BackgroundColor3=C.base; ob.BackgroundTransparency=0; ob.AutoButtonColor=false
                ob.Text=o.t; ob.TextColor3=C.textDim; ob.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium
                ob.TextSize=11; ob.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
                ob.LayoutOrder=oi; ob.ZIndex=51; ob.Parent=ddScroll
                local op=Instance.new("UIPadding"); op.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,8); op.Parent=ob
                UIKit.corner(ob,5); ob:SetAttribute("OptId",o.id)
                ob.MouseEnter:Connect(function() setHover(ob,true) end)
                ob.MouseLeave:Connect(function() setHover(ob,false) end)
                ob.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                    cur=o.id; plugin:SetSetting(key,cur); cap.Text=o.t; hoveredOpt=nil; restyleAll(); closeDd(); if onChange then onChange(cur) end
                end)
                table.insert(optBtns,ob)
            end
            restyleAll(true)
            local ddH=#opts*DDR_H+math.max(0,#opts-1)*3+6
            local typeBuffer=""; local lastChar=""; local lastMatchIdx=0; local typeTimer
            local function jumpTo(ch)
                local isSame=ch==lastChar; lastChar=ch
                local function showAt(i,ob) lastMatchIdx=i; ddScroll.CanvasPosition=Vector2.new(0,math.max(0,(i-1)*DDR_H-(math.min(ddH,111)/2-DDR_H/2))); setHover(ob,true) end
                if isSame then
                    for k=1,#optBtns do local idx=(lastMatchIdx+k-1)%#optBtns+1; local ob=optBtns[idx]; if ob.Text:lower():sub(1,#ch)==ch then showAt(idx,ob); return end end
                else
                    for i,ob in ipairs(optBtns) do if ob.Text:lower():sub(1,#typeBuffer)==typeBuffer then showAt(i,ob); return end end
                end
            end
            sinkBox:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(function()
                local tx=sinkBox.Text; if tx=="" then return end
                local ch=tx:sub(-1):lower(); sinkBox.Text=""
                if not ddOpen then return end
                typeBuffer=typeBuffer..ch
                if typeTimer then task.cancel(typeTimer) end
                typeTimer=task.delay(1,function() typeBuffer=""; lastChar=""; lastMatchIdx=0 end)
                jumpTo(ch)
            end)
            local function placePanel()
                local _sc=(WinFactory.getUiScale and WinFactory.getUiScale()) or 1
                local bp2=btn.AbsolutePosition; local mp=listContainer.AbsolutePosition
                local w=btn.AbsoluteSize.X/_sc
                local ddH2=math.min(ddH,111)
                local xOff=(bp2.X-mp.X)/_sc
                local yDown=(bp2.Y-mp.Y+btn.AbsoluteSize.Y)/_sc+2
                local mainH=listContainer.AbsoluteSize.Y/_sc
                if yDown+ddH2<=mainH then
                    panel.Position=UDim2.new(0,xOff,0,yDown)
                else
                    panel.Position=UDim2.new(0,xOff,0,(bp2.Y-mp.Y)/_sc-ddH2-2)
                end
                panel.Size=UDim2.new(0,w,0,ddH2)
            end
            sc.list:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(function()
                if ddOpen then placePanel(); updateDdSB() end
            end)
            btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                if ddOpen then closeDd(); return end
                ddOpen=true
                placePanel()
                panel.Visible=true
                restyleAll(true); updateDdSB(); task.defer(updateDdSB); tw(arr,{Rotation=180})
                typeBuffer=""; lastChar=""; lastMatchIdx=0
                pcall(function() sinkBox:CaptureFocus() end)
                task.defer(function()
                    for i,ob in ipairs(optBtns) do if ob:GetAttribute("OptId")==cur then ddScroll.CanvasPosition=Vector2.new(0,math.max(0,(i-1)*(DDR_H+3)-30)); break end end
                end)
                if ddOutConn then ddOutConn:Disconnect() end
                ddOutConn=uis.InputBegan:Connect(function(inp)
                    if inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and inp.UserInputType~=Enum.UserInputType.Touch then return end
                    local m=uis:GetMouseLocation()
                    local function inside(g) local ap2=g.AbsolutePosition; local as=g.AbsoluteSize; return m.X>=ap2.X and m.X<=ap2.X+as.X and m.Y>=ap2.Y and m.Y<=ap2.Y+as.Y end
                    if inside(panel) or inside(btn) or inside(sbTrack) then return end
                    closeDd()
                end)
            end)        end

        -- ===== sections =====
        mkHeader("Emission")
        mkSlider("Repeat Timer", 0, 10, K_REPEAT, 0, 0.1, function(v) return v<=0 and "0" or string.format("%.1fs",v) end)
        mkHeader("Interface")
        mkSlider("Scale", 0.5, 2.0, K_SCALE, 1.0, 0.05, function(v) return string.format("%.2f",v) end, function(v) WinFactory.setUiScale(v); if WinFactory.onWindowSaved then WinFactory.onWindowSaved() end end)
        -- Round Corners moved to Theme "All Corners" (borderRadius)
        mkSlider("Display Order", 0, 30000, K_DORDER, 10000, 100, function(v) return tostring(math.floor(v+0.5)) end, function(v) WinFactory.setBaseDisplayOrder(v) end)
        -- Defer the layout auto-save past the knob tween: onWindowSaved snapshots + SetSettings the
        -- whole layouts table, and running that ~1 frame into the 6-frame slide made it stutter.
        mkToggle("Edge Margin", "SineVFX_edgeMarginOn", true, function(on) WinFactory.setEdgeMarginEnabled(on); task.delay(0.2, function() if WinFactory.onWindowSaved then WinFactory.onWindowSaved() end end) end)
        mkSlider("Margin Size", 0, 100, "SineVFX_edgeMargin", 5, 1, function(v) return tostring(math.floor(v+0.5)) end, function(v) WinFactory.setEdgeMargin(v); if WinFactory.onWindowSaved then WinFactory.onWindowSaved() end end)

        mkToggle("Auto-Hide", "SineVFX_hideWhenNoEmittable", false, function(on) if WinFactory.setHideWhenNoEmittable then WinFactory.setHideWhenNoEmittable(on) end end)        -- (Button Layout merged into Window Layout)

        mkHeader("Tooltips")
        mkToggle("Enabled", "SineVFX_tooltipsOn", true)
        mkSlider("Hover Delay", 0, 2, "SineVFX_tooltipDelay", 0.3, 0.05, function(v) return string.format("%.2fs", v) end)
        mkHeader("Themes")
        local IDS = ids or {}
        local DANGER2 = C.danger or C.accent
        local function styleReset(b)
            b.BackgroundColor3=C.base; b.AutoButtonColor=false; b.BorderSizePixel=0
            b.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; b.TextSize=12; b.TextColor3=C.textDim
            UIKit.corner(b,6)
            b.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(b,{TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(C.white,0.4)}) end)
            b.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(b,{TextColor3=C.textDim}) end)
        end
        local function styleGreyDisabled(b)  -- inert, greyed out, NO hover handlers
            b.BackgroundColor3=C.base; b.BackgroundTransparency=0.55; b.AutoButtonColor=false; b.Active=false; b.BorderSizePixel=0

        local function styleDanger(b)

            b.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; b.TextSize=12; b.TextColor3=DANGER2:Lerp(C.white,0.4); b:SetAttribute("SVFXdangertext",true)

                local function confirmDialog(title, message, confirmText, onConfirm)
            ctx.pendingConfirm = {title=title, message=message, confirmText=confirmText, onConfirm=onConfirm}
