                App:toggle(IDS.confirm)
            end
        end
        local themesBox=Instance.new("Frame"); themesBox.BackgroundTransparency=1; themesBox.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); themesBox.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.Y; themesBox.LayoutOrder=nextOrder(); themesBox.Parent=list
        local tbll=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); tbll.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; tbll.Padding=UDim.new(0,6); tbll.Parent=themesBox
        local tBtnRow=Instance.new("Frame"); tBtnRow.BackgroundTransparency=1; tBtnRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,20); tBtnRow.LayoutOrder=0; tBtnRow.Parent=themesBox
        local newBtn=Instance.new("TextButton"); newBtn.Text="New"; newBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0.5,-3,1,0); newBtn.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0); newBtn.Parent=tBtnRow; styleAccent(newBtn)
        local importBtn=Instance.new("TextButton"); importBtn.Text="Import"; importBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0.5,-3,1,0); importBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0); importBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); importBtn.Parent=tBtnRow; styleReset(importBtn)
        local rowsHolder=Instance.new("Frame"); rowsHolder.BackgroundTransparency=1; rowsHolder.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); rowsHolder.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.Y; rowsHolder.LayoutOrder=1; rowsHolder.Parent=themesBox
        local rhl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); rhl.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; rhl.Padding=UDim.new(0,6); rhl.Parent=rowsHolder
        local buildThemes, createAndEditNew
        local cards={}
        local function collapseAll() for _,cc in ipairs(cards) do cc.panel.Visible=false; cc.arrow.Rotation=0 end end
        local function addThemeCard(theme,isDefault,isActive)
            local card=Instance.new("Frame"); card.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); card.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.Y; card.BackgroundColor3=C.base; card.BorderSizePixel=0; card.Parent=rowsHolder
            UIKit.corner(card,8)
            local cl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); cl.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; cl.Padding=UDim.new(0,2); cl.Parent=card
            local header=Instance.new("TextButton"); header.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,25); header.BackgroundTransparency=1; header.Text=""; header.AutoButtonColor=false; header.LayoutOrder=0; header.Parent=card
            local nm=Instance.new("TextLabel"); nm.BackgroundTransparency=1; nm.Position=UDim2.new(0,12,0,0); nm.Size=UDim2.new(1,-80,1,0)
            nm.Text=theme.name; nm.TextColor3=C.text; nm.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; nm.TextSize=12
            nm.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; nm.TextTruncate=Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd; nm.Parent=header
            local arrow=Instance.new("ImageLabel"); arrow.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); arrow.Position=UDim2.new(1,-10,0.5,0); arrow.Size=UDim2.new(0,12,0,12)
            arrow.BackgroundTransparency=1; arrow.ImageColor3=C.text; arrow.Rotation=0; arrow.Parent=header
            if UIKit.setIconImage then UIKit.setIconImage(arrow,"116140507142780") else arrow.Image="rbxassetid://116140507142780" end
            -- toggle ON the header itself (no "Active" text)
            local tgl=UIKit.makeToggle(header,34,18,14)
            tgl.track.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); tgl.track.Position=UDim2.new(1,-30,0.5,0)
            tgl.setOn(isActive, C.loop)
            local isDefaultCard = isDefault or theme.name=="Default"
            tgl.button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                local activeName=ThemeStore.getActiveName()
                -- There must ALWAYS be exactly one active theme. active==nil OR "Default" both mean
                -- "Default is on". The Default card can't be switched OFF (clicking it while Default is
                -- already active is a no-op that just re-asserts it via refresh); it only does something
                -- when a CUSTOM theme is active, switching back to Default. So we never land on "all off".
                local defActive = (activeName==nil or activeName=="Default")
                -- IN-PLACE recolor (applyLive, ~3ms) instead of full remount (rebuilds ~3.7k
                -- instances = the lag). Dup collisions are fixed + outlines/toggles are tag-based +
                -- Properties axis buttons refresh via ctx.themeRefreshers, so in-place is now complete.
                -- full remount on switch: rebuilds windows from the real theme so switching
                -- can't leave value-match recolor glitches behind.
                if isDefaultCard then
                    if not defActive then ThemeStore.apply(nil) end
                else
                    if activeName==theme.name then ThemeStore.apply(nil)
                    else ThemeStore.apply(theme.name) end
                end
                -- Signal that the active theme changed EXTERNALLY (from Settings, not the editor's own
                -- debounced applyLive). An open Theme Editor watches applyCounter and closes on a bump so
                -- it can't silently overwrite the theme the user just switched to.
                ThemeStore.applyCounter = (ThemeStore.applyCounter or 0) + 1
                if ThemeStore.refresh then ThemeStore.refresh() end
            end)
            -- panel: surface frame with the Edit | Export | Delete action row
            local panel=Instance.new("Frame"); panel.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); panel.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.Y; panel.BackgroundTransparency=1; panel.LayoutOrder=1; panel.Visible=false; panel.Parent=card
            local panelPad=Instance.new("UIPadding"); panelPad.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,6); panelPad.Parent=panel
            local pinner=Instance.new("Frame"); pinner.BackgroundColor3=C.surface; pinner.BorderSizePixel=0; pinner.Position=UDim2.new(0,6,0,0); pinner.Size=UDim2.new(1,-12,0,0); pinner.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.Y; pinner.Parent=panel
            UIKit.corner(pinner,6)
            local pp=Instance.new("UIPadding"); pp.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,4); pp.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,4); pp.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,4); pp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,4); pp.Parent=pinner
            local actrow=Instance.new("Frame"); actrow.BackgroundTransparency=1; actrow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,20); actrow.Parent=pinner
            local actl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); actl.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal; actl.Padding=UDim.new(0,4); actl.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; actl.Parent=actrow
            local function col3(text,lo) local b=Instance.new("TextButton"); b.Size=UDim2.new(0.33333,-3,1,0); b.LayoutOrder=lo; b.Text=text; b.Parent=actrow; return b end
            local eb=col3("Edit",1); local xb=col3("Export",2); local db=col3("Delete",3)
            if isDefault then
                styleGreyDisabled(eb); styleReset(xb)  -- Default: Edit greyed out (read-only)
                xb.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() ctx.pendingExportRaw=nil; ctx.pendingExportTitle=nil; ThemeStore.pendingExport=theme; if IDS.export then App:toggle(IDS.export) end end)
                styleDisabled(db)
            else
                styleReset(xb)
                if ThemeStore.isBuiltin(theme.name) then
                    styleGreyDisabled(eb)  -- Default: Edit greyed out (read-only)
                else
                    styleReset(eb)
                    eb.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() ThemeStore.pendingNew=false; ThemeStore.pendingEdit=theme.name; if IDS.editor then App:toggle(IDS.editor) end end)
                end
                xb.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() ctx.pendingExportRaw=nil; ctx.pendingExportTitle=nil; ThemeStore.pendingExport=theme; if IDS.export then App:toggle(IDS.export) end end)
                if ThemeStore.isBuiltin(theme.name) then styleDisabled(db) else styleDanger(db); db.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() confirmDialog("Delete Theme", "Are you sure you want to delete the theme \""..theme.name.."\"?", "Delete", function()
                    local themes=ThemeStore.list(); local outl={}
                    for _,t in ipairs(themes) do if t.name~=theme.name then outl[#outl+1]=t end end
                    ThemeStore.saveList(outl)
                    if ThemeStore.getActiveName()==theme.name then ThemeStore.apply(nil) else buildThemes() end
                end) end) end
            end
            cards[#cards+1]={panel=panel, arrow=arrow}
            header.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                local willOpen=not panel.Visible
                collapseAll(); panel.Visible=willOpen; arrow.Rotation=willOpen and 180 or 0
            end)
        end
        buildThemes=function()
            if not rowsHolder.Parent then ThemeStore.refresh=nil; return end
            for _,ch in ipairs(rowsHolder:GetChildren()) do if ch:IsA("GuiObject") then ch:Destroy() end end
            cards={}
            local active=ThemeStore.getActiveName()
            local _list=ThemeStore.list()
            local _savedDef=nil; for _,t in ipairs(_list) do if t.name=="Default" then _savedDef=t; break end end
            local _defActive=(active==nil or active=="Default")
            if _savedDef then addThemeCard(_savedDef, false, _defActive) else addThemeCard({name="Default"}, true, _defActive) end
            for _,t in ipairs(_list) do if t.name~="Default" then addThemeCard(t, false, active==t.name) end end
        end
        createAndEditNew=function()
            local name=ThemeStore.uniqueName("New Theme")
            local themes=ThemeStore.list(); themes[#themes+1]={name=name,colors={},props={}}; ThemeStore.saveList(themes)
            ThemeStore.apply(name)  -- create it + use it
            ThemeStore.pendingNew=false; ThemeStore.pendingEdit=name
            if IDS.editor then App:toggle(IDS.editor) end
        end
        newBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() createAndEditNew() end)
        importBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() ctx.pendingImportFn=nil; ctx.pendingImportTitle=nil; if IDS.import then App:toggle(IDS.import) end end)
        ThemeStore.refresh=function() if buildThemes then buildThemes() end end
        buildThemes()

        -- ===== Window Layout (merged: Hub Corner + saved layouts) =====
        mkHeader("Window Layout")
        local lrow=Instance.new("Frame"); lrow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,20); lrow.BackgroundTransparency=1; lrow.LayoutOrder=nextOrder(); lrow.Parent=list
        local saveBtn=Instance.new("TextButton"); saveBtn.Text="Save"; saveBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0.5,-3,1,0); saveBtn.Position=UDim2.new(0,0,0,0); saveBtn.Parent=lrow; styleAccent(saveBtn)
        local limpBtn=Instance.new("TextButton"); limpBtn.Text="Import"; limpBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0.5,-3,1,0); limpBtn.Position=UDim2.new(0.5,3,0,0); limpBtn.Parent=lrow; styleReset(limpBtn)
        local lholder=Instance.new("Frame"); lholder.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); lholder.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.Y; lholder.BackgroundTransparency=1; lholder.LayoutOrder=nextOrder(); lholder.Parent=list
        local lhl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); lhl.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; lhl.Padding=UDim.new(0,6); lhl.Parent=lholder
        local buildLayouts; local lcards={}
        local lastLoaded={name=nil,t=0}  -- name+os.clock() of the just-Loaded layout, so a rebuilt card can re-flash
        local function lcollapseAll() for _,cc in ipairs(lcards) do cc.panel.Visible=false; cc.arrow.Rotation=0 end end
        local function layoutCard(layout)
            local isActive = LayoutStore.getActive()==layout.name
            local card=Instance.new("Frame"); card.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); card.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.Y; card.BackgroundColor3=C.base; card.BorderSizePixel=0; card.Parent=lholder
            UIKit.corner(card,8); local cardStroke=UIKit.makeBorder(card, C.border)
            -- Shared flash: bold accent outline pops in, fades to the normal border. `settle`
            -- delays the start so the post-load lag (window remount + re-theme) clears first,
            -- otherwise the tween renders into a frame-drop spike and isn't visible.
            local function flashStroke(settle)
                task.delay(settle or 0, function()
                    if not (cardStroke and cardStroke.Parent) then return end
                    cardStroke.Color=C.accent; cardStroke.Thickness=1; cardStroke.Transparency=0
                    UIKit.twNow(cardStroke,{Color=C.border,Thickness=1,Transparency=0.3},TweenInfo.new(0.7,Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,Enum.EasingDirection.Out))
                end)
            end
            -- if this card is for the layout that was just Loaded, flash its outline as it builds
            if lastLoaded.name==layout.name and (os.clock()-lastLoaded.t)<1.2 then
                flashStroke(0.1)
            end
            local cl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); cl.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; cl.Padding=UDim.new(0,2); cl.Parent=card
            local header=Instance.new("TextButton"); header.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,25); header.BackgroundTransparency=1; header.Text=""; header.AutoButtonColor=false; header.LayoutOrder=0; header.Parent=card
            local nm=Instance.new("TextBox"); nm.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); nm.Position=UDim2.new(0,8,0.5,0); nm.Size=UDim2.new(1,-84,0,20)
            nm.BackgroundColor3=C.surface; nm.BackgroundTransparency=1; nm.ClearTextOnFocus=false; nm.ClipsDescendants=true; nm.ZIndex=6
            nm.Text=layout.name; nm.TextColor3=C.text; nm.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; nm.TextSize=12; nm.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; nm.TextTruncate=Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd; nm.Parent=header
            local nmPad=Instance.new("UIPadding"); nmPad.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,4); nmPad.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,4); nmPad.Parent=nm
            UIKit.corner(nm,5); local nmStroke=UIKit.makeBorder(nm,C.border); nmStroke.Transparency=1
            -- Default is immutable: its name is read-only, so clicks fall through to the header (expand still works).
            if layout.name=="Default" then nm.TextEditable=false; nm.Active=false end
            nm.Focused:Connect(function()
                if layout.name=="Default" then nm:ReleaseFocus(); return end
                nmStroke.Color=C.accent; nmStroke.Transparency=0
            end)
            nm.FocusLost:Connect(function(enterPressed)
                nmStroke.Transparency=1; nmStroke.Color=C.border
                local old=layout.name
                local ok,res=LayoutStore.rename(old, nm.Text)
                if ok and res~=old then
                    layout.name=res  -- keep this card's captured name in sync for its Load/Export/Delete handlers
                    -- Defer the rebuild: if the rename was committed by CLICKING Load/Export/Delete (which
                    -- releases focus -> fires this FocusLost), rebuilding synchronously would Destroy those
                    -- buttons before their MouseButton1Click resolves, swallowing the click. Deferring lets
                    -- the in-flight click land first; buildLayouts guards on lholder.Parent so it's safe.
                    if LayoutStore.refresh then task.defer(function() if LayoutStore.refresh then LayoutStore.refresh() end end) end
                else
                    nm.Text=layout.name  -- rejected (empty / duplicate / Default) or unchanged: revert to stored name
                end
            end)
            local arrow=Instance.new("ImageLabel"); arrow.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); -- arrow shifted left to make room for Load button
            arrow.Position=UDim2.new(1,-10,0.5,0); arrow.Size=UDim2.new(0,12,0,12)
            arrow.BackgroundTransparency=1; arrow.ImageColor3=C.text; arrow.Rotation=0; arrow.Parent=header
            if UIKit.setIconImage then UIKit.setIconImage(arrow,"116140507142780") else arrow.Image="rbxassetid://116140507142780" end
            local loadBtn=Instance.new("TextButton")
            loadBtn.Size=UDim2.new(0,36,0,15); loadBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5)
            loadBtn.Position=UDim2.new(1,-28,0.5,0); loadBtn.ZIndex=5; loadBtn.Parent=header
            loadBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; loadBtn.BorderSizePixel=0; loadBtn.Text="Load"
            loadBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; loadBtn.TextSize=11
            loadBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; loadBtn.TextColor3=C.base
            UIKit.corner(loadBtn,5)
            loadBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(loadBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(C.white,0.14)}) end)
            loadBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(loadBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent}) end)
            loadBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                -- remember which layout was loaded so a REBUILT card (if the list refreshes
                -- during load) can re-run the flash; covers both survive + rebuild cases
                lastLoaded.name=layout.name; lastLoaded.t=os.clock()
                LayoutStore.setActive(layout.name)
                -- do the heavy window reshuffle FIRST (it hitches a frame); pcall so an
                -- error can't skip the flash

                flashStroke(0.12)
            end)
            local panel=Instance.new("Frame"); panel.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,0); panel.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.Y; panel.BackgroundTransparency=1; panel.LayoutOrder=1; panel.Visible=false; panel.Parent=card
            local panelPad=Instance.new("UIPadding"); panelPad.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,6); panelPad.Parent=panel
            local pinner=Instance.new("Frame"); pinner.BackgroundColor3=C.surface; pinner.BorderSizePixel=0; pinner.Position=UDim2.new(0,6,0,0); pinner.Size=UDim2.new(1,-12,0,0); pinner.AutomaticSize=Enum.AutomaticSize.Y; pinner.Parent=panel
            UIKit.corner(pinner,6)
            local pp=Instance.new("UIPadding"); pp.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,4); pp.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,4); pp.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,4); pp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,4); pp.Parent=pinner
            local actrow=Instance.new("Frame"); actrow.BackgroundTransparency=1; actrow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,20); actrow.Parent=pinner
            local actl=Instance.new("UIListLayout"); actl.FillDirection=Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal; actl.Padding=UDim.new(0,4); actl.SortOrder=Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder; actl.Parent=actrow
            local function col2(text,lo) local b=Instance.new("TextButton"); b.Size=UDim2.new(0.5,-2,1,0); b.LayoutOrder=lo; b.Text=text; b.Parent=actrow; return b end
            local xb=col2("Export",1); styleReset(xb)
            local db=col2("Delete",2)
            xb.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() ctx.pendingExportRaw=LayoutStore.export(layout); ctx.pendingExportTitle="Export Layout - "..layout.name; if IDS.export then App:toggle(IDS.export) end end)
            if layout.name=="Default" then styleDisabled(db) else styleDanger(db); db.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() confirmDialog("Delete Layout", "Are you sure you want to delete the layout \""..layout.name.."\"?", "Delete", function() if LayoutStore.getActive()==layout.name then LayoutStore.setActive("Default") end; LayoutStore.delete(layout.name); buildLayouts() end) end) end
            lcards[#lcards+1]={panel=panel, arrow=arrow}
            header.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                local willOpen=not panel.Visible
                lcollapseAll(); panel.Visible=willOpen; arrow.Rotation=willOpen and 180 or 0
            end)
        end
        buildLayouts=function()
            if not lholder.Parent then return end

        mkDropdown("Transform Pos", {{id="TL",t="Top Left"},{id="TR",t="Top Right"},{id="BL",t="Bottom Left"},{id="BR",t="Bottom Right"}}, "SineVFX_transformCorner", "TL")

        mkDropdown("Counter Pos", {{id="TL",t="Top Left"},{id="TC",t="Top Center"},{id="TR",t="Top Right"},{id="CL",t="Center Left"},{id="CR",t="Center Right"},{id="BL",t="Bottom Left"},{id="BC",t="Bottom Center"},{id="BR",t="Bottom Right"}}, "SineVFX_pcCorner", "BC")

        mkHeader("Reset")
        local allRow=Instance.new("TextButton"); allRow.Size=UDim2.new(1,0,0,28); allRow.LayoutOrder=nextOrder(); allRow.Parent=list
        allRow.BackgroundColor3=C.danger; allRow.AutoButtonColor=false; allRow.Text="Reset Everything"; allRow.TextColor3=DANGER2:Lerp(C.white,0.4)
        allRow.BackgroundTransparency=0.5; allRow.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; allRow.TextSize=12; allRow.BorderSizePixel=0
        UIKit.corner(allRow,6)
        allRow.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(allRow,{BackgroundTransparency=0.35}) end)
        allRow.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(allRow,{BackgroundTransparency=0.5}) end)
        local armed=false; local armToken=0
        local function disarm() armed=false; allRow.Text="Reset Everything"; tw(allRow,{BackgroundColor3=C.base}) end
        allRow.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            confirmDialog("Reset Everything", "Reset ALL SineVFX settings (themes, layouts, positions, everything)? This cannot be undone.", "Reset Everything", function()

                if ThemeStore.seedPresets then ThemeStore.seedPresets() end  -- wipe cleared the theme list + version key; re-seed the built-in presets so they come back

                if ThemeStore.refresh then ThemeStore.refresh() end  -- rebuild the theme cards so the re-seeded presets show immediately
            end)
        end)
        -- ── About: version + update state ─────────────────────────────────
        -- Sits under Reset as the last thing in the list. ctx.version is the single source of
        -- truth (Main), and ctx.updateState is filled in by the update check at startup.
        mkHeader("About")
        do
            local row,bg=newCard(28)
            local name=Instance.new("TextLabel"); name.BackgroundTransparency=1
            name.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,0.5); name.Position=UDim2.new(0,6,0.5,0); name.Size=UDim2.new(0,NAMEW,1,0)
            name.Text="Version"; name.TextColor3=C.textDim; name.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; name.TextSize=13
            name.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; name.Parent=bg
            local val=Instance.new("TextLabel"); val.BackgroundTransparency=1
            val.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(1,0.5); val.Position=UDim2.new(1,-8,0.5,0); val.Size=UDim2.new(1,-(NAMEW+18),1,0)
            val.TextColor3=C.text; val.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; val.TextSize=13
            val.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Right; val.TextTruncate=Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd; val.Parent=bg
            local function refreshVersion()
                local v = (ctx.version and ctx.version()) or "?"
                local st = ctx.updateState and ctx.updateState() or nil
                if st and st.latest and st.behind then
                    val.Text = "v"..v.."  ->  v"..st.latest.." available"
                    val.TextColor3 = C.accent
                elseif st and st.checking then
                    val.Text = "v"..v.."  (checking...)"
                    val.TextColor3 = C.textDim
                else
                    val.Text = "v"..v
                    val.TextColor3 = C.text
                end
            end
            refreshVersion()
            if ctx.onUpdateState then ctx.onUpdateState(refreshVersion) end
        end
        -- (bottom spacer removed -- top/bottom margins balanced)

        -- Height auto-fits to content by DEFAULT, but the moment the user manually RESIZES the window
        -- we flip to "manual" mode: Settings becomes freely resizable and its height saves/restores
        -- like any other window (fixes "Settings height doesn't save"). The flag persists across reloads.
        local K_MANUAL_H = "SineVFX_settingsManualH"
        local manualH = plugin:GetSetting(K_MANUAL_H) == true
        main:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(function()
            -- only a real resize (drag on a handle) has activeHandles -> win.isResizing(); a move doesn't
            if not manualH and win.isResizing() then manualH = true; plugin:SetSetting(K_MANUAL_H, true) end
        end)
        local function fitMax()
            local sc_ui=(WinFactory.getUiScale and WinFactory.getUiScale()) or 1
            local ch=sc.layout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y/sc_ui + lpad.PaddingTop.Offset + lpad.PaddingBottom.Offset
            if ch<=0 then return end
            local content=TOPBAR_H + GAP*2 + ch
            -- CLAMP the max height to content: once everything fits (scrollbar gone) there's no reason
            -- to grow taller, so the resize handles stop there (the resize heartbeat caps nH at MAX_H).
            win.setMaxH(content)
            if not win.isResizing() then
                local curH = main.AbsoluteSize.Y/sc_ui
                -- default mode: auto-fit UP to content; ANY mode: clamp DOWN if a stale/manual height
                -- exceeds content (never leave empty space below the last row). Manual + shorter than
                -- content is left alone (user's chosen height; the list scrolls).
                if (not manualH and math.abs(curH - content) > 0.5) or curH > content + 0.5 then
                    main.Size=UDim2.new(0,main.AbsoluteSize.X/sc_ui,0,content); win.currentSize.h=content
                end
            end
        end
        sc.layout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(function() task.defer(fitMax) end)
        task.defer(fitMax)
    end
    local function unmount() cleanup() end
    return {mount=mount, unmount=unmount, isOpen=isOpen}
end

-- ImportThemeWindow: paste a SineVFX theme code -> adds it to the saved list.
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory, ThemeStore, ids)
	local C=Theme.C; local tw=UIKit.tw
	local plugin=ctx.plugin; local coreGui=ctx.coreGui; local uis=ctx.userInputService
	local WIN_W=320; local TOPBAR_H=25; local WIN_H=94; local GAP=8
	local gui=nil; local isPinned=false
	local function cleanup() if gui then gui:Destroy(); gui=nil end isPinned=false end
	local function isOpen() return gui~=nil and gui.Parent~=nil end

	local function mount(App, WIN_ID)
		cleanup()
		isPinned = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ImportTheme")==true
		gui=Instance.new("ScreenGui"); gui.Name="SineVFX_ImportTheme"
		gui.ResetOnSpawn=false; gui.ZIndexBehavior=Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
		gui.DisplayOrder=10010; gui.Parent=coreGui
		local win=WinFactory.new({ stateKey="ImportTheme", gui=gui, name="ImportThemeWrapper",
			w=WIN_W,h=WIN_H,pos=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.45,0), minW=260,maxW=420,minH=WIN_H,maxH=WIN_H, noYResize=true,
			topbarH=TOPBAR_H, getPinned=function() return isPinned end })
		local main=win.main; local bgFrame=win.bgFrame; local topbar=win.topbar
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(topbar, "Paste a theme code to import it.") end
		local importFn=ctx.pendingImportFn; local importTitle=ctx.pendingImportTitle; ctx.pendingImportFn=nil; ctx.pendingImportTitle=nil

		local titleLbl=Instance.new("TextLabel"); titleLbl.Size=UDim2.new(1,-60,1,0); titleLbl.Position=UDim2.new(0,12,0,0)
		titleLbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; titleLbl.Text=importTitle or "Import Theme"; titleLbl.TextColor3=C.text
		titleLbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; titleLbl.TextSize=13; titleLbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
		titleLbl.ZIndex=6; titleLbl.Parent=topbar
		local pinBtn,pinIcon=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"120413064155653",-48,15)
		local closeBtn,_=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"101421401454601",-26,10)
		pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			isPinned=not isPinned; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ImportTheme",isPinned)
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",isPinned); tw(pinIcon,{ImageColor3=isPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim})
		end)
		if isPinned then pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",true); pinIcon.ImageColor3=C.Pinned end
		closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() App:toggle(WIN_ID) end)
		win.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
			local col=focused and C.text or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			local ic=focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			task.defer(function()
				for _,ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
					if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end
					if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch,{TextColor3=col}) end
					if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then tw(ch,{ImageColor3=ic}) end
				end
			end)
		end)

		local box=Instance.new("TextBox")
		box.Position=UDim2.new(0,GAP,0,TOPBAR_H+GAP); box.Size=UDim2.new(1,-GAP*2,0,20)
		box.BackgroundColor3=C.base; box.BorderSizePixel=0; box.ClearTextOnFocus=false
		box.MultiLine=true; box.TextWrapped=true; box.ClipsDescendants=false
		box.Text=""; box.PlaceholderText="Paste theme code here"; box.PlaceholderColor3=C.textDim
		box.Font=Enum.Font.RobotoMono; box.TextSize=14; box.TextColor3=C.text
		box.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Center; box.TextYAlignment=Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
		box.Parent=bgFrame
		local bp=Instance.new("UIPadding"); bp.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,8); bp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,8); bp.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,6); bp.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,6); bp.Parent=box
		UIKit.corner(box,6)

		local status=Instance.new("TextLabel"); status.BackgroundTransparency=1
		status.Position=UDim2.new(0,GAP,0,TOPBAR_H+GAP); status.Size=UDim2.new(1,-GAP*2,0,20); status.ZIndex=10
		status.Text=""; status.TextColor3=C.danger; status.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; status.TextSize=11
		status.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Center; status.TextYAlignment=Enum.TextYAlignment.Center; status.TextWrapped=true; status.Parent=bgFrame

		local impBtn=Instance.new("TextButton"); impBtn.AnchorPoint=Vector2.new(0,1)
		impBtn.Position=UDim2.new(0,GAP,1,-GAP); impBtn.Size=UDim2.new(1,-GAP*2,0,25)
		impBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; impBtn.AutoButtonColor=false; impBtn.BorderSizePixel=0
		impBtn.Text="Import"; impBtn.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; impBtn.TextSize=12; impBtn.TextColor3=C.base
		impBtn.Parent=bgFrame; UIKit.corner(impBtn,6)
		impBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(impBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1),0.15)}) end)
		impBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(impBtn,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent}) end)
		impBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if importFn then local ok,e=importFn(box.Text); if not ok then status.TextColor3=C.danger; status.Text=e or "Invalid"; return end; App:toggle(WIN_ID); return end
			local t,err=ThemeStore.import(box.Text)
			if not t then status.TextColor3=C.danger; status.Text=err or "Invalid"; return end
			t.name=ThemeStore.uniqueName(t.name)
			local themes=ThemeStore.list(); themes[#themes+1]={name=t.name, colors=t.colors, props=t.props}; ThemeStore.saveList(themes)
			if ThemeStore.refresh then ThemeStore.refresh() end
			App:toggle(WIN_ID)
		end)
	end
	return { mount=mount, unmount=cleanup, isOpen=isOpen }
end

-- ExportThemeWindow: shows ThemeStore.pendingExport as a copyable code string.
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory, ThemeStore, ids)
	local C=Theme.C; local tw=UIKit.tw
	local plugin=ctx.plugin; local coreGui=ctx.coreGui; local uis=ctx.userInputService; local runService=ctx.runService
	local WIN_W=320; local TOPBAR_H=25; local WIN_H=61; local GAP=8
	local gui=nil; local isPinned=false
	local function cleanup() if gui then gui:Destroy(); gui=nil end isPinned=false end
	local function isOpen() return gui~=nil and gui.Parent~=nil end

	local function mount(App, WIN_ID)
		cleanup()
		isPinned = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ExportTheme")==true
		gui=Instance.new("ScreenGui"); gui.Name="SineVFX_ExportTheme"
		gui.ResetOnSpawn=false; gui.ZIndexBehavior=Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
		gui.DisplayOrder=10011; gui.Parent=coreGui
		local win=WinFactory.new({ stateKey="ExportTheme", gui=gui, name="ExportThemeWrapper",
			w=WIN_W,h=WIN_H,pos=UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.45,0), minW=260,maxW=420,minH=WIN_H,maxH=WIN_H, noYResize=true,
			topbarH=TOPBAR_H, getPinned=function() return isPinned end })
		local main=win.main; local bgFrame=win.bgFrame; local topbar=win.topbar
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(topbar, "Copy this theme's code to share it.") end

		local rawCode=ctx.pendingExportRaw; local rawTitle=ctx.pendingExportTitle; ctx.pendingExportRaw=nil; ctx.pendingExportTitle=nil
		local theme=ThemeStore.pendingExport
		local code = rawCode or (theme and ThemeStore.export(theme)) or ""

		local titleLbl=Instance.new("TextLabel"); titleLbl.Size=UDim2.new(1,-60,1,0); titleLbl.Position=UDim2.new(0,12,0,0)
		titleLbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; titleLbl.Text=rawTitle or ("Export Theme"..(theme and (" - "..theme.name) or ""))
		titleLbl.TextColor3=C.text; titleLbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; titleLbl.TextSize=13
		titleLbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; titleLbl.TextTruncate=Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd; titleLbl.ZIndex=6; titleLbl.Parent=topbar
		local pinBtn,pinIcon=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"120413064155653",-48,15)
		local closeBtn,_=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"101421401454601",-26,10)
		pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			isPinned=not isPinned; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ExportTheme",isPinned)
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",isPinned); tw(pinIcon,{ImageColor3=isPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim})
		end)
		if isPinned then pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",true); pinIcon.ImageColor3=C.Pinned end
		closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() App:toggle(WIN_ID) end)
		win.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
			local col=focused and C.text or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			local ic=focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			task.defer(function()
				for _,ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
					if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end
					if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch,{TextColor3=col}) end
					if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then tw(ch,{ImageColor3=ic}) end
				end
			end)
		end)

		-- (Ctrl+C hint removed)

		local box=Instance.new("TextBox")
		box.Position=UDim2.new(0,GAP,0,TOPBAR_H+GAP); box.Size=UDim2.new(1,-GAP*2,0,20)
		box.BackgroundColor3=C.base; box.BorderSizePixel=0; box.ClearTextOnFocus=false
		box.MultiLine=true; box.TextWrapped=true; box.ClipsDescendants=false
		box.Text=code; box.Font=Enum.Font.RobotoMono; box.TextSize=14; box.TextColor3=C.text
		box.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Center; box.TextYAlignment=Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
		box.Parent=bgFrame
		local bp=Instance.new("UIPadding"); bp.PaddingLeft=UDim.new(0,8); bp.PaddingRight=UDim.new(0,8); bp.PaddingTop=UDim.new(0,6); bp.PaddingBottom=UDim.new(0,6); bp.Parent=box
		UIKit.corner(box,6)

		-- keep the code intact (read-only feel) + auto-select-all on focus for easy copy
		box:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(function() if box.Text~=code then box.Text=code end end)
		box.Focused:Connect(function()
			local conn; conn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
				if not box:IsFocused() then if conn then conn:Disconnect() end return end
				if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
					box.CursorPosition=#box.Text+1; box.SelectionStart=1
					if conn then conn:Disconnect() end
				end
			end)
		end)
	end
	return { mount=mount, unmount=cleanup, isOpen=isOpen }
end

-- ThemeEditorWindow v7: auto-sizing value frames, live apply (edits change the theme immediately),
-- font-family dropdown (shown in its own font, weight preserved), dropdown above windows.
return function(ctx, Theme, UIKit, WinFactory, ThemeStore, ids)
	local C=Theme.C; local tw=UIKit.tw; local twNow=UIKit.twNow or UIKit.tw
	local plugin=ctx.plugin; local coreGui=ctx.coreGui; local uis=ctx.userInputService; local runService=ctx.runService
	ids = ids or {}
	local GAP=6; local WIN_W=320; local TOPBAR_H=25; local WIN_H=470; local BH=25
	local NAMEWRAP_H=59; local BBAR_H=BH
	local SCROLL_OFF = TOPBAR_H + GAP + NAMEWRAP_H + GAP + GAP + BBAR_H + GAP
	local DDR_H=24
	local FONT_OPTS={}; for _,f in ipairs(ThemeStore.FONT_FAMILIES) do FONT_OPTS[#FONT_OPTS+1]=f.label end

	local SECTIONS = {
		{ title="Tabs",           fields={ {color="base"},{prop="baseTransparency"},{color="windowBg"},{prop="bgTransparency"},{color="header"},{prop="topbarTransparency"} } },
		{ title="Panels & Content",  fields={ {color="CurveBG"},{prop="curveBgTransparency"},{prop="propFieldColor"},{prop="propFieldTransparency"} } },
		{ title="Buttons & Surfaces",fields={ {color="surface"},{prop="surfaceTransparency"},{color="loop"},{prop="toggleOffColor"},{prop="toggleKnobOnColor"},{prop="toggleKnobOffColor"} } },
		{ title="Hub",               fields={ {color="hub"},{prop="hubTransparency"} } },
		{ title="Accent",            fields={ {color="accent"},{prop="accentTransparency"},{color="slider"},{color="handle"},{color="Pinned"} } },
		{ title="Text & Fonts",      fields={ {color="text"},{prop="textTransparency"},{color="textDim"},{color="white"},{prop="font"},{prop="textScale"} } },
		{ title="Outlines",          fields={ {color="border"},{prop="dropdownBorderColor"} } },
		{ title="Corners",           fields={ {prop="borderRadius"},{prop="windowCorners"},{prop="cardCorners"},{prop="buttonCorners"},{prop="toggleCorners"} } },
		{ title="Status Colors",     fields={ {color="rep"},{color="repet"},{color="repet2"},{color="danger"} } },
		{ title="3D Axis (Vector3)", fields={ {color="axisX"},{color="axisY"},{color="axisZ"} } },
		{ title="Background Image",  fields={ {prop="bgImage"},{prop="imageColor"},{prop="imageFit"},{prop="tileSize"},{prop="imageStatic"},{prop="imageTransparency"} } },

	}
		local PROPDEF = {}; for _,p in ipairs(ThemeStore.PROPS) do PROPDEF[p.key]=p end

	local gui=nil; local isPinned=false
	local function cleanup() if gui then gui:Destroy(); gui=nil end isPinned=false end
	local function isOpen() return gui~=nil and gui.Parent~=nil end
	local function defaultStrings() local t={} for _,k in ipairs(ThemeStore.KEYS) do t[k]=ThemeStore.c2s(ThemeStore.DEFAULT[k]) end return t end
	local function fmtNum(v) local s=string.format("%.2f", v); if s:find("%.") then s=s:gsub("0+$",""):gsub("%.$","") end return s end
	local function optFontFor(label) local f=ThemeStore.fontFamily(label); return f and (f.bold or f.reg) or Enum.Font.GothamBold end

	local nameBoxRef
	local function mount(App, WIN_ID)
		cleanup()
		isPinned = plugin:GetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ThemeEditor")==true
		gui=Instance.new("ScreenGui"); gui.Name="SineVFX_ThemeEditor"
		gui.ResetOnSpawn=false; gui.ZIndexBehavior=Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
		gui.DisplayOrder=10008; gui.Parent=coreGui

		-- Resolve the theme being edited and ACTIVATE it BEFORE building any UI. rethemeRemount
		-- (fired by apply) skips the OPEN editor, so if the editor built with the previously-active
		-- palette it would stay stuck on the old theme while every other window switched -- exactly the
		-- "editor uses the previous theme, other windows use the new one" bug. Building AFTER apply()
		-- means the editor's own window renders in the edited theme too.
		local isNew = ThemeStore.pendingNew==true; ThemeStore.pendingNew=false
		local editName = ThemeStore.pendingEdit
		local cur, curOrig
		if isNew then cur={ name=ThemeStore.uniqueName("New Theme"), colors=defaultStrings(), props=ThemeStore.resolveProps({}) }; curOrig=nil
		else
			local found=nil
			if editName then for _,t in ipairs(ThemeStore.list()) do if t.name==editName then found=t; break end end end
			if found then
				cur={ name=found.name, colors={}, props=ThemeStore.resolveProps(found) }
				for _,k in ipairs(ThemeStore.KEYS) do cur.colors[k]=(found.colors and found.colors[k]) or ThemeStore.c2s(ThemeStore.DEFAULT[k]) end
				curOrig=found.name
			else cur={ name=editName or "New Theme", colors=defaultStrings(), props=ThemeStore.resolveProps({}) }; curOrig=editName end
		end
		-- snapshot for Cancel/revert
		local wasActive=ThemeStore.getActiveName(); local wasNew=(curOrig==nil)
		local snapName=cur.name; local snapColors={}; for k,v in pairs(cur.colors) do snapColors[k]=v end
		local snapProps={}; for k,v in pairs(cur.props) do snapProps[k]=v end
		if isNew or wasActive ~= cur.name then ThemeStore.applyLive(cur.name) end

		local win=WinFactory.new({ stateKey="ThemeEditor", gui=gui, name="ThemeEditorWrapper",
			w=WIN_W,h=WIN_H,pos=UDim2.new(0.5,40,0.42,0), minW=20,maxW=470,minH=20,maxH=700,
			topbarH=TOPBAR_H, getPinned=function() return isPinned end })
		local main=win.main; local bgFrame=win.bgFrame; local topbar=win.topbar
		local PANELBG = C.CurveBG

		local function persist()
			if cur and ThemeStore.isBuiltin(cur.name) then return end  -- Default theme is read-only
			cur.name=(nameBoxRef and nameBoxRef.Text~="" and nameBoxRef.Text) or cur.name
			local themes=ThemeStore.list()
			-- a rename must not collide with another theme's name (or "Default")
			for _,t in ipairs(themes) do
				if t.name==cur.name and curOrig~=cur.name then
					cur.name=ThemeStore.uniqueName(cur.name)
					if nameBoxRef then nameBoxRef.Text=cur.name end
					break
				end
			end
			if cur.name=="Default" and curOrig~="Default" then
				cur.name=ThemeStore.uniqueName(cur.name)
				if nameBoxRef then nameBoxRef.Text=cur.name end
			end
			if curOrig then
				local found=false
				for i,t in ipairs(themes) do if t.name==curOrig then themes[i]={name=cur.name,colors=cur.colors,props=cur.props}; found=true; break end end
				if not found then themes[#themes+1]={name=cur.name,colors=cur.colors,props=cur.props} end
			else themes[#themes+1]={name=cur.name,colors=cur.colors,props=cur.props} end
			ThemeStore.saveList(themes); curOrig=cur.name
		end
		-- live apply (debounced): edits change the theme immediately, no Apply click needed
		local refreshCond
		local liveTok=0
		local function liveApply()
			if cur and ThemeStore.isBuiltin(cur.name) then if refreshCond then refreshCond() end return end  -- Default is read-only
			if refreshCond then refreshCond() end
			liveTok+=1; local my=liveTok
			-- fast live preview (in-place recolor) while you're editing / dragging
			task.delay(0.06, function() if my~=liveTok then return end persist(); ThemeStore.applyLive(cur.name) end)
			-- (recolor now caches each element's resolved theme key -- see Main recolorGui --
			-- so re-edits/reverts are correct without a heavy full remount here.)

		end

		local function styleReset(b)
			b.BackgroundColor3=C.base; b.AutoButtonColor=false; b.BorderSizePixel=0
			b.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; b.TextSize=12; b.TextColor3=C.textDim
			UIKit.corner(b,6)
			b.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(b,{TextColor3=C.textDim:Lerp(C.white,0.4)}) end)
			b.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(b,{TextColor3=C.textDim}) end)
		end
		local function styleAccent(b)
			b.BackgroundColor3=C.accent; b.AutoButtonColor=false; b.BorderSizePixel=0
			b.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; b.TextSize=12; b.TextColor3=C.base; UIKit.corner(b,6)
			b.MouseEnter:Connect(function() tw(b,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent:Lerp(C.white,0.14)}) end)
			b.MouseLeave:Connect(function() tw(b,{BackgroundColor3=C.accent}) end)
		end
		local function selectAllOnFocus(box)
			box.Focused:Connect(function()
				local conn; conn=runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
					if not uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
						if conn then conn:Disconnect(); conn=nil end
						if box:IsFocused() then box.SelectionStart=1; box.CursorPosition=#box.Text+1 end
					end
				end)
			end)
		end

		-- chrome
		local titleLbl=Instance.new("TextLabel"); titleLbl.Size=UDim2.new(1,-60,1,0); titleLbl.Position=UDim2.new(0,12,0,0)
		titleLbl.BackgroundTransparency=1; titleLbl.Text="Theme Editor"; titleLbl.TextColor3=C.text
		if UIKit.attachTooltip then UIKit.attachTooltip(titleLbl, "Edit this theme's colors.") end
		titleLbl.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold; titleLbl.TextSize=13; titleLbl.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; titleLbl.ZIndex=6; titleLbl.Parent=topbar
		local pinBtn,pinIcon=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"120413064155653",-48,15)
		local closeBtn,_=UIKit.makeTopBtn(topbar,"101421401454601",-26,10)
		pinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			isPinned=not isPinned; plugin:SetSetting("SineVFX_pinned_ThemeEditor",isPinned)
			pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",isPinned); tw(pinIcon,{ImageColor3=isPinned and C.Pinned or C.textDim})
		end)
		if isPinned then pinBtn:SetAttribute("PinnedActive",true); pinIcon.ImageColor3=C.Pinned end
		closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function() App:toggle(WIN_ID) end)
		win.setFocusCallback(function(focused)
			local col=focused and C.text or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			local ic=focused and C.textDim or C.textDim:Lerp(Color3.new(0,0,0),0.15)
			local pc=focused and C.Pinned or C.Pinned
			task.defer(function()
				for _,ch in ipairs(topbar:GetDescendants()) do
					if ch:GetAttribute("NoFocusTint") then continue end
					if ch:IsA("TextLabel") then tw(ch,{TextColor3=col}) end
					if ch:IsA("ImageLabel") then tw(ch,{ImageColor3=ch.Parent and ch.Parent:GetAttribute("PinnedActive") and pc or ic}) end
				end
			end)
		end)

		-- name section
		local nameWrap=Instance.new("Frame"); nameWrap.BackgroundColor3=C.base; nameWrap.BorderSizePixel=0

			local function updateDdSB()

			local optBtns={}; local hoveredOpt=nil; local closeDd

				ob.Text=opt; ob.TextColor3=C.textDim; ob.Font=Enum.Font.GothamMedium; ob.TextSize=11; ob.TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left; ob.LayoutOrder=oi; ob.ZIndex=121; ob.Parent=ddScroll

				if ch==lastChar then for n=1,#optBtns do local idx=(lastMatchIdx+n-1)%#optBtns+1; if optBtns[idx].Text:lower():sub(1,#ch)==ch then lastMatchIdx=idx; show(idx); return end end
				else lastChar=ch; for i,ob in ipairs(optBtns) do if ob.Text:lower():sub(1,#typeBuffer)==typeBuffer then lastMatchIdx=i; show(i); return end end end
			end

					if inside(ddFrame) or inside(vpBtn) or inside(sbTrack) then return end; closeDd() end)
				task.defer(function() local cur2=cap.Text; for i,ob in ipairs(optBtns) do if ob.Text==cur2 then ddScroll.CanvasPosition=Vector2.new(0,math.max(0,(i-1)*(DDR+3)-30)); break end end end)
			end)

		local function addSizeField(parent, def)

			local function fmt(v) local a,b=tostring(v):match("(%d+)%s*,%s*(%d+)"); if not a then local n=tostring(v):match("%d+"); a=n or "128"; b=a end; return a..", "..b end

		local condFns = {}

		local function addField(parent, f)
			if f.color then return addColorField(parent, f.color) end
